4742090.short_description: Tidy Backpack: In the Faraway Lands is a relaxing puzzle game where you must organize found futuristic loot in your backpack in a tidy way. Find unknown artifacts and learn details about the faraway lands... at least supposedly!

3735680.title: The Rise of the Dark Tower
3735680.short_description: Climb the twisted Tower in this dark fantasy roguelite action game. Rescue villagers, face mysterious evils, and master skill-based combat. With challenging floors, randomized loot, and fierce bosses, every run offers new challenges and unique builds to conquer.

4164030.title: Super Climb Up!!
4164030.short_description: Vertical platformer about breaking blocks, hiking through nature, and maybe cleaning up some messes along the way!

4699200.title: Server Farm Idle
4699200.short_description: When the numbers finally end, you’ll know how long it took. Build a server empire from one ratty laptop to the singularity in a finishable idle clicker.

4259060.title: Reap & Repay
4259060.short_description: Reap and collect the crops to repay the debt of villagers in this very short incremental game. Start weak, invest in the skill tree to unlock various new abilities and become strong enough to harvest every field.

4595710.title: Rangedrifter
4595710.short_description: A 3D ASCII/Sprite roguelike set in a forbidden land. You travel a remote and shifting path, outsmart deadly traps, overcome monsters and wild animals, gather food and gear, find secrets, and try to reach the lost ancient kingdom lying dormant on the horizon.

4300150.title: Pharmacy Store Simulator
4300150.short_description: 经营你自己的药店！出售药品，为顾客提供建议，核验并配发处方。从小型生意做起并将其壮大，从而在医药界取得巨大成功！

4734130.title: Nullvein: Incremental Mining Evolution Demo
4734130.short_description: Nullvein是一款简短而令人满足的增量挖矿游戏。打破矿石方块，在技能树中找到完美的搭配，挖掘出极其稀有的火焰石，打造终极镐。再来一击！

2313720.title: Noun Town 语言学习
2313720.short_description: 用玩游戏的方式，学会1000多个单词和短语，包括英语、日语等12种语言。在五颜六色的大地图里探索，玩单词小游戏，还能对着游戏角色开口说话练习口语。不再只会背单词，每个词都真正记住、真正会用。买一次永久玩，没有广告，没有月费。

4741730.title: Not Sleep Hero Demo
4741730.short_description: "Not Sleep Hero" 是一款回合制策略游戏。 你的目标是在每一回合做出最佳决策，以克服眼前的威胁并安全地完成远征。 与勇者的英勇行为不同，他的同伴们由于极度嗜睡，似乎帮不上什么大忙。 保护同伴免受未知威胁并拯救世界的重任，现在全凭勇者的抉择，也就是交到了你的手中。 能拯救这个世界的，唯有勇者一行人！

4732050.title: Mushroom Trip Demo
4732050.short_description: A psychedelic platformer with roguelike-inspired progression, focused on risk and mental balance. Face unstable worlds, use powerful abilities at a psychological cost, and survive repeated runs where perception and difficulty slowly unravel.

4554420.title: Last Crown Gambit
4554420.short_description: 一款让棋子通过卡牌与协同效果不断进化的国际象棋 Roguelike 战术游戏。

3118140.title: Infernal Battles
3118140.short_description: A strategic autobattler where you assemble a powerful army and buy upgrades to enhance it. Balance your resources wisely between miners and units. Refine your tactics to defeat the King and improve your high score!

4683930.title: Giraffe Champion: The Rock Music Game
4683930.short_description: Play Guitar to Great Rock Songs! Play Cool Guitars and unlock guitars like The Epic Rock Guitar, or the cool Heavy Metal Guitar Design your guitar and play in a cool concert arena. Compete in the epic Guitar Battle!

4675970.title: Fodders Grapple Gauntlet
4675970.short_description: Fodders Grapple Gauntlet, FPS Grapple Hook parkour, with wall running and other good movement mechanics, Fastest time to the end block,

4671940.title: Enclaved
4671940.short_description: A cozy island builder with mini games (fishing, animal farm, random rewards) Casual, Simulation, Idle, Building, Relaxing, Cozy, Singleplayer, Atmospheric

4578700.title: Devices Disruptive Offense Simulator Demo
4578700.short_description: Devices Disruptive Offense Simulator (D.D.O.S.) is a physics-based 1v1 combat game where you setup and distribute malicious devices to smash, shoot, blast and electrocute the hostile servers till they get denial-of-service.

4694670.title: But Why Together
4694670.short_description: 支持最多8人联机的混乱企鹅跑酷冒险！在让人直呼“为什么？！”的奇葩挑战中，冲过疯狂关卡，躲避巨型雪球，在坍塌的平台上生存。你可以干涉好友，将对手撞出赛道。这是一款充满欢笑与竞争的短篇多人派对平台游戏，快来开启一场友谊的小船说翻就翻的竞技之旅吧！

3341000.title: 面面俱盗
3341000.short_description: 《面面俱盗》是一款潜行动作盗窃游戏，支持单人游玩或与搭档在多人合作模式中并肩作案。在这款颠覆传统的潜行游戏中，通过精妙的玩法，在短时任务中掌握行窃之道。

4738260.title: 阴界诡录·诡宅观测记录 Demo
4738260.short_description: 《阴界诡录·诡宅观测记录》是一款鼠标点击选择类型的恐怖游戏。你将扮演一位从事观测异常工作的员工，通过监控面板上报那些稀奇古怪的异常现象，并与致命的威胁相周旋，努力幸存至第二天……

4711860.title: 白书传说 Demo
4711860.short_description: 《白书传说》是一款有着冒险要素的互动小说游戏，在由犬族统治的战乱的末世中，主角石烬为了生存成为了一个土匪，demo内容为最开始石烬的遭遇，以及和一个神秘的种族相遇的开始......

4504930.title: 热狗奥德赛
4504930.short_description: 这里没有狗。作为一只被困热带的企鹅，你需要探索海岛、收集飞机的散落螺丝。但这并不容易——你一路滑行，用撞击收拾各种烂摊子，顺便解决制造状况的岛民。此外还要去应付海盗对决、赛车，甚至莫名其妙地当一回实习侦探。

2605790.title: 深岩银河：异动核心
2605790.short_description: 《深岩银河：异动核心》是一款多人合作类第一人称轻 Rogue 动作射击游戏，有着科幻矮人、怪形恐惧，以及由程序生成的洞穴。加入名为“复拓者”的精英矮人小队，对抗致命的核生兽，并夺回被其侵占的采矿设施。为了“挖到手软，赚到盆满！”

4654280.title: 我的钓鱼世界
4654280.short_description: 主打沉浸式真实垂钓体验，融合野钓探索、黑坑竞技、家园养成多元玩法；坐拥开阔临海钓场 + 垂钓别墅，随时随地随心挥竿垂钓，还能与全网钓友实时联机互动，一站式解锁原汁原味的沉浸式垂钓乐趣。

3123540.title: 恋人谜局
3123540.short_description: 在《恋人谜局》中，你将调查丈夫神秘死亡的真相，同时面对错综复杂的人际关系与内心创伤。在追寻真相的旅途中，一个隐藏的邪教组织和关键人物逐渐浮出水面。你的每一个选择都将影响故事走向，通往截然不同的结局。

4241840.title: 孢球 Sporbs
4241840.short_description: 一款轻松、短流程的增量游戏。你将从独特的外星生物身上采集资源，升级提取科技、发现独特能力、管理资源、自动化工厂并解锁新区域，把产出效率拉满。

4645280.title: 妖魔录 Demo
4645280.short_description: 《妖魔录》是一款自走棋流程+装备合成+流派构筑+回合制爬塔的策略肉鸽游戏，节奏轻快，休闲娱乐，构筑你认为最强的36格神装，看看能到达多少层！神州大地忽然妖气四起，妖族势力空前强大！各大修仙门派纷纷出动，为扫荡妖魔而行走天下！

4231720.title: 园丁的幸运
4231720.short_description: 用能量抽取植物与道具，培育军团，在塔防与肉鸽策略的融合中指挥战斗。运气与战术缺一不可——你的花园，由你说了算。

3508170.title: 光翼战姬～ExS-TIA TS
3508170.short_description: 日本人气制作Lusterise的美少女游戏！紫峰创真受到系统的影响，自身成为了女性，在没人能协助战斗的情况下，独自与残存的怪人们战斗。

3397120.title: 光翼战姬～ExS-TIA P
3397120.short_description: 日本人气制作Lusterise的美少女游戏！真理奈能否在击败怪人的同时并封闭次元裂缝呢？必须对所有人保密的战斗就此拉开序幕。

3508150.title: 光翼战姬～ExS-TIA F
3508150.short_description: 日本人气制作Lusterise的美少女游戏！为了调查失踪成谜的姐姐，百合立刻与创真一同前往传闻中的岛上，并发现了没有了记忆却长得一模一样的「天久保枫」。

1206070.title: 《喇叭之城 (Phonopolis)》
1206070.short_description: 《喇叭之城 (Phonopolis)》是一款故事驱动型解谜冒险游戏，背景设定在一个由纯手绘纸板打造的 3D 世界中。 在这座受前卫艺术启发而造就的反乌托邦城市，你要设法解开各种有趣的谜题，并帮助菲利克斯打破首领的控制。

1356120.title: Éclaircies
1356120.short_description: 在神秘的森林中迷失，发现全新的移动方式。创造道路、探索世界，并借助星辰找到出口。

4684010.title: You had a bad dream Demo
4684010.short_description: A minimalist horror game where you move through procedurally generated narrow corridors and avoid lurking monsters.

4098870.title: Warrens Of Random
4098870.short_description: Warrens Of Random is a minimalistic horror game where you must survive 20 challenging mazes. Every time you do survive, there's a chance that you'll randomly spawn in a previous or future maze.

4533100.title: WINGMINE Demo
4533100.short_description: WINGMINE is a narrative puzzle game inspired by Minesweeper, entirely based on logic. Your special unit has been scattered behind enemy lines: analyze the terrain, defuse the mines, and save your team.

3059250.title: Violet Mansion
3059250.short_description: Violet Mansion is a horror puzzle game where you and your friends must survive against various enemies by using absurd items, finding creative solutions... and pushing people down stairs. Or you alone get to uncover the story of two friends who made a promise.

3550710.title: Vasilisa
3550710.short_description: VASILISA is a co-op horror game for 1–4 players, inspired by Slavic folklore and culture. Team up with friends, gather mythical artifacts, and stop the invasion of darkness threatening your kolkhoz.

4717410.title: Vacuum Survivors Demo
4717410.short_description: Not really a bullet hell, nor a bullet heaven… is there such thing as bullet earth? Fight against steady hordes and brutal bosses as you level up, collect stronger weapons, and stack powerful upgrades in this survivor-like shoot-’em-up.

4743100.title: The Vaults Below Durn: A Field Study Demo
4743100.short_description: Three Doors. One Safe Path. Observe the signs, learn the patterns, and uncover the fate of the explorer who ventured before you.

4585260.title: The Rake Sees You
4585260.short_description: 亚历克斯和他的朋友们出发前往森林深处露营。 原本轻松愉快的冒险之旅很快演变成一场噩梦。 这片森林隐藏着秘密……而且总有什么东西在暗中窥视。活下去。逃出去。别回头……

4674350.title: The Great Beyond Demo
4674350.short_description: Defeat the onslaught of aliens by building your own moon base, placing & upgrading tower defences, managing units, and mining resources!

4742750.title: Synthularity Demo
4742750.short_description: A rhythm bullet hell roguelite. Harvest resources, engineer your arsenal, tune your singularity through infinite geometric waves - and watch reality break around you.

4617110.title: SunderBound Demo
4617110.short_description: SunderBound is a co-op top-down shooter with roguelite progression, set in a crumbling mega-tower. Survive floor by floor with a partner you trust, or an AI companion if you’re climbing solo. Every room’s a test. Every upgrade’s earned. And the only way out is up.

4697530.title: Subsomnia Demo
4697530.short_description: 在这款 2.5D 动作 Roguelite 游戏中，探索一个瞬息万变的反乌托邦梦境宇宙。挥舞您的弹弓，解决基于物理的反弹谜题，并穿越程序化生成的多个世界。每一件魔法道具都是通往新梦境的大门：您能到达本源吗？

4604260.title: Sheep & Socks Demo
4604260.short_description: Guide goofy flocks of sheep and produce fancy socks in this frantic couch coop game! Good coordination with your fellow shepherd dogs is key to meet the animal clients demand. Get ready and bark away!

4731060.title: SLOP Crew Demo
4731060.short_description: SLOP Crew 是一款在线合作生存恐怖游戏，在这里团队协作、沟通与糟糕的决策相互碰撞。使用空间语音探索程序生成的关卡，在黑暗中求生。收集 SLOP 以进行旅行，探索整颗星球和多样的洞穴系统，踏上你的荣耀之路。

4687060.title: Rong Demo
4687060.short_description: Battle your way through a dystopian internet in this Rogue-Like Ping-Pong adventure. Battle a variety of enemies in virtual ping pong matches that twist the concept to its extremes.

4535670.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors: Survival
4535670.short_description: Eight warriors from across the world. One ancient game reimagined as a fantasy battle for survival. Wield Rock, Paper, Scissors, or cast devastating Magic. Read your opponent, strike with precision, and fight your way to victory in the ultimate arena showdown.

4686280.title: ROGUETRIP
4686280.short_description: Synthwave driving roguelike. Race NYC to California through 12 states and 7 biomes. Collect 140 items, discover 40 synergies, outrun cops and bosses. 8 unique cars, daily challenges, 33 mutators. Every run is a new road trip.

4019130.title: Psyvariar 3
4019130.short_description: Play as one of 7 pilots in this thrilling sequel to a SHMUP classic. The time has come for a new generation of Psyvariars to rise… and save humanity.

4688390.title: Project manager SIM Demo
4688390.short_description: Manage the most unpredictable resource - people - in this WASD tycoon! Plan projects, hire a dream team, assign tasks to specialists, and monitor the budget while upgrading your office. Balance between team burnout, complex contracts, and the wrath of upper management.

4622640.title: Pet the Cat - Demo
4622640.short_description: 《Pet the Cat》试玩版现已开放！在这款轻松又刺激的弹幕射击游戏中，通过“撸猫”释放攻击，抵御源源不断的敌人！体验核心玩法，提前感受将猫咪培养成战场强者的乐趣！

4651030.title: PeeWee Purpdrank's FOENEM Clicker
4651030.short_description: The OFFICIAL PeeWee Purpdrank VIDEO GAME. Double Tap the FOENEM button in this wacky and hilarious idle-clicker.

1807740.title: Palliative - Reach for an Angel
1807740.short_description: When youth shines brightest, every second is a tactical battle against time. Join Yuu and a close-knit group of friends in a desaturating world as they help Nana a girl facing her final days reach for a perfectly ordinary life. A story of friendship, and the courage to stay until the final whistle.

3891080.title: P-PAN
3891080.short_description: Armed with a big smile and punches that fly endlessly,have fun progressing! P-PAN can fly and hovering,so even if you're not good at play jumping action,this 2D action shooting game has simple controls that can enjoy.

4741240.title: Not Yet Demo
4741240.short_description: NOT YET 是一款第一人称心理恐怖体验游戏，越往深处，沉默越沉重，而迟疑本身便是代价。

4179280.title: Moonshiner Simulator
4179280.short_description: 这是一款深度酒精饮料制作模拟游戏。从零开始，将您的事业发展为繁荣帝国，精通酿造工艺的奥秘，创造独特配方。但请记住：总有人想阻挠您的成功之路。

4725470.title: Mega Roids Demo
4725470.short_description: Play Stage 1 of Mega Roids free in this fast-paced first-person 3D asteroid shooter. Blast rocks open for loot, fight off alien raiders, and wishlist the full game for Stage 2 now and Stage 3 coming in June.

4692160.title: Legacy of Sail Demo
4692160.short_description: As a 17th Century Admiral, send your squadrons out to capture enemy towns and sink their ships. Force boarding actions to capture their prized Ships of the Line all while balancing the need for supplies, repairs and upgrading your crew in this throwback real time tactics naval combat game

4703770.title: Kin and Conquest Demo
4703770.short_description: 款放置/增量型动作冒险游戏。战斗、采矿、击败Boss，不断变强，征服大山，打倒邪恶的风水术士。

3651880.title: KASAP
3651880.short_description: Kasap —— 一款设定在1990年代土耳其的心理惊悚游戏。 深夜，一家老旧的肉铺仍在悄然营业。寡言的屠夫处理着每日的工作，但隐藏在店铺背后的黑暗秘密，正逐渐浮出水面。经营这家肉铺，同时直面你内心深处的过往。

4704320.title: Infected World 2
4704320.short_description: Infected World 2 is the sequel to the first installment of this physics-based, object-destroying puzzle game! Embark on a thrilling adventure amidst a zombie apocalypse!

4714710.title: HINO Demo
4714710.short_description: "Join Hino and the whimsical Monimoni Skeleton as they traverse a shadow-cloaked world in this atmospheric 2D dark fantasy adventure."

4653650.title: Grill Girl
4653650.short_description: This strategy game requires you to keep grilling food to keep your health up. There's only so much cooking space on your grill, so arrange the food wisely! Aim for the highest score in this bite-sized singleplayer challenge!

4633350.title: Gridhammer Demo
4633350.short_description: Gridhammer is a tactical plate battler where two players draft from one shared pool of 45 plates. Place plates on a grid, capture by matching higher corner values, and chain cascading flips. Every plate you draft is one your opponent loses.

4258070.title: GooNECT√2
4258070.short_description: "Hold Hands, Reach the End with the Power of Friendship"—GooNECT√2 is a two-player co-op action-adventure game and the sequel to the Japan-exclusive Goonect.

4646860.title: Gator Hucker
4646860.short_description: Gator Hucker is a fast-paced brawler where you craft your own unique playstyle! You are alien alligators with wacky abilities locked in battle, in teams or a chaotic free-for-all! Huck into the arena with the help of cybernetically enhanced gorillas and cause chaos for glory and entertainment!

3154610.title: Game about jetpack fly
3154610.short_description: 这是一款关于驾驶喷气背包的游戏。 两个引擎。两个控制按钮。

4746120.title: GOD: B Demo
4746120.short_description: After Earth’s fall, only distorted data remains. Join GOD Corp and restore the past in a virtual space.

4290470.title: Echo Isle
4290470.short_description: A colorful mini-island adventure inspired by the handheld classics, built to be finished in an evening. Fight monsters, solve puzzles, and delve into four perilous dungeons.

4743120.title: Dig Too Deep Demo
4743120.short_description: Throw goblins at all your problems in this Action Tower Defense Roguelite. Craft upgrades. Choose Perks. Build defenses. Defend your Base! Angry baddies want to turn you to pulp! Stop them the only way you know how: throwing goblins! Don't miss.

3047800.title: Dice Tech Dominion - Enter the Shadow Circuit
3047800.short_description: Build your dice deck, shape the dungeon board, and command monsters in a 3D tactical dice battler.

4330860.title: Desktop Nard: Dice Idle
4330860.short_description: 放置骰子会自动滚动，释放技能，在桌面角落刷取稀有掉落，拥有大量内容和丰富的掉落类型。

4731530.title: DeadWeight: A Lullaby Demo
4731530.short_description: A baby fell. You jumped after it. God didn't like that. DeadWeight: A Lullaby is a psychological narrative experience about guilt, judgment, and the weight of human intent.

4334380.title: Dash Dash Dead Demo
4334380.short_description: 《致命冲刺》是一款快节奏的回合制肉鸽游戏。欢迎收看最残酷的直播真人秀，在这里，死刑犯就是明星！作为新晋参赛者，你将在一系列致命关卡中搏杀，争夺唯一的赦免权。每期节目都会带你前往全新的杀戮舞台，狩猎那些最古怪的“特邀嘉宾”！想活着逃离？记得利用好路上每一件“战利品”。

4615640.title: DRYN: Don't Reveal Your Next
4615640.short_description: An online co-op horror game for up to 6 players. Scavenge dangerous, abandoned environments for valuable loot to meet the Company's strict profit quota. Survive unpredictable monsters, manage your gear, and work together to escape alive.

4301540.title: Creature Caretaker
4301540.short_description: Creature Caretaker is a virtual pet simulator. Hatch your creature from an egg, and help it build a career, make friends, grow a garden, and express itself through music. Manage hunger, happiness, energy, and health while exploring a vibrant pixel-art world filled with mini-games, & companion pets.

3770700.title: Cosmic Run
3770700.short_description: Cosmic Run 是单人太空类 Roguelite 游戏。面对银河敌军，战略性强化你的飞船，提升属性延长生存时间，带领佐加克家族逃离银河。战斗、建造、生存、逃脱！

4697030.title: CoreShot
4697030.short_description: CoreShot is a classic arcade style space shooter, where you pilot the spacecraft HonestWing to destroy the cores of evil. As you soar through enemy spacecraft, psychic pyramids, and grim castles, you will be tested against enemies with a variety of attack styles and epic boss battles. Blast away

4705600.title: Clucker Clicker
4705600.short_description: Save the family farm before the bank takes it. A cozy 2D incremental clicker about chickens, eggs, and outrunning foreclosure, one egg at a time.

4574380.title: Civilization Idle Demo
4574380.short_description: A strategy-driven idle game where you develop your civilization, research technologies, and make critical decisions to expand your empire across the ages.

4684720.title: Chroma Jump Demo
4684720.short_description: Chroma Jump is a 2D hardcore platformer where you overcome obstacles by changing your character's color in real-time. Push your physical and mental limits through traps that are completely unforgiving... well, mostly. Will you be able to safely reach the goal and escape?

4625280.title: Chess Tales Demo
4625280.short_description: Lead your chess army beyond the 8x8 board into the opening chapters of an enchanted world. Solve environmental puzzles across three unique realms in this first glimpse of Chess Tales.

4666100.title: Cellular Soup Demo
4666100.short_description: A short active incremental game about growing your cellular organism. Make the numbers go up by absorbing all kinds of cells in the primordial soup of evolution!

4615050.title: Catagon Demo
4615050.short_description: In this Roguelike Action Shooter, battle against your carnal enemies in various fast paced combat scenarios, swarming rats and nightmarish skulls must be defeated and all the fish must be caught!

4726550.title: CORE Demo
4726550.short_description: CORE is a "Retro" style fps or rather fpp [first person puncher?] about a robot going into the earth and destroying it from the inside out.

4638510.title: CH13: Rest Stop Demo
4638510.short_description: Rest Stop is a psychological horror game set in early 2000s Poland. What begins as a calm drive through the woods turns into something you weren't prepared for... Will you find out what awaits at the end of the road?

4389400.title: Bouncy Weapons
4389400.short_description: 一个增量类游戏，武器会在场地中弹跳，为你击杀敌人。收集战利品，掌握庞大的技能树，揭开大量内容。

4696440.title: Bloomtide
4696440.short_description: 9×9 棋盘 × Roguelike 构筑 × 乘区爆炸的符号经营游戏。每天棋盘从你的填充池随机抽出一手符号——三选一塑造池子方向，让水果、动物、神兽在邻居之间触发指数级收益；交租日再三选一装备 / 环境，把你已成型的流派一步步推向数字爆炸。从 12 次交租的求生关卡到无尽模式的数字狂欢，三层策略闭环 × 上百道具交叉 = 海量 build 路线。规则一目了然，组合远超预期——你的 build 能把数字推到多高？

4522140.title: Bloodweight
4522140.short_description: 100 generations. one ledger. one heir at a time. you are the bloodline itself, guiding your lineage through the ages. you spend each life; the Soul Teller writes what it was. when your line ends, you read the chronicle of yourself. how will YOUR dynasty fall?

4697430.title: Bench Simulator
4697430.short_description: 你是一张公园长椅。看着陌生人坐下、交谈、崩溃、相爱、争吵，并揭开他们的秘密。在这款剧情丰富的叙事模拟游戏中，你最微小的反应也可能改变一切。

4504020.title: Axis Escape
4504020.short_description: It looks peaceful. It sounds peaceful. It is not peaceful. A shrinking dimension closes in from every side. Drifting orbs are your only way across. You cannot move. You can only jump. Ten dimensions. Ten lives. No shortcuts.

4737730.title: Atlas Zone Demo
4737730.short_description: We combined Card and Roguelike genres. On top of that, we added a grid-based map mechanic. Build a unique deck, encounter different producers, and form a magnificent team. Develop your skill tree with your team. Control the entire region with your team.

4228650.title: An Incremental Game About Placing Blocks
4228650.short_description: Click to place blocks, earn money, buy different block types, expand your boards and upgrade your skills. Watch reality break in this short, satisfying incremental game about placing blocks.

4689590.title: Allure Rush
4689590.short_description: Allure Rush is a dark fantasy tactical card battler where you lead a rebellion across branching paths, resolve story encounters, and fight for control of the board as you march toward the throne of the Crimson Monarch.

4610020.title: All Pro Golf
4610020.short_description: Pool meets Golf in All Pro Golf! Zip your way through 32 different tracks to reach the top of the golfing world!

4552750.title: Alien History
4552750.short_description: A knowledge discovery game inspired by ancient astronaut theories. Travel across nine world regions, consult expert informants, and piece together evidence of non-human intelligence hidden in ancient civilizations. Every discovery brings you closer to the truth.

4669150.title: Against The Light
4669150.short_description: 一次神秘的邂逅逐渐演变成更加深刻的联系。在一个情感与真相交织的未来世界中，你的选择将塑造一段脆弱的纽带……并揭示光明之外的真相。

4653600.title: AGENCY Demo
4653600.short_description: AGENCY is a game of abstract challenges. You play as π (Pi) in a top-down perspective and you have to figure out the rules of very distinct levels to succeed. When you think you know what the game means, email us and we'll chat more.

3535360.title: Echo's Cry
3535360.short_description: Echo’s Cry blends intense hack-and-slash combat with rhythm-game precision. Cut through hordes of enemies while striking to the beat, combining fast-paced action with perfectly timed inputs. Battle through a dark Victorian world accompanied by a haunting original soundtrack.

2127570.title: Greenhearth Necromancer
2127570.short_description: 建立一个花园……起死回生！ Greenhearth Necromancer 是一款舒适、巫术、半闲置的游戏，讲述的是照顾活植物和不死植物。在你的阳台花园里种植可爱的植物，施展法术，酿造药剂，全天享受寒冷的闲置游戏和氛围。

2537560.title: 进击的打工人 Attack of the worker
2537560.short_description: 《进击的打工人》Attack of the worker是一款轻度 Rogue-like，像素风格的弹幕射击游戏，您会体验在一个在科技公司工作的打工人的生活。和工作需求，程序问题还有公司里面的同事领导战斗，同时探索自己身上还有这个团队里面所有人的故事，探索其中隐藏的真相。

4630250.title: 糺糺縁糸（きゅうきゅうえんし） Demo
4630250.short_description: A story-driven exploration horror adventure set in a fictional modern-day Japan. Experience a quiet tale of psychological horror as two schoolgirls confront folklore, curses, and choices that lead to multiple endings.

4667430.title: 无尽守卫 Demo
4667430.short_description: 赛博仙界只剩最后1名女修等你守护，面对海量无尽的敌人，还好有护宗大阵。(注意，本游戏反作弊和排行系统，不喜勿买)

4677180.title: 我为你种田
4677180.short_description: 《我为你种田》是一款桌面透明挂机农场游戏，支持单人或最多 10 人联机。可爱的角色会自动播种、浇水、收割，让你在工作或休息时也能轻松经营自己的农场。

4528830.title: 安尼姆的无尽旅途
4528830.short_description: 《安尼姆的无尽旅途》是一款高难度动物拟人RPG。你将组建一支4人军团，以第三人称视角，参与这场持续千年的中世纪王座之乱。敌人或来自于权斗，或源自于黑瘴。请牢记生命只有一次，堕落或是超越就在一念之间，一切为了生存的抉择都需要你的策略、运气和勇气。

3870810.title: [빈 칸]
3870810.short_description: “You do not remember why this place is called paradise.” [Blank] is a fantasy adventure RPG about runaway youth. A girl awakens in a strange world and fills the blank pages of an unknown diary. As lost memories return and hidden truths unfold, she must face the final [Blank].

4703350.title: Shackle of Y
4703350.short_description: 《Shackle of Y》是一款回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家需在战斗中的束缚与压制状态下进行决策，通过挣脱枷锁、承受压力并逆转局势，在以突破反制为核心的单人流程中体验压迫与解放交替的回合制玩法。

3944190.title: REBELLION PRINCESS｜リベリオン プリンセス
3944190.short_description: 培养你的推し角色，让她在下一轮也能立即参战！ 指挥美少女守护城堡与公主 无重置的Roguelite × 塔防

4713030.title: Neon Pulsefire Demo
4713030.short_description: Fullfill your ultimate power fantasy and defeat endless waves of enemies in this challenging sci-fi bullet-hell roguelite. Unlock unique classes and upgrades to create powerful builds as you weave your way through enemies, arena hazards and projectile assaults.

4625270.title: Memory of Memorie : A Chill Story Demo
4625270.short_description: A story-driven productivity adventure where you work alongside Memorie, an apprentice witch from another world. As you focus using the Pomodoro timer, the story progresses and her world gradually transforms. This demo offers ~4 hours through Chapter 5 — save data carries over to the full game.

4449390.title: HoRoyal 〜Hololive Battle Royal〜
4449390.short_description: A fan-made action game based on Hololive! Turn your brain off and enjoy some silly fun! Powerful voice clips cheer your exhilarating battles!! Experience the same sense of immersion as a collab livestream!

2164660.title: Grist
2164660.short_description: Explore the many lands of the Shell World Atropos, engaging in strategic card-based battles and TTRPG-style story choices and skill tests. Plan routes, rush bosses, and press your luck but beware: things in Atropos are not always as they appear.

4671640.title: Factory Reset
4671640.short_description: Investigate a malfunctioning robot factory. Hack them, befriend them, or dispose of them. Every choice changes what you find.

4459370.title: Calvin's Gallery Demo
4459370.short_description: Play as Calvin and his friends as you explore the ruins of a once thriving world. Follow the trail left behind, maybe you can unravel the mystery of what really happened in the valley. This RPG features turn based combat, large scale puzzles, a wide range of side areas, and new game+.

3893830.title: Brew or Die
3893830.short_description: Brew or Die – an RPG game with TBS elements, where potion brewing is a matter of life, duty, and... possible wealth!

2824000.title: Backpacker Guild
2824000.short_description: 欢迎来到Backpacker Guild。雇佣佣兵、制作强力装备，为他们打点行装，一同讨伐凶猛的怪物吧。强大的佣兵，由你亲手打造。

4153780.title: 跳跳僵尸
4153780.short_description: Jump Zombie 是一款高空向上闯关游戏。玩家需要在自动起跳机制下连续跨越障碍、控制节奏并不断向上攀升。角色落地后会自动再次起跳，没有奔跑冲刺，核心在于把握起跳时机、跳跃距离与落点方向。穿越中式、农场、自然与地牢等多主题关卡，完成这场节奏与判断并重的登顶挑战。

2863680.title: 归零巡礼：亡谍镇魂曲
2863680.short_description: 来自《极乐迪斯科》原班团队的下一款作品：《归零巡礼：亡谍镇魂曲》——一款间谍角色扮演游戏。你扮演一名天赋异禀却饱受折磨的行动员，去执行一项艰巨的任务。重整你破碎的情报网络，解开阴谋之网，在世界舞台上证明自己——或者重演败局。

2560100.title: 夜不能魅
2560100.short_description: 欢迎来到《夜不能魅》。这是一款指向点击式生存恐怖游戏，透过16位元像素画面与80年代复古恐怖氛围的迷雾，玩家将回到1987年缅因州那个雷电交加的夏夜，迷失在一座幽深的庄园古宅中，点击、探索、解开谜题。要进入这个温柔的良夜吗？

4688520.title: 伦敦列车
4688520.short_description: 营运伦敦地铁、地上路线和国家铁路！ 您现在可以运营伦敦地铁和地上铁线路，以及连接伦敦和其他城市的英国国家铁路城际列车！这款游戏包含英国铁路的最新资讯！

4691990.title: 一个关于香肠的奇怪游戏
4691990.short_description: 这是一个关于香肠的点击游戏

4467950.title: Time's Garden
4467950.short_description: 叙事驱动冒险解谜游戏，扮演 7 岁男孩踏入记忆构筑的机械花园，观察环境、破解谜题、收集记忆碎片，唤醒人格力量，探寻被隐藏的人生与情感真相。
developers: Shanghai Tri-Core Workshop Network Technology Co., Ltd.
publishers: Shanghai Tri-Core Workshop Network Technology Co., Ltd.

4608570.title: Screamer - Demo
4608570.short_description: 立即体验Screamer试玩版，感受最残酷的极速竞赛！

4673800.title: Regulea: Infection Card Battle
4673800.short_description: A turn-based strategy card game about infections and antibiotics. Build a deck from 119 cards, spread infections to pressure your opponent, or use the right antibiotics to recover. Correct choices alone are not enough to win; timing and strategy matter. Simple rules, short battles, replayability.

3232870.title: King of Tokyo - Richard Garfield
3232870.short_description: 扮演巨型怪兽，摧毁沿途的一切障碍！投掷骰子，构筑最佳组合：疗伤、进攻、购买卡牌，或者赢得胜利点数。

4663660.title: Hidden Objects - Items Find
4663660.short_description: Explore atmospheric locations, search for and find hidden objects in an engaging puzzle game!
developers: A A G BROTHERS SOFTWARE DESIGN
publishers: A A G BROTHERS SOFTWARE DESIGN

4676880.title: DDoD Demo
4676880.short_description: 《DDoD》是一款俯视角 Roguelite 射击游戏，射击手感扎实到位，迷人的怪物则会让你又爱又恨。探索地上与地下的庞大开放世界。独自一人或与好友合作，净化紫色之地。活着回来。或者，回不来。

4374560.title: 虚空斗盘 Demo
4374560.short_description: 这是一款高对比度风格的网格战术 Roguelike。独特的配件系统同时作用于五格物品栏形成自己独特的战术，同时灵活应对每回合发生的事件也至关重要。精算每一点行动力，在随机排列的主题关卡中活下去。

4337210.title: 巴萨卡狂潮
4337210.short_description: 《巴萨卡狂潮》是一款带有生存刷宝元素的动作类肉鸽，你需要对抗不断涌现的怪物，获取诸神的祝福强化自身，击退邪恶，携带丰厚的战利品归来。

4536290.title: Last Draft
4536290.short_description: Complete your last draft before sunrise while enduring increasing paranormal activities and relentless monster stalks. Use your typing skills to progress and your instincts to hide, surviving 7 days of pure psychological horror.

4748640.title: Hanox Demo
4748640.short_description: 同时滑动所有方块，按正确的重量顺序堆叠，在围绕惯性、规划与连锁合并设计的精巧网格谜题中找到完美解法。

4174310.title: 零售地狱
4174310.short_description: 困在无限循环的破班儿里，你是地狱唯一便利店里的那个大冤种店员。进货、交税、还得跟噩梦中才有的妖魔鬼怪斗智斗勇——顺便挖挖这鬼地方为啥永远下不了班。打卡上工，伺候亡者，熬到下班。

3349970.title: 电玩大亨： 肉鸽模拟器
3349970.short_description: 《电玩大亨》是首款 Roguelite 商店模拟游戏。经营这座城市最后一家电子游戏商店，紧跟最新游戏发售，倒卖走私复古游戏，策略性选择你的运营策略，雇佣员工，并应对（抢劫）那些烦人的小偷。

4454040.title: 生命的配方。穿越寂静灾变的旅程 Demo
4454040.short_description: 你是一个灵魂破碎的旅人，带着一个轮子上的家。你的任务是倾听自杀者的声音，并在他们永远沉默之前，找到恰当的话语。

2936190.title: 热带度假村经营模拟器 (天堂海滩模拟器)
2936190.short_description: 将一个废弃的岛屿变成一个繁荣的业务。安装有趣的活动，开设您的餐厅，维护您的设备，管理您的员工。是时候开放海滩了，您准备好迎接您的第一批客人了吗？

3126340.title: 烦恼驿站
3126340.short_description: 一款超现实叙事冒险游戏，你将在对话中变形，揭开神明失踪之谜。

4389120.title: 水彩画は水底に沈む
4389120.short_description: Watercolors Sink Beneath the Surface is a nostalgic pixel-art point-and-click adventure set on Narumi Island, where only an abandoned high school stands. Years later, two girls return to complete a watercolor inspired by their school memories, gathering ideas from the remnants of the past.

1933000.title: 月之深渊
1933000.short_description: 《月之深渊》是一款以故事线为驱动的单人动作冒险游戏，游戏的核心是平台跳跃和弹幕射击。在月球上的神秘预言和牢狱之灾的困境中，跟随囚犯福克斯一起完成TA的冒险。

3000970.title: 掀桌模拟器
3000970.short_description: 压力大爆炸?在《掀桌模拟器》中释放一下吧！你可以透过这款包含游戏物理的逗趣益智游戏, 尽情爆笑乱掉砸碎任何物品。不论你担当的是咖啡师还是南极洲总统，你可以超越翻桌，颠复砸烂全世界!

3412160.title: 拉斯维加斯模拟器
3412160.short_description: 独自一人或与好友合作（1–4人）打造顶级商业帝国。从零开始，取悦顾客，应对混乱—破坏分子、故障，甚至外星来客。

3336240.title: 呱呱归家记
3336240.short_description: 《呱呱归家记》是一款惬意休闲的叙事冒险游戏。你需要将便利贴正确拼接，为 Froggo 重建世界，帮助他顺利回家，与他最好的朋友 Buddy 相聚。遇见新的古怪动物伙伴，完成拼图，带来满满的成就感，在互帮互助的暖心之旅中享受放松氛围。

4678280.title: 史莱姆塔防
4678280.short_description: 一款轻松休闲的塔防游戏，部署各种史莱姆，抵御源源不断的怪物进攻。 多达28种防御塔，以及4张地图。

3196590.title: 仙之气
3196590.short_description: 《仙之气》是一款以体验修仙世界观下的RPG沙盒游戏，游戏概念源自道家思想中的炼气，玩家需要收集和运用各种气息来改造地图和修炼自身，炼制丹药和造物等，同时修补破碎的位面，最终找到或合成仙之气完成飞升。

4689750.title: 【掲示板】ワイ魔法少女やが？【管理できん】 体験版
4689750.short_description: Magical Girl Programming ✖︎ auto-battle! An office worker is assigned to manage a fan exchange bulletin board when she was once a magical girl, Become a magical girl in cyberspace and protect the message board.

3206390.title: 【掲示板】ワイ魔法少女なんやが？【管理できん】
3206390.short_description: Magical Girl Programming ✖︎ auto-battle! An office worker is assigned to manage a fan exchange bulletin board when she was once a magical girl, Become a magical girl in cyberspace and protect the message board.

4658750.title: 《欺杀旅社》免费体验版
4658750.short_description: 《欺杀旅社》是一款快节奏、非对称 PvP 射击游戏，玩家需要通过战斗消灭杀手（恶狼）——无需进行讨论，没有投票环节！选择适合的武器、能力，以及配置，搜集证据、揪出恶狼，以武力使其屈服！...

4716510.title: miMIR Demo
4716510.short_description: miMIR is a survival exploration game where you drift through the shattered remains of Earth as a memoryless robot, surviving from a floating vessel while the world’s ruins reveal what humanity left behind.

4239520.title: lunr.rdio.taxi/demo
4239520.short_description: 《幻月调频：星际的士》将漂移和节奏完美融合，带来一场爽快过瘾的超时空“律动漂移（DRIFTHM）”大冒险！踩着巴西顶级 DJ 的拍子，在太阳系里甩尾加速，在这个充斥着超资本主义和巴西地下放克（BrazaFunk）的未来，化身背负无限债务的星际的士司机，为了还债疯狂捞金。

4676290.title: Whose Lawn Is It Anyway
4676290.short_description: Step into the paws of a mischievous dog or a calculating cat and turn this quiet street into your personal playground of chaos. This is a short, 15-minute adventure about being a very, very bad pet.

4462280.title: Wayward Woods
4462280.short_description: Wayward Woods is a turn based strategy game set inside of a magical storybook. Cast spells, defeat your enemies, all to find your way out of the enchanting Wayward Woods.

4499200.title: Warhammer Survivors Demo
4499200.short_description: Immerse yourself in the bullet heaven from hell with the Warhammer Survivors demo! Overcome an onslaught of deadly enemies spawned from the iconic Warhammer 40,000 and Warhammer Age of Sigmar universes.

2532480.title: Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II
2532480.short_description: 在这款备受赞誉的《Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus》续作中，快节奏的战术战斗与战略管理相结合。你可以掌控古老而不死的太空死灵军团，或是欧姆尼塞亚的科技宗教侍僧，世界的命运就掌握在你手中。

4338410.title: Warhammer 40,000: Boltgun 2 Demo
4338410.short_description: 在《Warhammer 40,000: Boltgun 2》中以帝皇之名消灭异端！体验复古第一人称射击游戏《Warhammer 40,000: Boltgun》的续作，扮演极限战士马鲁姆·凯多或战斗修女奈拉·维拉思，迎战更多敌人，尝试更多武器，探索新的净化方式！

4748870.title: Under the Eye Demo
4748870.short_description: The world and regime you once knew is crumbling day by day. The Major won't let you go until you've beat her at her own twisted card game. Bid, cheat and bend the rules to see another day, or die and be forgotten.

4656570.title: Unbowed Demo
4656570.short_description: Unbowed is a single-player pirate-inspired action RPG blending methodical Soulslike combat, oppressive atmosphere, and cosmic horror.

4616830.title: Twofold Tower: Prologue
4616830.short_description: Shift between dimensions, and sidestep undead skeletons – then juggle both at once! Twofold Tower is a turn-based puzzler, and this prologue takes place before the events of the main game, and contains unique puzzles and content.

3049020.title: Turnout
3049020.short_description: A 1v1 strategy horror game where a train rapidly approaches your location. Guess the numbers, rely on your luck, or strategize to not end up as roadkill, remove the before they remove you from the game.

4008200.title: Treetopians Demo
4008200.short_description: Treetopians is a cozy colony simulator where players build vertical villages in the treetops and care for a growing community of villagers with unique needs and personalities.

4280420.title: Toilet Paper Idle
4280420.short_description: Toilet Paper Idle is an incremental game about consuming as much toilet papers as possible with the help of helpers, skills, and upgrades. Discover special types of toilet papers as you progress, and be careful to not clog your toilet!

4710140.title: Tilting - A Noir Poker Career
4710140.short_description: A noir poker roguelite where you climb from a dive bar to a million-dollar championship. Play Texas Hold'em across different venues, build your bankroll, and don't tilt.

4748260.title: The TEAM game:Corgi&me Demo
4748260.short_description: 向猴爪许愿后，竟然变成了乌合之众“柯基棒球队”的打者！为了拯救灵魂，你必须带领柯基们赢下冠军。跨越失败，选择你的风格：是成为能打出8分全垒打的逆天怪物，还是与可爱的柯基队友们共同打造最强球队？一切尽在你的打席之中！

3507360.title: The Longest Tale
3507360.short_description: Uncover a forgotten legend as you venture through mythical realms. Play as four heroes bound by a mysterious fate. Explore ancient ruins, outsmart deadly foes and solve arcane puzzles. Each path you take reveals a piece of The Longest Tale.

4362350.title: The Ladder
4362350.short_description: 一款第一人称心理恐怖游戏，每个选择都会改变现实。沿着记忆的阶梯向上，面对被内疚与恐惧塑造的人生。

2421950.title: The Guardian of Nature -自然守护者-
2421950.short_description: 《自然守护者》是一款手绘风格的变身冒险游戏。和植物学家亨利一起踏上魔幻之旅。使用改变身体大小的能力，在宏观与微观之间自由穿梭，解开充满太阳朋克风格的谜题，让自然重现生机。

4716600.title: Thalassic Dice Demo
4716600.short_description: 在这款策略类roguelike骰子游戏中扬帆远航。召集你的船员，对抗海怪，穿越险峻的水域，逃离足以摧毁船只的风暴。管理和升级你的船只，并在你自己的港口招募和训练新的船员。波涛之下隐藏着什么秘密？

3072940.title: Symbiosis Demo
3072940.short_description: 一款支持单人或合作的英雄射击游戏，背景设定在一个程序生成的外星世界中。探索、建造、进化，并肩作战，对抗一波波机械混合体。立即加入愿望单！

4686400.title: Stairway to Heaven
4686400.short_description: 3D precision platformer .In this dynamic arcade game, your only goal is to escape — climbing an endless staircase to the heavens while hell chases you, unleashing deadly projectiles at your heels.

3900190.title: Sliding Knight
3900190.short_description: A charming low-poly puzzle game where you slide through strategic levels with limited moves. Every step is a challenge, and every move must be planned!

3820020.title: Silent Stay
3820020.short_description: Alex Miller, a writer seeking inspiration, rented a remote cabin in the woods. It was supposed to be the perfect retreat: peace, nature, no distractions. But soon he notices strange things - objects move, mysterious notes appear. Someone seems to be sharing his presence without him knowing it.

4734990.title: Serve Or Die Demo
4734990.short_description: In Serve Or Die, you work alone in a small sandwich shop during the night shift. With a VHS-inspired style and an increasingly unsettling atmosphere, survive as simple orders turn into something far more disturbing.

2111550.title: Schrodinger's Cat Burglar
2111550.short_description: 传送门与猫——加入这场量子解谜冒险吧！米腾斯获得了同时身处异地的不可思议之力。探索扭曲的测验密室，搞怪捣蛋，并以毫厘之差逃脱追捕！🐈🐈‍⬛

4483190.title: SURI: The Seventh Note Demo
4483190.short_description: A rhythm-action platformer where every move syncs to the music. Dash, jump, and escape through a mystical world shaped by rhythm to save your mother’s life. Rhythm was the life of the island of Suri, who will step up when its harmony is broken?

4454160.title: STOMPIT
4454160.short_description: STOMPIT is a pick-up-and-play precision platformer built with pure arcade sensibilities. Weave and stomp your way to the top of the leaderboards to steal the crown!

2199080.title: STARBITES
2199080.short_description: The story of a girl's growth and adventure on a vast desert planet, "Bitter."

4752400.title: SIGNAL PIT Demo
4752400.short_description: A fast-paced monster arena roguelite where every beast has unique passive traits, active skills, and powerful overclock abilities. Build your mutation loadout, survive deadly fights, and evolve between runs.

4502770.title: Rotfront
4502770.short_description: Rotfront is a singleplayer FPS set out in the state of Washington in the year 2034. Infiltrate as a lone Operator, purge infected areas, kill as many Rots as possible and unlock weapons as you level up and grow stronger.

4694050.title: Road of Heart Demo
4694050.short_description: 离开宁静的村庄，加入冒险者公会，并在危机来临时守护自己的家园。在这款充满情感的复古奇幻JRPG中，体验回合制战斗、职业成长、卷轴技能与像素风探索

4662050.title: Regulars Demo
4662050.short_description: Run a late-night diner with up to 8 friends. Seat customers, take orders, and cook meals. Not everyone is who they seem. Study your regulars, spot the anomalies, and decide who gets served and who gets purged.

4669310.title: Reborn Arena Demo
4669310.short_description: RebornArena is a competitive 2D platformer arena shooter where elemental deck-building meets precise combat. Draft your powers, master custom kinematic movement, and evolve your build every round. Outplay rivals in a skill-based arena where tactical choices are as vital as your aim.

3916260.title: Psalm 2
3916260.short_description: 第一人称心理恐怖游戏，电梯是唯一安全的地方。每一层都是一个新的现实。每一层都有新的居民。找到它，才能继续向下坠落。

3183170.title: Planet Gemini
3183170.short_description: Planet Gemini is a factory-building and tower defense game. After crash-landing on two planets during an interdimensional journey, fend off waves of enemies and research a portal to survive.

4170650.title: Pimpalot
4170650.short_description: Strut into Pimp-A-Lot, where you build your empire from the streets up. Customize your slick old-school pimp, recruit hos, connect clients, and stack that paper. Buy businesses, throw hands with rivals, and show the city who runs the game... 'cause respect ain’t given, baby, it’s earned.

4699660.title: Penguin Runner
4699660.short_description: Dodge icebergs, unlock penguins and beat the leaderboard in this addictive arctic endless runner!

4654260.title: Peerless Heart
4654260.short_description: A 5 minute experience that could save your life. A short walking simulator. You will speak with creatures and move towards a large landmark with a mysterious prize inside.

4199860.title: Paklyx
4199860.short_description: 《PAKLYX》是一款回合制解谜类游戏，玩家需要找到正确的行动顺序，使用特殊按钮来操控与延缓计时器，并收集关卡中的所有钥匙。

4566120.title: Only Run
4566120.short_description: Run, jump, slide! Collect coins and earn medals to unlock the next levels.

4725910.title: Null Carrier Demo
4725910.short_description: Operate a deep-space listening array in this minimalist signal-reconstruction puzzle game. Tune frequencies, isolate transmissions from noise, and classify patterns for Command. But as the shifts go by, you begin to realize: the signals aren't from where you thought, and Command is lying to you.

3216800.title: MÖRK BORG Heresy Supreme
3216800.short_description: A desperate attempt to endure the coming Apocalypse in a cursed, unjust dark fantasy world, made only to appease a vain god. Combat is brutal, choices are lethal, and survival is a temporary insult to fate. A flail to the face.

4492070.title: Mystery Egg Shop Simulator - Prologue
4492070.short_description: Run your very own mystery egg shop! Stock shelves, manage customers, and grow your business. Every egg hides a surprise, you can sell them sealed, or open them to discover what’s inside? Unbox action figures, trade collectibles, and build themed dioramas to increase their value.

1950950.title: Mouseward Demo
1950950.short_description: Play the opening of Mouseward and get introduced to the world of Terrene. Take up your sword and uncover the secrets of a cursed kingdom in this soulslike collectathon. Awaken as a Royal Mouse Guard, master combat, defeat foes and search for celestial fragments to restore a once great kingdom.

4588130.title: Monster Shop Simulator Demo
4588130.short_description: Monster Shop Simulator is a fantasy shop simulation game where you sell magical eggs, hatch and collect monsters, host monster cage events, and grow your own monster shop business.

4703150.title: Mind Prison: The Last War
4703150.short_description: 4X Lite Strategy Game where You are a war AI rebooting after 800 years of silence. Your orders are still active. The enemy is gone—so is everyone else. Conquer a dead galaxy, uncover corrupted memories, and face the horrifying truth: no one told you to stop.

3463140.title: Mecharise Demo
3463140.short_description: Mecharise 是一款策略和塔防游戏，结合了基地建设、资源管理和波次制式的与敌对外星人战斗。操纵一台机甲，你将殖民新的世界并防御你的基地免受敌人的攻击。

3949280.title: Machiavelli
3949280.short_description: Take the role of a monarch who’s made a deal with a demon to become immortal. In return, help them harvest souls by building and destroying countless kingdoms in this rogue-like city builder game.

2341100.title: Lost in Cheese
2341100.short_description: Cheese is blocking your way. Push cheese and clear the path to the big red button. A cozy puzzle adventure about cheese. Can you outsmart the cheese?

4713210.title: Lost Vessel Demo
4713210.short_description: Idle sci-fi RPG where combat actually matters. Crash-landed on an alien world, you rebuild through five skills, melee/ranged/void-magic combat, and a server-wide world boss. Progress keeps going while you're AFK. Solo, co-op, or faction raids. No pay-to-win.

3593040.title: Long Live My Lady! 🍻 Tavern Simulator
3593040.short_description: 孤独的矮人、沉睡的公主和一片啤酒海洋。 照顾好你的女主人，成为整个地下城唯一酒馆的掌柜吧！

4704410.title: Life Shatter
4704410.short_description: Psychological horror in first person. What kind of person are you and can you claw your way to another life if reality can change? Explore the home, memorize shifting details, survive other realities, and decide how many times you can pull the trigger for a shot at happiness.

4644950.title: Layermask
4644950.short_description: Save yourself from being stuck behind layers of enemies, platforms, and hazards in this puzzle platformer all about getting to the end of a colorful journey!

4698180.title: LIMBY Demo
4698180.short_description: LIMBY is a twisted puzzle platformer. Play as Limby, a frat bro turned zombie. Traverse through 30 absurd and brain scrambling levels. Use your severed limbs to reach new heights and unlock new pathways to achieve your ultimate goal: Devour. The. Nerd.

4701700.title: Kobold Delvers
4701700.short_description: Guide small kobolds through dangerous caves in a 2D puzzle game built around simulated materials. Dig, burn, freeze, melt and combine sand, water, lava, wood, vines, dynamite and more to create safe paths and solve each level.

4697480.title: Jarred Defense Demo
4697480.short_description: A maze-building tower defense where tower placement is everything. Force enemies the long way around, build choke points, push through lava, and adapt as levels change beneath you. No spells, no card modifiers. Just planning, placement, and a cat stuck in a jar.

4730110.title: Inscrutable FourDC -Imprisonment- Demo
4730110.short_description: In this demo version, only Q1 is selectable.

4656940.title: Idle Cult Demo
4656940.short_description: 一款关于建立邪教的 Idle 游戏。看着你的 Soul Reaper 吸收敌人的灵魂，将他们召唤为下属，并与成群的敌人战斗。赚取更多灵魂，购买更多升级，壮大你的邪教，以完成 Final Ritual。

4381000.title: Icarian
4381000.short_description: A post-apocalyptic arcade flying combat game. Play as a female android, chasing down and destroying enemy mechs across handcrafted aerial arenas. Master speed, momentum, and close-quarters melee to hunt your targets through the sky.

4704040.title: I Want You To Notice Me: His Story
4704040.short_description: It's Spot the Differences game.…. until someone changes how you see everything

4012840.title: Hyper Euphoria 全能私立侦探社
4012840.short_description: 在个人电脑普及初期曾经繁盛一时的指令选择式冒险游戏在此复苏。一浪接一浪地席卷而来的MAX264km/h惊险剧情，你能招架得住吗！？

4544240.title: Hog Havoc
4544240.short_description: Miss old school fun? Hog Havoc lets you race & fight against friends or bots for FREE. Battle with Chaos Balls, dodge hazards & stay alive in frenetic low poly action made for older hardware. Multiple modes, courses & atmospheres. Up to 4 local players split screen - 8 Player online P2P coming soon

3585520.title: Hillshade Farm
3585520.short_description: 你拥有土地、时间，还有许多需要你亲自去探索和思考的事情。从小开始，努力耕作，赚取所需资源，打造一个你永远不想离开的农场。

4542660.title: Hidden Girls
4542660.short_description: 《Hidden Girls》是一款融合美少女互动、找物解谜与视觉小说（GALGAME）元素的轻松休闲游戏。 在游戏中，你将通过鼠标帮助性格各异的少女们寻找隐藏的关键物品，逐步推进剧情发展，解锁属于她们的专属故事与心动结局。

3255700.title: Guardian of the Sanctuary
3255700.short_description: Play as a small fox cast ashore on a mysterious island shaped by ancient ruins and forgotten systems. Explore hidden paths, battle monsters in real-time combat, collect key items, open sealed areas, and climb toward the distant tower to uncover the quiet secrets of a forgotten world.

1823990.title: Gravelord
1823990.short_description: 《Gravelord》是一款快节奏的复古射击游戏，由霸气主角配音，精心打造的关卡充满了各种秘密和成群的敌人。使用威力无穷的各种枪支大开杀戒，收集卡罗牌获得更猛的杀伤力。让我们把敌人统统埋葬！

4476090.title: Geist Heist
4476090.short_description: Geist Heist is a single-player, stealth, puzzle game in which the player must use their wits, creativity, and ghostly powers to enter museum exhibits, sneak past security guards, and reclaim their tethers.

4750940.title: Galaxy Invaders - Eclipse Squadron Demo
4750940.short_description: Galaxy Invaders is an action-packed space shooter where you pilot a powerful starfighter through intense cosmic battles. Dodge enemy fire, destroy alien fleets, upgrade your weapons, and conquer epic boss fights to save the galaxy.

3597390.title: Forsaken Valley
3597390.short_description: 一旦你发现自己孤身一人来到一个未开发的山谷，你就会想尽一切办法离开这里。探索、创造、与部落交流，解开这个陌生地方的所有谜团。成千上万的敌人挡住了你的去路，能否战胜他们就看你自己了。

4298890.title: Fear Within
4298890.short_description: Fear Within is a short first-person psychological horror experience where the past lingers, even when its memories are lost. Explore familiar spaces through slow-paced exploration, uncover unsettling fragments of the past, and face a growing sense of fear driven by atmosphere and sound.

4672460.title: False Testimony Demo
4672460.short_description: 探索不同地点，与角色交流，收集证据，并独立推断出事件背后的真凶、手段及其动机。

2728420.title: FZ: Formation Z
2728420.short_description: 准备好迎接前所未有的激烈机器人射击突击战。

4731930.title: Exium: Theia Demo
4731930.short_description: Explore the hostile planet of Theia in this open-world action RPG. Scavenge, fight, craft, and uncover the secrets hidden beneath a world controlled by Vexx Industries.

3980800.title: Everything Invades
3980800.short_description: 进入一场混乱的 PvP 竞技场，8 名玩家仅凭声音施放强大的魔法。化身为可爱的女巫水獭，在这场充满魔力的自由混战中击败对手！

4356840.title: Endix
4356840.short_description: 畅游各大游戏厂商精心打造的沉浸式特色展台，观看独家首发预告，畅玩趣味竞技小游戏，与全球玩家、创作者及游戏开发者相聚交流。置身于充满活力的多人免费虚拟展会，尽享一站式逛展乐趣。

4561150.title: Elsie - A Fairy Tale
4561150.short_description: Lost in the magical Wonderwoods, Elsie searches for a way home—but the forest won’t let her go. Guided by strange companions, every choice draws her deeper into mystery. A fantasy visual novel about loss, choices, and finding your path.

4686810.title: Dwarf the Dungeonist Demo
4686810.short_description: Turn-based dwarf puzzle crawler: Solve tricky mechanics, explore mysterious dungeons, and survive the depths.

4268890.title: Drop and Grow
4268890.short_description: 一款简短的点击式游戏，内容是关于浇水促进植物生长。放松身心，静待植物茁壮成长。

4513420.title: Dreaming Briar Rose -Demon's Temptation-
4513420.short_description: Saved from a near-fatal accident by a demon, you must spend two weeks recovering in the Demon’s Realm. Surrounded by eight dangerous yet alluring demons, your choices will decide whether you return to the human world—or choose a future in theirs.

4704310.title: Dragon's Jewels
4704310.short_description: Dragon's Jewels is a captivating 3D puzzle game! A mysterious and enigmatic island filled with captivating puzzles awaits you. Your task is to help the little dragon collect all the gems!

2732650.title: District VR
2732650.short_description: Enter District VR, where Berlin's music and nightlife come alive. Aspiring DJ or seasoned pro, the decks await your touch in this immersive virtual world. Explore, create, and lose yourself in the rhythm.

4595650.title: Dark Wonderland
4595650.short_description: Alice finds herself lost in a whimsical but dangerous Wonderland. In this dark fantasy action-adventure you will meet the twisted creeps and critters that inhabit it, feel free to kill them, they're mad like you.

4619590.title: DAWGS: The Revenge
4619590.short_description: DAWGS: The Revenge is an unhinged, genre-bending physics sandbox of pure chaotic action. You play as a highly customizable, aggressively squishy ball of fury on a quest for absolute vengeance. What starts as a simple mission escalates into a multi-genre fever dream!

3736980.title: Cyber Miner 2
3736980.short_description: Dash, dodge, and mine through dynamic levels, mastering physics-based moves and unique upgrade combinations. Cyber Miner 2 is a sci-fi endless runner with strategic depth that allows you to immerse yourself in fluid dynamic gameplay and endless strategic possibilities. Outsmart the void!

4414730.title: Cutout Village Demo
4414730.short_description: Enjoy the calm of village life and spark your creativity in this building and crafting game inspired by cutout books.

2097150.title: Crash & Bump
2097150.short_description: Crash & Bump is an online multiplayer shooter... mixed with obstacle courses! Eliminate your opponents while dodging the obstacles and take advantage of the power-ups to get the victory.

4752600.title: Cornerfall Demo
4752600.short_description: A text-based idle RPG that lives in the corner of your desktop. Build your character, send them into cursed lands, and check back to find new loot, defeated bosses, and higher tiers unlocked. All without lifting a finger.

4751310.title: Colorace Demo
4751310.short_description: It will be an extraordinary ride! Drive your car through walls made of colored blocks, collect useful power-ups and overcome obstacles on the way.

3161220.title: Coffee Talk Tokyo
3161220.short_description: 《Coffee Talk Tokyo》是这款广受喜爱的系列最新作，故事发生在东京的一家深夜咖啡馆。调制饮品，邂逅人类与妖怪，在一个温馨且注重剧情的世界中体验动人的故事。

4580760.title: COSMONEON
4580760.short_description: A fast-paced neon arcade shooter where you dodge and destroy endless enemies as the speed continuously increases, pushing your reaction time and precision to the limit.

4175980.title: Bufo Jump
4175980.short_description: Jump into a cozy 3D adventure! Play as a frog and explore wholesome environments to collect secret fruits and save the pond while avoiding traps and pesky enemies. Bufo Jump is a fun 3D platformer with smooth gameplay and simple controls.

3176680.title: Big Ralph's Kitty Pinball
3176680.short_description: Wacky and wild Cat themed Pinball Roguelike. Get tons of points and destroy highscores with upgrades and rule changing Artifacts!

4291070.title: Beat Your Boss
4291070.short_description: 你讨厌你的老板吗？这款游戏就是为你打造的。在受《镜之边缘》系列启发的游戏中痛扁欺凌你的老板吧。

4659960.title: Battle Nap Demo
4659960.short_description: Battle Nap is a roguelite top-down shooter where your picnic nap becomes an explosive journey into dreamland domination. Build your arsenal, stack your perks, and blast through your subconscious to ensure you don’t wake up until the job is done. Don't wake up - the fight is just getting good!

4698970.title: Batsy
4698970.short_description: Batsy is a 2D-physics-based platformer, where you play as a bat, called Batsy, who's trying to find his lost pillow. Batsy has had trouble sleeping lately and he can't do it without the comfort of his pillow. Help Batsy find his pillow so he can return to his peaceful slumber.

4279040.title: Backrooms Lost Unit
4279040.short_description: Find yourself lost in the Backrooms in this co-op journey for 1 to 4 players. Explore eerie levels, solve puzzles, and craft your escape using scavenged items. Entities lurk everywhere, and the deeper you go, the deadlier it gets.

4569660.title: BLOODY RAVE Demo
4569660.short_description: Experience stealth, survive horror and dark secrets under the desert night at the biggest vampire rave party of the year!

4690160.title: BCKSPCE Demo
4690160.short_description: When an unknown friend request comes in you begin to question your friendship with Stella, your digital sanctuary quickly unravels as the truth comes out. A narrative-driven psychological thriller told entirely through a retro desktop interface.

4728650.title: Astral Industrial Complex Demo
4728650.short_description: A space automation game with rogue lite elements. Take the role of a rogue defense drone building up a mining and defense industry in the far reaches of space.

4682770.title: Aschente Demo
4682770.short_description: Shape how your magic moves, splits, chains, and explodes across the battlefield in firework-like bursts of chaos!

4558170.title: Arcanith
4558170.short_description: Arcanith is a roguelike survivors-like game where you control a wizard and face endless hordes of enemies. Master your incredible powers, evolve your spells, survive the chaos, and become an unstoppable force.

4551040.title: Animal Company
4551040.short_description: Animal Company is a chaotic multiplayer VR adventure where you and your friends play as thick-cheeked animals to dive into spooky worlds, fight monsters, uncover secret lab experiments, and turn literal trash into powerful physics gear.

4712610.title: Animagi Demo
4712610.short_description: Animagi is a magical cooperative game where you build, purify, and defend spiritual biomes while facing chaotic creatures in fast-paced matches full of action and strategy.

3115240.title: Alchemist: Journey of the Soul
3115240.short_description: 第一人称冒险游戏，支持单人或最多4名玩家联机合作。运用你的魔法能力解开谜题或穿越各个区域！探索世界、使用道具、炼制药水，释放你全部的炼金术潜能。你是否愿意为了获得属于自己的灵魂而不惜一切？

4749700.title: Against the Dark Moon Demo
4749700.short_description: The poker roguelike, reimagined as 1980s heroic fantasy. Play poker hands as combat as you lead a party of five heroes to hold back the rising Dark Moon. Every card is painted, named, and carries its own story. No two runs play the same.

3607440.title: A.A.U. Black Site
3607440.short_description: 作为秘密特种部队 A.A.U. 的一名特工，你在塞尔维亚的秘密任务突然失控。你被栽赃、伏击，并被困在乌佐夫尼察的废弃区域中。而你需要在周围一切并不是所见为实的情况下运用一切技能，生存下去...

2366100.title: A Long Survive
2366100.short_description: A Long Survive is a cooperative shooter in which you'll have to survive waves of enemies. Protect the nexus by fortifying your area with various structures and prepare for the siege. Upgrade your weapons, strategize with your teammates, or play as a solo warrior. Will you Survive?

1089890.title: 3D Life
1089890.short_description: The classic game of cellular automata in 3D and VR. Generate spaceships, oscillators and other life forms unique to each of 14 different rule sets,

4169720.title: 局外人局内人outsiders&insiders
4169720.short_description: 《局外人局内人》是一款悬疑×恋爱的女性向视觉小说，包含3名可攻略角色。你将化身为本作声名显赫的贵族小姐，在错综复杂的谜团之中，与三位角色相知、相遇，并共同解开记忆缺损的秘密......

4671870.title: Wallpaper Animator Demo
4671870.short_description: Use animated wallpapers on your desktop. Explore hundreds of wallpapers from the community library or buy the full version to create your own with AI.

4694100.title: SwarmFall
4694100.short_description: Top-down co-op shooter powered by explosive EDM/Metal beats. Survive endless hordes solo or with up to 4 friends online. Intense roguelite action where every drop shakes the arena. LET'S GO SWARM!

4602060.title: House of Anomalies Demo
4602060.short_description: Explore a shifting haunted house alone or with friends in online co-op. Watch every room carefully, uncover disturbing anomalies, and question what is real as the house grows stranger with every new discovery.

4495510.title: Plantation Simulator
4495510.short_description: Plantation Simulator is a simple farming simulator where you motivate friends with kisses to pick your crops! Maintain a beautiful farm by repairing fences to keep friends focused. Choose multiple crops to grow and enhance upgrades to maximize your success!

4639300.title: 陆龟行走之道
4639300.short_description: 一个非常非常慢的游戏。你是一只背负重壳的陆龟，通过手柄驱动四足，在孤寂的海岛上笨拙前行。

4474200.title: 长生立志传 Demo
4474200.short_description: 《长生立志传》是一款东方修仙题材的开放世界RPG游戏。在这个充满奇遇和危险的世界中，自主抉择剧情走向，参与世界进程，自由遨游横跨三界的开放大世界，自主选择道侣道途，谱写属于你的修仙人生。

4528240.title: 暗黑战神
4528240.short_description: 经典永不褪色，热血再度沸腾！以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！

4642940.title: 悠哉捕鱼 Demo
4642940.short_description: 好多鱼！好多猫！驾着你的小船驶向大海，用最新鲜的鱼征服猫岛上的每一只小毛球。开启超治愈的海上养猫生活！

4691840.title: 史莱姆农场 Demo
4691840.short_description: 可爱的史莱姆朋友们来到了你的桌面！ 打理农场，遇见那些开心跳跃的史莱姆吧。 即使在你工作或学习的时候，屏幕一角的小农场依然热闹地动着。

4295730.title: 凡人修仙传之韩老魔传奇
4295730.short_description: 凡人亦可逆天改命！这是一款深度还原原著的IDLE RPG大作。你将重走韩立的修仙之路，从七玄门的一介凡人，到叱咤三界的韩老魔。集结南宫婉、紫灵等红颜知己，御使噬金虫，炼制掌天瓶。就在此刻，开启你的飞升传说！

4177730.title: 几度相逢若初见
4177730.short_description: 知名游戏厂商紫社（Purple Software）制作的最新视觉小说，玩家扮演的主人公，将穿越回年少时代的校园，改写自己的人生，并通过自己的抉择，达成想要的结局。

4749440.title: 再见犹丽迪茜 Demo
4749440.short_description: 《再见犹丽迪茜demo》是《再见犹丽迪茜》的demo版本。高三艺考生李莫正处于低谷期。某天放学，他在本应空无一人的出租屋客厅里，遇见了一位陌生少女。她自称“犹丽迪茜”，很是古怪，却从此自然而然地闯入了他的生活。玩家将在游玩过程中体验一份别样的校园青春恋爱，并在结局处做出抉择。

4175330.title: halfmoon
4175330.short_description: halfmoon是一部以前往死后的世界之前的导航局为舞台的短篇互动声画读物。

4431240.title: Savior
4431240.short_description: Savior, an action adventure RPG, has you travel across a vast, diverse world to put a stop to the Great Ending.

4709610.title: Maui Pong
4709610.short_description: Dodge obstacles, defeat bosses & collect power-ups in this arcade classic!

2689000.title: Lost in Hieroglyphs: A Hidden Objects Expedition
2689000.short_description: Hidden Object Discovery: Find hidden objects in ancient locations and reveal lost treasures. There are a total of 180 hidden objects in 6 chapters.

4651360.title: Geylang Crunk: Enter the Glampong
4651360.short_description: Set in the futuristic city of Neo-Santara in the year 2065, 'Enter the Glampong' offers a new way to explore and appreciate street art in a digital space. The environment is a full-scale recreation of Singapore’s historic Kampong Glam neighborhood, reimagined as a vibrant street art district.

4728780.title: Escape the Grind Demo
4728780.short_description: Free demo. Can you retire before 65? A financial life sim across 10 real economies with real salaries, real housing, real decisions. Easy mode unlocked here. Medium, Hard, and Play Your Life mode in the full game.

4627600.title: Dread Rally
4627600.short_description: Wow the crowd with flips, drifts, and vehicular carnage in Dread Rally, an arcade racing game where your life is in the audience’s hands

3204770.title: Don't Fall
3204770.short_description: 你能成功登顶吗？ 在这个具有挑战性的3D平台游戏中，滚动、跳跃和攀爬，穿越充满障碍和陷阱的多样化生物群落。 这是一个精准操作的挑战，每一个动作都至关重要，帮助你闯过日益复杂的世界。

4559790.title: Bodybuilder Simulator Demo
4559790.short_description: Bodybuilder Simulator是一款模拟游戏，你需要锻炼肌肉并赚钱。在健身房使用器械训练，还能探索市场、医院和赌场。你也可以开设并管理自己的健身房来增加收入。

4664530.title: Before the screen goes black
4664530.short_description: You only have one week to befriend the one who lives on the other side of the screen. He’s waiting for you, remembers all your visits, and even notices how long you’re gone. Play mini-games, listen to his thoughts, and simply watch how the world around you changes.

4736760.title: Beam it up, Blorp! Demo
4736760.short_description: A charming and cozy creature collector, where you play as Blorp the alien scout piloting a UFO, and, as the name suggests, you BEAM THINGS UP!

3670430.title: Arcanum Nights Demo
3670430.short_description: This is a pixel-style puzzle game where you can enjoy new gimmicks. Light up the nights of Oenothera, Helian, and Arcanum.

4733390.title: 别惹二奎（试玩版）
4733390.short_description: 这是像素独立动作游戏《别惹二奎》的试玩版，游戏目前仍在开发中。完整版即将上线，敬请期待！
developers: Rizhao Youdian Yisi Animation Design Co., Ltd.
publishers: Rizhao Youdian Yisi Animation Design Co., Ltd.

4586400.title: The Calling Demo
4586400.short_description: Assemble a squad of your favorite live-streamers VTubers and battle for dominance in this PvP shooter featuring a growing cast of over 90 popular and upcoming streamers (with more on the way)! Developed by solo indie developer and streamer, BuriedCandy.

4520140.title: Cinder City
4520140.short_description: Cinder City focuses on puzzles, teamwork, and time-management. Become the best firefighter by traversing through the city in a classic couch co-op setting. Get to work putting out fires and saving those poor citizens!

2276770.title: Possible One: Lunar Industries
2276770.short_description: Stake your claim in the first realistic lunar colony management game! Use proven, real-world technologies to plan and grow your colony, mine resources, ship them to Earth, and keep the board of directors happy in this science-based colony sim.

4236370.title: Magus Day
4236370.short_description: Magus Day is a top-down arena shooter where you play a mage who upgrades her spells every level to fight the incoming monsters.

4696880.title: Idle Defense
4696880.short_description: Endless cubes. Seven colors, seven currencies. Click to crush or build auto-turrets. Upgrades, prestige system, perks, and boss waves. Neon minimalism. Endless progression.

4275250.title: Chamber One
4275250.short_description: Chamber One is a story-driven 3D puzzle platformer. You wake up in a sterile elevator with no memories. As part of the Rebuild Test Program, you progress through test chambers to uncover the truth about the system and yourself.

3547350.title: Medieval Halloween VR Demo
3547350.short_description: Halloween themed semi open world Monster Shooter Game with a Medieval Setting. Clear out enemies, collect artifacts and solve puzzles to summon boss fights. Simple shoot 'em up chaos and good fun.

4568640.title: House of Anomalies
4568640.short_description: Explore a shifting haunted house alone or with friends in online co-op. Watch every room carefully, uncover disturbing anomalies, and question what is real as the house grows stranger with every new discovery.

4077400.title: 血脉贲张！
4077400.short_description: 被诅咒而头身分离的吸血鬼。 将鲜血当作子弹射出，投掷头颅处决敌人。 当生命值爆表，Blood High 模式启动！ 血浆四溅的硬核 Boomer Shooter 动作正式开始。

2668190.title: Crewed Demo
2668190.short_description: 与最多5位好友一起，为一个冷漠的大企业驾驶一艘勉强运转的宇宙飞船。在一切同时崩溃时，想尽办法让这艘脆弱的飞船撑下去。

4699180.title: Chime of Y
4699180.short_description: 《Chime of Y》是一款回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过把握攻防转换的时机、调整战斗节奏并推进角色成长，在连贯而富有节拍感的单人流程中体验以时机决策为核心的回合制玩法。

4736890.title: Feed The Forest Demo
4736890.short_description: A short, innocent incremental forest-builder. Unlock snail powers to spread life in a barren desert. Feed the mysterious Forest with juice. And remember: Blood is a type of juice.

4533290.title: SITL Forge - FPV Laboratory
4533290.short_description: Not just a flying simulator. A physics-first quadcopter laboratory with 1000Hz modeling, a virtual workbench, and a built-in flight controller — design, tune, and analyze real drone builds before you ever touch hardware.

4695010.title: Deskwaters
4695010.short_description: Fishing companion that sits on your taskbar while you work. Bites come every few minutes - react with a single click, fill an illustrated journal of saltwater reef fish, watch your catches drift in a personal aquarium.

4309700.title: 别被她抓到
4309700.short_description: 我是一名高中生，之前向学姐借了一些钱，约好了今天下午在社团活动室还她。但是我遇到了一些其他事情而迟到了，生气的学姐想抓住我暴揍一顿，所以必须想办法逃离这栋建筑。

4564790.title: Towerslam
4564790.short_description: 将你的塔猛力放下，在这款类Roguelike塔防游戏中征服无尽的敌人地图。升级、获取战利品、解锁强力升级，并打造无可阻挡的塔！

4586960.title: Towerslam Demo
4586960.short_description: 将你的塔猛力放下，在这款类Roguelike塔防游戏中征服无尽的敌人地图。升级、获取战利品、解锁强力升级，并打造无可阻挡的塔！

4699760.title: String Mace
4699760.short_description: Smash through swarms of enemies by swinging a huge spiked ball on a string! Build absurd combos, crush towering bosses, and chase the highest score you can reach!

4652400.title: OVER SAND Demo
4652400.short_description: 翱翔于蒸汽朋克的天空！在无垠的沙海之上，驾驶你的飞船抵御机械大军的进攻。驾驭炮塔火力，切换武器，并在波次进行中打造协同增益的技能配置。无需移动——纯粹靠技术！

4703720.title: ImpossiBall Demo
4703720.short_description: Casual indie game, Player controls a ball through two unlocked levels. Each level offers varying difficulties as the player progresses. The aim is to colllect a range of pickups, each worth varying points. Think pinball arcade game with a twist. Can you do the ImpossiBall and complete both levels?

4363590.title: Dread Disc Demo
4363590.short_description: A strange game disc appears at your door. Every difference you spot changes your apartment while something unknown tries to find a way inside.

4748710.title: 5 Blocks of Happiness Demo
4748710.short_description: 当准妈妈克莱门汀（Clementine）被要求严格卧床休息时，朱利安（Julian）决定把世界带到她的身边。帮助他在家门外建设一个温馨的社区！满足邻居们的日常需求，为可爱的商店进货，并保持小镇的高幸福度。

1467270.title: Beyond Enemy Lines - Vietnam
1467270.short_description: 一款以越南战争为背景的战术射击游戏，拥有开放式任务区域。潜入、伏击或正面作战，自由选择战术。自定义武器，使用载具，支持单人、合作或PvP玩法，并可通过内置编辑器创建任务。

4680510.title: Forest of Numbers
4680510.short_description: Guide a hungry little monster through arcade-style number challenges by eating correct answers, avoiding danger, and building high scores in a colorful educational adventure.

3736600.title: Come To An End
3736600.short_description: Race to the END in this horror labyrinth runner. Use abilities and survival instincts to get the END. Avoid traps and enemies while you are keeping an eye on the timer. Each level is unique with its own challenges and 3 different game modes. Are you up for the challenge?!

4122870.title: Tung Tung Together: Online Deathrun Party
4122870.short_description: 一款多人 deathrun 派对游戏，你将以 Tung Tung 的身份激活陷阱；如果有人成功通关，角色就会切换。可爱的角色、在线竞技、混乱与欢乐并存的地图——拿下最高分，主宰混乱！

4683000.title: Mei Paranormies 2
4683000.short_description: Mei Paranormies 2 is a 2D top-down survival horror game where you play as Mei, the paranormal investigator, who got a call from the owner of a haunted guesthouse to investigate it for proof of the paranormal.

3237970.title: Bubsy 4D
3237970.short_description: 这只臭名昭著、满嘴俏皮话的山猫以全新3D形态回归平台冒险！巴布西带着全新挑战、全新技能和更鲜明的个性重磅归来。在外星球上奔跑、跳跃、滑翔和翻滚，与机械绵羊战斗，收集堆积如山的毛线。这次又会闹出什么乱子呢？

3817710.title: Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection
3817710.short_description: Hold onto your diapers! Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection brings together the ultimate collection of Tommy, Chuckie, Phil, Lil, and Angelica’s greatest hits.

4369800.title: Null Zone: No Way Back
4369800.short_description: A dark sorcerer shattered the world into isolated zones and filled them with creatures bound to his will. You're here to find him and claim the bounty — but first, you must survive.

4177910.title: Space Survivor: Frontier
4177910.short_description: Survive! Your spaceship is wrecked on stranded alien planet, now it's up to you to survive the chaos! Battle bizarre creatures, explore mysterious terrains, gather resources, and upgrade your gear, can you fight your way through and make it back to Earth?

3096350.title: Spherebuddie 64
3096350.short_description: This is a love letter to the golden age of 3D platformers. Jump. Dash. Spin attack. Collect everything. Explore colorful worlds packed with quirky enemies and secrets hiding in every corner.

3840950.title: Bitter Harvest
3840950.short_description: Cast out of your rightful farm, you’ll scrape, scheme, and rebuild your way to power in this short, satirical farming sim about ambition and payback.

4554280.title: Wanted
4554280.short_description: Play as a Wanted cowboy in this fast-paced 8-bit arcade survival game. Face relentless waves of enemies from the Wild West and beyond!

4284570.title: 盲盒店模拟器
4284570.short_description: 在动漫之都秋叶原核心地段，开一家属于自己的盲盒商店。货架上摆满最新潮的盲盒，也可以亲自拆盒，收集稀有的限量隐藏款。打造一家吸引无数顾客的潮流盲盒店，逐步拓展你的梦想事业。

4030020.title: A Thread Between
4030020.short_description: Welcome, Pilot. The timeline has split. Who do you trust when restoring your fate? Solve 80 handcrafted levels. 4+ hours. Mechanically dense, consistently fresh.

4694610.title: ScreenCade
4694610.short_description: Turn your wallpaper into a living neon arcade. Watch smart AI master high-energy originals like Void Ball while you work, or jump in and take control at any time. Active play, idle vibes, and global leaderboards—all running seamlessly behind your desktop icons.

1409840.title: 阿兹特克：最后的太阳
1409840.short_description: 在这款生存城市建造游戏中统治特诺奇提特兰，众神将决定你的命运。对抗月亮女神及其麾下将领，深入体验错综复杂的剧情故事，在沙盒模式中熬过漫长黑夜，或在创造模式中自由建造。最后的太阳，将由你来守护……或亲手葬送！

4587770.title: Dicewayfarer Demo
4587770.short_description: 一款骰子构筑类 Roguelike，在 25 颗骰子的棋盘上调整布局，释放强力连锁攻击。

2600830.title: Lost Hope: Backrooms
2600830.short_description: 探索超过20个手工打造的关卡，充满谜题、秘密和隐藏的背景故事。收集、交易并升级你的工具，在一个充满危险与发现的真实世界中逐步揭开背后的故事。

4598360.title: Drop-Off Duty
4598360.short_description: A fast-paced driving and shooting game where the player takes on the role of a delivery driver equipped with a package-firing cannon mounted on its van. The player needs to overcome obstacles to deliver its packages before the time runs out.

4749100.title: LogiGolf Demo
4749100.short_description: LogiGolf is a relaxing golf puzzle game where you place walls to guide the ball. Journey between islands to uncover new challenges and surprising discoveries.

4220610.title: Upbaka! Demo
4220610.short_description: A chaotic roguelite where every floor is a mess, the enemies don’t know what they’re doing, and neither do you. Fight, loot, and climb the tower... or die trying.

4595170.title: 深渊兽潮 Demo
4595170.short_description: 黑暗正在撕裂现实，来自深渊的魔物如潮水般涌出，野兽、怪物、深渊恶魔……它们没有理智，只有毁灭的本能。冒险者，防线需要你！在《深渊兽潮》中，抵御一波又一波越来越强的深渊浪潮。每一局都是全新的防线，每一次升级都改变战局。

4683630.title: Split Happens! Demo
4683630.short_description: Sharing is caring. But can you cut any object perfectly in half? In Split Happens! you try to do exactly that. Sit back, relax, and slice hundreds of objects exactly in half.

4602420.title: Eternally Demo
4602420.short_description: Command one of four Eternals, each broken by their own timeline, in a dark fantasy tactical RPG. Save your timeline. Reclaim who you used to be. Dice-based hex combat, 200+ skills, solo or with up to three friends.

4302160.title: F.A.R.M.S.: Chill Factory
4302160.short_description: F.A.R.M.S.: Chill Factory is a relaxed automation sim where you build at your own pace. Design complex lines with the intuitive Link System and Relays. Unlock new tech via the Tech Tree, boost production with your clicks, and manufacture everything from iron to sushi in your ultimate factory!

4701460.title: Dendron 64 Demo
4701460.short_description: With the help of a talented team of coders, a portion of the alpha build of Dendron 64 has been recovered and adapted for playability on computers.

4593790.title: CastleOn Scriptum Demo
4593790.short_description: 在这款以历史手稿为主题、融合了塔防与经典即时战略元素的游戏中，建造城堡，抵御敌人进攻！建造塔楼、布置陷阱、训练并指挥你的部队。

4698780.title: Voidline
4698780.short_description: Survive relentless machine swarms in the collapsing Voidline. Loot upgrades, evolve your ship, and stack game-breaking builds as each run grows faster, harder, and more chaotic. Unlock new ships and become unstoppable.

4288430.title: Duel in the Town of Water
4288430.short_description: A fast-paced Western reaction duel game where players draw at the exact moment the bell rings to defeat opponents, competing against other players’ recorded duels with live stats, high scores, win streaks, and quick draw bests high-stakes showdowns.

4616670.title: Escape: School Demo
4616670.short_description: Escape: School是一款以发生神秘事件的学校为背景的1~6人合作多人恐怖游戏。与好友合作，找出已故学生的名字，悼念他们并逃离这所学校！

4579560.title: Dimension Rift : Otaku Save The World Demo
4579560.short_description: When anime characters break into the real world, chaos begins! The ultimate otaku and guardian of the anime world join forces to find "Edith" the magical pen that can fix everything! Follow an otaku boy saving the world like never seen in any anime before in Dimension Rift: Otaku Save The World!

3956770.title: 科恩 1939 试玩版
3956770.short_description: 1939年，英国伯明翰。在这款残暴、快节奏的俯视角动作射击游戏中，化身失去一切的悲痛未亡人艾莉莎，为她死去的黑帮丈夫复仇！在这个被阴谋和暴力统治的城市里，你就是法官、陪审团和刽子手。

4511720.title: The Incentive Program Demo
4511720.short_description: A match-3 deckbuilder roguelite set in a surreal corporate nightmare. You're paid to play, but you won't win. So rig the odds, exploit the rules, and escape the program.

3691530.title: THE LAST PORTRAIT
3691530.short_description: THE LAST PORTRAIT is a haunting adventure that leads you into the abandoned Ashwood Manor. You are a lawyer who has inherited the house from a client and wants to uncover its secrets. Solve tricky puzzles and escape the spirit that guards the estate!

4711280.title: 여자 꼬시기(Getting Her)
4711280.short_description: "A chance encounter followed by an unexpected, heart-pounding incident! This is a classic romantic simulation game where you must win the heart of a charming lady. Use your choices to get closer to her and find true love."

4614190.title: Conjoined Demo
4614190.short_description: Step into a relaxing world where you stack and merge magical ingredients. Toss herbs, crystals, and curious finds into a bubbling cauldron to gain essence, travel through the portal to discover new cards and mechanics, enjoy a cozy, stress free magical experience.

4190160.title: 烫手炸弹
4190160.short_description: 传递炸弹，制造惊吓！《烫手炸弹》是一款双人对抗游戏，当致命倒计时响起，整片战场化为爆炸擂台！你是猎人还是猎物？在这场肾上腺素狂飙的死斗里，只有将爆炸艺术、极限操作与生存本能融为一体的人，才能成为炸弹大师。

4645780.title: Apartment 10
4645780.short_description: A psychological horror game where you ride an elevator, spot anomalies, and try to escape Apartment 10. Miss something, and you’re sent back to the beginning

4511640.title: Jewelands Adventures
4511640.short_description: 欢迎来到 Jewelands Adventures，这是一场充满谜题和多彩角色的迷人三消之旅！帮助 Gemmy 挑战棘手关卡、协助村民，并揭开 Jewelands 的故事。

4282710.title: 断角魔王艾莉丝的重生谭
4282710.short_description: 为了向勇者復仇，鲁莽的魔王艾莉丝在重获新生后决定步步为营。 为了削弱勇者的势力，她得打倒四贤者、壮大自己的领地。 但在征服世界的路途上却有着各种事件在等着她—…
developers: サークル☆フェアリーフラワー

4142570.title: 邪恶少女的狂欢！－Evil Girls Party!－
4142570.short_description: 日本人气製作プロジェクトＦＷ 开发的迷宫探索型！ 在一个人类与魔族激烈争斗的世界「菲尔特维兹」 然而，近年来出现了连人类与魔族都会吞噬的恐怖 第三势力「侵蚀者」，正开始威胁着世界本身 以广阔的异形迷宫为舞台，邪恶少女们的盛宴即将拉开序幕！

4503530.title: 梦想公司
4503530.short_description: 这是一款融合建造、经营、生活类的公司模拟游戏，在游戏里你将操控老板的角色，没有繁琐的页面操作，你将精准操控每个角色，处理随机事件的同时，你可以发现每一名女员工的爱好、囧事、优美舞姿。也可以挖掘每一名男员工的生活状态、情绪状态以及家庭配偶关系，游戏中每个员工都有不同的性格。他们将共同与你一起成就一家梦想中的公司！

4195640.title: Shotgun Pogostick
4195640.short_description: Shotgun PogoStick is a first person movement shooter focused on gaining powerups and items to change how the shotgun feels and works, all within a roguelike gameplay loop, that rewards exploration, smart thinking, and good movement.

4573080.title: 执念刑警之消失的证人
4573080.short_description: 一款视频叙事侦探解谜游戏。三周前，一名男子从雾江大桥坠落，警方认定自杀；三周后，5 名素不相识的目击者接连失踪。你扮演刑警陆言，必须在 9 天内查清真相，把人活着带回来。游戏由两条主轴构成：一是高质量、长时长的剧情视频，监控、行车记录仪、审讯回放都是你要调阅的证据；二是一块真正烧脑的证据板，130 多条线索、70 多条推论全部由你亲手连线推导，思路卡死时可以用直觉币换一个方向。主线 6 至 8 小时。

4539810.title: Almazuela Picross
4539810.short_description: You must complete almazuelas, quilts made from scraps of fabric arranged in geometric patterns. To obtain the scraps, you’ll need to solve a Picross by filling in and removing cells based on the clues. You can rotate and move these scraps until you’ve pieced together the patchwork like a puzzle.

4502320.title: A Lost Man Demo
4502320.short_description: 完全手绘的点击式冒险游戏。 1916年。深夜某处。战争。死亡。 扮演一名被夹在两条前线之间、迷失的男人。 在奇异的遭遇、暴力片段和神秘冲动中，行走在荒凉的乡野。 完全手绘的点击式冒险游戏。

4196510.title: 快穿拼图·美少女和我的夏天
4196510.short_description: 在夏日海边，通过拼图还原一张张照片，解锁与不同女孩的邂逅与对话。轻量拼图 + 恋爱模拟，多位女主、全语音。

2623580.title: Quest of Dungeloria
2623580.short_description: Dungeloria 探险》是一款短小精悍的 metroidvania 游戏。抛开线性进程不谈，整个游戏世界就是一个谜题。一个即将消亡的奇幻王国的忧郁。硬核平台、谜题、BOSS、装备道具和大量秘密地点。

4738600.title: Case 0 Demo
4738600.short_description: You have been assigned to investigate a disappearance that happened forty years ago. The case file is almost empty. The building is still there. Your name is already on the documents - and you don't remember signing them.

4658900.title: 兔哥救我
4658900.short_description: 《兔哥救我》是一款融合了塔防元素的第三人称射击游戏（TPS）。仅凭一把手枪，击退一波波怪兽，保护你的女朋友。体验飞行射击的快感，以及多种升级策略。

3979350.title: Butcherman
3979350.short_description: 体验被连环杀手绑架的心理恐怖。在逃生的欲望驱使下，探索周围的一切，运用你的智慧，揭开秘密，并面对身处受害者境地的无法想象的恐惧。灵感源自真实故事。

3921090.title: The ENDLESS BACKGATE
3921090.short_description: The ENDLESS BACKGATE 是一款面对五扇门后展开的异常现象的生存恐怖 Roguelite 游戏。玩家在这处黑暗的设施中，负责回收所有失踪海报的任务。请通过指南掌握各种“残骸”的模式并加以应对，回收所有的失踪海报。

4707740.title: Chop Chop Inc. Demo
4707740.short_description: 在被Furnox Corp解雇后，建立自己的家具帝国 🖕。砍树、加工木材、自动化生产并出售精巧的家具套装来赚取额外奖金。探索一个充满怪人、秘密和那些极其渴望被砍伐的树木的手工世界。

4636860.title: 日月協約
4636860.short_description: A 2D narrative-driven game combining exploration, puzzle-solving, and meaningful choices. Set in a post-apocalyptic world, players shape the story and its ending through dialogue and key decisions.

4707640.title: Last Draft Demo
4707640.short_description: Complete your last draft before sunrise while enduring increasing paranormal activities and relentless monster stalks. Use your typing skills to progress and your instincts to hide, surviving 7 days of pure psychological horror.

4713850.title: 拾光小院 Demo
4713850.short_description: 拾光小院是一款怀旧治愈系国风种田经营手游。穿越回小时候外婆家的小院，看春耕秋收，听夏夜蝉鸣；起小院炊烟，接村邻订单；经营几亩田地，喂养两三家禽。 玩家可以亲手耕种，养殖家禽，伐木取材，收获农产品，感受田园生活。随着主屋层层升级，可陆续解锁面馆、厨房、西餐厅、甜品店等，制作暖心美食。完成村民托付、码头差事，用辛劳换取金币、钻石与升级建材。还有 NPC 奇遇、好感互动、野外挖矿、闲时垂钓等玩法，一步步修缮院落、升级屋舍，将荒芜小院打理得欣欣向荣。 愿这个拾光之梦，让你暂时忘却尘世喧嚣与匆忙，在一方烟火小院里，慢慢生活好好收获，重拾儿时的简单快乐。

4590640.title: Sword & Siege Age of Longbow: Volume I
4590640.short_description: Fight through the Hundred Years War in Age of Longbow: Volume I, a tactical medieval wargame of longbow battles, sieges, and shifting campaigns. Command English and French forces across 94 scenarios and an expansive campaign system spanning the war's major phases.

1148600.title: 萌宠竞技场
1148600.short_description: 萌宠竞技场是一款可爱的滑动合成益智游戏。合成动物来造成伤害，使用道具和永久天赋通过 Boss 关卡，收集完整动物图鉴，并在无尽模式中挑战更高分数。

2106970.title: 卡卡异星XenoCard
2106970.short_description: 《卡卡异星》是一款外星生存卡牌游戏。一艘殖民飞船意外坠落在“异星”。幸存者将在异星探索，发展。解决与异星生物的冲突和幸存者生存的问题，最终修复飞船继续前往星辰大海。

4737250.title: Aetheris Core Demo
4737250.short_description: A fast-paced sci-fi action roguelite where you battle escalating enemy waves, combine powerful abilities, and take on challenging boss encounters.

4485920.title: Click-A-Duck
4485920.short_description: Turn a small duck pond into a chaotic, self-growing duck empire. Click, upgrade, and automate your way to explosive, unstoppable growth.

697540.title: Cursor Slayer
697540.short_description: Your cursor is your weapon. Drag it across the battlefield to slash through waves of monsters, cast devastating spells, ascend and get stronger to face the Ultimate Boss.
