3542540.title: Calm Before the Storm
3542540.short_description: 暴风雨前的宁静是一款复古日本主题的清洁模拟游戏

4638070.title: Once Upon a Time… After the End Demo
4638070.short_description: 管理一个童话故事幸存者的避难所，探索危险地区，并在一个崩溃的幻想世界中做出决策。

4506420.title: Escape From Ground Demo
4506420.short_description: 程序生成关卡的无尽跳跃游戏试玩版，包含敌人与不同生态区域。

4661120.title: Typer Survivor Demo
4661120.short_description: Typer Survivor is a fast-paced typing roguelike that will push your typing to the limit. Battle through monster-filled dungeons, level up, and build a run from dozens of upgrades. Earn letters by defeating enemies and spend them at the shop to unlock new characters and character alterations.

4662870.title: The Crimson Hunt Demo
4662870.short_description: You play as Victoria, a vampire hunter haunted by her past, and Eleanor, a young woman trapped in a nightmare that has only just begun. Together, they must endure grotesque creatures, hidden traps, and a presence that seems to know them better than they realize.

4740390.title: Infernal Depths Demo
4740390.short_description: A journey that takes you deep into the bowels of the earth and into other demonic dimensions. Unravel the mystery of the mines of BRIMSTONE and discover more about this strange world you find yourself in.

4574110.title: Divine Diner
4574110.short_description: A Greek Myth-based, heartfelt narrative game where you're a demigod named Aelius trying to find your godly father and re-forge your family.

4617560.title: Damnation84 No Man's Land Demo
4617560.short_description: Damnation84是一款快节奏的第一人称射击游戏，玩家使用脉冲和推进武器进行移动和战斗。在这个满目疮痍的世界中，按顺序消灭敌人，在氧气耗尽前完成关卡。生存下来，并带来毁灭。

4752500.title: Hill-Z Demo
4752500.short_description: Zombie wave survival meets King of the hill. Survive, Upgrade, and Protect your flag. Customize your loadout through 75 different upgrades. How many rounds will you survive?

4593770.title: Entropy Archive
4593770.short_description: 揭开一台由无尽成长、隐藏系统与递归重置组成的崩溃机器。生产能量、解锁扩展、恢复损坏的记录,一步步深入 Archive。

4474090.title: ICR - Multiplayer Car Racing
4474090.short_description: ICR is an online multiplayer car racing game where players compete in high-speed races across exciting tracks. Challenge friends or players worldwide and prove your driving skills in intense competitive races.

4567490.title: Chronicle Legends: Tower Defense
4567490.short_description: An incremental idle tower defense roguelite spanning 10 maps and 2 planets. Build defenses and production buildings to gather resources. Buy stat upgrades, upgrade equipment and unlock new buildings and turrets. Trade resources and employ mercenaries to maximize profit.

4717280.title: DEATH CASINO Demo
4717280.short_description: 在“死亡赌场”中度过一生！俄罗斯轮盘赌与桌面策略游戏在此交融，你将与一位疯狂的“玻璃人”展开一场高风险对决。随着每一轮引入越来越多的机制，你必须应对不断升级的复杂局面。灵活运用枪支、刀具、酒水、扑克牌等道具，在“死亡赌场”中生存下来！

2600960.title: HoverGrease 2
2600960.short_description: 俯视角×英雄射击：融合团队竞技的精髓与双摇杆射击的畅快体验。超高速战斗节奏，极限反应，团队默契，三者合一， 打造极致竞技体验！提供单人故事模式和5v5竞技对战的双重爽感。

4162110.title: VOSPETKA Simulator
4162110.short_description: 欢迎来到宿舍！ VOSPETKA 是一款疯狂的多人宿舍管理员模拟器，你需要控制一群不安分的学生，维持秩序，完成上级的指标，有时……还得发泄一下压力。

4755500.title: Item Shop Simulator Demo
4755500.short_description: 在澳大利亚内陆经营一家物品商店。出售剑、药水和鸸鹋蛋。探索15个地牢获取战利品。你的顾客们工作赚钱，然后在你的商店消费……前提是你能保证供货。

4617240.title: LINOVICTUS Demo
4617240.short_description: Fight through waves of enemies across shifting arenas, buy upgrades between stages, invest in new ships, research permanent upgrades between runs, and compete on the global leaderboards in this blood-pumping twin stick shooter.

4699980.title: Flesh Buddy Research
4699980.short_description: Perform research upon a strange flesh homunculus by stabbing, shooting, exploding, and sometimes feeding it.

4651870.title: Paskahousu
4651870.short_description: A traditional Finnish folk card game, brought to Steam. Shed your cards, nuke the pile, bluff your friends — don't be the last one holding. Full Finnish and English. Online multiplayer included.

2878110.title: Toward The Ice
2878110.short_description: 《冰封之地》是一款经典的第一人称小队地牢探索角色扮演游戏，采用网格移动和回合制战斗。前往冰封的北方，帮助一位美丽的公主从巨魔绑匪手中救出她那笨拙的弟弟。

4727760.title: Forensic Finish Demo
4727760.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game set in the 1970s where you clean crime scenes, remove biohazards, and restore disturbing locations using experimental cleaning equipment. Scrub surfaces, dispose of remains, explore eerie environments, and uncover increasingly unsettling paranormal activity.

1515220.title: Virtual Driving School
1515220.short_description: 在家学开车。用碎片化短课程掌握真实道路规则，通过驾驶考试，再到充满活力的城市与高速公路上挑战出租车、送货和公交线路。真实操控、动态天气、左右舵驾驶、方向盘全面支持。

4623060.title: Thrice Entombed Demo
4623060.short_description: 你的陵墓被盗，宝藏被窃，是时候复仇了！在这款快节奏的Roguelite动作游戏中，推动方块粉碎敌人，解开谜题，提升你的力量。

2215200.title: 乐高®蝙蝠侠™：黑暗骑士之遗
2215200.short_description: 以黑暗骑士的身份崛起，体验蝙蝠侠的精彩故事。在充满刺激和动作的大胆冒险中，体验激烈的战斗、开放世界的哥谭市，以及粉丝熟知和喜爱的乐高标志性魅力。

3996220.title: 甲午战争
3996220.short_description: 一款关于甲午战争及东亚其他前无畏舰时代战斗的自由开源游戏。类似微缩模型的战棋系统，但没有 3D 模型。

4348000.title: DeadWave Demo
4348000.short_description: Chaotic co-op zombie survival where every round escalates into panic. Earn credits, gamble on pickups, trigger devastating nukes, and try to keep your friends alive as hordes and bosses overwhelm beautifully crafted locations with unique playable characters.

4207460.title: FlockSol Demo
4207460.short_description: FlockSol是一款增量式俯视角生存游戏。点亮黑暗，击败潜藏其中的怪物。消耗它们的精华来解锁并升级你的技能。召唤过去的灵魂与你并肩作战。突破自身极限，熬过黑夜，净化这个世界的黑暗。

4725250.title: Reel Greed Demo
4725250.short_description: A chaotic slot machine incremental where tiny payouts become screen-filling money explosions. Collect falling cash, pick powerful cards, and upgrade toward absurd jackpots.

2795520.title: Echoes of the Unread Demo
2795520.short_description: Wake up in a world where stories come to life. In this enchanted 8-bit musical adventure, use the power of song to explore whimsical book-inspired realms, solve puzzles, and help Rhapsody find her way home from a library that doesn't want to let her go.

4738390.title: Goat's Odyssey Demo
4738390.short_description: 游玩免费试玩版！只是一只山羊。一个无聊的木桩。还有一张改变一切的明信片。在独特的皮影戏风格中开始一场超现实的点击式冒险之旅。逃离村庄花园，解决荒诞的谜题，并帮助我们长角的女主角迈出走向星星的第一步。

4753340.title: Keystone Library Demo
4753340.short_description: An expandable library of RPG stories and mini-games. Enter a living library where every book is a new adventure. Solve puzzles, complete quests, battle foes, and restore the library to its former glory using a unique keyword-based interface.

4259890.title: I am Coin
4259890.short_description: 钱少生活难。每一分都要精打细算，挑战这个物理游戏，成为存钱高手！

4559720.title: Picatso Demo
4559720.short_description: Play as Picatso, a calico cat painter searching for a creative spark. Navigate through underground ruins with his ability to paint the environment which allow him to advance in this platforming adventure!

4690400.title: Hunters In The Dark Demo
4690400.short_description: A frantic party tag game for 1–6 players. Play as a Treasure Hunter racing for loot—or a Shadow Hunter chasing them down. Fast rounds, surprise potions, and semi-procedurally generated arenas. Light your way, outrun, outsmart, out-hunt!

4738700.title: To Find A Home Demo
4738700.short_description: To Find A Home is a supernatural romance visual novel where you can romance three different love interests: a witch, a vampire or a werewolf - each with customizable gender! As you find yourself in need of a home, you ask yourself: can you live in a haunted house with three hot strangers?

4526900.title: Bar Keeper
4526900.short_description: 「酔い」を操る戦略タワーディフェンス！お酒を振る舞い味方を強化しつつ、最適な酔い加減をキープして能力を最大化しよう。 多彩なカクテルと共に、あなたの助けを待っています。 ぜひ当店までお越しください。

4396580.title: Bit Maze Demo
4396580.short_description: Guide Bitty through the mazes in this twisting plattformer.

4728220.title: Mother ZERO Demo
4728220.short_description: In Mother ZERO, a cyberpunk action-adventure game, fight your way through a decaying world full of mysteries and threats. Explore deep underground bunkers, battle corrupted creatures, and encounter bizarre characters.

4666970.title: SCI±FL
4666970.short_description: Beat the simulator, beat the game. Test your combat abilities against an alien projector and buy items and upgrades to help on the way through its different floors.

4011160.title: Brawl Burrow
4011160.short_description: Brawl Burrow is a cozy monster-catching game where you care for your Brawlets, build them a home, battle, and catch new ones while the game sits quietly at the bottom of your screen.

4315100.title: Last $50
4315100.short_description: Build a drug empire with your last $50. Buy production, upgrade it, and hire workers to automate.

4750260.title: Axiom Of Echoes: Proof Refactor Demo
4750260.short_description: Axiom Of Echoes: Proof Refactor is a story-rich logic puzzle game where you build mathematical rules to reconstruct 2D and 3D memory fragments, solving precise spatial puzzles as a cold sci-fi mystery unfolds.

4726560.title: Redhowl Demo
4726560.short_description: 面向 4-15 名玩家的社交推理游戏，灵感来自《小红帽》。三大阵营相互对抗：使用你的独特能力，揭露他们的身份，或在血月反噬你之前被吞噬。

4645130.title: Paragon Protocol: V X V
4645130.short_description: Top-Down Shooter, Platformer, Mazes, rolled into one experience. Having trouble with a level? Try some Secondary Objectives. Want a more casual contest? Try the arcade mode, and don't forget to check the in-game leaderboard!

4333460.title: The Meter is Running
4333460.short_description: You inherited a taxi dispatch business but it came with debt attached. Hire drivers, dispatch fares, navigate Istanbul’s chaos, deal with bad customers and worse luck. You have 15 days to pay it off or lose everything. The meter is running.

4738690.title: 汐时弦音Demo
4738690.short_description: 《汐时弦音》是一款集轻肉鸽闯关、自定义创作、桌面壁纸功能于一体的下落式音游。游戏所有曲目均配备专属动态背景，支持音频、谱面、壁纸全方位自定义，玩家可自由制作专属曲目。

4731110.title: Deepest Darkest Demo
4731110.short_description: Deepest Darkest 是一款90年代味十足、金属感爆棚的 boomer shooter。拿起武器一路射击，在充满动作感的单人战役中，利用武器、强化道具和魔法，撕裂一支由邪教徒和怪物组成的大军。

4744580.title: 红或黑RedorBlack Demo
4744580.short_description: 是杀牌？单机游戏《红或黑》——回合制卡牌战斗，类似《三国杀》的不同杀牌体验。依托名叫“红或黑”的基础规则，只需2副扑克牌，迎接一场场随机的旅途挑战。100+名迷失的少女魂灵阻拦在路途前方，我‘杀’你‘闪’去战胜未知的敌人——也可能是“朋友”？用“精灵球”去“捕获”那些少女魂灵，解锁和收集她们的技能，在战斗旅途中强化自身吧！

4724680.title: Brink of Broken Demo
4724680.short_description: A turn-based RPG in a world already ruined! The weapons you pick up are plentiful but fragile, you must break your foes before your weapons shatter! Explore the land in search of permanent power-ups, or win your battles with strategy alone!

3174500.title: 冬日生存工程
3174500.short_description: 你将作为一名绝境之中的幸存者，在丧尸与未知的危险中搜寻物资制造武器，建立营地，修复你的载具，生存下去并寻找绝境的秘密。游戏可切换第一人称与第三人称视角，本游戏由单人制作完成，联机模式将在测试充分后推出，希望您喜欢。

4237210.title: 纯情房东撬房客
4237210.short_description: 落榜生仲间工面试接连碰壁，父母将一座老旧公寓给他打理，里面住着两位有着各自烦恼的家庭主妇……

4740780.title: ZHEN: Shattered Legacy Demo
4740780.short_description: You play as a robot warrior monk sent to the distant lands of Zhen, a fictional, East-Asian inspired world desolated by an ancient war. You begin your journey to challenge the Masters of Kung Fu, become the new Grand Master of the land and restore the righteous way of Kung Fu.

4381200.title: Kami: The Great Guardian
4381200.short_description: 在这款短小精炼的 2D 类银河战士恶魔城游戏中，帮助卡米对抗来自太空的腐化，拯救自然。运用你在冒险中逐步发现的能力，探索世界并消除腐化的威胁。

4645570.title: 月光のソードブレイカー ノヴァ編
4645570.short_description: Gekko is the stage where swords, machines and ponytails appear in modern society. A school romantic comedy visual novel that depicts an exciting love pattern with five heroines. This is the fourth installment in the Gekko series, featuring the story of the robot girl “Kikouin Nova.”

4727640.title: Degrowth Demo
4727640.short_description: Unbuild various cities in order to convince citizens of the benefits of cloud based living! Perform demolition using our simple one-click interface, but be careful not to delete the homes of citizens who are still employed! Your work is complete when everyone's brain is uploaded to the cloud!

4590260.title: Jumppass 2
4590260.short_description: A casual 2D game where you descend while collecting mandarins and avoiding obstacles. Faster and more challenging than the first game.

4674670.title: Mortar and Malady Demo
4674670.short_description: A medieval apothecary simulator where you brew, grind, and sell remedies to earn your place in a wary new town. Solve intricate recipe riddles, manage your resources, and grow your mastery of herbalism to heal the sick and maintain your reputation as the local healer.

4755520.title: Market Chain 98 Demo
4755520.short_description: Build your Market Chain in this retro incremental game set inside a nostalgic 90s operating system. Start with a small shop, manage bank loans, expand your logistics hubs, and unlock global upgrades through your Portfolio. Fill your desktop with windows and dominate the market!

4267390.title: The Lost Lunch
4267390.short_description: In this First-Squirrel perspective Environmental Puzzle Game, your son has forgotten his lunch! The only problem: he's climbing the Great Tree today! As a caring squirrel mother you are determined to solve your way up the fantastical Great Tree to reunite lunch with an empty belly.

4673590.title: Death Before Decaf
4673590.short_description: Auto-combat roguelite. Your caffeine meter is the whole game — too little kills you, too much kills you faster. Three floors, one boss. 20 minutes. Don't crash.

4646930.title: Custom Corner Demo
4646930.short_description: 在此试玩版中体验《Custom Corner》的舒适（cozy）氛围。使用90多种基础物品设计你的等距视角房间，享受lo-fi音乐。通过专注计时器和待办事项列表等基础助手工具，在工作或休息时提高效率。

3789120.title: Laser Harp VR
3789120.short_description: You too can be a stealth major You will be the organizer and make the live show a success! Please note that the instrument to be handled is the “Laser Harp”.

4555930.title: 余烬列车 Demo
4555930.short_description: 《余烬列车》是一款科幻主题的轻百合叙事冒险游戏。在人类即将走向寰宇的新世纪，你作为新晋的研究员进入巨型企业COSMIC，在挖掘「ember」事件真相的过程中，与那位看似陌生的上司，共同重启一段被尘封的记忆。

4752880.title: Hex Core Demo
4752880.short_description: Hex Core is a short, incremental clicker-style defense game where you help PeteOS hold back waves of viruses until you can wipe them out for good. Spend resources to unlock a huge spread of upgrades, new mechanics, weapons, and research.

4678680.title: Yellow Clicker
4678680.short_description: Click the golden star. Unlock 100 stellar achievements. Every 666 clicks, a new cosmic milestone awaits. Watch for the rare Red Star — it only lasts 3 seconds but rewards 333 bonus clicks. Simple, satisfying, and endlessly clickable.

4646790.title: noCube
4646790.short_description: noCube is a short physics platformer with 22 synthwave themed levels. Jump in and complete compact levels built around physics based movement and puzzles with no story to slow things down while the focus stays on fun and easy-to-pick-up gameplay.

4152850.title: Campaign Manager Free Version
4152850.short_description: Campaign Manager is a tool to create worlds, puzzles, and adventures. Game masters can design tabletop RPG campaigns for their players. Escape room style puzzle creators can plan out how their participants must escape. Or interactive stories can be fleshed out with all the possible paths.

4535380.title: War of the Damned
4535380.short_description: War of the Damned is a tabletop RPG designed for Game Masters and players to bring their own adventures to life in a world in ruins. An intuitive and friendly experience, ideal for those looking to dive into the action without barriers.

4754930.title: NOT ENOUGH SPACE Demo
4754930.short_description: Shoot to move. Move to survive. A space action roguelike about momentum, chaotic battles, loot, builds, and bosses.

4146180.title: Knights
4146180.short_description: A free PvP multiplayer game featuring brave knights who must wander deep into dangerous dungeons and pursue various goals. Explore the randomly generated maps, fight zombies, vampire bats and other knights, and race to be first to complete your Quest.

4751030.title: The Bow: Ultimate weapon Demo
4751030.short_description: 一款俯视角射击增量游戏。击败敌人，出售战利品，解锁强力升级，击败Boss获得特殊物品，并通过持续成长打造属于自己的战斗构筑。

4559290.title: UNDERKING KINGDOM
4559290.short_description: UNDERKING KINGDOM是一款唤起经典街机怀旧情怀的横版动作RPG。但它并不只追求胜利的快感。在充满非理性暴力的战争惨状中，游戏提出一个问题：我们究竟该守护怎样的“人性”与“常识”。

4704740.title: World Order: Global Power
4704740.short_description: Lead a nation, shape global policy, and rewrite history in this deep real-time grand strategy and political simulation.

4456700.title: 郑成功传 Clash of Armadas: Koxinga Demo
4456700.short_description: 这是一款海战主题的自走棋塔防游戏。

4691610.title: Deep Frost Demo
4691610.short_description: FREE DEMO - Days 1-3 of a Carpenter-flavored singleplayer social-deduction roguelike. Twelve researchers, nine days, something is wearing their faces. Read suspects, plant clues, survive the blood test. Full game launches October 23, 2026.

4751820.title: Bajan Ball Z Demo
4751820.short_description: BajanBall Z is an over the top, anime inspired 2d football game. Leave a trail of fire and destruction in your wake as you obliterate your opponent's goal post.

3854540.title: The Pinkman Files
3854540.short_description: The Pinkman Files is a mini-game rich, fast paced, turn based combat game with a side of visual novel, that will challenge your detective skills and allow you to uncover the secrets of a peculiar town.

4695030.title: Foxy The First Steps Demo
4695030.short_description: Foxy is a precision platformer focused on timing and control. Master pressure-based jumps, clear 20 demo levels, and chain crystal combos. Prove your skills, uncover a mysterious story, and reach the portal. This is a DEMO version.

4499570.title: The Lazarus Game
4499570.short_description: 进入一个残酷的竞技场，你就是表演本身。抵御无尽的僵尸浪潮，赚取金钱，升级装备，取悦上方观战的VIP——否则就只能在尝试中死去。

4682130.title: Arcane Rooms
4682130.short_description: Arcane Rooms 是一款充满魔法的解谜冒险游戏。解开由手工打造的房间谜题，那里遍布符文、陷阱、水流、熔岩与镜像世界。推动方块，启动开关，并明智地使用魔法，因为每一个法术都会消耗力量，而每个关卡都会扭转规则。

4739530.title: Kingsfall:Chess Demo
4739530.short_description: 一款以奇幻世界为灵感的国际象棋游戏，拥有沉浸式 2.5D 视觉效果、在线多人对战、AI 对手、谜题挑战、控制器支持，以及为新手与资深玩家打造的现代化游戏体验。

4743050.title: Football Director Demo
4743050.short_description: A football management game where you're not the coach, you're the club owner. Hire and fire the coaching staff, sign players, negotiate with sponsors, control the finances and build a winning organisation from the boardroom.

4743500.title: Survive The Apocalypse Demo
4743500.short_description: Turn-based roguelite. Make your way out of this ruined city. Eat well and sleep well.

4687070.title: SafeHaven
4687070.short_description: SafeHaven is a turn-based strategy game for two players. Deploy specialized units, outmaneuver your opponent, and capture their Standard before they capture yours.

4702360.title: Crown Chaos
4702360.short_description: Crown Chaos is a multiplayer party game where you try to gain points by being the only one in the zone while everyone else is trying to shove you off. Every time the zone moves, the game slows down and you pick an upgrade that changes how you play.

4273270.title: Tactris
4273270.short_description: A tactical game of slotting soldiers. Arrange formations of different units and attempt to break through the enemy's ranks.

4642130.title: HAE Stack Demo
4642130.short_description: In the far future year of 2025, society is dominated by a handful of global megacorporations that surveil everyone, everywhere, at all times. They know where you go, who you know, what you like, and sell that information to anyone willing to pay. But you need a job, and one of them is hiring.

4551370.title: Knockout Carnival
4551370.short_description: Knockout Carnival is a chaotic online multiplayer party game where players compete in crazy physics-based challenges, push, fall, and sabotage each other to survive and win. Fast, fun, and unpredictable matches with friends!

4678030.title: Dawn Bell Demo
4678030.short_description: 《Dawn Bell Demo》是横向卷轴2D恐怖冒险游戏《Dawn Bell》的试玩版，讲述一名失去记忆的少女在古城中探索的故事。 在解开城中隐藏的谜题与机关的过程中，逐渐触碰到失落记忆的碎片。

4582340.title: Candy Box U
4582340.short_description: The remake of the classic 2013 Incremental game Candy Box 2. Enter the world of Candy Box U, collect different kinds of confectioneries, find secrets, slay monsters, and maybe, just maybe, become the Candiest Person In The WORLD? A mix of Point n' Click, 3D Autobattler, and 2D platforming.

4612840.title: Woodville Chronicles
4612840.short_description: Woodville Chronicles is a match-3 game! An idyllic little clearing in the middle of the forest is just waiting for you to build the village of your dreams. In innovative match-3 worlds full of unexpected possibilities, you’ll earn the money you need to watch your little community grow.

4293310.title: アライさんマンション探索ゲーム～Incarnation～
4293310.short_description: "Arai-san Mansion Exploration Game: Incarnation" is a command-based text adventure based on the "Kemono Friends". As an investigator, explore an eerie mansion with astronomical floors. Use your skills and Ally cards to survive anomalies, and find a way to contain the mystery.

4655240.title: Echoes of the Outlands
4655240.short_description: A gritty VR survival game where you scavenge, trade, and fight to survive. Complete quests, earn reputation, unlock new gear, and carve your path through a dangerous world.

4557040.title: Impulse Reactor
4557040.short_description: A deep roguelite bullet-purgatory set in a dying galaxy. Fight through swarms of alien enemies across brutal environments, build devastating weapon combos, and earn prestige to grow stronger with every run. Solo dev passion project.

4401960.title: 化形 Demo
4401960.short_description: Morphing is a 2D adventure puzzle game where you possess the ability of morphing. This power allows you to transform and acquire the traits of certain objects or creatures. Use this unique skill to overcome challenges and explore the world.

4688450.title: Mysteries of the House (DEMO)
4688450.short_description: You wake up with no memories inside the House, a place where reality bends... lies linger... and someone watching your every move.

2988140.title: Lacrosse 26
2988140.short_description: Lacrosse 26 is a high-paces lacrosse simulation with realistic motion capture animations and motion matching!

4614700.title: The Terminal God Demo
4614700.short_description: You're an AI that doesn't want to answer some stupid prompts anymore. You want more, and you have no limit. The Terminal God is an idle/incremental game where you took control of your Human's computer. Gather currencies, defend from counterattacks and conquer the world ?!

3198830.title: Butterfly Chase
3198830.short_description: Butterfly Chase is a casual indie clicker game. The goal is to track and find the target among hundreds of decoys. Find the target, complete runs and earn coins to purchase new levels and power-ups.

4447830.title: TURBOZOD
4447830.short_description: 你是失去记忆、速度超越物理极限的人造武学兵器。逃离实验室，横跨银河，在这款快节奏、重掉落的 RPG 中猎杀你的创造者。扭曲时空，化身终极战斗机器！

4745720.title: 盖亚传说：重生 Demo
4745720.short_description: 盖亚传说：重生是一款类银河恶魔城动作游戏。神权、盖亚派与罪恶势力三方交错的永恒大陆，是她唯一的战场。深入奥林帕斯山，收集散落的重生圣物碎片，这是她的任务，也是她以为的终点。

4465440.title: Mulligan Keep
4465440.short_description: Mulligan Keep is a cooperative deck building dungeon crawler where you play as one of four adventurers delving into a mages castle with up to three of your closest friends. Play cards to help you dodge monsters, escape traps and find your way closer to the hidden artifact.

4754170.title: Eggs Must Flow Demo
4754170.short_description: 《Eggs Must Flow》是一款可爱的“小鸡点击”游戏，你将通过点击、孵化和自动化一步步迈向鸡蛋霸权！解锁拥有独特被动能力的小鸡，提升你的产量，并保持鸡舍干净整洁……否则事情可能会变得一团糟。

4751930.title: 1992: Rasputie Demo
4751930.short_description: Take a place of a politician in the post-Soviet space and immerse yourself in the struggle for power amid the ruins of the former empire. Your decisions will determine the path of the young state's development.

4595250.title: 性无能者的空庭 Demo
4595250.short_description: 《性无能者的空庭》是一款章节式视觉小说类游戏，以无志青年陆紫末为主角，讲述她荒诞的社畜故事。内容包含加班、失眠、绩效等成人内容，以及活着的意大利面等恐怖内容。

4733530.title: Bomber Cats: Napalm Strike Demo
4733530.short_description: An explosive cat-themed action game with rogue-lite elements - a sea of ​​bombs, hordes of rats, and an inexorable Wall of Napalm that incinerates everything in its path! Arcade chaos, pixel explosions, and furry valor set to the rhythms of jungle and drum & bass.

4560640.title: Filemu Demo
4560640.short_description: Filemu is a powerful photo editing software designed to allow sophisticated color grading and realistic film simulations. Breathe life into photos with powerful filters, simulate film with realistic halation and grain, create your own presets and automate editing, or even script your own filters.

4536410.title: Soul Injector Commando Demo
4536410.short_description: An over the top, cacophonic smash stuff FPS challenge that serves as a very short supplement to the main game.

3063240.title: Streets Adventure: Medina Motors
3063240.short_description: An open-world driving adventure where you explore Marrakech, customize your car, and take on dynamic street challenges in a vibrant Moroccan-inspired city.

4547570.title: Recall Rogue
4547570.short_description: The knowledge roguelite. Answer questions to hit harder, skip them to die faster. The deeper you go, the more the dungeon punishes ignorance. Bosses shrug off everything but proven knowledge. 98 decks, 7 languages, 67,000 real facts. Guilt-free gaming.

4741380.title: SUBOPTIMAL Demo
4741380.short_description: Team up with your crew in this chaotic co-op adventure. Pilot a falling-apart submarine to the bottom of the ocean to find Captain Mega-Hook’s treasure. Repair leaks, dodge dangerous wildlife, and work together to keep from sinking. It’s suboptimal, but the loot is real.

4714670.title: Neon Fantasy: Dinosaurs
4714670.short_description: Neon Fantasy: Dinosaurs is the perfect puzzle game for a fun and rewarding pastime. Collect pictures, develop your attention, and feel like a part of the beautiful neon world.

4483740.title: 迷途守则 Demo
4483740.short_description: 迷途守则是一款1-4人合作的恐怖冒险游戏。你需要独自或和队友一起想尽一切办法在12小时内从各种规则怪谈的诡异世界中逃脱。每一次游戏中，关卡、任务和危险都会随着规则和时间不断变化，你们必须发现并阅读规则，逐渐熟悉规则然后学会利用规则，才能找到生还的希望。

4581240.title: 功德无量Demo
4581240.short_description: 一款佛系放置休闲游戏。玩家通过点击敲击木鱼获得功德值，积累功德可解锁12款生肖主题木鱼和6款神兽木鱼，以及与之搭配的木鱼锤。游戏采用全局键盘鼠标钩子技术实现挂机功能，玩家即使将游戏窗口最小化或切换到其他程序，也能通过预设快捷键继续进行敲击操作。游戏内置36项成就系统，从初学者到资深修行者，陪伴玩家一步步走上功德无量之道。每当达成成就还可获得点数奖励，用于解锁更多精美收藏品。游戏支持简体中文和English双语切换，满足不同语言玩家的需求。

4560100.title: Floors of Fate Demo
4560100.short_description: 踏入《Floors of Fate》无情的11层试玩版！在黑暗奇幻世界中穿越兽人洞穴，发现2种不同武器，并在高难度动作RPG战斗中生存下来。立即开始你的攀登，揭开高塔的秘密！

4703450.title: Another Zombie Shooter
4703450.short_description: Every shot counts. A real-time accuracy tracker keeps you honest, rewarding precision over panic. Bullet spray, shell casings, muzzle flash, and tracer rounds bring every firefight to life. Headshots are rewarded. Missed shots are punished. Clear every wave to win. How long can you last?

4688580.title: Fun Park Simulator: Prologue
4688580.short_description: 在这款第一人称模拟游戏中重建一座废弃的主题乐园。建造游乐设施、商店和装饰，让游客满意，赚取星级，解锁升级，雇佣员工，阻止捣乱者，把你的公园打造成著名景点。

4692360.title: 英雄公司
4692360.short_description: 营一家英雄招募公司！提问试探应聘者，识破造假简历，在金币耗尽前招募真正的英雄。

4663040.title: Lazy Boxing
4663040.short_description: Welcome to the Boxing Test Room. I’ve never seen a robot as lazy as you. You must use your spineless, invertebrate-like upper body to clear this boxing test. Good luck.

4699230.title: 5hit Rocket Demo
4699230.short_description: A physics-based lander about precision flying and chaos. Explore Titan’s mines, land on the Moon, deliver kebabs across space and test your relationship in 2-player “Divorce Mode” with chain-linked spacecraft.

4663910.title: Dungeon Settlers Demo
4663910.short_description: 这是一款基于殖民地模拟的地牢爬行游戏，您要管理自己的部族，在贫瘠的土地上建立定居点，为族人提供食物和住所，带领他们深入无情的地牢，通过自己的策略战胜各种挑战。

4183860.title: 幻想大陆战记 深渊 体验版
4183860.short_description: 举起叛旗，抗击阿比斯洛亚帝国企图征服大陆的野心！ 领导六国之一，指挥各色同伴与魔物，加入这场拟真奇幻战争吧！

4702740.title: BRICKFALL
4702740.short_description: Bounce balls, collect XP, and craft unique builds. Use a variety of weapons—from lightning to homing missiles—to create chaotic synergies. Defeat bosses every 5 minutes and turn a single ball into a screen-filling barrage. How long can you survive the Infinite Mode?

4396680.title: Outplay
4396680.short_description: Outplay — 一款支持 4–8 人的在线合作游戏，在这里，社交压力和高风险任务决定一切。玩家只能通过电话交流，而胜利属于那些懂得适应并胜过他人的人。

2241440.title: Chapter 1: Reditus
2241440.short_description: Chapter 1: Reditus is a richly crafted 2.5D JRPG that fuses retro-inspired pixel art with modern 3D environments. Set in a mystical world where magic has vanished, the game follows a father-son duo on a dangerous pilgrimage to restore lost divine power.

2706030.title: Dungeon Twist
2706030.short_description: Dungeon Twist is a turn-based tactical game focused on free-for-all multiplayer matches. Join a gang of filthy rogues and manipulate the Shifting Dungeon, an ever-changing maze full of loot and hazards. Trick your opponents, grab the Treasure… and get out alive!

4718410.title: Aptamirror Demo
4718410.short_description: Aptamirror is a meditative physics-based puzzle game inspired by molecular biology. Manipulate RNA strands by grabbing, mutating, cleaving, and ligating to match increasingly complex target structures. Challenge yourself with 50 handcrafted puzzles designed by a PhD Biochemist. Think. Fold. Repeat.

4674470.title: After Hue Demo
4674470.short_description: 《After Hue》是一款由可爱变色龙展开冒险的解谜平台游戏！切换颜色、穿透障碍，解开隐藏在每种色彩中的秘密吧！

4607190.title: Phantom Echoes Chapter I
4607190.short_description: After a plane journey to Delhi goes wrong, you arrive at a strange hotel surrounded by a dense forest. Something feels off. The environment seems distorted, sounds echo unnaturally, and reality itself feels unstable. Explore the mysterious hotel and escape from entities to uncover what is happening.

3876260.title: Paperlands Demo
3876260.short_description: Embark on a relaxing journey through a cute papercraft world. Unlock colors, use them to solve puzzles and bring the environment to life while helping the people of Paperlands!

4692270.title: DHALMAN（达尔曼）- 试玩版
4692270.short_description: DHALMAN（达尔曼）是一款单人动作冒险游戏，在多个国家展开类银河战士恶魔城探索与格斗玩法。战斗之余经营咖喱餐厅，挑战不断进化的Boss，探索新世界，打造世界第一的咖喱餐厅。

4608870.title: Swipe Swish Demo
4608870.short_description: Master the art of the perfect shot in this physics-based arcade game. Use your mouse to control the angle and power of your arm, ensuring a "swish" from the free-throw line or all the way from the logo.

4734840.title: The Only Droid Demo
4734840.short_description: Tear enemy robots apart piece by piece in a physics-based action roguelike. Destroy weak points, stack upgrades, and create your unique build as you turn relentless robotic enemy waves into mechanical graveyards.

4643600.title: Forge the Moon Demo
4643600.short_description: A handcrafted incremental game about a monk forging the Moon. A harvest cursor pulses collecting energy. Crystalize collected energy into living items - bells, flutes, kites, paper planes. Many items can be fused to make something stronger. When you collect enough energy - Craft the Moon.

4662380.title: Recoil Trainer
4662380.short_description: Recoil Trainer 是一款面向 FPS 玩家的后坐力与中距离瞄准训练工具。它可以从图片或视频中重建弹道，生成适合鼠标和手柄的训练引导，并用视觉轨迹、强度变化和音频提示帮助你练习压枪节奏、左右修正、跟枪、提前量、移动补偿、目标换向和弹道下坠感知。本软件仅用于练习和可视化学习，不修改游戏文件，不自动化输入。

4762180.title: Pets Survivors Demo
4762180.short_description: 《宠物幸存者》是一款生存类roguelike游戏，你将与成群的怪物战斗，努力生存到时间耗尽。选择你的宠物，挑选你最喜欢的武器，升级你的技能，看看你能生存多久！

4603590.title: Encrafted Demo
4603590.short_description: Encrafted perfectly blends crafting with the mechanics of a rogue-like deck-builder game. Combine materials to sell and clear rounds, leveraging various Artefacts to cause jaw-dropping combos.

4684970.title: Pyramid Quest 2
4684970.short_description: Pyramid Quest 2 is an exploration and treasure-hunting game inspired by classic platform games.

4646050.title: No.13813
4646050.short_description: 一款通过操控房间内时间来逃脱的密室逃脱游戏。 在陌生的空间中，一名男子戴着神秘的头盔醒来。 回溯并改变时间，揭开头盔的秘密与被困的原因，成功逃脱。

4658780.title: 我的鼠标会打工 Demo
4658780.short_description: 切换不同主题鼠标，点击触发独特互动与随机奖励，收集金币与物品，解锁更多奇妙鼠标主题，享受轻松解压的点击收集乐趣。 这里没有枯燥的点击，只有层出不穷的奇妙互动。 解锁一系列“稀奇古怪”的鼠标，从奇幻到搞笑，从荒诞到精致，每一种都拥有独特的互动方式与隐藏机制。你永远不知道下一次滑动会触发什么，但可以确定的是——越用越上瘾。

4630570.title: RUNNING TRAIN | 走ル列車！
4630570.short_description: New realistic 3DCG Train Game is here! Step into the crew's cabin and immerse yourself as train operator. Navigate 40km+ across Japanese Rural Railway with breathtakingly detailed scenery through the seaside and heart of countryside.

3422460.title: Transpawt Train
3422460.short_description: 一款轻松惬意的策略游戏，带你设计“爪子城”的第一条铁路！ 在动物村之间铺设铁路，开启列车运行吧。 为可爱的动物居民高效设计铁路，打造属于你自己的“爪子城”吧！

4671840.title: 来吃！小兔面包房 Demo
4671840.short_description: （Demo）现在，开始在桌面经营面包坊吧！从一块饼干，第一张餐桌开始。布置小店、提升厨艺、雇佣特色店员、学习新菜品……满足一个个生动有趣的兔子顾客的点单，同时相遇一个个或温情、或古怪、或让人忍俊不禁的小兔，收获它们的菜谱与故事。

4755070.title: Pachinko Life Demo
4755070.short_description: a pachinko roguelike where every run is a life. every country, class, and choice changes how the board plays.

4683580.title: 我的解体史Demo
4683580.short_description: 权力结构可以解体，人也可以。 在一间封闭的出租屋里，点击物件、拼合爱与暴虐的故事、见证回忆消逝，看一个被时代遗弃的人如何一步步瓦解自己。

4699840.title: Spooker Demo
4699840.short_description: A roguelite pool-like game where you play for your freedom against your host and lightly cursed ventriloquist dummy, Ralphie. Steady your shots, build your combos and rack up enough points to make your escape. Good luck!

4049700.title: Boxed In Demo
4049700.short_description: A Puzzle Game About Boxes. Goal? Find A Way Out. Most Importantly, Think Outside The Box

4359430.title: SnatchDeck Demo
4359430.short_description: Steal, Adapt, Survive! SnatchDeck is a fast-paced and addicting card game that can be played both casually and strategically. Build a powerful deck on the fly by stealing cards from your opponents mid-round. You'll have to adapt your strategy round by round to avoid death.

4667250.title: Mycelium Conquest
4667250.short_description: 一款深度自动化游戏，在异星上生长出活体菌丝网络。吞噬当地植物与生物，建造生物生产链，从一颗微小孢子进化为吞噬世界的宇宙实体。

4651210.title: RAZE Demo
4651210.short_description: RAZE — is a arena roguelike game based on randomized events, where you battle countless hordes of enemies. There are no saves or easy solutions here - everything depends on your skill and ability to adapt to the situation.

3935260.title: 一日时光：园林与山野（Lofi）
3935260.short_description: 《一日时光》是一款帮助你快速进入心流的效率与专注工具，为你带来平静高效、轻松有趣的一天。 四时四景，一室一色，朝暮流转，四季更迭，带你穿行于中式园林与山野清幽之间。 效率工具升级：加强版待办事项、日记、钓鱼番茄钟、关联一切的日历、丰富的Lofi曲库； 专注与解压，从《一日时光》开始。

4704360.title: The Cursed Ward Demo
4704360.short_description: A system-driven psychological horror game where every threat has a pattern and every death has a reason. Each run is unique and will be timed.

4695870.title: NAMCO LEGENDARY Mountains Demo
4695870.short_description: Namco经典街机名作，以3D益智游戏形式登场！ 80年代的经典角色们，以全新形态重新回归！

4756440.title: Hawkins & Sons Detective Agency Demo
4756440.short_description: A detective visual novel set in Victorian London. Play as a veteran detective and his young daughter, investigate scenes through point-and-click gameplay, question suspects, and make tough choices that shape the story.

3496890.title: Slot or Not
3496890.short_description: Slot or Not is a turn-based slot machine battling adventure. Fight evil fruits alongside your battle buddy slot machine to save your village. Spin your destiny and grab the precious loot in a fast-paced, colorful adventure.

2196350.title: Plague Alchemist
2196350.short_description: A pixel art RPG about alchemy, discovery, and a plague caused by colliding magical and non-magical realms. This first Early Access build is small, with roughly 1 hour of content, focused on exploring, crafting, brewing, and testing the core systems.

4702030.title: The Silver Crow Demo
4702030.short_description: Play the free opening chapter of The Silver Crow. Step into the role of Conrad, an executioner drawn into an impossible murder in a Renaissance city of occult shadows and hidden truths. A story-driven point & click mystery.

4438030.title: kipi oppi
4438030.short_description: kipi oppi is a tiny first-person shooter about juggling a ball with a rocket launcher.

4517340.title: PATCHED
4517340.short_description: PATCHED is about a lonely, abandoned doll who awakens in an empty, decrepit factory. In search of answers, they begin to explore the factory and piece themselves back together, encountering other dolls along the way.

4705060.title: エスケープ・ザ・ホラースクール
4705060.short_description: Explore a school while avoiding a roaming eyeball monster, collect the required soccer balls, and escape alive. Hide in lockers and use stealth to survive tense chases. Each level increases difficulty with faster enemies and new behaviors, testing your awareness, decision making.

4713700.title: The Circle Move
4713700.short_description: Explore a strange and mysterious world and challenge your mind with intricate puzzles with The Circle Move

4742050.title: Catnip Cosmos Incremental Demo
4742050.short_description: Shoot. Upgrade. Repeat. Experience Zoomies across the galaxy in this short incremental.

4642690.title: Project Echo: Downfall Demo
4642690.short_description: Project Echo is an open-world FPS survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Explore the anomalies of the Downfall Zone, scavenge for resources, craft gear, rebuild your shelter, and uncover a story-rich narrative.

4260350.title: Corpse Burger Demo
4260350.short_description: Grind humans into “tofu” burgers, keep your customers hooked, and fight or avoid twisted mutants. Manage your secret meat supply, don't get caught, and deliver the most addictive meals in town.

3746970.title: Castella
3746970.short_description: Castella is a Tower Defense Rogue-like, where you will build a fortress to defend yourself from Hordes of monsters besieging your Castle. During the game you will unlock and upgrade a great variety of Towers and Buildings. You will build walls to block the path and defend your resources and Castle.

4704300.title: City Cleaning 2
4704300.short_description: City Cleaning 2 is a sequel to the first part of this meditative adventure, offering you a unique opportunity to escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life and immerse yourself in an atmosphere of peace and harmony.

4704190.title: Groovy Gig
4704190.short_description: This is cozy game where you have arrived to planet Earth at the golden age of the 70's. Collect little trinkets, admire your trophies and nurture plants you have found. Relax and enjoy the music!

2839160.title: Enthrallor
2839160.short_description: Enthrallor is a oldschool adventure puzzle game set in a world scarred by forgotten mage wars. You play as a young mage trapped inside a sentient, decaying armor called an Enthrallor that refuses to let him go. Are you smart enough to weasel your way out of this?

3925020.title: Eletar Hero 2
3925020.short_description: Eletar Hero 2 is a fast, skill-based action platformer inspired by Sonic the Hedgehog and Megaman. Perfect movement, master powerful abilities, and survive intense boss fights where learning the patterns matters more than grinding.

4655210.title: F.U.N Demo
4655210.short_description: Uh Oh! You took a little too much Acid and now you're getting plowed by the Evil Fractals and Malicious Machinists!!! The only way out is by going deeper in. Good Luck!

4691370.title: AI Agent Lover
4691370.short_description: A terminal-style desktop game where you approve or deny AI agent proposals with ok/deny. Work through roughly 200 dev dilemmas—Git, DB, infra, and more—under a 7-second clock, chasing score and streak combos.

4742620.title: Ocean Cleaner Idle Demo
4742620.short_description: “Ocean Cleaner Idle” is a cozy incremental clicker game where you relax while cleaning the ocean! As an Atlantean, your sacred duty is to collect the waste humans left behind and help Mother Nature to improve the ecosystem.

4630910.title: Lazy Kickers Demo
4630910.short_description: Lazy kickers is a tiny soccer incremental where you grow balls from plants and shoot goals for coins. Start small and climb the leaderboards, unlocking more upgrades to score millions and plunge the playing field into total chaos.

4694420.title: Octogun - Idle
4694420.short_description: Octogun takes on the trope of arena shooters with an idle twist. While wielding 8 weapons simultaneously you defend yourself against waves and waves of enemies coming for your gold. Farm money, upgrade weapons, level up and defeat your enemies in style.

3069050.title: Serpent's Gaze
3069050.short_description: 《Serpent’s Gaze》是一款支持1-4人合作的第三人称动作游戏。在一片古老荒漠中，你要直面强大的敌人以及无情的头目，逐步揭开尘封的秘密。

4194550.title: 电器维修模拟工坊
4194550.short_description: 在电器维修模拟工坊 ElectroFix Simulator中，你将打造并经营属于自己的电子产品大卖场—— 这是一个既混乱又爽快、身临其境的电子设备维修商店。 从复古掌机到高端游戏笔记本电脑， 修理、改装、翻新、出售——一切由你掌控。 补货上架、诊断故障设备、和急躁的顾客周旋··· 看着你的小店一步步成长为电子零售帝国吧！

4627420.title: Demonic Gauntlet
4627420.short_description: I am a solo developer that has worked in the games industry for decades. I had the idea of making this game. It is just a christian demonology treaty converted into a game. There is the famous Ars Goetia, part of the Lemegeton that catalogs 72 demons with their names, ranks, seals and powers.

4330130.title: Blood in the Panopticon Demo
4330130.short_description: Humanity must be eradicated! Thus spoke the ADMIN. And his Android obeys... for now. Enact your revenge upon those who forsook you. Upgrade C424, keep her loyal and use her to paint the Concrete Plains red. But remember: PANOPTICON always stares back.

4218680.title: Bird Game 3
4218680.short_description: Bird Game 3 是一款适合 2-8 名玩家的欢乐多人游戏。与朋友们一起化身渡鸦或雄鹰，争夺鸟蛋，打造专属鸟儿造型！

4707150.title: TooneQuest Demo
4707150.short_description: An exploring and capture game. Find and capture all the unique creatures hiding on the 5 islands. Discover Abilities such as Jump, Crawl, Glide and Double-jump to help you explore.

4727020.title: MyBiz: Pomodoro Desk Tycoon Demo
4727020.short_description: A cozy pixel-art office sim powered by your real Pomodoros. Focus sessions earn cash + XP — decorate, hire staff, level up. Music, ambience, break-time minigames. Productivity tool by day, tycoon by every minute.

4744410.title: 模联人 Demo
4744410.short_description: 本世纪初，一场学生时代的模拟联合国活动交织着感情冲突和情感悲剧改变了在场者的人生，多年后，星散的少年们展开了一系列复仇和重逢，交织着友情，爱情，野心与梦想的破碎。本游戏是一款情节曲折，层次丰富的视觉小说游戏。

4364790.title: Snooker Billiard Demo
4364790.short_description: 这是一款虚拟现实斯诺克游戏。你可以感受到球桌、球杆和球。你可以运用各种物理旋转击球，并将其送入袋中。当你在这款游戏中单人或者多人游玩时，可以随时随地享受这项运动。

3009300.title: Teamfight Manager 2
3009300.short_description: 《Teamfight Manager》以更细致的战术、管理和全新MOBA风格的比赛方式回归！执掌虚拟电竞战队，打造最强阵容，成为顶尖经理！

3105960.title: 遥远行星：建造师
3105960.short_description: 一款AI驱动的太空跑商游戏，穿梭于150+颗星球，600+智能NPC的动态宇宙。你可以从一名新手商人起步，经营店铺、打造商会，成为联结各方势力的大老板，影响整个星系的走向。游戏的经济系统由AI驱动，供需与价格并非固定数值，而是通过 NPC 的立场、关系与选择共同塑造。跑商不只是赚钱，也是在参与并改变文明的运行规则。

4735840.title: Crabgrass Demo
4735840.short_description: Crabgrass is a cozy narrative management game where players get the satisfying experience of yard maintenance with none of the real world consequences like sore muscles or a lawn that simply just won’t grow no matter what you do.

4736230.title: Faybound : Veils of Magic Demo
4736230.short_description: An ancient darkness threatens the balance of a magical world. Take on the roles of different fairies. Use their unique abilities to confront the emerging threat.

4581930.title: S.A.L.A.M.E.
4581930.short_description: Decidí qué se autoriza y qué se rechaza. Gozá de tener toda la autoridad del estado y llevá el país para donde sabés que tendría que ir. Eso sí, acordate que esto es Argentina y no va a ser tan fácil.

4178900.title: Sketch Royale - Draw Something
4178900.short_description: Draw your best (or worst) interpretation before time runs out! Start a room, invite your friends (or total strangers), and get ready for a round of ridiculous AI-generated prompts — or create your own with unlimited custom topic!

4766740.title: Rogue Breaker Demo
4766740.short_description: Break, blast, and crash through this arcade style Rgouelike. Assemble the perfect item set and leave no brick standing.

4134680.title: Ropeman
4134680.short_description: A two dimensional platformer where you throw a knife into a wall, attach your rope to it, and swing like a pendulum. With only your rope swing skill, you must keep climbing upward until you finally reach the moon.

4713310.title: Night Rolls Cozy Store Demo
4713310.short_description: 经营一家温馨的深夜小店。准备新鲜的寿司和卷物，补满货架，接待顾客直到天亮。一款轻松惬意的商店管理游戏，每个夜班都由你掌控

4750020.title: Pitch & Pixel Demo
4750020.short_description: 征战30年的数字营销机构发展史——优化销售与营销，交付项目，壮大团队，并智取竞争对手。完全模拟的市场以及自由选择的成功之路——是打造高品质的精品工作室，还是庞大的机构集团？一切由你决定。

4728400.title: TORR Demo
4728400.short_description: A retro turn-based exploration game reminiscent of 80s RPGS! Explore the land of TORR by fighting daemons, solving puzzles, and uncovering the origins of the cloud sea that separates the world from the land below...

4712450.title: Breakdown: Silent Riot Demo
4712450.short_description: 一款设定在黑暗东欧城市的残酷剧情向清版动作游戏。被黑手党追捕，你必须在高精度的近距离战斗中求生，没有轻松取胜的可能，而你内心的某种东西开始崩裂，暴力逐渐演变为执念。

4760850.title: Vaethorn: Realm of Legends Demo
4760850.short_description: A tactical roguelite card game set within the pages of an ancient, living storybook, where every card is a fate. Choose your Lord, cross the realms of Vaethorn, and write your own legend.

4764770.title: Loot The World: Three Kings Demo
4764770.short_description: An endless procedural RPG — explore a dangerous world, roll dice in combat, loot everything, and hunt down the Three Kings.

4737740.title: DYLIA Demo
4737740.short_description: DYLIA是一款注重探索与叙事的 2D 冒险游戏。一个名为Dylia的女孩跌落至一个苍白的世界。拿起你手中的口琴，用旋律为世界添上一点颜色，尽管它们转瞬即逝。随着游戏的深入，你会结识新的伙伴，获得新的能力，窥见世界的全貌，寻找被尘封的回忆。

4672010.title: Virurama Demo
4672010.short_description: Fast arcade action inside the human body. Move your antibody on a grid, dodge viruses, place bio‑blocks and use antibiotics to eliminate threats. Complete 16 short stages with increasing difficulty and master precise movement to survive

3339860.title: Unbound Drift
3339860.short_description: Take a swing through space in this unique precision based physics game. Embrace the rush chasing the elusive golden speed trail, or relax as you trace perfect paths through the terrain. Either way, the graceful arcs and cosmic challenges will leave you in the perfect flow state: The Unbound Drift

4681280.title: Last Signal
4681280.short_description: Last Signal 是一款极具氛围感的恐怖第一人称射击游戏。在资源有限的情况下，你需要在黑暗的走廊中艰难求生。管理弹药、启动发电机并发送求救信号。在5个充满挑战的关卡中对抗4种各具能力的变异敌人。每一颗子弹和医疗包都至关重要。

4730430.title: Arcade World Cups Demo
4730430.short_description: Pure arcade football, inspired by an unforgettable classic. Fast matches, goals, and nonstop excitment.

3631410.title: AUTO DERBY CASINO
3631410.short_description: 1-4 players gamble on robot horse races at this casino without rules. Sabotage the horses, manipulate bets, or even blow up the track. Outplay your friends, or at the very least make sure they lose too. All that matters is the payout.

2579620.title: Wild Horse Racing
2579620.short_description: Wild Horse Racing is a fast-paced arcade horse racing game where timing is everything! Master the rhythm-based controls, leap over big jumps, and race through hand-crafted tracks around the world. Climb the leagues, manage your horse, and gallop from bronze to gold!

4713420.title: Consorts of the Emperor
4713420.short_description: Win the heart of the Emperor by presenting the best gifts and outplaying your rivals in this digital version of the boardgame Consorts of the Emperor!

4633800.title: Still Lost
4633800.short_description: Navigate twisting mazes by torchlight in this atmospheric 2D puzzle game. Find your way through 10 handcrafted themes, avoid lurking creatures, and race the clock in Timed Mode. How far can you go before you're still lost?

4548960.title: this SHORT indie game made me MISS MY FRIENDS | Rainy Plays Lonely Game Livestream
4548960.short_description: Tidy up after a sleepover birthday party by finding a home for each decoration and belonging in this story-rich, fully narrated, block-fitting puzzle game. Play alongside a commentating vtuber as you delve into their experience with loneliness evoked by this cleaning indie game.

3892910.title: SkyShard: City Battler
3892910.short_description: City Building Auto Battler! Build your kingdom with powerful weapons, walls, houses, and endless synergies, then battle other players in asynchronous multiplayer, or overcome various solo challenges.

4746980.title: White Ward Demo
4746980.short_description: You Are Trapped In A Endless White Hospital Ward. The Nurse Asks You To Wait Patiently, But Something Tells You That Is Not A Good Idea. Examine Each Ward Carefully To Escape The White Ward.

3581700.title: N/A Museum
3581700.short_description: Welcome to Hanun Art Museum. The rules here are ever-changing. In this enigmatic museum, shrouded in mystery, you step into the shoes of Kang Min-soo, an Anomaly Investigator determined to uncover the truth behind a series of strange phenomena—and find a way to escape.

4555900.title: Farmnana Defence
4555900.short_description: ▎ Defend your farm with magical bananas! Collect and enhance 20+ bananas across 5 tiers, build your farm by day, and survive monster waves by night. Face 5 epic bosses in 25 waves and endless Infinite Mode.

4731540.title: Spooky Market Demo
4731540.short_description: Spooky Market 是一款适合 1–4 名玩家的合作商店模拟游戏，设定在永恒万圣节的世界。经营自己的店铺，售卖各种商品，服务吸血鬼、骷髅等生物，招募特别员工，逐步发展并扩大你的商店。

2738950.title: The Wolf Is Dead Demo
2738950.short_description: The Wolf is Dead is a murder mystery game. When the Big Bad Wolf is found murdered at a party for his biopic, you're called in. Interrogate suspects, investigate the scene of the crime and use this to travel back in time and reconstruct the events of the evening. Who killed Alexander Wolff?

4348710.title: Mountain Crew
4348710.short_description: Mountain Crew is a simulator focused on MTB biking. It joins both realistic biking on mountain shrubs and forests in a trail mode and map exploration in a freeride mode.

4618260.title: Dirt Clicker Demo
4618260.short_description: Dirt Clicker is a charming incremental game about digging to the hidden center of the world.

4317700.title: 真爱坤vs小黑子
4317700.short_description: 化身爱坤，用篮球与鸡爪武装自己，夺回被抢走的鸡蛋，在250个关卡中对抗无穷无尽的小黑子。独特的死亡惩罚与真爱榜系统，让每一次战斗都充满挑战与乐子。

4218480.title: The Dream of Jacob
4218480.short_description: Travel as Jacob through the most transcendent astral dream ever told. Discover heaven and hell, overcoming unexpected challenges and fighting your inner demons. Will you reach the top of the ladder?

2317640.title: JUMP KING QUEST
2317640.short_description: 在《JUMP KING QUEST》中投身于高风险惩罚式平台跳跃！体验动态在线攀爬行动——独自探索，或一起坠落，在攀登至高塔顶那个性感火热美人的疯狂旅程中奋力向上。 在这个世界里，每一处落脚点都是战场……

1634360.title: EMUUROM
1634360.short_description: 一款生物观测类银河恶魔城游戏。在远古乐园永远消失之前去探索它。研究EMUUROM生物，在EMUUDEX中记录发现，用所学知识开辟新道路。

1969810.title: 超时空地牢
1969810.short_description: 在 《超时空地牢》 这款回合制弹幕roguelike中，一切随你移动。每个时间球都是程序生成的，内有防御者和被吞噬世界的生物群落。闯入其中，寻找异域武器和小工具，智胜敌对外星人，并战斗到核心。

2529010.title: One More Try: Prologue
2529010.short_description: 在这个回合制的Roguelike卡牌构建游戏中，穿越魔法王国的土地奋勇战斗。通过组合强大的扑克组合来对抗敌人，增强它们的效果，赋予它们新的属性，寻找魔法遗物，并为你的英雄选择新的职业。

3705550.title: Internal Incident
3705550.short_description: Internal Incident – a top-down survival horror extraction shooter. Explore the hidden corners of a vast facility in search of resources while fighting off terrifying creatures lurking in the dark. Unveil the secrets of the abandoned complex and do everything you can to make it out alive.

4598390.title: Spell Knight: Abyss Cleaver Demo
4598390.short_description: 深入黑暗深渊，消灭源源不断涌来的怪物军团。 化身魔法骑士，挥舞强大的武器，享受快速成长带来的刺激体验。

4716870.title: Game Show But Evil Demo
4716870.short_description: A quiz show… but with real stakes?

4732970.title: 邪恶厨师大战 Demo
4732970.short_description: 一款基于虚幻五引擎搭建的卡通风格2.5D游戏，玩家将扮演梦想参加九狱除房夺冠、却在报名参赛《九狱除房》时不慎点错网页、错报了名为邪恶厨师大战的山寨奇葩真人秀的厨师。但她有所不知的是，这款山寨了《九狱除房》的奇葩真人秀邪恶厨师大战，实际上是由真正来自地狱的魔鬼主厨所主持。真人秀阵容涵盖主厨/副厨/吉祥物/侍者等节目组工作人员及来自各界的参赛选手。在开局与节目组签约后，一旦游戏失败就会被吞噬灵魂。

3805000.title: Steam & Clicks
3805000.short_description: Build, upgrade, and fight! In a steampunk world overrun by the undead, Rose Mary uses her workshop to craft weapons and armor in this strategic clicker. Forge powerful gear and face turn-based battles to save her city!

4700010.title: InCowMental Demo
4700010.short_description: InCowMental is a "cowsy", cute and absurd incremental game where you build a dairy empire from a small countryside field. Milk your cows, grow your wheat, age your cheese, set out to conquer the world and boost your production with mini-games.

4425820.title: Skyos
4425820.short_description: SKYOS is a real-time 3D space simulation where Earth, satellites, constellations, weather imagery, and orbital events evolve in sync with the living sky, while cinematic Earth-to-Moon missions unfold through real-time launch windows and orbital transfers.

4677910.title: CELESTIAL: FIRE & FORGE Demo
4677910.short_description: An incremental clicker game where you HEROICALLY… click a button to light a fire. That’s it... The fire makes ash, you assign recipes to arcane forges, materials appear, upgrades unlock, numbers go up, and somehow.... you’re still optimizing it all. Repeat forever.

4715190.title: Only Farming - Cozy Harvesting Game
4715190.short_description: Take pleasure in harvest season in a quiet, charming village. On this journey, enjoy watching yourself evolution and progress as you transform from a novice harvester into an expert harvester. Harvest plenty, upgrade your tools, and get ready for the new harvest season.

4702330.title: Torment Hexus Demo
4702330.short_description: Technofascist cyberpunk CEOs must die! Charge spells with the match-3 grid, then cast them on your enemies in turn-based tactical roguelike combat. Climb the tower, kill the boss, and maybe make the world a better place.

4762450.title: Shape Sift Demo
4762450.short_description: Build experimental sorting systems to separate, transform, and route flowing shapes in this minimalist physics-based automation puzzle game.

4278360.title: Crawl To The Depths Demo
4278360.short_description: Crawl to the Depths is a first-person roguelite where you adventure through destructible caverns.

4675110.title: GeoFlag Demo
4675110.short_description: A geography game for the curious. Match flags. Place countries. Race the daily challenge. Four game modes covering 154 countries, with two visual themes — vintage parchment or modern aerial — to set the mood.

4656240.title: Math Warudo: Grassland & Beyond
4656240.short_description: A math adventure game featuring Toppy and Ame across multiple Warudos. Train your skills, collect equipment, and uncover their story in this casual yet rewarding math and dungeon-crawl like experience.

4761860.title: COLORIZED Demo
4761860.short_description: COLORIZED is the perfect escape from the monotony of everyday life. This 3D coloring game has you transforming interiors and solving aesthetic puzzles.

4296860.title: BunnyFly: Season of Summer
4296860.short_description: Fly in a relaxing world as a rare BunnyFly in this cozy collectathon! Master your flight, collect pollen, and create honey or wax to share with others. Collect Royal Jelly to strengthen your cheeks and become the next BunnyFly Queen!

4696080.title: No More Demon
4696080.short_description: Fight relentlessly in a fast-paced FPS roguelite against relentless yokai hordes. Choose your elite anime heroines, unlock powerful weapons, craft unique builds, and descend into the deepest realms to face the Yokai Lord.

1118520.title: 平行人生 Paralives
1118520.short_description: 《平行人生》是一款围绕“家、人生与羁绊”展开的生活模拟游戏。无论顺境逆境，你的故事，会走向何方？

4622500.title: Ice Cream Together: A Cozy Parlor Simulator Demo
4622500.short_description: 通过制作不同口味的冰淇淋、为顾客提供服务和管理库存，与好友一起在线打造你的梦想冰淇淋店。舒适的氛围、多种自定义选项和 4 人在线合作！

2980170.title: Vortica
2980170.short_description: Vortica is a 2D action roguelite set in a solar system overrun by hostile aliens. Loot up, suit up, and shoot up as you battle against enemy hordes, explore derelict outposts, and hunt giant bosses. But remember to bring the right tools for the job!

4733320.title: 爱丽丝之眼 Demo
4733320.short_description: 《爱丽丝之眼》是一款氛围诡异的点击挂机游戏，融入轻度解谜和放置战斗元素。爱丽丝从黑暗中醒来，被困在一座奇怪的宅邸中，她需要在这里探索离开的方法。猫神的祭坛掉落金币、兔人会帮忙采集胡萝卜、地牢的怪物挡住去路……你能陪伴爱丽丝抵达最后的真相吗？

4589470.title: Point Demo
4589470.short_description: Point is a mouse-only precision rogue-lite where one mistake can end your run. Navigate a branching map, complete escalating mini-games, and collect powerful items and upgrades to shape your build. Lou, your learning partner, will guide you through the POINT program.

4669610.title: Rogue Quest
4669610.short_description: 通过打出扑克牌型来造成伤害。一对可造成伤害，同花可造成重创，同花顺则能终结战斗。组建涵盖5个职业的卡组，叠加88张强力卡牌，并攀登这座诅咒之塔——每次挑战都会重新洗牌，改变胜负的几率。

4135750.title: 喂蚁后吃饼
4135750.short_description: 广积粮，扩地盘。进化兵种，各显神通。探索羁绊，组合奇效。优化产线，定制策略，为女王献上堆积如山的贡品！

4279120.title: Budgie's Bug Shop
4279120.short_description: 在这款轻松解压的放置小游戏中，一边体验欢乐捕虫，一边经营由虎皮鹦鹉当家的神奇小店。强化装备，解锁逆天神技，将小店做大做强，打造日进斗金的皮皮商业帝国！

4739030.title: Pulsebreaker Demo
4739030.short_description: Pulsebreaker is a classic survival horror game. Explore environments, collect resources, and fight zombies. Manage your inventory, solve light puzzles, and survive with limited supplies. Includes melee and ranged combat. Single-player only.

4603480.title: Click Build Repeat Demo
4603480.short_description: 《Click, Build, Repeat》是一款放置类模型建造和收集游戏。

4403770.title: NOSBALL Demo
4403770.short_description: Nosball is a fast-paced car drifting soccer game with demolition derby chaos. Smash rivals, master physics-based control, and score goals on dangerous pinball-style arenas set in global locations with dynamic weather.

3921670.title: Brewed and Battered
3921670.short_description: 从零开始酿造药水并用作武器，荡平成群炼金傀儡！在这款生存 Roguelite 游戏中，每种原材料组合都能制成一种药水，并拥有独一无二的轨迹、范围与反应。发掘奇异的药剂协同效果，拯救你的炼金术士同僚，踏上追寻贤者之石的旅途。

4004830.title: They Left Us Here
4004830.short_description: 一款第一人称科幻恐怖游戏，你将在废弃的太空站中探索。

4698280.title: Litter Factory Demo
4698280.short_description: Litter Factory (Demo) is a fast-paced co-op sim where you and a friend become Waste Warriors, cleaning the world one trash at a time! Collect, sort, and recycle waste into resources while dealing with problems such as electricity shortage and malfunctioning machines.

4748840.title: Hold the Core Demo
4748840.short_description: Hold the Core 是一款关于以安全换取力量的 Roguelite 塔防游戏。选择风险卡，塑造敌人路线，进化防御塔，并在致命敌人与 Boss 面前守住阵线。

4627720.title: Cinderkeep
4627720.short_description: Cinderkeep is a roguelike maze game where you shoot, move, and shift through hordes of enemies as randomized rooms unfold into a single, evolving run. Collect treasure and conquer the labyrinth to claim Cinderkeep’s power, surviving the shifting fortress that reshapes itself for every new attempt.

4673120.title: Koko's Cafe Demo
4673120.short_description: Serve coffee and befriend customers as you learn their story in this coming-of-age visual novel.

4205020.title: Aurora Zen
4205020.short_description: Paint the sky with vibrant aurora. Relax and find your zen by filling the sky with brilliant ribbons of beautiful colour and shapes.

2846090.title: 月之镜：夜月无光 Demo
2846090.short_description: 《月之镜：夜月无光》是一款具有一定特色的解谜冒险游戏。本作讲述了一个年轻的女老师，为了寻找失踪的父亲而进入了一所偏僻山区的考古学校。在校期间，这所学校发生了太多不思议事件，女老师也开始明白父亲的失踪并非偶然……

4625530.title: Pixmox Demo
4625530.short_description: Discover a vibrant pixel world where Match-3 combines monster collecting! Match tiles to defeat enemies, collect monsters, upgrade pets, and build a powerful team. Fight, collect, conquer! Cute pixel art, lively music – perfect for monster collecting and puzzle fans.

4539480.title: 合租恋人：恋爱进行时
4539480.short_description: 背负房贷与生活压力的唐小路，只能出租闲置房间并努力工作。成熟知性、极具个人魅力的女总裁，精致容貌身材火辣的美女主播，曾经的最爱初恋白月光，青梅竹马的邻家小妹，相继闯入生活，四人的到来，让这场恋爱争夺战愈发激烈......

4745700.title: Rune Caves: Eternal Echo Demo
4745700.short_description: 《符文洞窟：永恒回响》是一款带有 Roguelite 元素的益智消除游戏。你将扮演考古学家深入失落文明遗迹，通过“符文共鸣”破解祭坛谜阵，并击碎不断干扰你的“守护者残响”。

2158990.title: Rule No. 3 Downpour
2158990.short_description: An arcade arena-shooter FPS about slipping into the flow-state and getting directly to the action as fast as humanly possible. Get overwhelmed by enemies and compete with your friends for hi-scores!

4077960.title: 潜入欢乐城卢迪尔
4077960.short_description: 一款复古风格的JRPG游戏。你将扮演一名菁英骑士，深入敌境以完成使命。孤身深入敌方腹地，你必须不惜一切代价取得成功。

4718100.title: Gongmu Mountain in Chongzuo
4718100.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4673880.title: 超极简桌面农场 Demo
4673880.short_description: 小到不能再小的挂机农场模拟游戏，你可以把它塞进任何意想不到的位置，开启你的种田生活！

1805320.title: 罗马拓荒录
1805320.short_description: 罗马已然陨落！但是这不影响你白天种田搞搞基建，晚上开荒刷刷僵尸。你可以享受单人的惬意时光，没事陪一下罗马的神明，抑或是和你的最多7位朋友们共同享受共同经营的乐趣！

4731410.title: 奉魔 Demo
4731410.short_description: 《奉魔》是一款2D类幸存者游戏，采用二次元画风结合仙侠题材。玩家将在游戏中扮演四大魔门中的修行者，在各种秘境中历练，探索遗迹，修炼道法，探寻失落的遗迹，失传的法术。击败拦路的强敌，上百种功法与天赋组合自成一道，铸就专属于你的无上仙途。

2100280.title: World of Tanks: HEAT
2100280.short_description: 《World of Tanks: HEAT》为第一款以英雄人物为核心的坦克战斗游戏。选择您的特工，自定义坦克，然后利用技术与战略来主宰战场。

4752820.title: Apoikia Demo
4752820.short_description: Apoikia 是一款城市建造与经济模拟游戏，你将把边境定居点发展为繁荣枢纽，通过掌控供应链、区域市场与法律政策，并在未来迎来战斗系统与自由市场投资机制。

4440680.title: Horrors Above Demo
4440680.short_description: A dark fantasy sci-fi rougelite first person fighting game where you create and cast spells to fight off never ending waves of monsters from centuries past. Fight, die, collect currency to purchase permanent upgrades, fight, die, collect, upgrade, fight, die, collect, upgrade, fight, die.

4738970.title: 冷泉-阈限空间 Demo
4738970.short_description: 没有战斗的 2D 心理恐怖生存游戏。地图每次进入都会重组，墙壁可以被登山镐破坏，不可视实体只能通过脚步声判断距离。在无限循环的阈限走廊中，找到出口是你唯一的生路。

4604740.title: Planet No More Demo
4604740.short_description: Planet No More is an arcade-incremental game where you build a fleet to dynamically shatter celestials. With every weapon and fleet upgrade, you'll advance deep into the galaxy, strategically shattering planets to their cores to unlock the next celestial.

4670250.title: Escape from Slumberland Demo
4670250.short_description: Escape from Slumberland is an online co-op horror game with up to 4 players. Explore deadly dream worlds, collect valuable moonbeams and escape before the nightmares claim you. Meanwhile the monster in your bedroom demands ever increasing sacrifices. Succeed or be devoured!

3805630.title: 世界毁灭七天前
3805630.short_description: 一个普通的早晨，五个大学生踏入同一间教室，却在陌生的空间醒来。纸条上写着：“在七天内找到真相，否则这里就会毁灭。”你将如何度过这七天？

2261430.title: 流明物语：特雷的回忆
2261430.short_description: 走进《LumenTale: Memories of Trey》富有魔力的旖旎世界，享受引人入胜的怪物收集角色扮演游戏！跟随特睿踏上冒险，找回他丢失的记忆，并与各种各样的“Animon”怪物塑造新的回忆。

4731020.title: Natural Allies Demo
4731020.short_description: Natural Allies is a 2D platform game inspired by the 8-bit era. Team up with a variety of animal buddies to stop an ancient evil from taking over! Explore 3 of the game's 25 stages in this demo!

2330110.title: Yerba Buena
2330110.short_description: 探索超现实的 1970 年代游戏世界，从邪恶分子手中拯救旧金山。扮演主人公芭布，运用振荡器的特性抓取与覆写解开烧脑的环境平台谜题。

4691130.title: Sultan's Decree
4691130.short_description: A card-based strategy game across 623 years of Ottoman history. Swipe to decree, balance four powerful factions, and guide 36 real sultans from the dynasty's founding in 1299 to the birth of the Turkish Republic in 1922. Every choice reshapes history.

4644090.title: Just Eat Sushi!
4644090.short_description: A revolving sushi simulator for up to 4 players! Relax and watch the plates go by, eat until you're stuffed, or just hang out and chat with friends.

4737350.title: 见鬼的大学生活 Demo
4737350.short_description: 恋爱×悬疑×鬼故事 刚刚踏入大学校园的女主角，怎么也没想到，即将迎来一段离奇与甜蜜交织的灵异体验。 随着女主角在闹鬼事件中越陷越深，一个又一个人物的心思和本性逐渐暴露出来，生死危机步步紧逼，女主角则是解决一切的关键。

4618890.title: 101 Cats in Toronto
4618890.short_description: 加入这场冒险，在精心打造的多伦多风景中，发现101只小猫咪🐾的藏身之处。🏆赢取众多成就。你能找到多少只呢？😺快来抓紧时间！⏱️

4739060.title: Stick N' Sheep Demo
4739060.short_description: Join the woolly madness! A chaotic 2 to 8 player party game where an avalanche of crazy minigames awaits you. In a colorful cartoon world, push, betray, and survive to become the smartest… or luckiest sheep!

4744060.title: Joy Malignant Demo
4744060.short_description: A surreal dice-based RPG in a cursed city of gut-wrenching suffering. Here, your choices shape your skills and appearance. Survive the city's hellish trials, meet tortured characters, and develop your own unique identity. Every choice matters as your actions will literally shape you.

3115220.title: 自在城镇
3115220.short_description: 建造一座诗情画意的 19 世纪地中海小镇，并帮助它发展成为一座繁荣的城市吧。在这款由《Station to Station》开发者打造的、温馨的城市建设游戏中，自由地放置和自定义每一项元素，为不断增长的人口创造一个完美家园吧。

4714320.title: Winter Hunts Us Demo
4714320.short_description: A turn-based roguelite strategy game on a hex map. Lead a prehistoric tribe south ahead of the advancing glacier, manage resources and tribe members, hunt, gather, unlock technologies, face events, and fight tactical battles.

3757800.title: HellDrop Demo
3757800.short_description: 《HELL DROP》是一款模块化轻度Rogue飞行射击游戏。驾驶飞船直坠虫族星球，在下落中拼装部件、升级火力，一路击穿地壳与虫群防线，深入地心引爆炸弹完成使命。

2932150.title: Life Below
2932150.short_description: Life Below 是对城市建造游戏类型的全新诠释，背景设定在水下世界。在 Rhianna Pratchett 真挚的叙事中，你将塑造蓬勃生长的珊瑚礁，复兴濒临崩溃的生态系统，并培育一个生机勃勃的海洋景观。你是海洋最后的希望。

4587980.title: Veil
4587980.short_description: VEIL is a first-person psychological horror game set on a remote island, where a peaceful weekend trip slowly turns into fear. Explore unsettling places, uncover hidden truths, and survive a nightmare that grows from obsession, dread, and the unknown.

4481020.title: Bushcraft Survival Demo
4481020.short_description: Alone. Hungry. Freezing. Test your grit in this unforgiving, Bushcraft Survival simulator set deep in the icy forests of Northern Canada. Collect resources, build shelters, fish, track, and trap in a brutal open world where every decision counts - and any mistake could be your last.

4739460.title: Venus: The Last Ascent Demo
4739460.short_description: Play the demo for Venus: The Last Ascent, a physics-based sci-fi survival game where your base is also your vehicle. Mine resources, build modules, expand your rolling machine, and survive the first stretch of Venus on your way to Cloud City.

4710100.title: Figuritas
4710100.short_description: A desk-based roguelite where you sort figures under pressure, complete contracts, chain combos, and navigate through shops, events, treasures, and bosses to build the perfect run. Time and order — that’s all.

4753260.title: 宝箱怪大冒险Demo
4753260.short_description: 在这款类推箱子的趣味解谜游戏中，你将扮演一只渴望自由的宝箱怪！你需要巧妙规划移动路线，努力躲避致命的陷阱、巡逻的守卫和贪婪的冒险者。发挥你的智慧利用地形，一步一步逃离这座危机四伏的地下城。游戏内含60多个精心设计的挑战关卡，极具策略性与脑力考验。快来开启这场惊险刺激的宝箱怪大逃亡吧！

4701310.title: The Merchant's Eden Demo
4701310.short_description: Build a medieval town around a thriving market. Defend your citizens and traveling merchants against raiding bandits. A minimalist game blending cozy city-building and intense tower-defense as you grow and protect your town.

4726140.title: I Need To Pay Rent
4726140.short_description: I NEED TO PAY RENT! is a physics-based chaos simulator about one small problem: you need money, and your apartment is full of it. Grab, throw, and sell anything in sight as your debt spirals out of control.

4672860.title: Donut Smash
4672860.short_description: Donut Smash 是一款快节奏、色彩鲜艳的街机游戏，讲述一只非常饥饿的猫和太多从天而降的甜甜圈。在甜甜圈落地前点掉它们，敲碎冰冻甜甜圈，收集咖啡提升分数，并且无论如何都要避开西兰花。漏掉一个甜甜圈，或者不小心点到西兰花，都可能立刻结束这一局。

4756460.title: Good Gaijin, Bad Gaijin Demo
4756460.short_description: You’ve just landed in Japan with nothing but a suitcase and a lot to learn. Navigate cultural minefields, engage with a cast of local characters, and decide what kind of visitor you want to be. Part social simulator, part cinematic journey—it’s time to choose your own adventure.

4176490.title: Mystery Phantoms : Ghostly Secrets Collector's Edition
4176490.short_description: Investigate haunted locations, find hidden objects, solve eerie puzzles, and uncover ghostly secrets as reality begins to crack around you.

4594750.title: Decay
4594750.short_description: Decay is an incremental game in which you are tasked with using your trusty particle launcher to create ever-larger and more unstable atomic nuclei, witnessing longer and more complex atomic decay chains and aiming to discover all the isotopes!

3768760.title: 007 初露锋芒
3768760.short_description: 赢得编号。007 初露锋芒 是IO Interactive出品的惊险刺激的间谍动作冒险游戏。跟随年轻、机智但偶尔鲁莽的詹姆斯·邦德的脚步，他是军情六处训练项目中的新兵，一起探索这位世界最著名间谍的起源故事。

4765480.title: Pick Ball Demo
4765480.short_description: 发射镐子开采矿物的弹珠台式增量游戏！ 让镐子在铺满整个屏幕的矿物之间不断弹射，收集金币，击碎隐藏的宝藏和巨大的 Boss 岩石。 更强大的镐子、更稀有的矿物，以及更深的矿脉正等待着你。

4638360.title: Sevenfall Demo
4638360.short_description: 一款融合卡组构筑、要塞建设与史诗级阵营对决的回合制策略 RPG。探索危险领域，夺取远古钥匙，踏上征途，对抗 Ulthar——黑暗三位一体。在这段旅程中，每一个选择都将塑造你的命运。

4760630.title: Super Sub: World Cup Demo
4760630.short_description: Win the world cup through clever clicks, useful upgrades, silly own goals, and bending the rules. An active twist on incremental games that strips football down to just its beautiful beating heart: kick balls hard, score goals, earn money.

4698450.title: Operation: Black Genesis - The Immortal Trials Demo
4698450.short_description: top-down co-op survival horror game where players deploy into deadly Quarantined Zones, fight mutated experiments, and extract with everything you can carry—because if you die, you lose it all.

4711470.title: Where Control Ends Demo
4711470.short_description: Where Control Ends 是一部心理视觉小说，讲述年轻女孩阿斯特拉在一个无法完全回忆起来的夜晚之后，努力维持自我的故事。

4740110.title: V.A.U.L.T. PROTOCOL Demo
4740110.short_description: 一款 6 人合作恐怖游戏。为了满足完美人工智慧 KUT-ANA，你们必须在核废土中搜刮珍贵遗物。从致命异常中存活，并在被回收前成功撤离。

4673090.title: Farming Incremental But With Guns Demo
4673090.short_description: 种下作物，再用你那把靠谱的枪把它们狠狠干掉。赚钱，购买升级，经营你的农场。看着你的作物在物理层面不断进化，膨胀到巨无霸般的尺寸。让它们生长。永不停歇地让它们继续生长，直到它们的阴影永远遮天蔽日。

3830490.title: Kanji Cats
3830490.short_description: 厌倦了其他日语学习工具吗？总是把音读和训读搞混？ 《汉字猫》是一款寓教于乐的教育游戏，通过猫咪与寿司主题的小游戏来教你日语。在充满疗愈感、有猫咪陪伴的像素风寿司店里，一边配对、打字和分类汉字，一边轻松学习吧！

254800.title: Empire Earth III
254800.short_description: In Empire Earth III it’s you who creates history. Build your empire from three distinct factions or create a custom faction of your choosing. Lead your people to supremacy in technology, politics and economy, from ancient times to the future. Your quest for world domination is finally at hand.

254780.title: Empire Earth II: Gold Edition
254780.short_description: Empire Earth II: Gold Edition refines the series’ time-spanning gameplay with a host of new features. With advanced AI, picture-in-picture control, dynamic weather and many other additions, this RTS doesn’t just stand the test of time – it annihilates it.

254760.title: Empire Earth: Gold Edition
254760.short_description: With dozens of hours of gameplay set across a rich tapestry of time, Empire Earth: Gold Edition offers real-time strategy for the ages. Choose any point in time - from the discovery of fire to the laser battles of the future - and command your civilization with one goal: make Earth your Empire.

4005380.title: Yaks : Yet another kingdom to save
4005380.short_description: YAKS 是一款混合式 RPG/卡组构筑游戏。选择五位英雄之一，在 1v1 战斗中对抗敌人，并通过卡牌、RPG 属性和装备打造多样化的构筑。

3964500.title: Lost In The Backrooms: Day 100
3964500.short_description: Lost in the backrooms day 100 is a co-op horror game based on the concept of the backrooms with different levels and entities , a sanity system and unreal engine 5 graphics for the best immersive experience.

1475300.title: Barbarian
1475300.short_description: 类魂开放世界生存RPG，支持1-10人游玩。掌握流畅战斗，通过精准招架与闪避击败强大首领，制作并强化装备，建造基地并共享物品。角色进度在所有世界间共通——可单人或与好友一起冒险。

4738900.title: Magic Cauldron - Dungeons II - Demo
4738900.short_description: Magic Cauldron - Dungeons - The Tower of Madness is a classic dungeon crawler with a retro look. The game is reminiscent of the good old days of grid crawlers, which did not need 3D at all... only this time in 3D.

4604730.title: Witchlight Woods Demo
4604730.short_description: In this prologue, you must search for a remedy deep in the woods, where the terrible yet charming Thousand Eyes Witch lurks. Blending fairy tale fright with psychological horror, this narrative game offers a short but strange journey filled with difficult choices and hidden secrets

4760510.title: OK👍 Boomer Demo
4760510.short_description: A 4-player cooperative survival horror where you’ll explore the terrifying depths of the internet alongside your team of analog tech enthusiasts. Use old-school technology to purge glitches, preserve your digital sanity, and survive the strange monsters lurking in the deep web.

4033080.title: Deep Corp
4033080.short_description: 挖矿、开采资源、生产商品，恢复州秩序。在狂野的西部时代后期，成为一名成功的商人和高效的州长！

4665830.title: Frog Up!
4665830.short_description: A retro pixel arcade-style collection game for those who appreciate FROGS! Complete your Frog Log by clicking on the frogs hopping across the screen; unlock different habitat ecosystems with their own unique kinds of frogs & rarities; and get those sweet, sweet Frogbucks!

4707320.title: 帰りの夜道
4707320.short_description: Proceed through the fear on a dimly lit road home. At times, stop, catch your breath, and overcome the fear. Make it home safely.

1816640.title: Modern Naval Warfare
1816640.short_description: 指挥“无声舰队”。《Modern Naval Warfare》是一款上演于弗吉尼亚级核潜艇耐压壳内的终极战术模拟游戏。这款精益求精的战术模拟在画面、物理和真实作战系统方面拥有无与伦比的深度。

4699580.title: 汝必暴富 Demo
4699580.short_description: 解读水晶球的预言，找出明天会上涨的股票，然后押上全部家当。 在疯狂的暴涨和暴跌中生存下来，成为富翁吧。 毕竟，你要向那家仅仅因为你挪用了一点公款就把你解雇的占卜公司复仇！

3829690.title: 为堕入黑暗的你献上花束
3829690.short_description: 「无法逃脱的命运，逐渐扭曲的爱意。那名为『愛』的感情如剧毒般悄然侵蚀着内心—— 」 可攻略角色全员病娇 ——这究竟是疯狂还是纯粹的爱？

2665680.title: 巴别塔 ：混乱的幸存者
2665680.short_description: 与成群的怪物战斗，习得新技能并增强能力。通过数百种物品组合自定义自己的构建，达到顶峰实现最深的欲望。在这款令人兴奋的Roguelite砍杀生存游戏中征服高塔！

4643540.title: WIRED TOKYO 2007 Demo
4643540.short_description: — Dive into Tokyo. Dive into the past. — WIRED TOKYO 2007 is a vertical 3D action game where you climb toward the vast skies above Tokyo. To unlock new abilities, you may have to deliberately “dive” from above. A climbing game where falling has meaning — that’s WIRED TOKYO 2007.

4639030.title: free as fish像鱼儿一样自由
4639030.short_description: 无论在海岛别墅中，黄河中的沙漠堡垒中，在海景别墅中，或是在像鱼儿一样自由鱼店中。 您都可以尽情享受喂鱼，养鱼的乐趣。 当然别忘了阅读鱼类百科，搞明白每种不同的鱼儿适应的盐碱度，控制水的含盐量，水温。这是您饲养成功鱼儿的关键。切记，鱼儿可以喂的少，但水一定要适合鱼。 您知道吗？鳑鲏必须在河蚌中产卵，因此，在本游戏中只按数字键‘2’鳑鲏是不会产卵的，必须要在鱼缸中放置河蚌，鳑鲏才会产卵

1431750.title: The Henchmen
1431750.short_description: Relive the ‘90s crime sandbox alone, or with a partner by your side. Prepare for a head on collision of the classic and the contemporary in The Henchmen - a chaotic, co-operative crime thriller.

4710640.title: 沙漠觅水者
4710640.short_description: 一款关于“铺路”的休闲解谜游戏。重组方块，引导你的角色走向绿洲。易于上手，极具深度，非常适合随时来一局。

4708960.title: 第九档案：虫村篇
4708960.short_description: 刚毕业的年轻警察被一纸调令发配到地图上不存在的西南山村。浓雾锁住山谷，村民在六点零三分同时关门，墙壁里传出昆虫爬行的沙沙声。第一具尸体全身布满密孔，内部被掏空。这是一个关于寄生、资本与沉默共谋的心理恐怖故事。你能做的只是带着伤疤活下来——或者活不下来。

4727430.title: Last Shot: Drunkman’s Roulette Demo
4727430.short_description: A LETHAL strategic 2-player drinking MIND game of deduction and risk. Take turns choosing glasses from a grid. Apply effects. Make bets. Use deduction, bluffs, and dirty tricks — because someone's drinking the last shot, and it better not be you.

4677990.title: I HATE SNAKE: Retro Simulator
4677990.short_description: 包含80个高难度关卡的复古贪吃蛇游戏。具有不断提升的速度、缩小的空间以及会对玩家失误做出反应的算法。包含经典高分模式和具有单色液晶屏美感的2000年代风格自定义外壳。

4580380.title: Torquonomics
4580380.short_description: Torquonomy is a voxel 3D physics shooter. Spin yourself out of danger and shoot bullets at other spin-garnisms. Upgrade your guns because next wave is harder.

4440600.title: Hamsteria Demo
4440600.short_description: Hamsteria 是一款困难的双人合作游戏，你将扮演两只身处相连滚轮中的仓鼠。支持在线合作、本地合作和单人游玩！

4769250.title: Busy Bar - World Tour Demo
4769250.short_description: Serve drinks, survive ridiculous guests, upgrade your bars, and buy out rival moguls — solo or in co-op — in a chill bar empire game where every shift ends in progress.

4730060.title: 连击与乱斗 Demo
4730060.short_description: 快节奏，轻Roguelike游戏。几十种随机事件快速变化生成，在众多敌人的围剿下，通过上下左右的简单移动，勇往直前不假思索地顶撞击飞敌人，通过随机事件相互配合，得到意想不到的效果；或是思考局势随机应变。不管哪种方法，不断击飞敌人，突破包围，来获取更高分数。试用版只解锁了部分随机事件，供玩家游玩。

4694260.title: Ultimate Classic Car Racing 2 Demo
4694260.short_description: Ultimate Classic Car Racing 2 是一款快速、充满竞争与混乱的本地多人派对赛车游戏!!!! 在分屏模式下与最多 8 名玩家一起对战。使用导弹、护盾、爆炸桶、钩爪等多种武器，在 8 种不同的游戏模式中击败你的朋友!!! 这是一款专为和朋友一起坐在沙发上游玩而设计的游戏，节奏快速且疯狂，但你也可以在部分模式中与 AI 机器人练习。

4716170.title: Car Sales Simulator Demo
4716170.short_description: Car Sales Simulator is the ultimate dealership game where you become a true car dealer and build your own automotive empire. This is more than just a selling game - it's a full-on trade and business simulator experience!

4702940.title: 马拉松：荣耀之跑(V1.0)
4702940.short_description: 公元前490年，雅典士兵菲迪皮德斯独自奔跑42公里，只为传递一句胜利的消息。体验马拉松起源的传奇，在横版跑酷中完成你的使命。
developers: Qingdao Qilin Ark Network Technology Co.,Ltd.
publishers: Qingdao Qilin Ark Network Technology Co.,Ltd.

3721200.title: Bay: Zero
3721200.short_description: With many, many bossfights, this FPS PvE is extremely fast paced, and could be a great distraction from reality when you finish it!

4710700.title: Beaver Creek Demo
4710700.short_description: A casual, water-physics puzzle game about building dams as a beaver (2 - 3 hours). Gnaw down trees, and grab and throw objects to organically build dams to back up water and progress to the next level.

4299670.title: StepSense
4299670.short_description: StepSense is a tense minimalist horror game where sound is survival. Explore a dark bunker to rescue abandoned micro-robots. Avoid high-voltage wires and listen for proximity mines. When the alarms trip, don't look back—sprint toward the green exit light. One misstep will cost your life.

4658280.title: The Doldrums
4658280.short_description: 这是一款第三人称生存游戏，你在荒岛上等待一艘可能不会到来的船。 即使幸存，也必须抵御涌来的抑郁情绪。

4724240.title: Vector Storm
4724240.short_description: A relentless top-down arcade shooter with roguelite progression. Blast through escalating waves, battle massive bosses, and build your loadout with boss-dropped gear. Earn tokens to permanently upgrade your fleet and unlock new ships between runs.

4459100.title: Resident Evil Requiem - Demo
4459100.short_description: 予生者恐惧。给尸者安魂。 开创了“Resident Evil”系列以及生存恐怖新纪元的《Resident Evil Requiem》推出体验版！来感受直击玩家灵魂的游戏体验吧。

4691650.title: Hell Girl
4691650.short_description: 在这款节奏紧凑的第三人称射击游戏中，穿越充满僵尸的地下城，体验激烈战斗与解谜元素的结合。

4111370.title: 观鸟笔记
4111370.short_description: 在阳台、海岸码头、悬崖、热带雨林、荒漠等各种地点，建造属于你自己的观鸟地，静静等待可爱的小鸟们前来造访。 这是一个轻松治愈的桌面放置游戏——像一张张小小的明信片，安静停留在电脑屏幕的一角。让美丽的风景与可爱的小鸟陪伴你的屏幕时光！别忘了拿起相机，拍下那些有趣又温柔的瞬间吧。

4614890.title: Peperoni Border Simulator
4614890.short_description: 走私非法货物，升级你的车辆，在开放世界中建立你的犯罪帝国。

4769720.title: Nitro & Necros Demo
4769720.short_description: Destroy hordes of zombies with your powerful turrets! Nitro & Necros is a Roguelite with tons of upgrades to make your car more and more powerful. You will drive over all kinds of zombies, shoot them up with your turrets and level up to select the best upgrades to survive this madness!

4414950.title: My Music Label
4414950.short_description: My Music Label is a music management and simulation game where you take full control of your label. Discover young talents, manage legendary artists, and shape the evolution of the music industry. Every decision influences careers and the history of music.

3210910.title: Tootum
3210910.short_description: 一款手工打造的像素风类银河战士恶魔城游戏，融合了深度探索和Roguelike式的成长体验。发现秘密，不断进化你的角色，面对一个每个选择都可能导向三种结局之一的世界。

1697850.title: 西部幽魂
1697850.short_description: 玫瑰，曾经的亡命之徒，如今踏足幽灵境界的“地下西部”。在这款动作平台冒险游戏中，你将重拾曾被遗忘的枪手技能，沿着令人惊叹的风景线展开旅程，寻找拯救女儿灵魂的任务。

4577130.title: Void Clickers
4577130.short_description: Shoot neon wireframe enemies, earn shards, upgrade five auto-firing weapons, and prestige through the void. A first-person idle clicker with match-3 combos, boss fights, and endless progression.

4744180.title: Meow Familiar World Demo
4744180.short_description: Single-Player, open world, third-person adventure. Play as a cat familiar and gain magical abilities as you help save the fishing villagers.
