Explore at your leisure, transform into different animals, compile quests in your journal, end the curse, and just be a cat and relax sometimes.

4571190.title: Illegal Alien Tower Defense
4571190.short_description: Can you save civilization from the brink of collapse, and restore Earth to a High-Trust society? This is a Tower Defense game focused on strategy, tower placement, and defeating enemies in a hilarious setting. Warning: Mature content. Depicts violence, cartoon blood, and macabre comedy.

4675800.title: Smashing Bottles Demo
4675800.short_description: Smashing Bottles 是一款简短且令人满足的游戏，你需要砸碎瓶子来赚钱，升级你的棒球棒，发现新瓶子，并制造混乱！你能砸碎足够多的瓶子买下整个宇宙吗？

4662130.title: Eve of Cultivation
4662130.short_description: Waking up alone on an deserted island, Keiko must discover the fate of her missing brother, find food to survive, and confront a warped force of nature who seeks to subsume her.

4686330.title: Hack 'n' Stack Demo
4686330.short_description: Physics meets tower defense in this chaotic party game for 2 to 4 players. Craft barricades and turrets with whatever you can find. But beware: relentless waves of enemies are coming to tear down everything you build.

3832300.title: Veil of Torment
3832300.short_description: Enter the abandoned Black Water Asylum in search of a missing girl. Veil of Torment is a psychological horror game where reality twists, shadows whisper, and every step drags you deeper into madness.

3434220.title: FearPark Chapter 1
3434220.short_description: FearPark is a horror experience set in an abandoned amusement park. The current version represents the full core experience, with potential improvements and updates planned after release. FearPark is currently in active development. Some features and content may change before the final release.

4677590.title: Sushi Idle Clicker
4677590.short_description: A relaxing idle/clicker game where you manage your own sushi restaurant. Start with basic ingredients, hire chefs to automate production, and upgrade your recipes. Reach level 7 to perform a rebirth and click your way to building the world's largest sushi empire.

4716700.title: Escria
4716700.short_description: Explore a dying fantasy world in this atmospheric 2D adventure, created by a single guy. Fight dangerous creatures, collect powerful weapons and relics, and journey through forests, castles, ruins, and corrupted lands before the world of Escria fades forever.

4735620.title: Ball, Fall, Dungeon Crawl Demo
4735620.short_description: Drop and merge balls to do battle, slay your foes, and get that sweet loot. Explore, dodge traps, and keep your torch lit. Retrieve the Amulet of Endor from the darkest levels of the dungeon.

4750320.title: Double Dealers - Demo
4750320.short_description: 一款支持3–6名玩家的拍卖游戏，围绕虚张声势、欺骗与操控展开。你必须在紧张激烈的竞价战中智胜对手，隐藏真相，并将高风险交易转化为利润。每一轮都是心理博弈的较量，信任脆弱，策略决定胜负。

4707810.title: Solitaire Deck Demo
4707810.short_description: 这是为多平台兼容的酷炫纸牌游戏，每一次胜利你都会解锁更多的扑克牌历史。用手柄、鼠标、键盘或触屏，你可以在任何设备上畅玩 Solitaire Deck。我们没有套路，我们只想把单纯的纸牌做到最好。

4736310.title: VAULTRATS Demo
4736310.short_description: Scavenge after the Collapse. Extract before it's too late.

2838620.title: Statecraft: Corrupted Democracy
2838620.short_description: 民主是肮脏的，弄脏你的手吧。像放羊一样操纵大众，贿赂议会，暗算对手。在70年代的混乱中，诚实就是软弱。你会成为救世主还是独裁者？选择权——以及腐败——就在你手中。

4726030.title: Sokobum Demo
4726030.short_description: 一款由放屁驱动的推箱子解谜游戏。潜入STINK臭气平台，探索诸如《超级放屁奥》、《印第肛纳·琼屎》、《致命后庭毒气》等传奇大作！推手纸，悄悄潜行，并在时间限制内赶到厕所。现已登陆STINK平台！

4748700.title: Fall of Days Demo
4748700.short_description: A strategic survival game where you uncover a zombie-infested world card by card. Scavenge, fight, craft, and outlast the undead. Reach your ship in time, make it your homestead, and travel across the fallen lands.

4640290.title: Barbecue Demo
4640290.short_description: 《Barbecue》是一款1到4人合作派对游戏，玩家要在自家后院办一场烧烤派对,最终演变成彻底的混乱。点火、烤肉、招待客人——并努力不把整个地方烧掉。

4712660.title: Time of the Lilies
4712660.short_description: A spy thriller featuring an escaped State Security agent navigating a conspiracy involving federal police, foreign agitators, and a familiar face from years past.

4688800.title: Mexican Train Demo
4688800.short_description: Mexican Train brings the classic game of Mexican Train Dominoes to 3D, supporting up to 7 players per online multiplayer session, or play solo and compete against up to 6 CPU players.

4751380.title: Distance Travellers Demo
4751380.short_description: Distance Travellers is a single player extraction space simulator, set in the distant future, fight, mine and loot your way around the galaxy. Upgrade your equipment and ship and do your best to survive the barren wastes of the new world.

4683700.title: Blast Beam Bang Demo
4683700.short_description: Blast Beam Bang 是-款俯视角 Roguelite 竞技场射击游戏，你将在每波之间升级并改造主动技能和武器，打造不断进化的构筑，在无情的机器人浪潮中生存下来。

4312280.title: Is Guilty
4312280.short_description: 心理恐怖工作模拟游戏。在偏僻的汽车咖啡店里为顾客服务。但当一封神秘邮件到来，你的夜班发生了变化。观察车辆。检查车牌。有人隐藏着黑暗的秘密，而某种存在正在黑暗中注视着你。

2982610.title: Stonemachia
2982610.short_description: Fight, Zefiro! Arm yourself with the power of chess and explore Medhelan, a land haunted by the Plague of Angels, in a dark action-adventure with soulslike elements. Will you be able to return to Heaven?

3239940.title: Mesoké
3239940.short_description: Mesoké 是一款诗意且内省的飞行游戏。 在不断变化的内在世界中自由滑翔， 每一次移动都轻触记忆、情感与美。 探索、冒险， 收集唤醒你内在圣所的生命能量。

2597080.title: 墨境
2597080.short_description: 《墨境》是一款水墨风动作Roguelite游戏。在猎杀狐妖的过程中，你发现自己的命运被所谓的“天道”掌控着，只有逃离这个世界，才有可能获得真正的自由。黄粱一梦，猝然而醒：“我虽凡尘微末，也当以剑代笔，纵横天下，快意人生！”

3575190.title: Peek
3575190.short_description: 一款以聆听为核心的恐怖游戏。你必须仅凭声音，在仪式网格中追踪幽灵的行踪。闭上双眼，记住她的行进路线，放置正确的圣物以求生存。

4769550.title: Castillon Demo
4769550.short_description: Castillon is a short strategy game where you freely build and defend your castle with magic. Gather resources and explore during the day, then survive enemy attacks at night. Use four types of magic to create the best defence, all in about 45 minutes.

4733670.title: Last Bullet Demo
4733670.short_description: A tactical turn-based roguelike where you build the ultimate Gun. Create a sequence of bullets, discover game-breaking combinations, and use simple one-tap controls to execute complex, screen-clearing attacks and defeat hordes of enemies!

4624780.title: Prettiest Morgue
4624780.short_description: A deckbuilding dress-up game where you run your own morgue fueled beauty agency that uses corpses as models.

4735610.title: Boby and the Witch Demo
4735610.short_description: 波比的女友被女巫绑架了——穿越3个世界和18个关卡去救她。你能5分钟内通关吗？

3070080.title: 极性场域
3070080.short_description: 这是一款基于真实物理特性的益智解谜游戏。你无法直接控制单个物体，只能改变整个世界的电场和力场方向。电场可以推动带电物体，且正负电荷运行方向相反；而力场可以推动所有物体，且运行方向相同。通过电荷的转移与中和机制的相互作用，加上充电、电势阱、电磁屏蔽等机制，组合成复杂而有趣谜题。

2934250.title: Cosmic Match
2934250.short_description: Cosmic Match is a relaxing space-themed memory game featuring multiple modes and dynamic grid challenges.

3698230.title: Grumpy Jack
3698230.short_description: 与不情愿的英雄杰克一起，在这款俯视视角的幽默冒险中探索阴森的噩梦世界。遇见古怪的角色，揭开隐藏的秘密，战斗凶狠的敌人，寻找死神丢失的咖啡杯。

2081790.title: Cards from the West
2081790.short_description: 用您的左轮手枪和扑克牌闯过狂野西部的险境吧

4682070.title: Zombobox: Bredo Story Demo
4682070.short_description: It seems like a zombie apocalypse has begun in the world, but it's somehow quiet... Maybe ask an elderly drunked person what happened? He says that he stopped everything, but how?

4748780.title: SUBJECT 404 Demo
4748780.short_description: 一款 PSX 风格心理恐怖游戏，将快节奏微型游戏变成服从系统。阅读面板的命令，在时间耗尽前反应，活过每个房间——否则面对处刑者。

4726750.title: NEVER SAFE IN DELAWARE Demo
4726750.short_description: A throwdown between 3 of the most wanted men on the East Coast and the powers that be who want them dead.

2894540.title: Ex Libris
2894540.short_description: Ex Libris is a library-crawling RPG adventure set in a 16th century monastery, inspired by the writings of Umberto Eco, Francois Rabelais, and Clark Ashton Smith.

3959160.title: 你的体重
3959160.short_description: 一款关于减肥的轻策略生活模拟游戏。管理运动、饮食、休息、意志力、体力和饥饿，在随机事件与角色特性中，努力让体重一点点降下来。

4602970.title: King Of The Hollow Circuit
4602970.short_description: Rebuild a dead techno-gothic empire in this dark idle clicker. Click the reactor, summon ritual servitors, decode forbidden archives, and ascend the hollow throne. Features random puzzles, dark curses, prestige ascension, and a haunting atmospheric soundtrack.

2539910.title: XF Extreme Formula
2539910.short_description: Race at the speed of sound and beyond in the great XF Extreme Formula championship! Taking place in the year 3000, you will tour trough the solar system proving you’re worthy of the title of champion.

4737670.title: 方块之地 Demo
4737670.short_description: 一款LowPoly风格的轻量化城市建造游戏，这里没有复杂的运营与资源管理，只有纯粹简单的建造。拥有科幻、幻想等风格建筑，能让你充分发挥想象力。选择你喜欢的建筑根据你的喜好搭建理想之城。

4718840.title: Unmixable Syrup Demo
4718840.short_description: I wolf down a cold, lonely meal. Work's wearing me down, and money's shaky. The syrup I pour into my cold coffee never mixes, no matter how much I stir.

4710780.title: Card Eater Demo
4710780.short_description: Combine cards to build the strongest deck and vanquish monsters! A deck-building roguelike FPS where you fight with a peculiar right hand.

4522520.title: 若诅咒以爱之名
4522520.short_description: 超重力百合x心理恐怖x悬疑怪谈x毒电波视觉小说。内含：全员重女、姬恋直、病娇、监禁、犯罪、姐妹骨科、修罗场、青梅战天降、重力女铜养娃等魔幻元素。主角将周旋于伪人妹妹、电波上司与掌控欲爆棚的青梅之间，解开十五年前妹妹神秘失踪之谜，探寻掩藏在记忆中的残忍真相。

4195160.title: Iron & Ivory
4195160.short_description: Iron & Ivory is an asymmetric head-to-head VR showdown; you either take command of the submersible as the VR captain or use the desktop and play as the Sea Beast. Battle alone or against your friends and use strategy, reflexes, and stealth to destroy your opponent.

3678970.title: TBH: 塔斯克巴·英雄
3678970.short_description: 终极迷你放置RPG！ 可爱的像素勇者们正等待着与你一同踏上冒险——就在你的任务栏旁。 用多样的职业、技能、道具和配装，击退工作和日常生活的无聊吧！

4688680.title: 食人花园 Demo
4688680.short_description: 一款用光引导植物的解谜游戏。踏入一座充满奇异植物的花园，破解谜题，找回你的小狗。

4687980.title: We Need More Humans! Demo
4687980.short_description: 一款关于驾驶UFO绑架地球上所有人的迷你渐进式（放置）游戏！环游世界， brain 键解锁升级，绑架人类直到一个不 vanishing。

4746940.title: Island of mech 机械岛 Demo
4746940.short_description: 《Island of mech 机械岛》 is a 2D click-based puzzle game. If you love puzzle games, this one is not to be missed. Trust me — you’re in for a unique experience.

4714600.title: Organism Detected
4714600.short_description: Face off as Human or Alien in an asymmetric online 1v1 game within a remote lunar facility. Purify, repair and predict or infest, sabotage and elude in a strategic battle for control.

4719070.title: Rally the Parties
4719070.short_description: A tactical RPG where time only advances while your character is acting. Direct your party while companions follow your orders autonomously, or switch characters to play their role yourself. Recruit NPCs to strengthen your party and descend into the dungeon. A permadeath roguelike RPG.

4290980.title: Eisen
4290980.short_description: Eisen is a strategic action roguelite. Evolve your weapons through branching trees, combine them with artifacts to craft broken builds, and use your dash to weave through endless swarms and evade complex boss patterns.

4189000.title: Hop Hop! Donut
4189000.short_description: 化身柯基犬甜甜圈，绑上气球翱翔天际，开启这场萌趣十足的 2D 平台冒险！大战邪恶猫咪，闪避致命陷阱，营救被绑架的主人——一场灵感源自《Balloon Fight》的奇趣冒险等你来玩。

1593370.title: Stickforge
1593370.short_description: Stickforge 是一款有趣的、基于物理的 2D 沙盒可改装火柴人游戏。创建您自己的地图、物品和皮肤；与其他玩家一起挑战和建造。

4071280.title: Nocturne for Cyl-Hestia
4071280.short_description: Play as a memorialist and investigate a dystopian city in this 3D adventure game. Collect memories, unlock visions, hack encrypted data, and expose the truth in the face of a regime that manipulates memory.

4567730.title: Worlds Upon The Wind Demo
4567730.short_description: Resettle the shards of a shattered world in this peaceful roguelite deckbuilder, covering centuries of classical Japanese art. Nurture communities, befriend animal spirits, and shape a new civilization through choices that echo across generations.

4692900.title: Beat Vector Demo
4692900.short_description: 一款360°全方位节奏游戏！击碎音符，让整个世界随着炫目特效一同炸裂，将每首曲目都化为一场盛大的灯光秀！

4042810.title: Cops&Crooks
4042810.short_description: 开局只有一名警察，其余可能是小偷、卧底或房主。潜伏、指认、周旋——直到1对1审讯，一句话就能翻盘。小偷阵营里还藏着间谍。节奏快、反转猛、语音爆笑的心理战 PvP。

4707410.title: Drunk Parking
4707410.short_description: You had one job: park the car. The problem? You’re doing it drunk. Drunk Parking is a chaotic physics-based driving game where simple parking turns into a complete mess. Fight unpredictable controls, overcorrect every turn, and try to land your car perfectly in a city full of obstacles.

4749340.title: 魔族公主打搜撤 Demo
4749340.short_description: 「打」倒敌人、「搜」集资源、「撤」离地图，运用你的巧思，用最少的魔力，走出最难缠的逃跑路线，创造属于玩家自己的逃跑奇迹！

4738960.title: BB ADVENTURE Demo
4738960.short_description: “BB ADVENTURE” is an immersive action game where you ride a real balance ball and clear athletic stages. Using a controller with an accelerometer, your balance ball’s movements control the in-game character, making you feel as if you’re inside the game.

4600360.title: Pit Panic Demo
4600360.short_description: 在这款卡通风格的Roguelike街机平台跳跃游戏中，逃离不断沉没的阿兹特克神庙。挖掘自己的上升路线，以爆燃速度跳跃攀爬，囤积战利品，用生命换取神级力量，击败首领并征服1000个手工打造的关卡。

4744090.title: Arcane Shores Demo
4744090.short_description: Arcane Shores is a city-building strategy game infused with magic. Build, defend, and expand your settlement while casting powerful spells that bend nature, restore what’s broken, and turn the tide against your enemies.

4609860.title: Revertices Demo
4609860.short_description: Revertices is an action combat sidescroller where you will be forced to fight the corrupted remains of your friends: your duty is to reset the cycle at all costs, but in doing so you doom yourself and your companions to repeat the same horrors.

4530610.title: Clutch Legend: FPS Career Simulator
4530610.short_description: Build your FPS career from zero. Pick your role, manage stress and fame, climb the leagues. Every week is a decision. Every match has stakes.

4204840.title: 你们都知道的！手臂坦克排球
4204840.short_description: “You All Know! Arm Tank Volley” 回来了！只要把球砸进对方场地… 但却意外地深奥又上头。揍一拳球网→rocket jump，站上球网，笑看物理奇迹。看着沙雕，玩起来 god-tier。

4770110.title: Skills & Raids Demo
4770110.short_description: 组队式撤离RPG，实时技能驱动战斗。管理冷却时间，应对敌人机制。收集资源完成任务，打造强力装备。组合技能，创造独特流派。世界已落入一种抹除一切的存在之手，甚至连思想也无法幸免。

4754350.title: Rush Hour Relay Demo
4754350.short_description: Run a high-stakes neighborhood delivery network. Dispatch drivers, beat the clock, outmaneuver your rival, and never let the milk expire. Manage routes, fuel your vehicles, and build the ultimate delivery empire.

1115990.title: Echo Generation 2
1115990.short_description: 在這款牌組構築角色扮演遊戲，你將踏上驚心動魄的科幻旅程。召集隊友，駕馭強力牌組，應對逐漸升溫的宇宙危機，發掘背後真相。準備踏上熱血冒險，憑一手好牌對抗星際威脅！

4738250.title: 地府牛马：阎王叫我三更死，我把阎王打半死 Demo
4738250.short_description: 阎王叫我三更死，我把阎王打半死！这是一款【职场模拟+剧情卡牌】的猎奇游戏。 你将以第一人称视角化身地府判官，审判鬼魂上天堂或下地狱，并运用手中的卡牌，暴揍恶心的牛头！ 本作采用粗糙复古的定格黏土动画风格与夸张的FMV演出。来吧！打工人，是时候在地狱整顿职场了！

4698010.title: Soul Clicker
4698010.short_description: If you like to torture yourself by clicking a button for small rewards and have hours to sink from not touching grass then this game is perfect for you.

4760520.title: MetaHustle One Demo
4760520.short_description: MetaHustle One 是一款节奏极快、带有恐怖元素的动作射击游戏。你必须击败大群邪恶的长角狐狸和“伟大的元德鲁伊”麾下的那些被扭曲的使魔，在故障的虚拟模拟世界彻底崩溃为超现实噩梦之前，从中逃离。

4324630.title: 100 Nature Cats
4324630.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4556620.title: Somnara
4556620.short_description: Somnara is a psychological dream experience focused on atmosphere and exploration. No monsters, no jumpscares, just strange environments that shift, distort, and feel increasingly wrong.

4767200.title: KaijuStory Demo
4767200.short_description: In a game of great minds and Hide-and-seek, save the city or destroy it! Play as an agent of the Earth Defense Force or a Kaiju and try to defeat your opponent before they defeat you!

4746500.title: Craving Wisps Demo
4746500.short_description: Slide in the walls, possess your enemies, and discover a mysterious world threatened by wicked spirits! This short adventure, full of action and humour, will please platformer fans and players looking for an original experience!

4445200.title: Nitro City Racing
4445200.short_description: 闪避车流并保持最高速度，你的任务就是成为终极街头赛车手！

4703130.title: 巴比伦:人与人之战
4703130.short_description: 一款赛博朋克题材的剧情向视觉小说。扮演新人警察雷恩·辛克莱，与AI辅佐官克里斯汀一同调查异常案件，在人类与AI的冲突中见证生命、自由、秩序与牺牲的抉择。

4669410.title: DIEATHLON Demo
4669410.short_description: 款快节奏的动作竞速游戏，玩家必须躲避致命的陷阱和怪物，才能抵达终点。探索不同的路线，解锁全新且未被探索的关卡每个关卡都带来独特的挑战。

4636900.title: Turbo Hatchback Time Attack Demo
4636900.short_description: A turbo-powered hatchback? In this economy? You bet! It does everything you'd expect a car to do like drift, jump and... flip. You know, usual car stuff. Keep the turbo charged and boost your way to the top of the leaderboards!

4771000.title: LavaLoop Demo
4771000.short_description: An explosive musical show set in a hand-drawn retro-futuristic universe. From shoot’em up to rhythm game, take on the role of three punk musicians, confronting a mad queen and her planet-killing machine. Discover a surprising gameplay blending arcade, music and comics!

4663130.title: Normal Golf Game Demo
4663130.short_description: A very normal golf physics simulation game. You wake up trapped, disoriented, and bankrupt. Can you golf your way out of this? Maybe this time, it is just the demo after all.

4766900.title: Frog Climb Demo
4766900.short_description: 🐸Free-To-Play🐸 Stop following someone else's route. Create your own way to the top by building your own path 🐸 Frog Climb is a stylized co-op climbing adventure where you must escape from terrariums 🐸 Level up, gain powerful upgrades, and prove that no wall is too high for a frog with a plan 🐸

3165680.title: Avakin Life
3165680.short_description: Avakin Life 是一个无尽的社交世界，等待着你的到来。过上你梦想的生活，从独特可定制的头像到时尚的服装和个性化的梦想家园。在这个你可以掌控一切的世界里，和朋友一起闲逛，参加派对，展开冒险。

4508620.title: Revenger3
4508620.short_description: The third installment in the Revenger series, a retro RPG from the Japanese feature phone era!

2866270.title: Sail the Seas
2866270.short_description: Sail the Seas is a sailing, trading simulator set in 18th century, spanning whole world

4694150.title: Wonderfall Demo
4694150.short_description: 巴黎，1920年。整座城市正化为流沙。 扮演能够操纵沙粒的孤儿少年莱昂，探索被“熵”吞噬的重塑巴黎。 这是一场叙事丰富的冒险之旅，在探索中揭示城市的命运，以及废墟之下仍然隐藏的真相。

4621670.title: Incrementoad Demo
4621670.short_description: Eat bugs, gain power, and restore the frogs to their former glory! In Incrementoad, a cozy incremental clicker, you collect t̶o̶a̶d̶s frogs, unlock godlike powers, attract crazier bugs to your pond, master deep upgrade trees, and uncover ancient secrets. Can you master this short, addictive journey?

2558730.title: Enigmatic Worlds
2558730.short_description: Explore strange and abstract worlds filled with equally unusual but deadly beings of many types. Enigmatic Worlds is an FPS inspired by obscure retro-styled FPS games and Amiga games.

4360930.title: Dark Room
4360930.short_description: This is Dark Room, an indie game made by an 11-year-old in which a ball traverses a procedurally generated maze with a flashlight in hand and attempts to escape. This game is great for people who like surprises around every corner.

4415750.title: LookFoorMe
4415750.short_description: 在一个再普通不过的夜晚，我遇见了“她”……《LookFoorMe》是一款以现代为舞台的恐怖游戏。

3389460.title: Red Tears: Angola
3389460.short_description: Red Tears is a dynamic Stealth-Action FPS set within a non-linear Open-World featuring brutal bush warfare. Employ guerrilla tactics, strike from the shadows, and endure violent gunfights to survive. Gather intel, loot resources, and fight boots on the ground in this Cold War-Era conflict.

4683280.title: Sneaky Secret Mission!
4683280.short_description: Let's stir up some undercover chaos! Slip past teachers, bosses, and parents, and play to your heart's content!

4696060.title: The Machine Stops Demo
4696060.short_description: Make everyone obsolete with AI by managing resources on a Matrix-style interface. You have one year to strategize resource allocation, unlock new layers of growth, and keep an accelerating company from collapsing under its own scale.

3115530.title: Gaelic Football Laochra
3115530.short_description: Feel the intensity of Gaelic Football Laochra! From heated county showdowns to the pinnacle of the Irish Championship, every game delivers authentic gameplay, strategic depth, and electrifying action. Every clash is a test of skill, and every triumph brings you closer to glory!

4732400.title: A Game About Flipping Cards Demo
4732400.short_description: 正如标题所言。《翻牌游戏》（A Game About Flipping Cards）是一款渐进式增量游戏：你通过翻牌来赚钱，用钱购买更多卡牌和升级，从而赚到更多的钱，再去购买更多的升级，以此循环，赚取无穷无尽的财富。

4338480.title: The Angel's Mandate
4338480.short_description: Your mother is dying, piece by piece. As Jesse, you must journey through corrupted realms ruled by fiends, evade deadly threats, recover shattered monuments, and face deadly challenges beyond mortal limits, using the monuments' power to rewrite fate and save her.

3695440.title: Coreward
3695440.short_description: Coreward is an incremental game where you use shields to protect yourself from incoming enemies and use their remains to become more powerful.

4038160.title: FPV Labs - Drone Simulator
4038160.short_description: Fly with true-to-life physics, next-gen visuals, and the most detailed drone configurator in any FPV sim. Build your setup, share community presets, and fly handcrafted real-world locations. Made by real FPV pilots.

4665070.title: FACTOVIVAL
4665070.short_description: Build your factory before the government and gangsters raid you. Earn money to buy machines, gear, and guns. Manage resources to keep the operation running. How long can you survive before your factory is taken down?

4693340.title: Basement Server Simulator Demo
4693340.short_description: Build a basement hosting empire solo or in co-op. Buy and place servers, install server apps, set your prices, accept time-limited customer contracts, and balance power, internet, heat, and hardware failures as you expand your operation.

4709430.title: Dark Web
4709430.short_description: 在这款暗网增量模拟游戏中，从地下室开始建立你的犯罪帝国！种植大麻、贩卖珍稀老虎、雇佣杀手，并榨干那些无辜的老奶奶。交易迷因币、在二十一点中豪赌加密货币、智斗联邦探员、兜售窃取的数据，甚至勒索老奶奶为你的帝国烘焙大麻布朗尼！

4675530.title: The Little Land Demo
4675530.short_description: 《The Little Land》是一款策略类神明模拟游戏，你将扮演一位被微小的村民所崇拜的神明。掌控自然之力，保护他们免受危险，并守护他们，看着他们收集资源、发展并扩建自己的村庄。

3898090.title: Super Firefighter
3898090.short_description: 冲入地狱，在这款本地合作双摇杆射击游戏中将其喷散。与1到3个朋友组队，从火焰和点燃它们者手中拯救受害者、房屋与树木。通过特别升级提升你的水力，以征服你将遇见的独特火灾带来的热浪。

4737590.title: HEXSTORM: Tears of Arcadia Demo
4737590.short_description: 《HEXSTORM: Tears of Arcadia》试玩版包含序章前 6 个关卡。围绕飞行要塞建立防线，管理能源网络，并抵御来自不同方向的攻击。

3922870.title: Tale of Chak Chak
3922870.short_description: Help Chak Chak on a heartwarming journey of friendship, self-discovery, and finding true happiness. Play mindfulness-inspired mini-games, grow her aura, and explore a charming cozy world filled with warmth, joy, and meaningful moments.

4368110.title: Orcavan: Idle RPG
4368110.short_description: Enter a medieval orc-themed idle RPG where every choice matters. Pick 1 of 3 character types, build your team, place your items wisely, and overcome increasingly difficult battles in a satisfying climb toward greater power.

4437600.title: Loopbound
4437600.short_description: A narrative incremental game where you're trapped in a time loop: survive, level up skills, and automate tasks across multiple worlds.

4740730.title: Brain Hack Squad Demo
4740730.short_description: 灵感来自《Syndicate》和《Door Kickers》，在实时战斗中暂停战术，指挥强化特工进行射击、黑客入侵和绑架行动。升级你的团队，洗脑敌方特工，部署线人，与竞争对手争夺城市的控制权。

4502580.title: StalSide Demo
4502580.short_description: Trapped inside a broken computer simulation of a post‑nuclear world, you must survive, explore, and uncover the secrets of the zone. Play solo or with up to 8 friends in this chilling mix of survival and digital mystery.

4443720.title: Focus With Luna: Cozy Magic Studies
4443720.short_description: 走进你的3D奇幻宿舍。Focus With Luna 是一款游戏化专注工具，让你随心控制动态天气，并在电影感十足的音乐中放松身心。探索这个精致、无干扰的避风港，专为深度专注、学习和创意灵感而设计

4761100.title: Corner Market Demo
4761100.short_description: 一款轻松的idle市场模拟器，在您做其他事情时静静地待在屏幕角落。

4683530.title: BRAVO
4683530.short_description: A 20‑minute playable thriller that will blow your mind.

4616520.title: Warlane Demo
4616520.short_description: Warlane is a real-time 1v1 strategy game where players draft random units, deploy them to the battlefield, and merge them into powerful fighters to take down the enemy King. Choose Instincts to shape your army's traits, and invest your gold to outplay your opponent.

4285180.title: DREADMARCH
4285180.short_description: 类似黑暗奇幻的幸存者，天国堡垒的冠军们探索世界地图，与地狱部落作战，收复失落的王国，并通过不同的战役变得更加强大。

4621190.title: Disease Demo
4621190.short_description: Demo version of the visual novel "Disease". The yellow nightmare comes to life.

4057290.title: Fix and Clerk
4057290.short_description: You work for a device company and your job is to verify paperwork of customers before handing their repaired device to them. Check, interrogate and confirm their identity. Beware of scammers in disguise coming to claim devices that are not theirs.

4457260.title: Lesson In Progress
4457260.short_description: This psychological puzzle based mascot horror is designed to tell a story. Manage your stress as reality begins to distort. When you panic, doors stop responding and hallucinations creep in. Uncover the secrets of this school.

4728450.title: Last Floor Demo
4728450.short_description: 每一层看起来都很正常……直到不再正常。 一切正常就上楼，出现异常就下楼。 一次失误就会让你回到起点。 你能到达最终楼层吗？

4484420.title: FLESHCANCER
4484420.short_description: FLESHCANCER is a Fast-paced Boomer Shooter with surreal environments and old-school violence. Fight cannibal cultists, terrorists, grotesque aberrations and more. MAKE IT RAIN FLESH, ORGANS, AND BLOOD LIKE NEVER BEFORE.

3384670.title: Calame Demo
3384670.short_description: 在这款回合制战术 RPG 中，声望可以改变战争的走向。带领肯梅尔与黑豹对抗光之王，通过你的选择塑造编年史，并运用传说之力扭转战局。

3803820.title: Demon Bluff Demo
3803820.short_description: 卡牌会说谎！在这款单人社交推理游戏中，恶魔早已混入村庄，正伪装成你的同伴。每一次翻牌都是一场赌局——是朋友，还是敌人？你能拆穿他们的谎言吗？

4617530.title: Hastilude Clash Demo
4617530.short_description: Master the art of the duel in Hastilude Clash, a high-speed, 4-player party fighter. This demo includes 2-4 player local multiplayer battles and single player against bots.

4535050.title: Rescue the Hostages: Words of Fear
4535050.short_description: Rescue the Hostages: Words of Fear is an FMV horror word puzzle game that tests your observation and focus. Search the grid of letters for hidden words in a gripping experience where every discovery moves you closer to completing the puzzle and saving the hostages.

4674190.title: Feed the Giants Demo
4674190.short_description: You are a giant guiding a group of lost children through a hostile world. Help them… or sacrifice them to entertain your kind, who watch the spectacle from above. Some want to see them thrive, others crave their suffering. Every choice has its price.

4683750.title: Eggs Must Flow
4683750.short_description: 《Eggs Must Flow》是一款可爱的“小鸡点击”游戏，你将通过点击、孵化和自动化一步步迈向鸡蛋霸权！解锁拥有独特被动能力的小鸡，提升你的产量，并保持鸡舍干净整洁……否则事情可能会变得一团糟。

4706510.title: The Pharhad Road
4706510.short_description: A Persian-inspired tactical RPG where enemies wake when they see you. Lead four pahlavans across one connected road, manage scarce recovery, and try Command Divs, Call Pharhad, Send Dastur Z, or Pahlavan Chess for alternate tactical chaos.

1116050.title: Starminer
1116050.short_description: 在《星际矿业》中，你将在太空中打造一支舰队，通过开采和售卖珍贵矿藏来谋取丰厚利润。但要小心，你的贪婪会吸引来外星人。使用战舰和防御平台，不惜一切代价在真实空间中实时保护你的舰队。

4729450.title: Furyball: Rogue Revenge Demo
4729450.short_description: 在这款极具爆炸性的动作轻肉鸽游戏中，尽情探索新阿卡迪亚的第一个地区，你手中只有一样武器：一枚具有致命威力的弹球。 掌握弹球的艺术，击败疯牛战士，并解锁新的升级和装备。

4678410.title: Factomancer Demo
4678410.short_description: “秩序”授予你使命。使用魔法科技、建立生产链、规划你的基地，并随时准备应对各种突发状况。在这款自动化肉鸽工厂游戏中，”秩序之眼“时刻监视着你的一举一动——在这里，失败仅仅是通往完美的阶梯。

3941030.title: SOLARFLARE
3941030.short_description: SOLARFLARE is a byte-sized roguelike auto-battler in a sci-fi dystopia. Fight (and die) to unlock Upgrades, experiment to find broken builds, and obliterate the megacorp's bots.

4559260.title: G-MODEアーカイブス+ ナムコクロニクル
4559260.short_description: Track down the evil force that stole the legendary treasure, Wonder Eggs! Team up with namco characters and restore peace to the game world!

4515430.title: Chasing Whiskers
4515430.short_description: Catch cats in this cozy adventure game! After falling into Catworld through an interdimensional portal, you must find your missing cat by completing errands for Ponpon, the local Cat Café owner. Chase, catch and collect until you can find your way home!

2090390.title: Schrödinger’s Call 薛定谔的电话
2090390.short_description: 世界末日之时，你最后想和谁说话呢？《薛定谔的电话》是一款能体验人与人之间的伤痛与救赎，宛如翻阅绘本般的文字冒险游戏。通过电话去倾听并理解那些徘徊在生死狭缝间的灵魂的遗憾。是的，这是一个通过某人的遗憾映照出你自身的故事。

3524780.title: Sydless
3524780.short_description: Sydless is an ultra-fast movement shooter where your weapon is a chaotic ball that grows deadlier the more you move.

4264260.title: 传颂之物 循白之证
4264260.short_description: 经典IP《传颂之物》系列最新作以RPG形式登场，走向新境界！不祥的阴影再度悄然逼近，开始笼罩大国「大和」。交织的命运，宣告奥修特尔一行人全新旅程的开始。

4751880.title: The Birth Cry Demo
4751880.short_description: "Mikhail Markov lives in the city of Nesgrad, Virelia, during the 1990s. The city's old birthplace, 'Riverside Maternity Hospital,' has been shut down, and numerous urban legends and paranormal claims about its location circulate among the public."

4659480.title: Cosmo Cargo Demo
4659480.short_description: 《Cosmo Cargo》是一款结合背包管理、自走棋玩法的肉鸽单人PvE游戏，你将在其中为维持银河的混乱而战斗。在飞船内收集并组合各类物品，解锁强大的效果，并击败企图恢复秩序的管理者。

4683440.title: 余烬军团 Demo
4683440.short_description: 《余烬军团》是一款超轻量化的即时战略游戏。 异界裂隙撕裂大地，故土沦陷，希望仅存于零星余烬。 选择一位英雄，点燃篝火，招募士兵，组建你的军团——白昼突袭敌营，黑夜死守阵地，抵御潮水般涌来的异界生物。 善用昼夜攻防节奏，搭配多样兵种与强化装备，重燃散落大陆的希望之火，夺回失落的家园。

4727650.title: ClumpHunter Demo
4727650.short_description: ClumpHunter 是一款快节奏的 2D Roguelite (肉鸽) 平台动作游戏。在充满动感的关卡中，你将迎战一波又一波的敌人。收集受运气加成的战利品，提升各项属性，并通过组合升级来打造强力流派。

4751970.title: Heart of Vinterium Demo
4751970.short_description: 存在着一件能够实现任何愿望的圣物，但只有最强大的人才能找到它。在《Heart of Vinterium》中，你将探索阴森而不断变化的世界，每一步都可能是你的终结。战斗、收集魔法卡片并解决谜题。

4228900.title: BreakLoop
4228900.short_description: The ultimate brickbreaker deckbuilder! Start off with just a puny ball and build yourself an arsenal of weapons to mow down the endless waves of bricks barreling towards you. Discover powerful items and synergies as you evolve into the ultimate brick-killing machine.

4754520.title: サーキットの鷹 体験版
4754520.short_description: 一款多语言新街机赛车游戏，无需复杂设置即可轻松畅玩。

4757160.title: The Lightning Girl Demo
4757160.short_description: 在一道闪电的冲击中惊醒，你逐渐适应了陌生男人家中地下室的黑暗。寻找物品，解开谜题，躲避追捕你的人，并在这款生存恐怖RPG中揭开这栋房子的真相。

4624840.title: 迷宫球 Demo
4624840.short_description: 一款基于物理模拟的滚球休闲解谜游戏。通过自由旋转整个三维立体迷宫，巧妙运用重力与惯性，引导小球穿越复杂结构，最终抵达终点，感受物理规律带来的独特操控乐趣。

4209240.title: 欧皇VS非酋
4209240.short_description: 《欧皇VS非酋》是一款“全凭运气”的Roguelike抽卡对战游戏。我们不论财力，不拼工时，只比一样东西——运气。你的每一步成长，都由“抽奖”决定，全看天命。当你用一套神抽的卡牌碾压BOSS，赶紧问问你的朋友： “你怎么还没有通关啊？”

4111390.title: Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next!
4111390.short_description: 化身Nickelodeon明星角色，在网球场上体验快节奏的街机对决！自定义海绵宝宝、安昂、加菲猫等经典角色，在轻松上手的本地分屏对决中，畅享老少皆宜的欢乐竞技时光！

3974490.title: Bamorota Defense
3974490.short_description: 保卫奇幻世界中的封印石！ 在这款轻松的塔防游戏中，建造防御塔并施放法术，阻挡无尽的怪物浪潮。

3743540.title: Neon Moon Demo
3743540.short_description: Embark on a gripping journey through Neon Moon, a dynamic Metroidvania where you confront ancient adversaries, unleash extraordinary abilities, and unearth potent relics, driven by the sole desire to conquer the enigmatic Dark Night haunting Nightlight.

4005450.title: KOROMEKE Demo
4005450.short_description: Roll the dice, grow the loops, beat the clock! KOROMEKE is a GΛM̷͉̔ƁΞIßL̴͕͝Ξ̷̸ of simple rules and rich tactics which forces you to think on your feet.

4518440.title: 超凡功夫之王传奇
4518440.short_description: 三职业高爆传奇—专为兄弟们打造的热血国战版本！在这里，你将一步步练成真正的功夫之王。极品装备、绝世武学全都靠打，BOSS随便虐，爆率高到你想笑。战鼓已擂响，拳头已握紧，拿起你的屠龙宝刀，用一身真功夫和兄弟们一起攻沙、称王。

3345810.title: E9uations
3345810.short_description: 您就是等号（=）！ 重新排列数字和运算符来组成方程式，解开谜题。

4663500.title: PLACE TO FIT Demo
4663500.short_description: 欢迎来到 PLACE TO FIT 的世界。 这是一款整理模拟游戏，你需要把散落的物品放进有限空间。 如何摆放、朝向哪里、按什么顺序，都由你决定。发挥巧思，让一切都恰到好处地放进去吧。

4769740.title: 兔兔夹夹乐 Demo
4769740.short_description: 兔兔夹夹乐 Demo 是一款夹娃娃机得分闯关试玩版。观察不同兔兔的行动特点，抓准时机下爪，挑战试玩关卡；完成任务收集贴纸，装饰照片墙，还可本地双人合作或竞技！

4284560.title: 实况足球在线
4284560.short_description: 快来体验这款下载量超10亿次的超好玩的足球游戏吧！ 与世界各地的玩家一起玩《实况足球Online》！

4380400.title: Imaginary Kingdom
4380400.short_description: 款3D隐藏物品游戏，你将通过孩子的想象力探索 个小型中世纪王国，寻找母亲让你找的物品，无压力且没有时间限制。

4403340.title: んなたんのピクセルプリンセス
4403340.short_description: A pixel puzzle game featuring Hololive 4th generation member, Himemori Luna, is here! The Princess has discovered the joy of “drawing” and takes on pixel puzzles! Will she be able to feel satisfied in the end!?

4744540.title: 铁鸟 试玩版
4744540.short_description: 正统纵向卷轴弹幕射击×肉鸽。 10架各具特色的战机、10种子机、数十种宇宙之力。 在弹幕的缝隙中穿行，打造你的神级构建。

4554410.title: VOID WARD
4554410.short_description: A minimalist roguelite tower defense with neon aesthetics. Defend your planet against infinite waves of geometric enemies. Buy 70 upgrades, activate abilities, chain combos and grow stronger between runs with permanent upgrades. Every attempt makes you stronger.

4767020.title: Tyrania Enforcers - Visual Novel Demo
4767020.short_description: Faced with evil... would you pull the trigger? Tyrania Enforcers is a story-driven visual novel exploring morality, duty, and the cost of enforcing order in a world on the brink of conflict.

4612680.title: 盲盒模拟器 Demo
4612680.short_description: 《盲盒模拟器》是一款轻松休闲的桌面挂机游戏。每一次键盘输入和鼠标点击都在积累能量，让你在日常工作和学习的间隙尽情体验拆盒的快乐！收集心爱的潮玩玩偶、打造专属收藏展柜，搭配玩偶技能挑战强敌，享受盲盒收集与三消战斗的双重乐趣！

4659600.title: MQ: Rise Above
4659600.short_description: 问鼎苍穹，否则就在深渊中化为灰烬！在崩溃的世界中建造逃生之路。躲避雷暴与飓风，挑战史诗级Boss并不断升级。拥有翅膀、宠物和多人模式，打造你的专属传奇。在这里，你可以体验极致的自定义搭配与角色成长。你是选择坠落，还是振翅高飞？

4517090.title: Meteor Swarm Old School
4517090.short_description: Shoot meteors with a variable fire main, and various different power-ups. Survive and set a new hi-score today!

4747500.title: Ghost Control Demo
4747500.short_description: Working for the Pest Control company, you have been tasked with exterminating the 'pests' out of the haunted mansion. What they didn't tell you is that the pests are spooky ghosts!

4459820.title: 东方油库里山
4459820.short_description: 在3D益智合成游戏中悠闲放松一下吧！！ 《东方Project》的角色们化身“油库里”登场！？ 把“油库里”们堆起来，打造属于自己的“油库里山”吧！

4663200.title: 自拍虫虫 试玩版
4663200.short_description: 《自拍虫虫》是一款结合软 Q 物理与摄影的治愈之作。玩家将操作充满弹性的虫虫，通过自拍找回世界的色彩。内置“防老板功能”与专注计时器，让每一次高压工作后的短暂休息，都成为治愈与惊喜的冒险，是打工人完美的桌面伴侣。

4644010.title: 沙威猫传奇：黑帮预制菜 Demo
4644010.short_description: 这是一款割草射击，经营管理游戏。你作为黑帮，被师傅抛弃，变成了乞丐，你需要靠卖沙威玛重新发展起来。

4736460.title: Neon Planet Demo
4736460.short_description: 在霓虹外星行星上建立生活。耕作、钓鱼、烹饪、制作、装饰你的家。深入100层矿井，攀登战斗尖塔，在赌场获胜。单人游玩或与 最多24名朋友一起，体验玩家驱动的经济。

4710260.title: 碎星空间 Demo
4710260.short_description: 《Shard Space》是一款极简操作的策略游戏。在遥远的未来，你从漫长的沉睡中醒来。在忠诚的副官指引下，你必须重建无人机舰队，并踏上揭开宇宙终极真相的旅程。

4728520.title: Pogona Demo
4728520.short_description: 吐出鳞片，开辟道路，征服一切挑战。《Pogona》是一款手绘风格的硬核2D银河恶魔城游戏。扮演一只小小蜥蜴，将自己的鳞片化作平台与武器，解锁远古之力，探索充满秘密的广阔世界。

4764590.title: IDLE_DIRECTIVE Demo
4764590.short_description: Idly gather and manage resources to repair what's left of a decaying world. Scavenge forgotten ruins, meet scattered survivors, and push back against the inevitable collapse. IDLE_DIRECTIVE is a grid-based inventory and resource management idle game.

4016760.title: Balkan Shop Simulator
4016760.short_description: “Balkan Shop Simulator” lets you manage your own store in the Balkans – stock shelves, serve customers, and grow your businesses. From a small local shop to a thriving retail chain, success depends on your skills!

4231740.title: Office Inspector
4231740.short_description: 识别神秘办公大楼中的异常与危险，并通过电梯做出正确的决策以成功逃脱。

4780850.title: Magic Cauldron - Forgotten Island Demo
4780850.short_description: This game combines a deck-builder with turn-based combat and elements of a classic point-and-click adventure ... all infused with plenty of Magic Cauldron humor.

4180640.title: Pop Balloons and Drop People
4180640.short_description: 戳破气球和让小人掉下去的放置类游戏

4604320.title: 失焦 Out of Focus
4604320.short_description: 一桩旧案，一段无法对焦的真相。你是一名警察，你要与同事们一起解开这起看似寻常的谋杀案背后的故事。 本格推理设定。一切基于现实逻辑。 你要解开的，可不仅仅是这个案子那么简单。

1875580.title: 挖掘者米娜
1875580.short_description: 扮演米娜，一位声名显赫的挖掘者，踏上拯救被诅咒岛屿的绝望之旅。在《挖掘者米娜》这款由《铲子骑士》开发者带来的全新游戏中，挥鞭痛击敌人，钻入地下，探索完美的像素世界！

4759840.title: Abyss Ring Demo
4759840.short_description: 生存、烹饪、征服！ 在Roguelike中通过烹饪怪物挑战最深层。200+装备与随机地图，为你带来无限可能的全新体验。

3483660.title: Trace of the Villa
3483660.short_description: Jin has spent years searching for his missing sister, pursuing leads that took him to a remote, decaying mansion where he recovered manifests and hints that indicate his sister may still be alive, somewhere at the end of the trail he is about to follow.

4671590.title: Call of Elmore
4671590.short_description: Call of Elmore is an experimental arcade-styled action-adventure game with a unique blend of top-down and sidescrolling gameplay. Acquire a larger arsenal, explore the region, and survive while figuring out how a simple Lighthouse flame has laid waste to the colony.

2776240.title: さーきゅらーディフェンス!!～とある辺境惑星開拓事務所、３０日の記録～
2776240.short_description: ”Sacular Defense" is a real-time tower defense game in which you intercept enemies by placing circles around them to prevent them from hitting the planet in the center of the screen. Strengthen your turrets and defend your planet from the endless enemies!

4304220.title: 胡闹赶鸭 试玩版
4304220.short_description: 这是一款能让你和朋友喊到缺氧的声控派对游戏。放下键盘鼠标，用你们的尖叫声把鸭群赶向终点——或者因为某人的一嗓子，把这群倒霉鸭子全吼下悬崖！

4687470.title: 1.76复古沉默
4687470.short_description: 全新传奇《1.76复古沉默》，耗时两年精心雕琢，倾尽心血打造诚意巨献！以原创剧情为灵魂的基础上，它保留了传奇的核心玩法（打怪、升级、爆装备、攻沙巴克）超级大陆为舞台🌏，秉持“不肝不氪”的友好理念🥰、不同职业的多种流派等独具特色的新内容，让游戏体验既怀旧又新奇

4773570.title: 時折記 -Tokioriki- Demo
4773570.short_description: After a strange dream, high school student Kanata Tanaka notices small cracks in his ordinary life. This demo covers the prologue to the first half of Chapter 1, introducing limited after-school time, map exploration, diary choices, and the first shadow of a story where you cannot choose everything.

4527540.title: Fearsome Night
4527540.short_description: An anonymous email leads you to your recently deceased grandmother's house, asking you to find something hidden inside. Someone wanted you there. Something else was already waiting. Investigate, solve disturbing puzzles and survive the horrors lurking in the shadows.

4566450.title: Kim's Farm
4566450.short_description: Kim’s Farm is a story-driven survival experience inspired by real accounts from North Korean defectors who were once imprisoned. Torture and violence can take your life. Breaking the rules can lead to immediate execution. You play as a young girl struggling to survive with her mother and sister.

4112650.title: Lutarus Demo
4112650.short_description: An epic RPG adventure. Follow Luxtar and his loyal lutaru on a quest to save their community. Navigate dangers, safeguard his mental well-being, and uncover ancient secrets to shape the fate of humanity.

4775600.title: Reclaim: Earth Protocol Demo
4775600.short_description: 一款小队战术自走战斗游戏。构建强大的单位协同，升级你的战斗阵容，部署无人机支援，在激烈战斗中夺回地球。

4524310.title: 王者争雄
4524310.short_description: 耗时两年!呕心沥血!诚意之作! 原创剧情+超级大陆+不肝不氪 上线即送:专属自动回收 自动拾取 自动经验 专属法师单职业+特色剧情自由探索，专属BUFF任意搭配，百玩不腻

4618910.title: 101 Cats in Hanoi
4618910.short_description: 加入这场冒险，在精心打造的河内景观中，寻找101只小猫咪🐾的藏身之处。🏆赢取众多成就。你能找到多少只呢？😺快来抓紧时间！⏱️

3561030.title: 巨石岛
3561030.short_description: 带领巨石小人们围绕神秘方块建立不断繁荣的部落。收集资源、构筑技能、维持增长循环，在越来越夸张的特效与数值洪流中，把整个系统推向失控。

3550880.title: 武道残编
3550880.short_description: 《武道残编》是一款以武侠江湖为背景的放置类 RPG 游戏，融合了修炼成长、武学传承、宠物养成与江湖奇遇等核心玩法。玩家将扮演一名初入江湖的武者，从侠隐村出发，一路游历洛阳、襄阳、华山、少林、武当、峨眉、昆仑、大理、桃花岛、光明顶，最终登临缥缈峰，成就一代武林宗师。

3262100.title: Mighty Meow
3262100.short_description: 勇敢小喵喵 是一款拥有基地建设要素的可爱动作 RPG 游戏。你将在充满机器人的实验室中冲刺战斗去解救可爱的动物们。挑战弹幕汹涌的强大首领并建造热闹的动物据点。让毛茸茸的伙伴为你打造强力装备同时探索全新的地下城。

4740450.title: 60病 The 60-Second Syndrome Demo
4740450.short_description: 你将在60秒后死去。 本作是一款单人恐怖逃脱游戏。被困在仅有60秒时间循环中的男人，必须从密室中逃脱。 在封闭的房间中，每当你死亡，时间都会重置。观察不断重复的现象，记住其中的变化，并从循环中逃脱。

4669340.title: 闲鱼修仙录 Demo
4669340.short_description: 一款修仙题材的Roguelike卡牌策略游戏。选择李闲鱼、小雪或陆寒渊三位修士之一，在 随机生成的三幕冒险中构建卡组、收集法宝、布置阵法。214张法术卡牌涵盖摸鱼、暴力 、灼烧、反伤等多种流派，金木水火土五行相克影响每一次出牌决策。98个随机奇遇、42 件法宝、12种阵法、9种结局、21级天道试炼难度。每一局都是独一无二的修仙之旅。

4777980.title: Unholy Employer Simulator (Demo)
4777980.short_description: A roguelike, incremental business-sim where you cultivate a family environment, make BIG profit and sacrifice the lives of your employees to the devil. Welcome to the world of business.

3263400.title: 爱里斯 奥德赛
3263400.short_description: 《爱里斯 奥德赛》是一款文字冒险游戏。在涩谷的中心，一名寻找家人的孤儿女孩与一位拥有魔法的犯罪调查官因命运相遇。他们的旅程将挑战自我，并引发与不可想象的力量的战斗。一场现代幻想冒险即将展开。

4760820.title: 漂流彼岸 Demo
4760820.short_description: 无名少年为了获得美好的来生，决定漂流至世界尽头。 他将驾驶船只，深入一个黑暗危险却纷繁有趣的世界，并使用他的鱼叉对付路上的麻烦。

4412360.title: D-BEAT HEROES Demo
4412360.short_description: D-BEAT HEROES is a grid-based tag-team action RPG! Choose powerful abilities to take with you into combat and fight against your enemies on the grid! Protect Daylight City from the forces of evil and maintain order. Do it before it's too late!

3936730.title: 星尘轨迹：魔女之愿
3936730.short_description: 时机已到——是时候踏上冒险之旅了！跟随少女战士「星」和少年法师「悠」，一起寻找愿望之星的秘密！体验精美的像素动画演出，感受经典SRPG战斗的策略魅力……命运的终点，正等待着你们共同揭晓。

4681030.title: Hypnos Demo
4681030.short_description: 玩家被困在箱中，结识了钥匙。为寻出路，他沉浸入丘姆之中，在那里他的抉择改变着发生的一切，推近或拉远他对那神秘源头的追寻。

4765660.title: Deathward Demo
4765660.short_description: Seek Death as you face dangerous foes, solve puzzles, and explore forgotten dungeons to become the ultimate necromancer.

4373690.title: Hearth & Shadow
4373690.short_description: Hearth & Shadow - is a card-based strategy game where you develop your settlement and defend it from monster invasions. Try different combinations, unlock new buildings and outposts, or upgrade them, and monitor your settlement's and defenses to defeat the monsters and save your human settlement!

4600370.title: Pudding the Jug
4600370.short_description: Play as pudding the adorable Jug, a rather affectionate term for a pug and a jackrussel cross breed. She means well but has unpredictable bowels. Explore the hand drawn village. Leave a trail of catastrophe.

4775290.title: Black Plague Demo
4775290.short_description: 一款快节奏的肉鸽生存混乱游戏，击败无尽的瘟疫怪潮，叠加疯狂强化，并打破力量规则。

4748020.title: Catastrophic Demo
4748020.short_description: Unleash feline mayhem in this 3D bullet heaven! Control adorable chibi kittens with unique ultimate abilities and survive waves of enemies. With a limited inventory of only 3 weapons and 3 passive items, your strategy is everything. Try the demo and start purring!

4771690.title: No One Returns Demo
4771690.short_description: 你是否想过，如果某天醒来，发现身边的所有人全都不见了，会发生什么？ 《No One Returns》是一款第三人称生存恐怖游戏。玩家将扮演丹尼斯（Denis），在一座死寂得令人毛骨悚然的城市中搜寻关于失踪家人的线索，同时还要与在街头肆虐横行的恐怖丧尸展开殊死搏斗。

4141860.title: 大尾松鼠
4141860.short_description: 经典点击式解谜＋角色扮演冒险！一位高超的盗贼为了完成公会任务，却意外卷入一场场麻烦与阴谋。玩家将通过探索、道具组合、推理与战斗，逐步解开谜题，展开一段充满惊喜、幽默与温度的奇幻旅程。可爱手绘风格，谜题设计巧思十足却不过分刁难，特别适合喜欢解谜游戏与精致小品的玩家。

4764850.title: 静水乐园 Demo
4764850.short_description: 你迷失在了巨大的，遍布水池和谜题的诡异迷宫中。利用搜集的道具启动各种机关不断探索。躲避或智取各类未知生命体。解开迷宫和自身的谜团逃离这里。游戏由池核所启发。

4777460.title: Link Cameras Demo
4777460.short_description: You work as a moderator for a strange camera website called L!nk Cameras. Watch live feeds, approve or reject cameras, follow the admin’s instructions, and uncover what hides behind each connection.

4339340.title: The Forgotten Killer
4339340.short_description: Survivor or Killer. Team up or go solo, move carefully, and outsmart your enemies. In the dark, mysterious Forgotten Forest, every choice matters. Survive, escape, or dominate — the choice is yours.

4717740.title: PlanetMars3D: Spirit Mission Demo
4717740.short_description: 通过 NASA 的“勇气号”火星车拍摄的真实 Pancam 照片，以 3D 方式探索火星。随着你的靠近，图像细节会愈发清晰；你还可以一眼浏览数千张火星车照片——手动模式、幻灯片播放或自动飞越。

3421940.title: Baspetball
3421940.short_description: 当监护人离开时，房子变成了篮球场，终极对决开始了：猫咪 VS 狗狗。在这款回合制等距视角解谜游戏中，带领“Gray Boss”猫咪队吧！计算你的移动和传球，将毛线篮球直接投入篮筐，投出完美的空心球！

4763520.title: Cloud Country Demo
4763520.short_description: An action rogue-lite adventure where you battle through random levels, level up and upgrade your weapons while unlocking new items and characters to defeat the witch threatening Cloud Country.

4438460.title: A Life I Couldn’t Feel
4438460.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game where survival means enduring a divine trial designed for you to fail. One passage, no saves, no combat — only the darkness, the dangers, and the gods who want you dead.

3851470.title: BarrelBots
3851470.short_description: A multilayered grid-based puzzle game featuring small robots that carry and stack Barrels of nuclear waste.

3908710.title: Dramatour
3908710.short_description: 在这款本地分屏多人游戏中，2至8名玩家将使用随机获取的3D物件堆叠高塔，竞相成为最先建塔完成之人。

4666110.title: Idle Swimmers Demo
4666110.short_description: A relaxing idle swimming game where you catch fish, unlock new locations and characters, customize your swimmer, and enhance your abilities with helpful pets and power-ups.

4568350.title: Beavertale
4568350.short_description: Help Gus, a brave beaver fighting to reclaim his forest from an evil corp. Build useful constructs, chop trees, destroy machines, and execute precise movements to overcome obstacles in this puzzle-platforming adventure. And remember, managing your resources is almost as important as using them.

4751000.title: DiDiDiG Demo
4751000.short_description: 你的目标是在月球上开采矿石。 挖掘矿石并运回地球来赚钱，购买技能核心并进行升级。 你也可以借助各种设备的帮助，基地里还有一只小狗。 寻找隐藏在月球上的秘密吧！

3746080.title: KatsuobushiClicker
3746080.short_description: A clicker × memory game where you take on flag quizzes while shaving katsuobushi. Shave, answer, remember, and try again. A flag-themed clicker that puts your memory and learning skills to the test!

2820010.title: The Black Siege
2820010.short_description: The Black Siege is a roguelite bullet heaven base defense game where you command the last army on Earth. Defend your headquarters from the plague zombies, hire engineers, and repair humanity’s last rocketship before the siege breaks through.

4492650.title: Cozy Petchi Cats
4492650.short_description: Welcome to Cozy Petchi Cats, a cozy desktop idle game where adorable static cats live on your screen! Feed, clean, play, and watch your virtual cat grow through every life stage. Relax with cute interactions and cozy vibes, with your companion by your side. Enjoy it all with a beautiful soundtrack.

4083060.title: Fragmentary
4083060.short_description: 精通你的卡牌，找到解谜和击败敌人的最佳策略。你的知识和记忆将解锁新的道路。收集物品，发现线索，参与回合制战斗，解开谜题，最重要的是，从错误中学习。

4218580.title: System Overload
4218580.short_description: SYSTEM STATUS: UNSTABLE> System Overload 是一款 Win95/98 任务管理器风格的模拟游戏。接下合同,结束进程,调校硬件,躲开诈骗,让 CPU 保持在 100 °C 以下,在剧情中做出你的选择。>DO_NOT_CRASH

4258570.title: Wall Of Insanity 2
4258570.short_description: Survive a relentless descent into a bio-organic nightmare. As a member of specialized tactical unit, navigate a decaying dimension to locate a vanished squad. Engage in high-stakes combat where every shadow hides an unspeakable horror. The veil is thinning - will you make it out?

4770580.title: Cloud Runner Demo
4770580.short_description: Cloud Runner is a casual First Person 3D platformer that tests your skills with relaxing fun levels and arenas. Collect coins to boost your speed and multiply your combo.

4598410.title: Pathotaxia: PANDORA Demo
4598410.short_description: Pathotaxia: PANDORA is an RPG Maker horror puzzle game where you explore Pathotaxia's setting, interact with strange characters, and view visual novel-like cgs as you progress through the game. Help Pandora as she seals demons back into her dolls and unravels the mystery behind her mother's death.

4738320.title: A Game About Chopping Trees Demo
4738320.short_description: 带上你的斧头，坐上手摇车，让自己沉浸在森林之中。砍树、升级装备，享受这段旅程 —— 无论是独自一人还是与友同行。

3921990.title: DekaDuck Demo
3921990.short_description: DekaDuck is a 2D action platformer, featuring fully hand-drawn art and animation. Fight enemies using their own abilities and quirks to solve puzzles and defeat bosses, in a sci-fi world full of conspiracies!

4777030.title: Ninjamboree Demo
4777030.short_description: A chaotic online party‑PvP arena where four players cycle through a format of one player controlling the Ninja racing for treasure while the other three team up as monsters to stop them.

4633530.title: Packed Lair Demo
4633530.short_description: You are an evil lord with a hero problem and not nearly enough floor space. Draft buildings, pack them into your cramped lair, toil to earn money to expand, create powerful monster synergies, and send your chaotic army of minions to repel wave after wave of heroic do-gooder pests.

1965980.title: Gelli Fields
1965980.short_description: Gelli Fields is a casual farming game with adorable slimes. Save the world of Continaa while you relax in the real one!

4761720.title: Master of Chaos: Beat or Break the Game Demo
4761720.short_description: 通过反击、偏转投射物、释放令人颤栗的终极技能，以及构建疯狂的连击来提升你的力量，让你的敌人后悔低估了这个可爱的小巫师，直到没有人能讲述你吸收、锻造和争夺来的能力的故事。

4757420.title: RPS Rumble! Demo
4757420.short_description: 基于石头剪刀布的策略卡牌游戏。组建你的5张牌组， 掌握24种独特技能，在故事模式中征服4座塔楼。 谁来主宰牌桌？

4776980.title: Playful Pursuit Demo
4776980.short_description: Playful Pursuit is a colorful 3D adventure platformer where you jump, climb, solve puzzles, battle goofy enemies, collect VHS tapes, and build friendships with allies in a silly High Desert quest to rescue Eddy’s stolen teddy bear.

4738840.title: Secho Demo
4738840.short_description: Secho — мрачный экшен-рогалик. Вы слепы. Чтобы видеть, вы должны издавать звук. Плати за удары собственным здоровьем, вычисляй истинные цели по цвету сердца. Следуй указаниям Белого Котла — твоего единственного наставника в этой пустоте.

4599980.title: Unshelved Demo
4599980.short_description: Unshelved is an up to 4-player co-op Work-Life Horror Sim where you manage a cursed library. By day, handle book requests and earn an honest living. But as night falls, you must return books to their shelves and survive the horrors that haunt the halls!

4693030.title: Congratulations On Your Purchase
4693030.short_description: The most expensive game on Steam. A palace, a red carpet, paparazzi, and a wall where you leave your name — visible to every owner who comes after you. Ten minutes. The price is not a mistake. It is the point.

4466370.title: DRYER DRAMA
4466370.short_description: Throw as many balls in the dryer as possible for the highest score as it spins unpredictably but be careful to manage them because if one of those balls touches the edge of the drum, the dryer will jam and explode!

4753030.title: Tears of Sulfuria Demo
4753030.short_description: Tears of Sulfuria is an emotional visual novel about two sisters in a dark fantasy world that rejects them. Marília and Adka must survive at any cost—and their choices may scar Sulfuria itself. Sacrifice yourself, lose your sanity, and do the unforgivable to move forward.

4535600.title: NUMERICAL ALCHEMIST
4535600.short_description: 这是一款将 9x9 数独与 8 种原创制约结合的数字逻辑谜题。所有关卡都设计为无需假设法或暴力穷举，只靠纯粹逻辑即可解开。找出多重制约交汇的突破口，体验盘面如连锁反应般逐步展开的快感。除剧情模式外，还支持自制谜题的创作与分享，让熟悉数独的玩家也能感受到新的发现与扎实的解题挑战。

4752410.title: Sea You Around Demo
4752410.short_description: The sea is a gamble—how well do the gods favor you? Command a fleet of monster hunters in a Roulette-lite tactical RPG where your ships are the balls and the boss is the wheel. Manipulate the winds, manage your crew, and bet your life against the Colossi to reclaim a world drowned in Miasma.

4008350.title: Beat The Champions
4008350.short_description: Beat the Champions is a fast-paced arcade football game where legendary players clash in explosive matches powered by special abilities. No realism — just speed, skill, and pure competitive chaos.

4029840.title: Zero Warning: Burnt Out
4029840.short_description: In this anomaly horror game, a boy has been abandoned in a burning train car. Spot the difference, decide when to push forward, and survive long enough to complete the rescue.

4258770.title: 恐惧原野
4258770.short_description: 你买下了一座与世隔绝的农场，准备开启新生活。然而，前房主埋藏在地下的可怕秘密逐渐浮出水面，打破了平静的日常。一场缓慢燃烧的乡村恐怖之旅就此展开。

4752980.title: Mandela Invasion VR: Alternates
4752980.short_description: Found tapes depict events leading to mysterious disappearances and murders with no clear culprit. With no more evidence than a couple of emergency calls describing unusual behavior in certain people who appear mostly human, you will relive these VHS tapes to uncover the events.

4756360.title: Vampy's Big Day Demo
4756360.short_description: Sneak through the shadows as a clumsy vampire learning to avoid deadly sunlight with help from a sun fairy. Master stealth, manipulate shadows, and make choices that shape your fate. Will you find redemption or embrace darkness?

3799500.title: 同情共焚 Demo
3799500.short_description: 《同情共焚》是一款叙事驱动的牌组构筑游戏，讲述一个个充满神秘色彩的故事，闲适氛围背后暗藏恐惧。你那满怀危险激情的老师将引导你完成禁忌的古老仪式。有时，召唤心魔才是自我治愈的唯一良方。

4725900.title: Eyes And Hypercubes Demo
4725900.short_description: Run and jump across floating platforms. Collect hypercubes to extend time, eliminate deadly Eyes, and don't fall into the void. Complete quests, set new personal records, and battle for the top of the global leaderboard.

4769470.title: Widle Demo
4769470.short_description: Widle is a cozy 2D pixel-art idle simulation in which you tend a tiny desktop planter, watch your plant grow over time and use earned coins to unlock new species and decorative pot skins.

4555050.title: Teaching Gender-Affirming Care
4555050.short_description: An educational visual training simulation that follows transgender and gender-diverse patients at a primary care clinic. Step into the role of a new provider as you prescribe and optimize hormone therapy, counsel patients around surgical affirmation, navigate care considerations for adolescents

3930360.title: Sinister Remains
3930360.short_description: In the shadow of a curse that has endured for decades, explore a town haunted by twisted truths and terrifying events. As you search for the remnants of the past, you’ll uncover the darkness around you and within yourself.

4147050.title: Salmon Tower
4147050.short_description: 利用动能进行冲刺和跳跃！一款平台跳跃与半“掘地求升”式的攀岩游戏。一路向上，攀登至黑暗之塔的顶端！你甚至可以说这是关于鲑鱼逆流而上的自然本能的纪录片……

3427850.title: Belts of Iron
3427850.short_description: Explore, automate, and fight in this new open world factory automation game. Build factories connected by miles of conveyor belts. Manage power and fluid networks. Explore procedurally generated worlds filled with resources to harvest and hostile creatures to defeat. Play solo or online with friends

3044510.title: Space Diva
3044510.short_description: 加入 Carmen 的旅程吧！她是一个有点迷糊的中年女性，驾驶着太空卡车穿梭宇宙，经历各种离奇状况——而且可能把事情搞得一团糟。这是一段关于宇宙中最张扬生物的互动叙事体验。

3304110.title: 868-BACK
3304110.short_description: 868-BACK is a computer-hacking strategy roguelike game where your mission is to dismantle capitalism one server at a time! Use hacking powers to fight enemies, steal the servers' data, and face increasingly nasty situations before being disconnected (again!) by the richest corporations on earth.

4016880.title: Secrets of Velendar Castle - Escape Room
4016880.short_description: 找到离开维伦达城堡的办法。揭开一切被夺走的真相。在这个奇幻密室中，你必须解开谜题，才能逃脱国王的愤怒……并弄清他究竟想从你身上得到什么。

4230130.title: Smol Toad
4230130.short_description: 一只个性十足的小蟾蜍会住在你的桌面上，陪伴你工作或游戏。与它互动，照顾它的快乐，避免过度打扰，并收集积分来解锁帽子和独特风格，打造你的两栖小伙伴。

4694850.title: Astra's Garden
4694850.short_description: Long ago, in a magical town filled with witches... There was one particular witch, Astragalus, who opened an apothecary. Grow some plants to help heal your customers and ease whatever ails them in this relaxing little idle game.

4697260.title: Guitar Practice Mate Demo
4697260.short_description: Cute characters will appear on your desktop to help you practice guitar. With features such as graphical sheet music and TAB notation, preset practice phrases ranging from beginner to advanced levels, and user customization options, it provides the ultimate practice environment.

3097510.title: 赏金乱斗：头号通缉
3097510.short_description: 欢迎来到“猎人天堂”，加入这场星际牛仔的狂欢！《赏金乱斗》是一款支持1-4人联机的快节奏动作射击游戏。利用独特“拉索”在战斗中辗转腾挪，与队友合力围捕强敌。但当威胁消除，真正的较量才刚刚开始……

4715830.title: Aether-07 Demo
4715830.short_description: Aether-07 is a space-bending, first person puzzle game set in a retro-futuristic sci-fi universe. Solve challenges with dual-purpose puzzle elements while uncovering the mystery plaguing the Aether mission.

4661680.title: Ignitement Demo
4661680.short_description: As a fire shaman, descend into a meditative battle against your inner demons. Wield explosive fire magic in a rogue-lite inferno. Burn through hordes, gather coins, unlock upgrades, and master the flame.

4582380.title: Hide and Shoot
4582380.short_description: Chaotic multiplayer hide-and-seek. Hunters wield bows. Prey shapeshift into farm animals or foliage to blend in. Dodge arrows, charge up fart-powered launches, and race to the escape portal. Up to 10 players with bots. 100 character skins. Fast rounds, big laughs.

4687080.title: Climbing Forever
4687080.short_description: Climb in the hope of finding Forever, and fail finding it again and again, until you succeed or fall to despair. Learn from your mistakes and climb anew. You only need to find Forever once.

4693560.title: 裂脑轮回 Demo
4693560.short_description: 你和朋友困在了一个身体里！ 这是一款合作冒险游戏，你们需要学会同时控制一个角色，勇闯精神世界，揭穿轮回这个巨型建筑的阴谋！沟通将是成功的关键！

4751060.title: Thousands of Chroma Demo
4751060.short_description: 仅用□（0）与■（1），完成数千种色彩画面的，层叠式逻辑解谜游戏

4584430.title: Good Catch! Demo
4584430.short_description: 《Good Catch!》是一款令人放松的钓鱼游戏。在这里，你可以体验温馨的钓鱼点、捕获稀有鱼类、完成小任务，并在旅途中解锁各种友好的角色。

1623770.title: Facettes
1623770.short_description: Explore the story of Facettes as you play as a woman discovering her homosexuality and overcoming her identity crisis. This self-questioning protagonist channels her introspection in her RPG inspired fantasy world: Facettes.

4381560.title: Compass
4381560.short_description: Explore long lost skies in Compass, an open-world piloting adventure about finding your way through uncharted clouds. Maneuver your ship through hazardous floating landscapes, complete challenges with your grapples, upgrade your vessel, and lead the Caravan forward.

3172440.title: One Move Away
3172440.short_description: 《One Move Away》是一款将解谜玩法与打包装车巧妙结合的 3D 第一人称解谜游戏。玩家将体验在不同人生阶段打包行李的过程，每一关都有不一样的挑战。完成所有目标，掌握打包的艺术吧！

4682430.title: Robosynthesis
4682430.short_description: A solar-powered robot awakens in an abandoned data center. — In this short 3D platformer, your movement, health, and ammo all use precious solar energy. Plan your actions carefully to seek freedom, as every step may be your last.

3783310.title: Sandloop
3783310.short_description: Help Hura save her village from invaders by exploring the intricate lands of Iman and gaining ancient skills that will enhance her mobility!

3819720.title: Feywood Wanderers
3819720.short_description: Explore the Feywood as you defeat enemies in tactical, turn-based battles. Find loot, abilities, secrets and meet helpful denizens of the forest as you delve deeper, customize your character with a great variety of classes, races, and equipment in this highly replayable extraction roguelike.

4565790.title: SALVO
4565790.short_description: 一款战术沉浸式模拟游戏。你身处地下，除了导弹一无所有。设计弹道武器，用两万美元的无人机猎杀十亿美元的雷达，用巡航导弹淹没敌人，或抵达高超音速技术。欢迎来到非对称战争。

4394020.title: Morels: Out of this World
4394020.short_description: Morels: Out of This World 是一款以外星世界中的蘑菇采集和野生动物摄影为主题的模拟游戏。通过收集各种蘑菇、拍摄外星生物以及完成每周任务来提升你的采集者和摄影师等级。

4691320.title: Shutterspeed Demo
4691320.short_description: Use your awesome camera gadgets to drill through enemies and the environment, fly where no cameraman has flown before and most importantly, freeze the world like a photograph in this platforming adventure through cyberspace!

4652980.title: Nursing Simulator—Code Ube
4652980.short_description: When things aren't as they seem, nobody stands against fate but one nurse. Play as Karen—a nurse who saves lives and kicks butt! Complete tasks, give meds, and document assessments. But when night comes, beware of those who try to steer you away from what's right.

4697520.title: Rogue Maze Demo
4697520.short_description: 塔防玩法在这款迷宫防守 roguelike 中焕然新生！设计刁钻的迷宫，用那些同时充当“塔”和通道的特殊地砖，让每一个不幸踏入的家伙精疲力竭。部署小装置、干扰物与工具，永远领先一步！

3419850.title: Trackastrophe!
3419850.short_description: 《Trackastrophe!》是一款治愈系火车解谜游戏。在梦幻般的等距视图关卡中铺设铁轨，收集车厢使列车不断变长，同时还要避开各种稀奇古怪的障碍物。充满趣味的小火车之旅等你来玩！

4192770.title: Mushi
4192770.short_description: Mushi is a single-player idle/incremental RPG. Level up, gather loot and explore a rich fantasy world.

1536120.title: 蓝莓心语
1536120.short_description: 《蓝莓心语》是款叙事驱动的平台解谜游戏。深入一位女性的精神世界，面对创伤，攀上人生之塔，重温重要的回忆，收集她的自我碎片，解开隐藏在她过去的秘密。

4461930.title: Undockable Demo
4461930.short_description: You are Hjorti, a living heart trapped in an absurd simulation. What does a heart do? Why, use space station modules to build a living weapon, destroy endless enemies, overcome complex bosses, all with a trademark dark sense of humor! Strategize, combine, and survive the madness!

4734080.title: Gunshot Arcade Demo
4734080.short_description: Gunshot Arcade combines the action of a classic arcade shoot 'em up with the meta-progression of a roguelike. Buy some weapons, upgrade your gear and survive as long as you can. Unlock much stronger guns from wave to wave and increase your reward, good luck.

4643050.title: Cherry on Top Demo
4643050.short_description: Chaos, coins, and cake! The free demo for Cherry on Top!

4481620.title: Stan the Dumpling
4481620.short_description: Help Stan escape from the mad chef's house before he arrives in this pixelart retro arcade adventure!

4725710.title: Physician Simulator Demo
4725710.short_description: 一款 Papers, Please 风格的医疗官僚模拟游戏。作为应届毕业生，你被分配到小镇诊所。诊断病情、识破伪造转诊单、拒绝纠缠不休的退休者。每一个决定都将塑 造你的声誉。五天，二十五堂说「不」的课。

4737860.title: DITTORI Demo
4737860.short_description: Deep beneath the world, an ancient god stirs. Master the forbidden power of DITTORI, discover its secrets, and use it to bend reality to your will. Herald the end of all things.

1299170.title: 神奇四叶镇
1299170.short_description: 摆脱无聊的日子，在四叶镇开启崭新生活吧！在可爱的宠物比洛卜的陪伴下，你将耕种田地、结交新朋，探索未知的土地。邂逅真爱，还是成为最伟大的宠物训练师？书写自己的神奇篇章吧！

2728840.title: The Crimson Lyre
2728840.short_description: The Crimson Lyre 是一款身临其境的第一人称 RPG 冒险游戏，深入危险的奇幻世界。

3766200.title: 100 Cats Lost In World 2 Find & Color
3766200.short_description: 🐱 在 9 张独特的手绘地图中寻找 900 多只猫咪 🌍。通过数字填色 🎨 放松或自由调配粉彩。单人探索或在线合作 👯‍♂️，同时享受 Meow FM 🎶 带来的氛围。

4334740.title: Prophet Margin Demo
4334740.short_description: Build thriving settlements. Weave intricate trade routes. Optimize complex supply chains to earn divine boons. Master a meditative City Builder where board-game logic meets deep Resource Management. A relaxing, 'real-time with pause' strategy puzzle where every decision is yours to undo.

2702260.title: 绘途寻踪
2702260.short_description: 在这款游戏中，地图将由你亲手绘制！作为一支小小冒险队的制图师，你会像真正的探险家一样，使用专业导航工具，探索未知岛屿，寻找传说中的宝藏。

4530130.title: Last Pirates: Die Together Demo
4530130.short_description: 支持多达4人的在线联机恐怖撤离游戏。利用你的弹性手臂为船长掠夺珍贵的战利品。但要小心，危险潜伏在每个角落，正企图夺走你的财宝！

4078130.title: Static Dread: The Submarine Demo
4078130.short_description: 在 claustrophobic 军用潜艇上坠入洛夫克拉夫特式恐怖。作为舰长副手分配任务、分析声呐信号、做出艰难抉择、防止船员陷入疯狂。黑暗恐怖潜伏于内部……以及船体之外。

4191130.title: 东方创造者
4191130.short_description: 来编写弹幕程序吧！ 《 东方创造者》是一款使用简单的编程语言创建东方符卡的弹幕编程游戏。

4515410.title: Phasebreak
4515410.short_description: In this turn based strategy game, your tactics are pushed to the limit as you need to consider not one,- but two gameboards. Warp both friend and foe between them, master interdimensional gunfights, and confidently strategize around RNG-free abilities in this FREE student project!

2854620.title: SCAD
2854620.short_description: SCAD 是一款动作紧张刺激的末日后 简体字 游戏，你将驾驶一艘可改装的气垫船。对抗源源不断的僵尸大军，制作并升级强力武器，为危险的远征做好准备。

4539960.title: 时光之缚 Timebound Demo
4539960.short_description: 深入神秘遗迹展开解谜探险。在这个谜题交织的世界里发掘遗落的魔法，找寻近在眼前的隐秘，摸透规则，然后打破常规。

3757430.title: 山羊物语：桌面牧场
3757430.short_description: 一个生活在你屏幕边缘的温馨山羊伙伴世界。照料一群独特又可爱的山羊，每只都有各自的个性，在你工作、学习或放松时观看它们。

4643160.title: Mining Grounds
4643160.short_description: 一款每次点击都至关重要的点击游戏。构建连锁反应，突破极限，实现全面自动化。放置角色触发强力连击，解锁升级，将点击能力推向极致。无需赶时间，只需享受顺畅的成长与策略乐趣。

4696360.title: Second Monitor Football Demo
4696360.short_description: A lightweight, physics-based football auto-simulation designed to be played or watched on a second monitor just press play and let the match unfold.

4656950.title: Attack of the Astrals Demo
4656950.short_description: Turn-based strategy roguelike where every battle is a tactical puzzle. Each move of your champion trio unleashes an attack and swaps tiles with other units. Combine skills, spells and summons to defeat a cosmic army that grows stronger as you do.

3854110.title: Mnemonimov
3854110.short_description: Mnemonimov is a fantasy console where you program in ASSEMBLY like in the 80s. Build anything from games to operating systems and understand how computers work at a low level.

3825740.title: 2 Bows 1 Arrow
3825740.short_description: 《2 Bows 1 Arrow》是一款专为两名玩家设计的纯正合作冒险游戏！你们可以在众多关卡中通过射箭来考验彼此的默契，但请注意：两人共用一支箭。游戏中设有许多关卡，需要你们通过行动配合与逻辑推理来击败敌人并解决各种谜题，这些挑战正等待着你们。

4585570.title: 角落之人 Demo
4585570.short_description: 你搬进了一间老旧的出租屋，霉味弥漫、窗户吱呀作响，屋内昏暗的灯光映出墙角的阴影。起初，这里似乎只是一个普通的房间，但随着日子一天天过去，你开始听到微弱的敲击声、低语般的窸窣声，甚至会在梦中看到不可名状的幻影。 是一款心理恐怖与悬疑探索相结合的剧情模拟游戏。你需要在每天的选择中平衡休息、探索和心理承受力：是去检查窗外的动静，还是安静地整理房间？是独自面对阴影，还是逃避它？每一个决定都可能影响你的理智值，进而改变结局的走向。 本游戏使用AI技术生成部分事件与角色行为，用于增强游戏的随机性与沉浸感，不涉及玩家数据采集或生成不受控内容。

4406850.title: RealmGuard
4406850.short_description: Realmguard is a rogue-like tower defense where every run is a strategic balancing act of expansion and elemental strategy. Expand the map tile by tile, uncover random encounters and hidden rewards, upgrade weapons and combine elemental effects for powerful synergies to survive.

4569500.title: Moonlit Dreams Demo
4569500.short_description: A sokoban game with overlapping levels, inside a dreamscape you'll never want to leave. Push blocks, open doors, traverse mazes, and then do it again across and between three layers of psyche.

4330260.title: Choozle!
4330260.short_description: A diorama-style puzzle adventure game where players solve puzzles using four unique flower buds. Each bud has a different ability, such as growing plants, destroying obstacles, or removing petrification. Collect stars across stages, complete optional challenges, and restore the broken constellation.

3780290.title: Magic Dodgeball: Homeless Edition
3780290.short_description: A chaotic PvP action bullet hell where unemployed wizards battle in magical dodgeball duels. Fight with your friends, choose buffs between rounds and build absurdly powerful spell combos to survive and entertain!

4738710.title: KUBIKA Demo
4738710.short_description: 在 Kubika 免费试玩版中引导可爱的立方体，这是一款受 Sokoban 启发的温馨 3D 解谜游戏。探索第一个世界，挑战约 20 个重力变换关卡，享受可爱的音效和柔和的音乐，并将完整版加入愿望单。

4691560.title: Polly's Puzzle Box Demo
4691560.short_description: 化身一只小小跳蚤，探索一只充满图形与秘密的神秘机关谜盒。收集拥有隐藏能力的奇异物件，循着线索的踪迹，一步步寻找逃脱之路。

4610170.title: Prism Deck Survivor
4610170.short_description: A deckbuilding bullet hell survivor-like where you craft powerful card synergies, unleash prism combos, and fight to survive endless waves.

4457010.title: When the Light Dies
4457010.short_description: A lady's life is bound to a mysterious artifact. And as its power dies out, so will the lady, unless Rick and his friends can identify the source of the evil and overturn it.

4707620.title: The Ministry for Anomaly Observation Demo
4707620.short_description: A retro anomaly observation game where a government ministry tasks you with monitoring CCTV feeds and identifying anomalies to construct case files. Missed anomalies corrupt the shift and its case file evidence.

2904040.title: Cheap Car Repair
2904040.short_description: 你的新座右铭是「也许不是最便宜，但至少能凑合用」！回到 90 年代的波兰，经营你自己的汽车修理厂。能省就省，赚上一大笔钱，还要小心愤怒的客人！

3487240.title: Mistaken
3487240.short_description: The world is lost to eldritch mist. No heroes, no grand purpose—only survival. Build, fight, and carve your path through treacherous lands where the remnants of humanity and horrors beyond reason now roam. Survive… or be Mistaken.

3524750.title: Tabletop Game Shop Simulator
3524750.short_description: 经营自己的桌游商店！上货、组装和涂装模型、和顾客在游戏之夜对战，把你的店打造成终极宅宅天堂。

3264960.title: Cardburners
3264960.short_description: CardBurners 是一款混乱而快节奏的卡牌游戏，支持单人或在线对战！ 你必须在手牌烧毁之前迅速出牌！ 此试玩版可在线体验两个卡包，并挑战单人模式中的前几个对手。

3858730.title: 试用版纵横秘湾 Corsair Cove Demo
3858730.short_description: 建立一座庞大的海盗避风港，组建舰队探索广阔海域，挑战王权让海盗时代得以延续！从麦酒到燧发手枪，从无名喽啰到侠盗剑客，你需要驾驭复杂的生产链，号令一群桀骜不驯的船员，方能称霸七海！

3576580.title: Ritualis: Summoner Simulator
3576580.short_description: 一座古城需要你的召唤魔法。召唤奇异的物品和生物来满足市民的要求。赚取金币，揭开当地人的奇怪秘密。哦，试着治好你突然失忆的坏毛病。它可能会救你的命。

4012690.title: The Big Hollow: 1982
4012690.short_description: Can you think like a killer? In this short murder mystery find details in evidence, interpret criminal behaviors and prove your worth to the FBI as new detective Desmond.

4095490.title: 密码，是什么？
4095490.short_description: 《密码，是什么？》是一款极简风格，需要你来破解四位数密码的解谜游戏。内含超过 100道谜题！

3583210.title: 崩溃小队
3583210.short_description: 快来尼罗快递打卡上班吧，这里是世界上“最高效”的仓库！最多支持四名玩家在线合作，共同处理在遵从物理引擎而越来越混乱的箱子。时间就是金钱，安全都是鬼扯……别把自己整崩溃了就行！

4738210.title: Cats and Sushi Demo
4738210.short_description: Run a cozy sushi restaurant for adorable cat customers! Prepare dishes, restock ingredients, and serve orders on a lively conveyor belt. Earn tips, and unlock new recipes each day in this fast-paced cooking sim.

4642760.title: PIKPOP
4642760.short_description: Mine your way through procedurally generated levels, digging ore and bombing enemies to achieve the highest score possible!

4127530.title: Bluey's Quest For The Gold Pen
4127530.short_description: Join Bluey on a fun-filled quest for the Gold Pen in an original story by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm. A joyful experience for the whole family.

4596400.title: 星穹幻想世界 Demo
4596400.short_description: When alien threats descend upon the planet, you embark on a grand adventure. Born from a massive stone, you know nothing of this world. During your open-world exploration, every corner of the land hides mysteries and pleasant surprises.

4526260.title: Explodey Towers
4526260.short_description: Build, upgrade, EXPLODE! Build and manage your tower defenses to fend of relentless waves of enemies in this small tower defense game!

4702980.title: TimelineTown
4702980.short_description: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

3390260.title: Benny & Nana's Barrel Adventure
3390260.short_description: 踏上惊心动魄的任务，从长喙部落夺回被盗的椰子！在这个令人上瘾的一键式冒险中证明您的技能和决心，从一个桶滚到另一个桶并收集椰子。

4475740.title: Shark Town: Kids and Toddlers Ocean Game
4475740.short_description: A toddler and kids friendly underwater exploration game where young players control sharks and sea creatures to freely swim, discover, and learn using simple controller based gameplay.

4720110.title: Space Town: Kids & Toddlers Space Exploration
4720110.short_description: Explore colorful planets, fly fun spaceships, collect letters and treasures, and learn through play in a relaxing space adventure made for kids and toddlers. Designed for controllers, safe exploration, simple gameplay, and family-friendly fun.

4715760.title: Apple Picker Demo
4715760.short_description: 从一棵苹果树开始，体验这款诡异的放置增量游戏的序幕。摘苹果，生产更多苹果，引发现实的“苹果化”。一种吞噬一切的苹果痴迷正在酝酿……但无论你做什么，（别）向独角兽开枪。

3284290.title: 月之魔印 Moonsigil Atlas
3284290.short_description: 一款没有能量限制的卡组构筑类肉鸽游戏—利用物理空间来出牌！拼接卡牌，改变卡牌形状，打出超模连招，突破游戏极限！

4677820.title: Winter Panda
4677820.short_description: This cute desktop pet is designed to mimic your desktop activities and reveal a reflective message each day. Enable the signature snowball startup launch to let Winter Panda stay with you always. No demanding tasks. Just when you might forget it’s there… then suddenly, you notice it again!

4592790.title: Mimic Meadows Demo
4592790.short_description: 这是一款通过模仿动物的动作来变身为它们的解谜游戏。玩家在解开烧脑谜题的同时，探索运用这一能力的种种创意方式，并试揭开草地深处隐藏的众多秘密。

4539820.title: Heavy Duty Inc. Demo
4539820.short_description: Lead three space mechanics through tense turn‑based tactical battles to save a collapsing space station. Work the shifts solo (for now), picking new gear between missions to keep your crew patched up and pushing on!

4772290.title: Rembrunir 2 Demo
4772290.short_description: Onnu, the machine that saved the world from Leviathan, is now its greatest threat. To avert an even greater evil, it initiates a genocide to force the arrival of the Antichrist.

4079420.title: FROGBLOCK
4079420.short_description: Hop into 100+ beautiful Perspective-Block-Puzzle levels as a tiny Frog! Change your perspective to find illusory paths, and create your own paths by moving Frogblocks around. Explore biomes and discover new mechanics while listening to a rich and calming original soundtrack!

4769390.title: Cages: Hidden Worlds Demo
4769390.short_description: 《Cages: Hidden Worlds 》是一款沉浸式第一人称解谜逃脱游戏，每一道声响、每一片阴影、每一处机关都带来诡异的神秘感，以及厄运将至的压迫气息。破解那些你前所未见、设计独特而复杂的机械运作原理，揭开深藏其中的秘密。

3640620.title: Main Sequence Demo
3640620.short_description: 《Main Sequence》是一款第一人称太空模拟工厂建造游戏。在游戏中，你将设计宇宙飞船、建造空间站，并实现全面自动化。从一艘飞船起步，逐步发展成横跨星际的工业帝国，在银河中留下属于你的印记。

3726370.title: Heavy Metal Death Can
3726370.short_description: 《Heavy Metal Death Can》是一款复古风格的生存恐怖游戏，背景设定在上世纪 70 年代末的另类瑞典。一场事故后你被困在海底，面对将船员变成丧尸的恐怖“淤泥”，你必须求生、寻找幸存者，并揭开疯狂背后的真相。

2672700.title: Lands of Fury
2672700.short_description: 在充满危险、谜团和被遗忘之力的世界中醒来。*Lands of Fury（狂怒之地）*是一款快节奏动作RPG Roguelite：战斗敌群，招募同伴，发现隐藏能力，揭开真正的自我。

4581640.title: Airship Climber
4581640.short_description: 成为国王……前提是你的朋友肯让你。穿过混乱的飞艇与漂浮残骸，夺取王冠，然后在炸弹、恐慌与背叛中坚持一分钟，之后化身天使或恶魔观众重返战场。

2809660.title: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time
2809660.short_description: A deduction puzzle game set in the last hour of a lost 90s JRPG complete with original manual, director's commentary, and clips of an unreleased amateur documentary, all used to uncover the secret at the heart of it all: "What is the Greatest RPG of All Time?"

3198890.title: 深海刮刮乐
3198890.short_description: 作为一个迷你渔贩机器人，你将探索各大神秘的钓鱼圣地，抛出鱼线、捕捞奇异的鱼类、享受刮鳞的酥麻爽感、投喂远道而来的神秘食客们，获取金币升级。

4646280.title: DeckWrecking Pirates Demo
4646280.short_description: 在这款战略 Roguelike 卡组构筑游戏中，你需要掷出骰子，指挥海盗船员，甚至可以控制敌人。构筑你的卡组……并击败对手卡组吧。

4686660.title: Call of Toys: Tower Defense
4686660.short_description: Embark on an exhilarating journey to protect Santa's Valley in this epic Tower Defense game. Explore an arsenal of 13 unique towers, each equipped with magical spells and exclusive abilities. Customize your towers with numerous upgrades that enhance their strength and unlock new magical powers.

4619060.title: SoundFest: Music Festival Manager
4619060.short_description: 打造并管理你的音乐节。设计场地、预订艺人、管理人群，发展属于你的盈利活动帝国。

4695220.title: Against The Godds
4695220.short_description: Death has vanished, and nothing can die. Lead a party, battle the Godds, and forge your fate in this turn-based rogue-lite where every move is decided by the roll of the dice.

3061390.title: Inkwellers
3061390.short_description: In this online 2-player co-op puzzle adventure, you and a friend become Inkwellers and dive into Celiphia’s magical journal. Work together, communicate clearly, and solve puzzles hidden within its pages.

4208150.title: Bootleg Alchemist
4208150.short_description: It's prohibition , time to bootleg like never before. As an exiled Alchemist on your path to redemption.Negotiate contracts from taverns to produce liquor and earn coin. Use your alchemy skills to evade guards , bandits and boost production, Help civilians and regain your status.

3887090.title: 机场行李模拟游戏
3887090.short_description: 在机场检查并分拣行李！检查箱子中的非法物品、重量和目的地机场。打造你自己的全自动行李处理系统，优化航站楼效率以获得最大利润！

3226660.title: 魔法与钢铁：英雄牌局
3226660.short_description: 组建3名英雄的小队，准备你的卡组，在六边形棋盘上主宰战术战斗。每一局都需要不同策略，每张打出的卡牌都至关重要，并且只会在下一局才返回牌库。

4636460.title: Ctrl+Alt+Defeat Zero Humanity
4636460.short_description: A 2D roguelike survivor where robots face absurd human leaders at the end of the world. Waves, builds, epic bosses, and an infinite mode for those who conquer Antarctica. Chaos never felt this good.

2476650.title: Do You even Forklift?
2476650.short_description: 一款受吉卜力工作室和日本汽车文化启发的物理引擎叉车游戏！运用你的叉车技巧解决充满意外结果的逻辑谜题吧！

2827230.title: 兽猎突袭
2827230.short_description: 《兽猎突袭》是一款用虚幻5引擎打造的国产射击网游，采用动物题材，以大战场英雄技能射击为主要玩法，玩家将扮演各类动物英雄，运用武器和战术技能，与队友紧密配合，奔赴战场，赢得胜利。 这里的英雄使用自己的动物本能作为技能，战场将充满想象，丰富多彩。集合你的动物战友们，一起战斗吧。

2227540.title: 诡域深行 Demo
2227540.short_description: 《诡域深行》是一款多人合作恐怖游戏。与同伴一同踏入这座被禁忌笼罩的岛屿，搜寻并带回受诅咒的物品。小心！岛上潜伏着未知的怪物与诡异的异象，随时准备逃离危险，或藏身于黑暗之中。

4719930.title: Aethelgard: Galactic Guardian
4719930.short_description: 在残酷的科幻宇宙中，指挥你的飞船，采集珍贵资源，升级你的武器库。《艾瑟尔加德：银河守护者》是一款紧张刺激的太空射击游戏，你必须打造终极战舰，才能在与精英外星舰队的史诗级战斗中生存下来。

4705140.title: Temple Maker 64 Demo
4705140.short_description: Temple Maker 64 is a third-person dungeon creator. Build dungeons full of traps and puzzles, or grab your sword and explore community-made dungeons. Choose from a vast selection of items, monsters, puzzle elements, and bosses, all wrapped up in an N64-inspired love letter.

1981560.title: 万词破 - 单词女友
1981560.short_description: 背单词：枯燥，无聊，没动力，难坚持，背了就忘？ 包含虚拟恋人、养成与战斗系统的背单词游戏《万词破-单词女友》帮您搞定！ 这是单词学习与电子游戏跨领域的大胆与创新的融合。 历时6年半的探索和预开发阶段，由十多名英语教育领域和游戏领域的资深从业者倾力合作，面向“大朋友”，以“让背单词变得真正轻松、有趣、更有学习动力、且不因游戏化而降低学习效率”为宗旨的《万词破-单词女友》正在开发中。

3985000.title: The Ballad of a True Thug
3985000.short_description: The dark underbelly of 1990s Europe, criminal enterprise, and rivers of blood. Rise from a petty crook to a criminal legend, where every shot must be precise and any mistake is fatal. A brutal, top-down tactical shooter.

4751700.title: Alcurist - Demo
4751700.short_description: Lead Curist and a squad of superpowered citizens in this 2D Idle RPG. After a wizard’s betrayal, use tactical formations and knockback mechanics to protect your leader. Master ultimate skills and position-based passives to defeat the rogue mage. Available on PC and Android.

4525940.title: Through the Chalk Dust
4525940.short_description: Step into the endless corridors of learning and unease in Through the Chalk Dust — a psychological walking-simulation puzzle inspired by looping-environment horror. You wander from classroom to classroom, each one almost identical to the last. Almost.

4603600.title: Be A Firefighter
4603600.short_description: 勇敢并非毫无畏惧，而是在恐惧面前挺身而出。直面极端环境，迎接工作的挑战。扑灭熊熊烈火，拯救危难中的人们，开辟通往安全的道路。守护并服务你的社区。这不仅仅是一份工作，更是一项使命。成为一名消防员吧！

3943690.title: Plush Parade
3943690.short_description: Design and sell your plushies in this cozy creative sim! Mix and match hundreds of pieces to create unique designs and build your own plush collections. Manage your online shop and compete with a rival company to become the ultimate plush designer!

4700970.title: Fortuna
4700970.short_description: A roguelite deck-builder based on "Daifugo". If you can't play a card, you take damage: (Field Total) x (Multiplier). Use battle rewards to customize your deck and special cards in the shop. Strategize and upgrade to defeat even stronger enemies!

4295110.title: Ribbit Jump Demo
4295110.short_description: 一款每一动都至关重要的精准平台游戏。快来体验 Ribbit Jump 的初期挑战。调整每一次跳跃的力量，在挑战性不断增加的关卡中前进。在此试玩版本中掌握跳跃技巧，包含游戏的初期挑战。

4645760.title: 冰柜里的尸体要多少钱？
4645760.short_description: 短篇视觉小说。 抱着人尽皆知的目的，在人尽皆知的街道，发生的人尽皆知的故事。

4711890.title: AIM/FLASH Trainer
4711890.short_description: AIM/FLASH TRAINER 是 Team Finder 为 Valorant 玩家打造的极简 aim trainer。练习准度、目标切换、tracking、深度控制和闪光反应，并用清晰的结果追踪支持 FPS 训练。

3283310.title: Kioku: 夏日记忆岛
3283310.short_description: 在《Kioku：夏日记忆岛》中，你将化身来到新家的少女阿斯蒂，在记忆岛上度过人生的第一个暑假。揭开岛屿的秘密，结交新的朋友，在这场温馨迷人的冒险中，重温童年夏日的美好时光！

4511050.title: Dicetris Demo
4511050.short_description: Dicetris is a falling-block puzzler with depth. Stack dice in columns, sum to hit the target, combo colors to clear overloaded stacks. Twist your strategy around special dice and rule-bending map conditions. Easy to learn. Built to master.

4754950.title: One More Core Demo
4754950.short_description: 《One More Core》是一款3D增量游戏。驾驶旗舰用激光将行星一层层切碎，收集资源，升级舰队，直到夺取行星核心为止。别忘了补充燃料，还有一个核心在等着你！

4730810.title: Poping Aquarium Demo
