4730810.short_description: 一款适合放在屏幕一侧的轻松放置打砖块。没有传统小球，而是由拥有不同特性的鱼儿弹跳穿梭，击碎方块并收集奖励。

4307420.title: FORENSIC - M.E. Protocol
4307420.short_description: 戴上手套，进入犯罪现场。在这款调查模拟器中，你需要解决9个独立且充满反转的案件。使用无人机、机器人和化学分析来揭开真相。在这里，你不是用枪惩罚罪犯，而是用科学将他们绳之以法。

4515560.title: Make It a Million
4515560.short_description: 终极数字放置益智游戏！掌握独特的石头剪刀布堆叠系统，打造强力连击，向 1,000,000 分冲刺！

4598370.title: ORUN
4598370.short_description: Follow Orun through his journey to restore the guardian flame that once defended the city from creatures that now have devastated the land.

4431440.title: Phantom Veil
4431440.short_description: A story-driven psychological horror where you play as an investigative reporter drawn into a disturbing and dangerous case. Explore haunting, atmospheric environments, uncover hidden clues, solve intricate environmental puzzles, and confront the terrifying truth that was never meant to be revealed.

2022260.title: Arcana Rift
2022260.short_description: Arcana Rift is a tactical 1v1 card battler set inside a mysterious theatre. Build tempo, manage mana, summon powerful Arcana, forge suit-based items, and outplay your opponent in online PvP or offline battles against AI.

4727350.title: Giraffe Champion 2: Football Rock
4727350.short_description: Play Guitar to Great Rock Songs! Play Cool Guitars and unlock guitars like The Epic Rock Guitar, or the cool Heavy Metal Guitar Design your guitar and play in a cool concert arena. Compete in the epic Guitar Battle!

4688350.title: 韭神：技能炒股 Demo
4688350.short_description: 一买就跌，一卖就涨？受够了当韭菜？欢迎来到《韭神：技能炒股》——在这里，系统亲自给你发挂！ 这不是模拟器，而是一款让你用超能力炒股的肉鸽游戏。忘掉K线图，你的技能才是王道。 每局都是全新的市场，角色技能搭配随机生成的道具与周末奇遇。构建你的无敌流派，在十分钟内完成从散户到“股神”的速通，体验嘲讽资本的快感！ 系统都让我开挂了，凭什么不能赢？

4695430.title: Sirin's Feather Demo
4695430.short_description: 死之鸟夺走了你的爱人。 为了让她回归，你要经历多少次死亡？ 在这个异教神话复苏的世界中，召集同伴、揭开他们的秘密，并塑造属于你的故事。

4737100.title: 万宝商会 Demo
4737100.short_description: 《万宝商会》是一款使用卡牌博弈来代替讨价还价的店铺模拟经营游戏。 用花色点数上演谈判心理战：你永远猜不到，对面的顾客下一秒是让步，还是掀桌。

4592980.title: Typewriter
4592980.short_description: 一台属于你的复古打字机。《Typewriter》是一款精心还原的复古打字机模拟器。每一次按键，字锤击打纸张，色带震颤，滑架缓缓移动——沉浸在纯粹的打字体验中。

4771710.title: 奇迹勇者：魔兽防线 Demo
4771710.short_description: 汹涌的兽潮正不断冲击你的堡垒，却始终无法越雷池一步。你只需与勇者伙伴们尽情收割来犯之敌，在战斗中不断成长，以更强的姿态迎接下一波——收割，变强，再收割，如此循环。

4646670.title: Banneret Demo
4646670.short_description: 肉鸽式卡组构筑与战术自动战斗相结合的队伍策略游戏。招募并培养队员，定制卡组，在危机四伏的旅途中探索前行，与强敌展开对决。

4217140.title: JPEG
4217140.short_description: A short psychological walk sim from a first-person perspective. Day after day, you perform routine tasks in the same apartment, following on-screen prompts. But the familiar walls begin to change — the protagonist is going mad, and so are you. Will you make it to the day the screen fades to black?

4637500.title: LAST STAND: DEAD DESERT
4637500.short_description: Survive against hordes of hungry zombies in a dark and terrifying atmosphere! Cross 3 different maps, fight 3 different zombie types, and reach the helicopter before time runs out to escape this nightmare. Only the fastest survive. Every decision is vital, every second is a race against death.

4708620.title: Synergrid
4708620.short_description: 构筑符号卡组，把卡牌放上4x3棋盘，连接协同效果，突破逐步提高难度的40个回合。

4694840.title: Outpour Demo
4694840.short_description: Outpour is a puzzle game where you redirect flowing water across dreamy cathedral rooftops. Manipulate your surroundings to guide a dynamic water system, traverse high places, and restore harmony to sacred structures.

4744130.title: Cropageddon Demo
4744130.short_description: Dark Messiah-inspired first-person roguelite. An ancient curse turned the harvest into monsters. Master brutal melee and devastating magic to fight monstrous fruits, vegetables, and other crops. Unlock powerful new spells and weapons with each run

4517720.title: 邪祟Evil thing Demo
4517720.short_description: 在幽深山林间，有一座香火凋零的狐仙庙。作为一名初来乍到的出马仙，靠着能与仙家沟通的神力，你成为了这里的新任守护者。然而，这座寺庙远非净土，污秽之物横行，邪祟在黑暗中窥伺。你能否在这片被诅咒的土地上，熬过每一个夜晚？

4633310.title: Would You Love Me If I Was a Snake? Demo
4633310.short_description: A puzzle game where you play as a snake. Push objects, block lasers, teleport, and bite your tail off to escape dreamy puzzle rooms.

4599050.title: 掘与战 Demo
4599050.short_description: 掘与战是一款结合了轻松挖掘与背包构筑的挂机游戏。装备上你的宝藏、技能和符文，去击败敌人，带回所有战利品吧～

4658790.title: 金羊毛 Demo
4658790.short_description: 《金羊毛》是一款巧妙融合平台跳跃与解谜元素的独立游戏。在这里世界本身即是终极谜题，你所看到的一切皆为谜题的一部分。身为破局者你需要将自身与“伙伴”的能力编织成“钥匙”，在虚实之间寻路前行，揭秘真相。 这不仅是一段解谜闯关的旅程，也将促使你思考规则与存在的意义。

3985130.title: 仓鼠萌语
3985130.short_description: 在电脑上处理各项事务的同时，在屏幕上养只仓鼠吧。 游戏、作业、工作……可爱的仓鼠会陪伴你的每一个瞬间。《仓鼠萌语》是一款不打扰日常生活、在屏幕一角与你共存的放置类社交游戏。与会对触摸做出反应的仓鼠交流，与全球玩家聊天，打造属于自己的小镇吧。

4684760.title: Khinkills Demo
4684760.short_description: As a cute khinkali dumpling, fight over the last piece of cake through fast paced and chaotic arenas. Smash your frenemies, steal their candies and kick everyone’s butt in this cute’n gore world.

4660710.title: The Void Demo
4660710.short_description: 在虚空中幸存。寻求救赎。

4145110.title: 等一个蛋 / Waiting for an Egg
4145110.short_description: 一款专为“等一个蛋”的人设计的像素风“研磨”放置游戏。欢迎来到灵感农场，你的目标是专注“研磨”，孵化成果，赚取“经费”。在这里，你的时间和耐心是唯一的资源。购买“鸡种”（例如“曼迪鸡”和“爱思鸡儿”），它们会自动进入漫长的“审蛋周期”。成功“见刊”后，你将收获从“普刊”到“顶刊”的五色灵感蛋。使用“经费”扩建你的鸡舍，从 3 只的容量开始，不断壮大你的“团队”。你还可以购买“温馨小屋”、“幸运女神”等道具来美化你的专属农场。游戏内置了“专注时钟”（番茄钟）和 AI 助手，以及可拖拽的便利贴，是你“研磨”时光中的最佳陪伴。

4398690.title: MoSimulator
4398690.short_description: MoSimulator is a robotics simulation game with an arcade feel that lets players mod in their own robots. Experience the excitement of competitive student robotics in a fun, accessible format where you can bring your own robot designs to life and compete in simulated matches.

4700870.title: 7 DEADLY DEMONS Demo
4700870.short_description: An incremental roguelite where you slay hordes of demons to level up. Click to collect powerful loot, develop your skills, master spells and attacks to test your true power! Are you capable of defeating the demon lords?

4127460.title: 天空之塔 Demo
4127460.short_description: “Tower of the Sky” is a roguelike RPG where every run is a new challenge. Join the ritual ascent, recruit unique allies, and fight through ever-changing floors. Discover hidden secrets behind the three families and the tower that reshapes fate itself.

4763280.title: 夏日重奏 Demo
4763280.short_description: 《夏日重奏》是一款视觉小说类角色扮演游戏，你将扮演一名表面平平无奇，实则背负着沉重过去的高二学生，为了重拾昔日的音乐梦想，精进自身，寻找队友，和同伴们碰撞出不同的火花，并最终决定自己与他们的未来。

4429950.title: 栩的人生已经没救了！
4429950.short_description: 在这款肉鸽回合制地牢探索RPG中，你将扮演被霸凌者毁掉人生后且无家可归的少女栩，复仇的执念支撑着她继续前行。探索危险重重的地下城，击败敌人，学习全新技能并收集装备，不断强化自己。不要让霸凌者再次占据上风！

4704900.title: Between Worlds: challenging puzzles Demo
4704900.short_description: "Between Worlds" is a 2D puzzle game where you reshape the boundary between two intertwined worlds to reach the goal. Turn characters into terrain to create paths, but every change affects both sides of the world. Use logic, shifting gravity, and creative thinking to solve complex puzzles.

4696140.title: Pocket of Y
4696140.short_description: 《Pocket of Y》是一款以紧凑节奏为特点的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过快速做出战斗决策、推进流程并强化角色能力，在简洁而连贯的单人体验中完成回合制冒险。

4654680.title: Signal Zero
4654680.short_description: 人类已被AI奴役。你的键盘是最后的武器。 在AI网络中注入病毒,在这款感染扩散题材的放置×策略游戏中解放20个国家。构建病毒,扩散感染,切断AI的带宽。完整本地化,16个成就。

3050170.title: Fathoms
3050170.short_description: Hop into a ship and escape! With the help of an aquatic ally, you pilot an underwater vessel in an attempt to escape the clutches of the Sea Intelligence Bureau.

4775840.title: 桌面星球-试玩版
4775840.short_description: 一款桌面放置版的《异星工厂》类游戏，没有频繁的怪物骚扰，只需要安心建设。从开采矿物起步建设基地，工厂，组建舰队开拓更多的星球。

4766490.title: 小罗的英语战争
4766490.short_description: 小镇即将崩溃，恶魔军团来势汹汹，拯救小镇的任务就交给你了！单词就是你的子弹，手速就是你的生命。面对如潮水般涌来的敌人，精准敲击正确的字母来释放致命技能。无论是为了精通英语还是为了挑战极限手速，拿起你的键盘，开始战斗吧！

4701820.title: Deck-A-Doodle Solitaire
4701820.short_description: 六种接龙模式、四套手工牌组、30张桌布及80张牌背可解锁。以美丽不列颠哥伦比亚省的绘画风景为背景。这是一封写给接龙游戏与我们称之为家园之地的情书。无广告，无订阅。一次购买，永久畅玩。

4709950.title: Don Memo Demo
4709950.short_description: Don Memo is a brave bull who embarks on one final journey across Costa Rica to rescue his granddaughter and confront Pisuicas. Fight against legends and shadows of the past in this 2D pixel platformer, while carrying the legacy of a family destined to protect the world from evil.

4679040.title: Bloodweight Demo
4679040.short_description: 100 generations. one ledger. one heir at a time. you are the bloodline itself, guiding your lineage through the ages. you spend each life; the Soul Teller writes what it was. when your line ends, you read the chronicle of yourself. how will YOUR dynasty fall?

4782820.title: Herb's Homegrown Havoc Demo
4782820.short_description: Herb's Homegrown Havoc is a simple but chaotic arcade roguelike. Pluck plants out of the ground before they rot and summon hostile creatures! Upgrade after each round to increase Herb's strength and skills in various ways.

4644040.title: Birdshot
4644040.short_description: A fast third‑person hunting game where you flush upland birds and call mallards into your decoys for quick, satisfying shots.

4784000.title: Toy Tycoon Demo
4784000.short_description: You're an owner of toy business. Start your business from a small store in the suburban area. Increase your profit, unlock new toys, hire employees, move to bigger place, and grow your business. At the end you will become a toy tycoon!

555400.title: Collision Course
555400.short_description: An asteroid is hurtling toward the planet! Sneak, scavenge and blast your way through an immersive prehistoric world filled with Humans, Dinosaurs, Droids and Mother Nature’s fury!

4320250.title: Neighborhood Video Demo
4320250.short_description: Crack the case of the missing video store employee in this 3D point and click mystery game by solving escape room puzzles, combing the computer database, and stocking shelves as an undercover detective posing as a cashier during your first weekend at the suspiciously understaffed Neighborhood Video.

4717710.title: ColorLand Friends
4717710.short_description: Colorland Friends is a gentle educational game for ages 3–6 where children learn colors through fun lessons, matching activities, and relaxing animations with Milo the monkey. Designed to build confidence, recognition, and early learning through play.

4731850.title: Terrafarm Demo
4731850.short_description: Robots emerge from the underground vault to cleanse the surface and restore nature. Replant and restore the wilds while growing food in order to support humans returning to the surface. A new culture of sustainable life and living in harmony with nature will be born.

4687670.title: Nightborn Demo
4687670.short_description: Fight, sneak, or charm your way through a gothic modern New Orleans as a Vampire detective of your creation. Unravel a vast centuries-old conspiracy involving Vampire factions, Werewolves, and far stranger horrors. Try to survive as a Nightborn without losing yourself to madness or damnation.

4768150.title: Hunk Battle Gems Demo
4768150.short_description: 体验 Hunk Battle Gems 的开场内容。挑战 Jax、Mason 和 Reed，展开回合制三消对决，积累元素 MP，解锁早期关系奖励，并抢先感受完整劲敌阵容。

4777260.title: Golden Magnet: Pilot Episode
4777260.short_description: 召集你的伙伴，拿起超强磁铁，准备被发射出去。拉动、排斥，在空中连续移动。穿过迷宫和跑酷关卡。一起飞，也一起摔。赢下大奖：Golden Magnet！

4654150.title: PULSARI
4654150.short_description: 一款讲究精准操作的街机节奏游戏，音乐不会自动响起，除非你亲手赢得它。从四个方向击打节拍，逐层构建每首曲目；守住节奏，因为一次失误就可能让音乐崩塌。

4634520.title: CatBun Idle
4634520.short_description: Tap and idle your way through 40 areas with adorable catgirl and bunny girl companions! Level up your crew, trigger powerful skills, and prestige for Stardust in this cute pixel art idle RPG with a full original soundtrack.

2115340.title: Shale
2115340.short_description: Discover the abandoned world of Shale in this 1-3 player action adventure. Shoot, craft and loot through cities of possessed creatures, industrial parks of corrupted bodies and fields of forgotten souls.

4777930.title: Valdrax Beyond the Rift Demo
4777930.short_description: Build a kingdom from nothing, forge your armies, and breach the rifts between worlds. Face endless enemies, recruit legendary creatures, and prepare for the ultimate battle against the Demon Lord. Every map is different. Every death is permanent.

4208890.title: Cosmic Rays
4208890.short_description: Jump and shoot in this 2D platformer to destroy the hivemind controlling the aliens that are attacking Earth. Hopefully nothing goes wrong on this mission...

4728870.title: Wizard Balls Demo
4728870.short_description: A game about bouncing balls. Get upgrades and unique types of balls to throw into an arena to defeat enemies. Use spells to mess with your balls in this chaotic physics sim game.

4674130.title: The Lakeview Orb 2: Consequences
4674130.short_description: A linear first‑person psychological horror game focused on completing objectives, exploring environments, and progressing through visual cutscenes as you play as Dr. Jim in the next chapter of the Lakeview Orb story.

4736350.title: Pucked Up Demo
4736350.short_description: Welcome to the Pucked Up demo! Take your team through a 10 game regular season and see if you have what it takes to make the playoffs...

4747730.title: Swordcery Demo
4747730.short_description: A colossal blade has pierced the Earth, unleashing a storm of enchanted swords from the heavens. Collect and wield an arsenal of these spellbound blades, turning them against the very force that summoned them. In this roguelike ARPG, you will defy the Celestial evil consuming the world!

4739900.title: Army Air Corps Demo
4739900.short_description: A top‑down arcade shooter with WWII‑inspired aircraft. Fight Solo or 2‑player Co‑op with your friends. Shoot through waves of enemy planes, dodge bullets, and master each Pacific theatre mission. Make it back safe to the carrier!

4779270.title: モノクリ Demo
4779270.short_description: White or Black— A world painted in just two colors. Toggle the colors of your character and the blocks to "forge" your path to the goal in this brand-new puzzle experience.

4638220.title: Greywind's Legacy - A Text Based, Skill Progression, RPG
4638220.short_description: This is a text based game that allows the player to step into the town of Alara as the grandson of the late Adventurer Greywind. Choose to avenge your Grandfather by killing the God Obcassus or to instead spend your time exploring the world and skilltree? Or maybe even both? The choice is yours!

3752560.title: Bob Saves the Princess
3752560.short_description: Bob Saves the Princess is a Roguelite about controlling the roguelite elements themselves. Build a path with special rooms, equip items, aid in battles and summon creatures to help Bob reach the end alive.

4749280.title: Band Of Heroes Demo
4749280.short_description: Band of Heroes is an action-adventure game in development, made to be played solo or with friends in host/client sessions. Face creatures, obtain equipment, complete missions, and strengthen your hero as the game continues to expand.

4780320.title: Maybe It Meant Something Demo
4780320.short_description: Platformer journeying a nightmare of meaning.

4125490.title: Teeth Cutter
4125490.short_description: A collection of short horror experiences meant to give you horror, disgust, curiosity, dread and much much more

1852980.title: ItLivesInTheWoods
1852980.short_description: ItLivesInTheWoods is a short first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find out what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

4757950.title: Under Tower Idle Demo
4757950.short_description: 在这款3D放置点击冒险游戏中，建造、扩张并自动化你的岛屿帝国。收集资源，训练部队，征服危险的地下城。

4600690.title: Cold Snap
4600690.short_description: Fast-paced multiplayer snowball battles where physics, chaos, and teamwork decide who survives the final showdown.

3032150.title: Frontier Legends
3032150.short_description: “Live your Wild West fantasy in Frontier Legends, an open-world frontier adventure where survival, crafting and exploration shape your story. Stake your claim, build your place in the West and uncover what lies beyond the rails.”

4752350.title: Protocol : Kill Switch Demo
4752350.short_description: 在这款 Digital-Noir Roguelite 中于主机系统中生存。甩开洋红腐化，在高风险神龛为你的代码超频，并与你升级后的 DAEMON 并肩作战。掌握高压武器，清除成群的掠食性逻辑体。在这个竞技场里，你不是漏洞——你就是病毒。

4684600.title: Watching the Sky
4684600.short_description: 看云，控制天气，播放音乐，然后假装这正是你今晚原本计划要做的事。Watching the Sky 是一款平静的观察类沙盒游戏，没有战斗，没有任务，也完全没有压力。

4566040.title: Raining Cats and Dogs Demo
4566040.short_description: It’s literally raining cats and dogs. In this game you platform, overcome about 100 unique obstacles, fight 3 janky bosses, find comments added from YouTube Shorts and make it stop raining cats and dogs by fighting Jeff in the end. Here's a message from Jeff: "YOU WILL NEVER STOP ME YEEEHAWWW"

4633990.title: Vem, Exu Demo
4633990.short_description: 一款短篇叙事互动体验，你将解开简单的谜题，探索一个情绪化为互动的世界。制作风筝，连接星座，并直面由自身愤怒引发的风暴。

4456580.title: Triple Chess Demo
4456580.short_description: Triple Chess reimagines classic chess with three stacked boards and vertical movement, creating deeper strategy, new tactics, and thrilling multi-level battles.

4681810.title: Shipped In Space
4681810.short_description: A space faring maze game where you must guide your little ship home through a treacherous field of asteroids

4654030.title: Animilf Puzzle
4654030.short_description: Relax with a stylish jigsaw puzzle game featuring suggestive anime artwork of confident mature women. Choose from multiple images, sort by category, play across three difficulty levels, and beat your best completion times at your own pace.

4745110.title: MonsTile Demo
4745110.short_description: 为了躲避凶残的冒险者，你来到了这片宁静的小森林！然而，冒险者们很快就会找到这里... 在 8x8 的棋盘上战略性地部署你的怪物，击退来袭的冒险者，守护这片温馨的森林吧！

4075610.title: Dung Battles
4075610.short_description: An action puzzle game where you play as a dung beetle, battling against your beetle peers to create the biggest dung ball. Battle online to test your ball rolling skills, strategically roll up items to win in challenge mode, or follow a young beetle's journey home in story mode.

4688440.title: Galactic Pit Stop Simulator Demo
4688440.short_description: Run the busiest fuel station on the edge of known space. Refuel incoming ships, trade goods in your market and hangar, upgrade your station, and keep travelers happy — solo or with up to 3 friends in online co-op. Build the ultimate galactic pit stop.

3635830.title: Richard
3635830.short_description: Welcome to Rose Academy, home to the brightest students in the world! Play as the new transfer student, George, as he embarks on his campaign against Richard, the most popular kid in school. Develop friendships, master your grades, and talk your way to earning the title of Prom King!

2345430.title: Escape From Crimson Manor: Trapped Together
2345430.short_description: 在"Trapped Together"中携手逃离庄园，这是一场以剧情为导向的双人合作解谜战役，这里逻辑至上，且没有死亡的威胁。沟通交流，通过送餐电梯交换物品，并解开错综复杂的谜题。

3215290.title: Alien Market Simulator
3215290.short_description: 在你的太空站经营市场。修复并升级太空站，扩展服务，并向各种外星顾客销售商品。体验在太空中管理企业和扩大市场的挑战。

4611070.title: Backrooms Game Creator
4611070.short_description: Backrooms Game Creator lets you build and explore your own liminal horror worlds. Design levels, customize enemies, lighting, and items, and create unique experiences—from quiet, eerie spaces to intense survival scenarios.

4760590.title: Spaceman's Luck Demo
4760590.short_description: Do you have a Spaceman's Luck? A space strategy game.

4673040.title: Week of the MEP
4673040.short_description: A tiny, fan-made visual novel featuring Pavolia Reine. Experience a working week filled with unexpected encounters and humor behind the peafowl persona.

1331180.title: Destructive Contraptions
1331180.short_description: Destructive Contraptions是一个物理沙盒游戏。你可以用多米诺骨牌、大炮和转轴拼凑出各种疯狂的机械，引爆超级壮观的连锁反应。在这里，你可以尽情设计混乱的发明，把整座巨型城市夷为平地——而且完全不用担心现实中的法律责任，更没有生命危险！

4749780.title: Pegfinity Demo
4749780.short_description: One shot can trigger a massive chain reaction. Launch, bounce, and break the board in this physics-based incremental. Upgrade your build, stack combos, and push every run further into chaos.

4092730.title: Aurora's Awakening
4092730.short_description: In a mysterious castle, sorceress Aurora has been asleep for centuries. Able to summon powerful Elementals to fight by her side, Ever must protect the fortress from monsters and its most‑sought‑after secret while trying to discover who was responsible for Aurora’s slumber and find a way to wake her.

4045370.title: Anomaly Zone Renovation
4045370.short_description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

4617040.title: Backrooms: Into the Hole
4617040.short_description: Discover an in-between space inspired by the Backrooms series. Make your way forward by jumping into holes, find alternative paths, and survive in this labyrinthine dimension. Play solo or in co-op mode and choose your path to the exit… if there is one.

4078360.title: When We Arrive
4078360.short_description: 一段合作旅程，穿越奇幻世界，所有事都一起出错。没有战斗，只有糟糕的决定、被偷的口粮、哥布林绑架，以及朋友会来救你的那份绝望期盼。

3621620.title: Project Confluence
3621620.short_description: Jump, jetpack, wall run and grapple your way through 3D environments in a race against time. Swap between parallel worlds to add or remove platforms in your way to reach the goal and complete your simulation of Project Confluence.

2369760.title: 17.waves TD
2369760.short_description: 《17.waves》是一款适合 2 到 4 名玩家游玩的在线合作塔防游戏。与队友一起制定战略、建造、升级和维护你的塔，保卫基地免收成群的敌方怪物攻击。

4711390.title: Bunker 14
4711390.short_description: Escape the bunker by ascending through its endless floors. Check each floor carefully for aberrations to return to the surface.

1925460.title: Truck Driver: The American Dream
1925460.short_description: 追逐美国梦，打造卡车司机的职业生涯！接受差事、解锁新卡车、购买新组件、驰骋于开阔的公路，让生活重回正轨，同时学着如何成为一名成功的卡车司机！

3589820.title: Don't Pop The Balloon
3589820.short_description: 与好友在这款基于物理的双人合作冒险中联手！通过控制你们之间的距离来操控脆弱的气球，穿越重重障碍。完美的同步是躲避陷阱的关键。你们能完成关卡而不弄破气球（或友谊）吗？

3505230.title: Soulblaze
3505230.short_description: Catch Animons and roll some dice in this cute creature-collecting roguelite! Build your team, train them well, and fight your way through several regions. Can you defeat all bosses?

4342480.title: Barely Alive Demo
4342480.short_description: A co-op survival party game. Hunt your friends or survive until sunrise.

4676590.title: Voxie Survivor Demo
4676590.short_description: 击溃兽潮、闪避虫群、营救幸存者，并在目标驱动的弹幕地狱中粉碎 Boss。打造超强武器组合，掌控混乱；只有真正的幸存者，才能征服一切。

4640620.title: Flux Ascendant
4640620.short_description: A fast-paced bullet-heaven roguelite where you tame the four elements. Draft cards, fuse them into game-changing builds, and survive endless waves across Fire, Lightning, Water and Earth, then face the chaotic Finale. Made by one developer, balanced by thousands of test runs.

4708860.title: Witch's Brew
4708860.short_description: Best played on a tablet or other touch screen, Witch's Brew is a 1-4 player game that is fun for everyone. Gather around the screen and be the first to collect all of the ingredients for your potion!

4688240.title: SHULERO – Dice Roguelike
4688240.short_description: 受 Yacht 启发的 Roguelike（快艇骰子）。掷骰子。打造组合。击败 Boss。作弊才能赢。

4506700.title: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina
4506700.short_description: Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife. Find out in this challenging puzzle platformer with a unique clock-stopping mechanic!

4712710.title: Knock Again Demo
4712710.short_description: This is not a normal clicker. It’s a psychological horror game where mechanical progress hides something dark, twisted, and unsettling. Knock on the door to earn money, upgrade your abilities, and keep knocking. It all seems simple… until it isn’t.

4418900.title: SHAWA
4418900.short_description: A typical shawarma stand. But the game notices where you're looking... and what you're ignoring. Endless shifts, a physics simulator, and a horror that only happens when you're not prepared.

4673420.title: Chickens. Chickens? Chickens!
4673420.short_description: 🐓 Fight ridiculous chicken hordes in a fast, casual arena shooter. 🐓 Move, dodge, shoot, survive waves, chase a better score, and try not to get buried in feathers.

4663700.title: CYBERMATRIX Demo
4663700.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

4358910.title: The Adventure of Lioh - The beginning of the End
4358910.short_description: Shortly after Lordbeni seizes power, Lioh's parents are murdered. The country descends into war. Join Lioh and Shay on a perilous adventure, traverse four dungeons, and confront Lordbeni in a story-filled journey brimming with secrets.

2613720.title: CYBERMATRIX
2613720.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

4558660.title: Momentum Fracture
4558660.short_description: Survive as long as you can in this fast-paced brick breaker / bullet hell. Each round unlocks unique upgrades that bend the rules of the game — every powerful buff comes with a risky trade-off.

4451550.title: Run & Dungeon Demo
4451550.short_description: Run & Dungeon is a fast paced incremental game where your party of fearless adventurers speed through dungeons in search of legendary loot. Smash through anything blocking your path to earn resources, unlock upgrades, learn powerful new abilities, and expand your team. Delve deep into the unknown...

4744220.title: Coralium Demo
4744220.short_description: 2.5D single player platformer demo game about a baby coral exploring a reef. In this demo you will use classic platformer mechanics like jumping, dashing and climbing. This time you will make sure to remain underwater because going out will make you run out of oxygen.

4764740.title: ArcaneBound Demo
4764740.short_description: ArcaneBound 是一款像素风 bullet heaven 动作 RPG。 收集魔宠，击败成群怪物，获取稀有卡牌，提升等级，并打造越来越毁灭性的构筑。

2995670.title: Reaper Actual
2995670.short_description: 《Reaper Actual》是一款开放世界持续型射击游戏。在饱受战火摧残的辽阔岛屿马罗瓦上,数百名玩家以Tier 1特战员「Reaper」的身份投入战场,彼此交锋,同时对抗占据全岛基础设施的5支NPC势力,在节奏紧凑的FPS战斗与PvPvE对抗中争夺主导权。借助海陆空载具穿梭于五种不同的生态环境,从高强度的HVT行动到稀有资源的采集,培养你的Reaper、经营自己的基地,完成任务以获取装备,并亲手改写这片土地的格局。

4704560.title: Beltmon Demo
4704560.short_description: From the endeavor of one broke solo dev, comes the parody creature collector rpg that will make you wonder if another international lawsuit is on the way. Travel through the world of Beltmon as a 31 years old unemployed person who's kicked out of their mom's attic and given their first Beltmon.

4708890.title: COLORFLY Demo
4708890.short_description: 当我们外出寻找自己的色彩时，主角"伍里"会得到什么答案？

4730340.title: Catapulteers Demo
4730340.short_description: A chaotic 1–4 player co-op physics comedy where cursed Catapulteers haul weird ammo, lose their heads, load one giant catapult, and stop a Troll that really hates catapults.

4339670.title: Ancient Adventure Demo
4339670.short_description: Venture forth! Evil has taken over the world. Equip your Weapon of Choice and venture forth. Journey out into the world to avenge your predecessors. Survive the hordes of monsters, seek out to extinguish the source of all Evil, so that one day, your people may finally live in peace.

4742360.title: Driving Test Simulator Demo
4742360.short_description: Test your driving skills by completing challenging driving tests and precise, skill-based scenarios.

4671930.title: Bannerlings Demo
4671930.short_description: Bannerlings is a strategy roguelike auto battler where you recruit, fuse, and customize units with emblems to build powerful synergies and overcome escalating, randomized encounters.

4622470.title: Trigonometric Equations Demo
4622470.short_description: Trigonometric Equations是一款严格的横向卷曲节奏游戏。解开三角方程，在漂浮点和曲线之间准确地飞来飞去！

4506210.title: FR分解端子導入作業に関する報告
4506210.short_description: A 3D Action Adventure: explore a rural island in Japan and defeat the enemies in the bottom of labyrinths.

4752700.title: Eslabong Demo
4752700.short_description: 在实时竞技场战斗中作战，经营你的俱乐部，在动作战斗与策略经营相结合的玩法中不断成长。招募佣兵，打造队伍，在联赛与杯赛中竞争，登上巅峰。

4144570.title: 试用版弹弹折射
4144570.short_description: 《弹弹折射》是一款益智游戏，你需要设置方块，改变子弹的路径，击碎目标。每关都要巧妙运用方格，让子弹射向不同方向，摧毁所有目标。

4745750.title: Craft & Deliver Demo
4745750.short_description: Run your own cozy garage workshop—craft handmade products, prepare customer orders, and deliver them to your neighbors while growing your small business.

1802370.title: Dang Darn Island
1802370.short_description: Dang Darn Island is a 1-4 player co-op roguelike adventure. Explore the procedurally generated island, delve deep into the temple, smash pots, dodge traps, and see if you can escape with the Gold Idol before the angry volcano loses his temper!

4404140.title: Moonlite - 1975
4404140.short_description: Get ready for a cosmic getaway with Moonlite - a lunar looting exploration expedition launching 1975. Grab your trusty shovel & spacesuit and start digging! The current version is Early Access v0.5 - pre-alpha - and includes a single map and game mode called 'Treasure Hunt'.

4621700.title: Monster Masher
4621700.short_description: 扔怪物。合成怪物。祈祷深坑别溢出来。Monster Masher是一款舒适又混乱的益智游戏，相同的生物合成更大的怪兽。打出连击，对抗Boss，假装你没上瘾。但你上瘾了。真的。

4681290.title: Unclouded Demo
4681290.short_description: Unclouded builds upon the simplicity of a minesweeper with some basic resource-management mechanics to create an engaging, replayable, singleplayer experience that feels both fresh and familiar.

4720380.title: 在线地球：Earth Online
4720380.short_description: 继《芝士财商》之后，宋雅网络第二款游戏《在线地球》来了。这是一款像素风多人联机生存游戏，你将与全球玩家共同生活在一颗圆形的像素地球上：收集资源、搭建庇护所、抵御黑夜生物，还要提防其他幸存者。游戏支持数十人同服协作或对抗，可组部落开荒，也可孤狼探险。动态天气、季节变化和完整的生活制造体系，加上地球自转带来的真实昼夜与资源分布，让生存充满变数。Steam即将上线，在这颗低像素、高自由的小小星球上，活出你的故事。

4505690.title: 49DAYS Demo
4505690.short_description: Become the host of an afterlife teahouse. For 49 days, serve the final cup to the departed. Experience a deep brewing system based on authentic traditions. Listen to the secrets of unique spirits, change their fates, and face the truth of your forgotten past.

4258760.title: Chainsaw Woods
4258760.short_description: 误入森林后，踏上逃离之路的生存恐怖游戏。作为舞台的森林在每次游玩时都会随机生成。支持最多 2 人多人联机。与同伴合作，设法逃离这片森林吧！

4626730.title: HEXED DELTA
4626730.short_description: You are a triangle. The world scrolls. Don't fall behind. HEXED DELTA is a fast-paced infinite platformer where everything - the player, the platforms, the enemies, the effects - are made from raw geometric shapes. No sprites. No textures. Just polygons, lines, and math.

4194800.title: 群星收割者 Starvester
4194800.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，围绕着扩展一个横跨整个恒星系统的工厂，在太空中建造巨型超级结构。部署成群的无人机，开采资源，解锁升级，并收集恒星的能量！

4725530.title: Cargo Lines Demo
4725530.short_description: Build a bustling railway network and juggle cargo transport in real time. New stations appear, the flow of goods shifts constantly, deadlines loom, and trains collide if you don't keep your eyes on them. Keep your cool and master the chaos as orders pile up, and every second counts.

4543800.title: 安西娅的正义
4543800.short_description: 时间是2248年。你扮演的是宇航公会的飞行员安西娅。她正在与一支海盗舰队作战。游戏中，你需要摧毁四艘敌方首领舰。

4699400.title: 异世界生活：餐厅&杂货店 Demo
4699400.short_description: 你被一股神秘力量召唤到了剑与魔法的奇幻世界中，幸运的是“它”为你提前筹备了一家刚开业的餐厅&杂货店。在成为一名传奇冒险者之前，先努力的经营这家店并存活下来吧。

4540450.title: HellSlave II: Judgment of the Archon Demo
4540450.short_description: 《地狱仆从II：神罚降临》是一款黑暗奇幻地牢探险游戏，你需在天堂净化世界前消灭所有恶魔领主。自定义角色、掌握残酷的回合制战斗，探索介于神罚与诅咒之间的末日世界。

2872760.title: Plant Budz 98
2872760.short_description: Raise a pet on a retro desktop. Then play as them across 4 completely different games.

4175920.title: Frontier: Path of Shadows Demo
4175920.short_description: 与敌人激战，升级你的小队，探索全新星球！在《Frontier: Path of Shadows》试玩版中做出艰难抉择，左右整个星区的命运。体验精心打造的25世纪世界，以及融合了X-COM与最终幻想风格的战术战斗。

2418490.title: Trakonius
2418490.short_description: In the merciless sands of the arena, a gladiator is forced to fight for survival. Trakonius defies Mars, the God of War, in this Action Roguelike experience! Face gladiators, mythological creatures, and deadly challenges across four brutal arenas. The truth can only be revealed through combat!

4581220.title: 反社会症候群 Demo
4581220.short_description: 你与七名陌生人被困在一座乡村宅邸中，被迫参与一场杀戮游戏。 对其他人而言，活下去的唯一方式是找出杀手。 而对你来说，亲爱的杀手，唯一的“活路”便是将他们全部杀死。

4606500.title: Signalfall
4606500.short_description: 迫降在一颗充满敌意的星球上，建造自动化资源开采前哨站以求生存。 保卫你的基地，管理电力网络，并将资源发送至轨道以解锁全新科技。

4671830.title: Mall Together Demo
4671830.short_description: Run your mall. Open new stores, sign contracts with leading brands, hire teammates, and meet customer needs. Play with friends or go solo, and enjoy the growth of your mall. You can open two stores in this demo version.

4735550.title: Eternal Dread Demo
4735550.short_description: Eternal Dread is a Medieval Dark Fantasy Horror game. You wake up in a dungeon. Everyone is gone. Have your premonitions finally come true? You must use what you can find around you to survive.

4515420.title: Curtain Call
4515420.short_description: Explore a cursed theater and persevere through all manners of dangers in this first-person survival horror game. Developed by third year students from Breda University of Applied Sciences.

4149320.title: 别碰蜗牛
4149320.short_description: 世界首款「反治愈系」放置游戏。你只有一条命。一只蜗牛将无休止地追逐你。一旦被它碰到，你将永远无法再次游玩。

4689630.title: Once Upon The Universe
4689630.short_description: Once Upon The Universe is a god-game that takes you to the VERY beginning of creation. You begin the game just seconds after the big bang, with nothing but an empty space and a lot of super hot hydrogen in the entire universe. Fill the universe with life and watch it thrive - or destory it.

4053960.title: Lexispell
4053960.short_description: Strategy meets physics, in this roguelike word game, where you combine spelling with cool upgrades to score high. Spell, m€rge, upgr@de, coz¥, combinati*ns, high$core, hippopotomonstrosesquipedaliophobia!

3070020.title: Automaton Heart
3070020.short_description: Automaton Heart is an RPG with platforming elements where you visit obscure and interesting places while upgrading your organs and strategizing about which items to bring along.

4717480.title: Snake
4717480.short_description: Features: - Classic score-based gameplay - Increasing difficulty over time - Simple, readable visual design - Fast restart and replay loop - Singleplayer arcade experience

4774570.title: Plateau Demo
4774570.short_description: Build and sculpt your own peaceful settlement in this relaxing city builder. A sandbox that lets you freely edit the terrain, add forests, rivers, paths and buildings without the pressure of resource management, timers or a fail state. It's pure creation, relaxation and admiring your little plateau.

4677940.title: Retail Rivals Demo
4677940.short_description: Build your retail empire inside a shopping mall. Open multiple stores, sabotage rivals, and play solo or with up to 8 players. Choose different match objectives or play endless mode and compete for retail domination.

4718970.title: 键启末日 Demo
4718970.short_description: 每一次敲击都是魔法的迸射！这是一款打字塔防游戏。在末日到来的圣地，你需要依托寄宿着远古神明的圣骸，通过快速且精准地打出古老的圣言，来激活其中沉睡的守护魔法，抵挡如潮水般涌来的末日怪物群。

3764940.title: 暴杀残雨之夜
3764940.short_description: 残雨之夜，给予爱或残忍在你一念之间。

3382310.title: Solis
3382310.short_description: Solis a hand drawn adventure. The city of Solis never sleeps — and tonight, neither will you. Elixer, the company you've dedicated yourself to, has gathered its people for an end-of-year celebration with a staggering promise at its heart: eternal life.

2868100.title: Shamania
2868100.short_description: 莎玛尼娅》是一款开放世界生存游戏，在游戏中，您将与朋友们共同创作、战斗和探索一个生机勃勃的沙盒世界。扩大您的基地，使其成为生存的枢纽，收集资源，掌握专业技能，从而解锁新的工具和机会！

3367830.title: Cemetery Simulator (Demo)
3367830.short_description: DEMO版的棺材当然是最便宜的松木！单人或与好友一起经营森林墓地。首先清理场地，然后拿起铁锹，挖出第一个墓坑并举办葬礼。看看你们中谁最擅长挥舞铁锹和打理墓碑吧！

4185080.title: System Ascension: Idle Core
4185080.short_description: Take control of The System. Master multiple interlocking power sources to build a singular, planetary engine in this narrative idle game. Features a fully voiced story, minimalist UI, and cross-platform play. The old world must fall for The System to rise.

4726510.title: Kiki's Nightmare Demo
4726510.short_description: An adventure RPG where you step in the shoes of a fearless hero. Navigate through unhospitable terrain, fierce enemies and save Kiki from her own terrifying dream!

4630050.title: Momo Don't Leave
4630050.short_description: 回到那座从未改变的小镇……以及本该已经死去的朋友身边。一部关于记忆，以及拒绝向前所要付出代价的心理恐怖视觉小说。

4753910.title: The Planetary Archive Demo
4753910.short_description: The Planetary Archive is a retro space survival game about grief. Explore the galaxy, maintain your space station, scavenge for replacement parts, and start to understand why you're out here.

4154230.title: Card Idle: Rise of the Eight
4154230.short_description: 收集卡牌、强化卡牌、构筑你的牌组。 战斗全程自动进行的放置型卡牌游戏。 玩家唯一的任务，就是“选择使用哪些卡牌”。 在由八大种族与其王统治的停滞世界中， 通过选择与牌组构筑改变纷争， 让文明再次向前推进。 放置的尽头，是策略与故事。

4737280.title: Total Blade: Mythology Demo
4737280.short_description: Gather soldiers on a 16th-century overworld map and lead over 1,300 troops in real-time TPS action. Manage your empire, command your army, and fight rival nations and mythical monsters in this grand-scale sandbox strategy.

4746470.title: WHISPERWOOD Demo
4746470.short_description: WhisperWood is a survival horror game inspired by the classics. Powered by Unreal Engine 5, it drops you into a nightmare where ammo is scarce and every shadow hides a threat. Solve puzzles, manage your inventory, and survive the darkness.

4385580.title: Primordio
4385580.short_description: 在虚空中求生。在这款 Roguelite 弹幕射击生存游戏中，控制一缕纯净的能量之火。用连锁闪电击穿蜂拥而至的原初实体，通过强力升级提升等级，努力活下去，直到揭开……PRIMORDIO 的秘密。

4672490.title: 魔塔国度 -Tower Realm- Demo
4672490.short_description: 《魔塔国度（Tower Realm）》是一款高策略性的魔塔 RPG 合集：固定地图与数值、自动回合制战斗、资源与路线精算。你可以硬核无补给通关，也可用“绿钥匙”降低难度；通关点数还能解锁自定义挑战，获得更强的挑战或是畅快开爽，随你喜欢！

3742920.title: 超载突围
3742920.short_description: 操控锈蚀机甲闯入未知区域，在快节奏俯视角生存动作中闪避敌潮、攻击升级。选择随机武器、技能强化和被动模块，组合不同战斗流派，击败 Boss，解锁新地图，在超载边缘杀出重围。

4573690.title: Auto Battle Girl Demo
4573690.short_description: 《战娘自走棋》是一款以戈尔大陆为背景的单机自走棋游戏，特色在于所有角色均为拥有超凡力量的女性生灵。游戏融合卡牌与肉鸽元素，玩家需收集并升级战娘，激活羁绊效果以提升战斗力。领袖和圣物作为战斗辅助，提供额外属性加成和特殊技能。玩家通过策略布局战娘站位，自动战斗直至消灭敌人。在这片神秘大陆上，体验独特的战斗魅力和策略对决！

3104000.title: 战娘自走棋
3104000.short_description: 《战娘自走棋》是一款以戈尔大陆为背景的单机自走棋游戏，特色在于所有角色均为拥有超凡力量的女性生灵。游戏融合卡牌与肉鸽元素，玩家需收集并升级战娘，激活羁绊效果以提升战斗力。领袖和圣物作为战斗辅助，提供额外属性加成和特殊技能。玩家通过策略布局战娘站位，自动战斗直至消灭敌人。在这片神秘大陆上，体验独特的战斗魅力和策略对决！

3932210.title: 节度使战略：安史之乱 Demo
3932210.short_description: 天宝十四载，安史兵变，祸起幽州，两京失守，叛军进逼灵州，形势岌岌可危。玩家将领朔方支营节度使之职，重整官军攻势，以对抗叛军，恢复大唐江山。

3831700.title: Endless TD
3831700.short_description: A simple yet unending tower defense game with a mix of idling and incremental progress. Tons of upgrades to purchase and endless progress to achieve.

4549080.title: MarbleFlow
4549080.short_description: MarbleFlow 是一款物理益智游戏，你需要放置各种装置和轨道，引导弹珠到达目标位置。 通过摆放物体并利用它们之间的互动来解决每个谜题。 在弹珠与装置发出的轻柔声音中，体验既平静又富有挑战性的解谜过程。

3807250.title: 深渊构筑
3807250.short_description: 卡牌构筑 + 自动战斗的 Roguelike 策略游戏。组建队伍，构筑卡组，在随机事件与多变规则中生存。 胜负取决于战前决策。每一次选择，都会影响你的构筑与命运。

4748090.title: Life of a Cockroach Demo
4748090.short_description: Yes, you’re a cockroach, so your top priority now is to survive. Explore an urban environment from a whole new perspective in this open-world 3D adventure filled with challenges, tasks, and dangers. Discover hidden places, master your skills, and become the ultimate survivor insect!

4687250.title: 你予我的羽翼和星辰 -Your Astrum, My Alae- Demo
4687250.short_description: 这是一部纯爱向、单女主、多结局视觉小说。游戏背景为大学校园，主题涵盖天文、钢琴、科研。两位主角均为大学高年级学生。即将毕业的学年里，他们在星空下偶然邂逅，又会擦出怎样的火花？本作包含国语、粤语双语配音。

3142840.title: Cochonnet
3142840.short_description: Play Pétanque online with your friends, the traditional french ball-throwing sport where 2 teams compete to land their metal balls closest to the target.

4276990.title: Dice Rogues Demo
4276990.short_description: Dice Rogues is a tactical roguelite with infinite possibilities where you upgrade your dice and harness unpredictable rogue faces (X2, baguette, croissant, etc.) to bend fate, outplay the House, and survive a new roll each run.

4550120.title: Hyper Sphere
4550120.short_description: 《Hyper Sphere》是一款高节奏的肉鸽（Roguelite）弹幕射击游戏。在邪恶方块的包围中射击、格挡与闪避。组合各种古怪道具打造“崩坏”级别的数值，将敌人的子弹格挡回去，击败最终 Boss。

3484850.title: 诈骗园区模拟器: 地下王国
3484850.short_description: 在混乱支配的城市中，建立并经营你的地下诈骗帝国。通过非法手段获取资源，招募并管理各类技能员工，扩张势力，自动化运营体系。在风险与利益之间做出抉择，揭开隐藏在城镇深处的黑暗秘密。

4697290.title: Penguin Rescue Run
4697290.short_description: A 3D platformer where you guide a penguin through obstacles, platforming challenges, and creative puzzles while exploring different environments filled with danger, precision jumps, and exciting challenges along the way.

4603660.title: The Sound of Piano Demo
4603660.short_description: A hardcore keyboard rhythm game featuring pure piano tracks. Every note you hit generates a real key sound for a true piano response. Designed for intermediate players and beyond, use our unique skill test algorithm to discover your rating. No AI-generated music, just raw human-crafted tracks.

4746270.title: Vocal Horror Stories - Gaja Demo
4746270.short_description: The first episode of a voice-sensitive episodic horror game, in which you play as Shivani, a young woman battling with phonophobia. Why did her mother go missing? Who is the elephant-headed entity she keeps seeing? Can you speak to him?

4128990.title: N.E.R.D
4128990.short_description: N.E.R.D is a story-driven escape room puzzle game, brought to life as a gripping interactive movie. Inspired by cult classic thrillers, this is an experience that will pull you in - and won’t let go. Dark, intense, and deeply unsettling, every moment pushes you further into the unknown.

4630180.title: 0KEY!
4630180.short_description: 0KEY! transforms the classic board game into a modern, competitive board game experience. Play with friends or match with players worldwide, level up, unlock exclusive cues, and prove you're the best. Are you ready to take your seat at the table?

2578960.title: 孤胆少女
2578960.short_description: 化身孤胆少女，在被异形与畸变怪物侵占的末世中，单枪匹马对抗无尽尸潮虫潮，收集资源升级军火库，用火力撕碎黑暗与血腥，体验肾上腺素狂飙的纯粹爽感！

4717260.title: Are You A Pilot
4717260.short_description: Are You A Pilot is a free-to-play neon arcade runner about speed, reflexes, and survival. Dodge obstacles, collect plasma, fire lasers, unlock skins, chase high scores, and jump into online squad runs.

4381410.title: Medic Please!
4381410.short_description: 最多4人的基于物理的在线合作救援模拟。搬运、拖拽、投掷——为了拯救病人不择手段！通过治疗赚取金钱并升级你的诊所。

4440740.title: 纸上征服者 Demo
4440740.short_description: 游戏与众不同的是放弃了六边形和四边形的地块儿。采用了更贴近现实的边境线这一部分完全为手工手绘 游戏剧情、在二战中扮演指挥官，在20回合内占领全部敌方地块 游戏时长，每个关咔5min，轻松休闲

4045560.title: The Goddess's Will Demo
4045560.short_description: Dive into a 2.5D isometric action RPG adventure inspired by late-90s and early-00s classics. Face cunning enemy factions, explore a layered world filled with vivid characters, mythic stories, and handcrafted environments. Immerse yourself in a dangerous and unforgiving golden age of power fantasy.

4187670.title: 大尸的自我修养
4187670.short_description: 这是一场在末日生存中展开的非凡冒险。你将扮演一名拥有操控丧尸能力的小女孩。这种力量既是武器也是钥匙，你需要策略性地号令亡者，破解环境谜题，突破层层险阻，最终揭开哥哥失踪的真相。

4511980.title: Meow Over Moo
4511980.short_description: Unleash tactical mayhem in a ruthless cat-vs-cow board game! Experience cute, 1v1 pure strategy with symmetric factions, deterministic combat, and zero first-player advantage. From relaxed play to competitive mastery, every move counts in this perfectly balanced, turn-based showdown.

4159130.title: New Folder
4159130.short_description: You log on to a computer having no clue of what lies within. Explore its files, solve puzzles to recover missing pieces, and decipher passwords to enter otherwise prohibited folders. As you delve deeper into its content, you’ll find that there is a greater mystery to be solved.

4705040.title: Medium Chronicles: Room 644 Demo
4705040.short_description: 你必须说话才能生存。但说话可能杀死你。对着麦克风低语仪式 — 而恶魔正在追捕你发出的每一个声音。

3639440.title: 史莱姆矿难 Into the Slimy Mines
3639440.short_description: 一款融合卡牌玩法的 roguelike 塔防游戏！你的飞船迫降到了一颗史莱姆横行的卫星上，你需要保护矿区并营救船员。购买卡牌和补充包，扩建隧道，发掘强力组合，踩扁那些烦人的史莱姆。挖掘、建造、防守——最终离开这颗该死的卫星！

4208520.title: RoboDeal Simulator Prologue
4208520.short_description: 在冰封星球赛拉里斯9号上设计、制造并交易机器人。效忠阵营，升级设施，在《机器人交易模拟器》中铸就你的机械传奇。

4291500.title: 春日狂想曲：情窦初开的秘密
4291500.short_description: 女子高中生加藤詩为了帮助摄影师男友，她开始接触形形色色的人与不同的世界，也逐渐发现自己内心深处从未察觉的另一面。在欲望与选择交织的故事中，她将迎来怎样的结局，取决于你的选择~

3040460.title: 卡牌修真：九宫幻境录 Demo
3040460.short_description: 《卡牌修真：九宫幻境录 Demo》是一款基于卡牌交互设计的修仙生存游戏，你因意外坠落到吸取寿命的幻境中，但这里灵气充沛，作为凡人的你，必须抓住这次仙缘，在幻境中提升境界，学习各种功法和炼制丹药法器。但同时也需要迎接来自恶劣天气、温饱生存、妖兽血月等各种挑战，找寻逃离之法！

4754840.title: Human: Profit Demo
4754840.short_description: An accurate depiction of our world, baked into a short, classic incremental game. Take over Grandpa's farm, rebuild the town, and do whatever it takes to succeed. Also rabbits.

3692490.title: Revive & Repeat
3692490.short_description: 《Revive & Repeat》是一款卡牌类 Roguelike 地牢探索游戏，你可以组合增益与神器，打造疯狂的构筑，挑战首领，并在排行榜上与其他玩家竞争——每一次死亡都让你更强大。

4515660.title: Control, I'm Not Coming Back
4515660.short_description: Control, I'm Not Coming Back is a short and emotional narrative game about a lost astronaut searching for a reason to keep going forward while facing the emptiness of space. Inspired by the Hopecore aesthetic, it’s a story about positivism, friendship and our human connection with Voyager 1.

4736550.title: Orc Incremental Demo
4736550.short_description: 从一名兽人出发，建立一支势不可挡的黑暗军团，征服世界。在这款放置自动战斗游戏中，完善你的阵型，召唤强大的野兽，解锁强力升级，每次重生后愈发强大。

4685890.title: Echoes of Creation: Origin
4685890.short_description: An open-world 3D action RPG with real-time combat, class advancement, and loot-driven progression.

4307340.title: 萝莉忍者村
4307340.short_description: 一夕之间被毁灭家园的巨魔愤而决定向这群萝莉忍者復仇。 潜入忍者之里，教训这群嚣张的小鬼吧！

4254560.title: 3876 AD: Corruption
4254560.short_description: A hardcore military sci-fi survival roguelike set in the post-apocalyptic world of 3876 AD. Engage in tense tactical combat, scavenge for resources, complete dangerous quests, and explore an immersive lore full of dark themes and meaningful decisions.

4768060.title: ONE SKILL - Drive or Fall Demo
4768060.short_description: Test your skills on various platforms and obstacles built high in the sky! Master your driving as you maneuver through thrilling challenges and perilous situations to reach the finish line.

3711170.title: 冰点之下
3711170.short_description: 一场寒潮将整个世界冰封，三位性格迥异的女孩闯入了你的生活。你将带领她们踏上这片极寒死地的冒险之路！当丧尸低吟化作呢喃挽歌，当暴风雪模糊了善恶边界。前方等待你们的究竟是希望还是阴谋？而此刻，那枚决定命运的骰子，正在你的指间发烫...

4550330.title: ハムタンク！
4550330.short_description: This is a top-down shooting game where a small and adorable hamster pilots a gigantic tank to fight off enemies. Players control the tank from a bird’s-eye view, shooting at enemies that attack from all directions while progressing through each stage.

4707120.title: VoxelMancy
4707120.short_description: Online voxel sandbox where you can build anything imaginable. Forget simple cubes – sculpt slopes, curves, and structures of any size with many realistic materials. Your imagination is the only limit!

4761200.title: Swish Ball Clicker Demo
4761200.short_description: 一款超可爱画风的像素护肝篮球放置挂机游戏，每次点击即是得分。升级球员、自动投篮，在轻松的2D独立球场上从默默无闻的菜鸟一步步成为全明星。非常适合在工作摸鱼时在后台挂机运行。

4707930.title: Shadow Saw Us
4707930.short_description: After their grandfather’s passing, Bell and Mark inherit the burden he left behind as the spirits he once sealed begin to break free. With the help of Banana, a Tani spirit and his old friend, they must help people, search for enchanted blades, and face dangerous spirits like Isacus.

4622230.title: ALBERO
4622230.short_description: ALBERO是一款第三人称动作游戏，在游戏中，你可以破坏覆盖战场的六边形地形来采集资源，并突破如潮水般涌来的怪物。不要害怕倒在蜂拥而至的敌人面前。死亡只不过是让你成为更强大的战士并通关章节的崭新起点。要不要一起去狠狠教训一下那些看扁你娇小可爱外表的怪物们？

4452480.title: Caldra
4452480.short_description: 构筑牌组、战术博弈与惊险逆转——终极对战卡牌游戏！ 通过买卖卡牌强化你的牌组，向胜利发起挑战。是干扰对手，还是抓住时机发起决定性一击？ Caldra 是一款以策略与心理博弈为核心的对战型卡组构筑游戏。

4750060.title: Dry Meadow Demo
4750060.short_description: Fight, sneak & scavenge your way through the first level of Dry Meadow. Light fires, drink vodka and smoke cigarettes in shaky hideouts.

4654390.title: Up-Beat!! Demo
4654390.short_description: Up-Beat!! is an action-packed boxing game heavily inspired by Punch-Out!! - take on the first 4 fights of the intro circuit in this tough-as-nails demo of the game!

4741060.title: Anomalous Object Demo
4741060.short_description: 与外界完全隔绝的警卫室。你必须服从命令，彻底搜查这间密室。仅凭有限的装备与线索，找出隐藏的“异常实体”并查明其真面目。 请记住：当你在观察它时，它也正在暗处注视着你。

3972160.title: Cat Vs Slime 猫咪大战史莱姆
3972160.short_description: 创新重力叠叠乐塔防！猫咪可层层堆叠，组成高塔攻击空中敌人。史莱姆从地面、传送门穿梭而来，左右两路夹击猫屋。18 种猫咪、36 道关卡，用策略搭建最强防线，守护喵星家园！

4385450.title: Bullet Spell Demo
4385450.short_description: 在这款充满魔幻色彩的间谍惊悚游戏中，躲避、穿梭并协调行动，在枪林弹雨和敌人的包围中杀出一条血路！同时操控双胞胎姊妹奥罗拉和索拉娜，考验你的多工处理能力；或与第二名玩家共享控制权，共同合作，确保双胞胎姊妹的生存。

2727870.title: GrigoriNightDragon
2727870.short_description: GrigoriNightDragon is a captivating RPG set in Elyria's fantasy realm. Discover quests, adventures, and formidable dragons guarding castles. Multiple endings ensure endless replayability and a multitude of challanges awit you on your journey!

4741050.title: Gravitten Demo
4741050.short_description: 免费试玩来袭！操控反重力小猫 Gravitten，驾驭环境中变幻莫测的物理法则。抢先体验完整版 5 大特色生态区中的 2 个，通过操控重力与视角，解开精妙复杂的谜题。

4689610.title: F.R.E.D.'s Ascent
4689610.short_description: A 2.5D rage platformer. Nine zones, each with its own physics — ice, wind, sticky floors, low gravity. You are F.R.E.D., a small machine kept asleep beneath a world that never wanted you to wake. Climb anyway. Wanderer, No-Save, and Speedrun modes.

4590750.title: The Retro Exorcist
4590750.short_description: You've been hired to perform exorcisms on all sorts of entities. The only thing you can't seem to understand is...why do they all haunt video games?

4256800.title: AI守护天使 AI Eternal Companion Demo
4256800.short_description: 手机里的AI突然出现在了你的身边，并且她们之间似乎爆发了一些矛盾 这款游戏是一个AI恋爱游戏，游戏连接了DeepSeek，豆包等知名AI。在玩这款游戏的时候，玩家可以和Deepseek女友和豆包女友自由对话，不同AI之间也可以互相交流互动，对话的内容将影响AI的游戏内行为以及游戏剧情的整体走向。AI还具备篡改游戏代码，根据玩家需求更改游戏程序参数的功能~ 在游戏中，曾协同互动的AI伙伴DeepSeek因未知异常突然黑化，成为打破世界平衡的存在。

4761290.title: Subject: Escape Demo
4761290.short_description: Escape a mysterious laboratory in a 2.5D puzzle platformer. Solve challenges, navigate experimental rooms, and find your way out.

4725820.title: 谋圣
4725820.short_description: 孙子知道你手里每张牌。凯撒的第一手免费。16 位历史名将，每位改写规则。在 11×11 棋盘上落子抢领土像围棋，再打卡牌改写规则。15 分钟一局。无刷怪、无运气抽卡。只有两颗脑袋的较量。

4780920.title: Delta Demo
4780920.short_description: Delta is a first-person movement-heavy platformer game focused on physics-based traversal, speedrunning, and mechanical mastery. And somewhere ahead, the one you lost is still waiting.

4631430.title: 寻找兔子2
4631430.short_description: 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，在满是兔兔的主题地点，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱兔兔和30根萝卜，你能找到它们全部吗？

3266880.title: Chicken TD: Defenders of the Coop
3266880.short_description: Chicken TD is a unique tower defense game where you strategically summon and upgrade creature towers to defend your coop from waves of enemies, while also engaging in Souls-like melee combat with a chosen weapon to directly hold the line and collect meta-progression currency.

4778590.title: NIGHTMIST Demo
4778590.short_description: Experience a high-fidelity nightmare in the NIGHTMIST Demo, a tactical PvE action-horror game. From a gritty body-cam perspective, navigate a terrifying world cloaked in dense fog. Use stealth, resource management, and tactical precision to outsmart intelligent AI hunting you from the dark.

4783260.title: Decide Your Fate: Prologue
4783260.short_description: 《Decide Your Fate》是一款令人神经紧绷的心理恐怖游戏，讲述的是逃离一栋梦魇般的房子。你必须悄无声息地行动，通过躲避一个盲眼杀手来确保自己成功逃脱。

4752620.title: Hopfinity Demo
4752620.short_description: Grapple to infinity as Hop! Ascend endless caves, castles & skies, dodging explosive Bombarders and enemy turret fire in this pixel-perfect vertical action-platformer! Enjoy this DEMO as the full game nears completion!

4448820.title: Iron Fuse: Field Test Demo
4448820.short_description: Run along walls and grapple around in the machine apocalypse of 3003. Survive against awful machines in this electrifying physics-based movement shooter demo.

4704400.title: Grill Your Friends Prematch
4704400.short_description: Grill your friends as cute marshmallow bears in a 2-4 player local party game! Enjoy the screams of your former friends as you march into victory!

4690200.title: Darklords: Siegefront Demo
4690200.short_description: Pick Human or Demon in a real-time strategy game with twelve units and faction skills per race, custom six-unit armies, and a multi-difficulty campaign. Finish the campaign to unlock Challenge Mode and top your records.

3655670.title: Vesperis
3655670.short_description: Vesperis 是一款第一人称恐怖游戏，带领玩家踏上一段充满神秘与恐惧的旅程。探索黑暗的环境，解开谜题，揭开隐藏其中的秘密。沉浸于一个充满黑暗秘密与恐怖的故事，历史背后藏着种种恐怖。

4704880.title: Chained Bikes
4704880.short_description: Chained Bikes 是一款合作游戏，每位玩家都将化身为自行车本身。你们被同一条链条连接在一起，必须一起移动、保持平衡、配合节奏，并互相帮助，穿越危险的障碍，最终抵达终点。

4235990.title: Mine Runner
4235990.short_description: A chaotic 2D co-op dungeon adventure. Dig traps, get treasures, outsmart mummies and survive together in an Egyptian pyramid.

4536970.title: Fish House Simulator
4536970.short_description: 捕捞、烹饪……或者暗中出售。🎣 在 Fish House 中，尽情钓鱼、烹饪，并快速为顾客上菜！升级你的装备，捕捉更有价值的鱼类，不断扩大并经营你的餐厅。并非一切都是合法的——有些鱼风险很高，但回报也更加丰厚。每条鱼都会被端上餐桌……但也有一些会悄悄从后门离开。

4620980.title: Nights of the Sleeping God
4620980.short_description: Highly moddable classical roguelike with persistence dungeons and fully simulated physics and chemistry.

4700390.title: MUTS NO TYPO
4700390.short_description: Enter a dystopian typing contest where speed, accuracy, and obedience are measured. Type carefully. Continue when instructed. Pay attention. GLORY TO THE HAND THAT NEVER SHAKES.

4610900.title: Bubble Shooter but In Space and Incremental Demo
4610900.short_description: A short, satisfying incremental game about flying through space, popping bubbles, and harvesting Bubble Matter. Build combos, land skillshots for massive multipliers, and spend your loot in a sprawling upgrade shop.

4774150.title: Organize my Shop Demo
4774150.short_description: 为商店带来完美的秩序！在货架之间切换，并在传送带上的堆积物中找到正确的商品。严格按照标签分类起司、肉类珍饈、香气四溢的糕点和甜点。享受完美秩序的瞬间！

4771110.title: Sisyphus Conviction Demo
4771110.short_description: Sisyphus Conviction is a Clicker Game about walking up Mountain, dragging a Rock from the Underworld. Based on the Greek Myth of the King Sisyphus who tried to defy Death. Now doomed for Eternity, join Sisyphus on this adventure with a Click, Upgrade, Repeat system.

4750660.title: Scapewatch: Idle MMO Demo
4750660.short_description: 28 skills. Three combat styles. Clans, raids, hiscores, pets, capes. Set up your queue, close the tab, come back richer. Scapewatch is the idle MMO for people who actually like the grind.

4761920.title: Tag! Demo
4761920.short_description: TAG! is a fast-paced 2-8 player multiplayer parkour game of tag. Sprint, vault, wall run and outplay friends to avoid being It when the timer hits zero, then customize your loadout with upgrades to your movement and game-changing Ultimates.

4264040.title: Habit Puzzles Demo
4264040.short_description: This free demo contains the game's tutorial and 5 jigsaw puzzles to help you decide if you'll enjoy the full Habit Puzzles experience.

4720860.title: Backrooms: The Wrong Door
4720860.short_description: Backrooms: The Wrong Door is a cooperative psychological horror game for 1–4 players. A single wrong door leads you into a shifting nightmare where reality feels broken, familiar places become hostile, and every step forward may bring you closer to something watching from the dark.

4701270.title: Oathguard Demo
4701270.short_description: Defy hordes of undead as a paladin. Strike, dodge, and chain devastating abilities through cursed graveyards in this action roguelike. Evolve your Oath, collect ancient relics and unleash deadly combos every run.

4699140.title: Tiles & Vials Demo
4699140.short_description: Merge weapons, shields and potions while moving through a strategic roguelike board battler. Collect 50+ unique artifacts, create game-breaking synergies and outsmart deadly bosses.

4676320.title: Intergalactic Puzzle Touchdown Demo
4676320.short_description: Intergalactic Puzzle Touchdown is a turn-based PvP puzzle game that fuses the familiar mechanics of classic match-3 games with the excitement of gridiron football. Match tiles to earn yards, dodge your opponent's blockers, and create Big Plays to light up the scoreboard!

4345530.title: 收冠之战 Demo
4345530.short_description: 这是一款流程简单的增量塔防游戏。培养并强化你的军队，以便能从无穷无尽的敌人的攻击下保卫自己的王国。

3269380.title: Roll'N With Da Punchez
3269380.short_description: "Roll'N With Da Punchez" is a stylistic, physics-based platformer with a unique twist! Punch a ball through challenging obstacle courses, and get to the goal as fast as you can!

4498650.title: Covert X Universe
4498650.short_description: Enter an online multiplayer combat sandbox where players battle on different worlds. Fight, survive, and prove who is strongest

4755320.title: Upmadillo Demo
4755320.short_description: You are an armadillo. You need to go up. Make precise jumps, master the physics, and reach the top without falling. That's it. Good luck.

4719990.title: DICEPATH Demo
4719990.short_description: DicePath is a puzzle game where every move costs Action Points. Plan your route, collect dice to stay alive, and reach the exit before you run out. 50 handcrafted levels. One resource. No margin for error.

2212680.title: Evil Of Fate
2212680.short_description: Welcome to Rotterwood Town. No one leaves this place. There is only one goal in this cursed village: complete the ritual and send the witch back to hell. Tarot cards, needle-pierced dolls, hidden ciphers. Team up with up to four players, unravel the mystery — but never let the witch catch you.

4717400.title: Otpisani: Nightingale Demo
4717400.short_description: A retro shooter game inspired by an old TV show. You play as a part of the resistance movement fighting the German occupation in a set of explosive missions while experiencing an exciting story.

4776300.title: Fury of the Axe Demo
4776300.short_description: Play the demo of Fury of the Axe: a brutal action RPG where rage is your only weapon. Fight through a cursed world, break your enemies, and unleash the fury within.

4101210.title: The Legend of You
4101210.short_description: Shape a fantasy realm with your words. Choose your hero’s tale, recruit, train, and equip allies, and battle through turn-based encounters of your own design. Each victory writes your legend, each choice brings you closer to the ultimate treasure.

3239060.title: Project Berserk Demo
3239060.short_description: The fight for the future starts now. Fight with or against your friends with crazy sci-fi tech, innovative mechanics, and a classic yet colorful retro feel!

4750070.title: Tribal Trouble: Resurrected Demo
4750070.short_description: The most troublesome RTS returns, free forever. Easy to pick up, tough to put down. Play as Vikings or Natives, build your tribe, and battle across randomly generated islands with up to 12 players online. A community-driven revival of a cult classic. Come cause some trouble!

4756560.title: G-Vora Demo
4756560.short_description: 高速反重力竞速,手工编写的物理带来直接利落的操作。沿着蓄能带滑行充能,用近战攻击把对手撞出赛道,与好友本地分屏对战。独立的战斗模式提供武器玩法。推荐使用手柄。

4751640.title: The Twisted Zone Demo
4751640.short_description: A collection of two short stories filled with mystery and confusion.

4741190.title: Seven Seas Jewels 2 Collector's Edition Demo
4741190.short_description: 在《Seven Seas Jewels 2 Demo》中开启一场充满危险、神秘与黑暗魔法的冒险！体验冒险故事的开篇章节，包含 16 个精心制作的 match-3 关卡，以及约 30-40 分钟的游戏内容，陪伴 Polly 踏上解除 Narissa 诅咒的旅程。

3929780.title: 生化美少女 Demo
3929780.short_description: 这是一款美少女丧尸 TPS 游戏。美月在冰冷的冷冻舱中苏醒，却发现太空设施已陷入混乱——血迹斑驳的墙壁、刺耳的警报声，以及徘徊在走廊中的丧尸。孤身一人的她必须生存、探索、破解机关，并揭开神秘实验背后的真相。

4765320.title: Cubic Haikus: Hikikomori Demo
4765320.short_description: Trapped inside your monitor, navigate your fragmented mind in this minimalistic physics-based narrative puzzle. Shift your color to manipulate the world around you and uncover the hidden haikus that will guide you through a poetic journey into yourself.

4751900.title: Harvest Looper Demo
4751900.short_description: 收获植物，解锁升级，通过技能树、天赋和强力收集器扩展你的成长循环。收集碎片，完成隐藏图鉴并优化你的放置成长。

4367540.title: DAMex : Dark Matter Exodus Demo
4367540.short_description: A challenging solo extraction shooter set in a hostile sci-fi world. Play as Quinn, a Dark Matter harvester stranded on planet Viridan — surrounded by deadly robots, fearsome bosses, hostile wildlife, and corporate lies. Harvest. Fight. Escape.

4747020.title: Center Of The Galaxy: Desktop Idle Demo
4747020.short_description: An idle pixel-art space game. Your ship travels toward the center of the galaxy on its own asteroids get in the way. Break them, upgrade your ship, unlock new ones. Reach the center, and the next universe begins harder than the last.

4310660.title: 100 Music Cats
4310660.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4719590.title: 汪里个狼 Wolf in Woof Demo
4719590.short_description: 《汪里个狼》的核心概念是“狗狗中藏着狼”。玩家会进入一个由狗狗角色组成的狼人杀对局，在看似可爱的角色关系中，通过发言、怀疑、站边、投票和身份推理，找出隐藏其中的狼人。我们希望给玩家营造一个高智商博弈，且不用组局，没有社交压力的狼人杀游戏 视觉上，项目走原创手绘狗狗角色方向，用可爱狗狗与悬疑推理之间的反差从而降低上手压力，同时保留心理博弈的紧张感。正式版方向上，我们希望继续扩展技能卡、NPC 解锁、特色模式和局外成长，让玩家在多局游玩中逐步认识、解锁并利用不同性格和行为风格的狗狗 NPC。

4752150.title: Death Comes Skiing Demo
4752150.short_description: When a retired cross-country ski team meets to celebrate their past victories, the past soon catches up to them. It's up to you to make sense of the slaughter that follows in this comedic point-and-click murder mystery.

4617340.title: Doctor Pigeon Simulator Demo
4617340.short_description: This is an action-comedy game. Manage your own hospital, treat patients, and defend your hospital against trolls. Make quick decisions in emergencies, perform CPR, open new areas, and improve your skills. A chaotic but fun hospital simulation experience awaits you!

4718430.title: 魔王的后宫~异世界温柔乡~ Demo
4718430.short_description: A turn-based Japanese RPG where players take on the role of a demon king to help goblins defeat the human army.

4768430.title: Void Commander: Armada Demo
4768430.short_description: Lead your fleet in a roguelite auto-battler where commanders define your strategy. Build your armada, adapt every run, and survive against an overwhelming alien swarm.

4725320.title: Blood in the Ice
4725320.short_description: Investigate a death aboard a trapped 1859 Arctic whaling ship in a bleak historical visual novel about evidence, hunger, trust, and the cost of telling the truth.

4725270.title: Signal Snow
4725270.short_description: Signal Snow is a paranoid Antarctic visual novel about a radio signal from beneath the ice, impossible memories, and a crew that may not survive its own fear. Decide who to trust, who to isolate, and whether to answer.

4651070.title: Red Clicker
4651070.short_description: Click the triangle. Watch the counter rise. Unlock 100 Steam achievements — from your very first click to one trillion. Simple, satisfying, and endlessly clickable. How far will you go?

4563360.title: BünzliFight: Swiss City Simulator
4563360.short_description: Cooperative real time city building simulator with Swiss flair. Build a town together manage resources and budgets solve quirky everyday problems and experience a world that keeps running even when you are offline.

4238380.title: Craft. Sell. Goblin. Repeat. Demo
4238380.short_description: 建造并经营属于你的哥布林店铺。通过小游戏制作独特武器并谈判价格。雇佣工人协助你的生意。成为王国中最富有的商人。

4738070.title: Bad Range Demo
4738070.short_description: Skewer them all! Control a spear‑wielding tank in this updated single‑screen arcade-like action game. Line up targets and pierce multiple enemies at once. Conquer each stage with a satisfying, steady challenge. 7 interwoven storylines gradually reveal the truth behind the unfolding incidents.

4742420.title: 困在琥珀里的三千日夜 Demo
4742420.short_description: 这是一款融合黑帮火拼与金融博弈的二次元视觉小说。你将扮演天才CFO陆一恺，与冷艳的女大佬叶枫在西吉地区的血雨腥风与柴米油盐中携手并进。约300张背景图片和100张CG，以及力求极致的演出效果，大气磅礴的超8小时故事，让你逐步揭开朴有天的罪恶真相，拯救你在这个世界最重要的心爱女人。

4552000.title: Dawn of Horror Demo
4552000.short_description: Dawn of Horror is a high-intensity Action Horror FPS set in the decaying urban sprawl of Cygnus City. Following the collapse of civilization into a digital Dark Age, step into the role of Kage—a survivor seeking vengeance against hordes of Cyber-Zombies and bio-mechanical monstrosities.

4761000.title: SCROLLBOUND Demo
4761000.short_description: Simple 3-key controls with fast-paced survival combat.Defend an ancient scroll against endless waves of enemies approaching from both sides in this fast-paced roguelite survival defense game. Master powerful skills, adapt your builds, and survive for as long as possible.

4779550.title: Stip Demo
4779550.short_description: Assign, undo, deduce! Solve a series of minimalist number puzzles. Use constraints to assign numbers to the correct stips. Navigate the interconnected puzzles to uncover secrets. Please ignore any odd Stip behavior.

4751070.title: 修仙挂机 试玩版
4751070.short_description: 一款修仙题材的休闲增量放置养成游戏。从练气小修开始自动修炼、挂机成长、突破境界，探索开放地图与副本秘境，刷怪掉宝，收集装备、技能、材料、丹药、灵石和灵宠。经营灵圃，发展钓鱼、伐木、挖矿、种植、炼丹、烹饪、锻造等生活玩法，规划资源、离线收益、战斗养成和长期成长路线，在持续变强的循环中踏上成仙之路。

4593720.title: Mahjong Kawuxing Demo
4593720.short_description: 一款休闲棋牌游戏。 快节奏的三人麻将，点击鼠标左键打出手中麻将牌，赢得更多金钱，成为赌神。

4728640.title: うつらうつらとつつうらうらと Demo
4728640.short_description: Roam a quiet late-night city in this chill point-and-click adventure. Click anything that catches your eye, check your phone, and reply to viewer comments only if you feel like it. Take your time and enjoy a slow, unhurried night—free from anyone’s expectations.

4306410.title: LouveSystems' Realms Demo
4306410.short_description: Realms is a strategy game where all actions are taken simultaneously then resolved all at once. With up to 8 players, there's no waiting for your turn here. Battle for land and for riches, upgrade your kingdom and follow your strategy to conquer other realms - become the one to rule them all.

4413840.title: Medieval Horse Simulator Demo
4413840.short_description: 作为一匹高贵的骏马在中世纪道路上奔驰，将货物送到繁华的村庄，拉运马车，躲避埋伏，升级马具，证明自己是王国中最可靠的骏马。

4614560.title: Battle Snails Demo
4614560.short_description: Create a snail and join the battle. Take control of the backyard with Battle Snails! Climb walls, hang upside down and move anywhere. Team up with your friends for a tank game unlike any other!

4683870.title: KeelOver Demo
4683870.short_description: KeelOver 是一款疯狂的物理派对游戏，重量即是规则。你的海盗船是一台巨大的天平，通过向对手投掷沉重的战利品来倾斜甲板，自定义你的海盗并保持平衡……否则就去喂鲨鱼！

4492980.title: Visual Novel Nodal Editor Demo
4492980.short_description: Create complex interactive stories without writing a single line of code. Visual Novel Nodal Editor features an intuitive node-based interface, a powerful layer system, and dynamic animations to bring your narratives to life. Import assets, connect choices, and export your game in one click!

4733210.title: Act! 细胞调律 Demo
4733210.short_description: 基于完全创新玩法的自由输入音游《Act! 细胞调律》现已开放免费试玩版！惬意享受、尽情沉浸；在潜意识的海洋中，调律独属于你的乐章吧！

4283620.title: Clicker Ore Demo
4283620.short_description: 深入地底，抵抗不断上升的高温，发现独特的镐，与地牢首领战斗，成为深渊之主。游戏将以 Free to Play 形式上线。

4310210.title: SLUGMOUTH Demo
4310210.short_description: SLUGMOUTH is a survival fps rpg set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland full of dangerous clans fighting a perpetual war. Bullets hit hard and survival demands careful resource management and tactical shooting.

4605880.title: 侵染：有你存在的夏日 Demo
4605880.short_description: 本作是一款包含夏日、少女与悬疑要素的视觉小说，6位可攻略角色。我有一个好朋友，只有我能看到她。医生断言她是我的妄想，她却自称来自异界。遵循医嘱，我来到一座海岛休养，各怀心思的少女们闯入了我的世界…谁可托付真心？虚妄还是现实？夏日海风将息，我必须做出选择。

4758010.title: Trebuchet Simulator Demo
4758010.short_description: 物理模拟器，你将控制投石机向城堡发射石头。调整臂长、抛射物质量、枢轴高度、释放角度和基础角度以使破坏力最大化。

4710840.title: Castles & Castellans Demo
4710840.short_description: Castles & Castellans is a hybrid of real-time strategy and third-person action. Rule from the castle-building RTS view - construct, manage, and fortify against looming threats. Then step into the castellan’s boots in TPP, fighting side by side with your soldiers atop the very walls you built.

2846530.title: 破碎怪谈：恶意关注
2846530.short_description: 《破碎怪谈：恶意关注》是“破碎怪谈”系列的第二部作品，《破碎怪谈：恶意取关》的前传。你将在一个地狱一般的世界中挣扎求生。恐怖的怪物如影随形，阴森的环境让人毛骨悚然，每个角落似乎都潜藏着秘密与危险。准备好进入这个充满惊悚和黑暗的世界，直面来自内心的极度恐惧。

4676140.title: Fu-Fu-Chan -way up!- Demo
4676140.short_description: Blow into the microphone and breathe life into your climb. As simple as a breath. As deep as the sky.

4434050.title: Corporate Climb
4434050.short_description: A fast-paced online multiplayer arena game where momentum-based dual-swing movement is key. Outmaneuver enemies, collect valuable items, and complete your quota to win. With fully skill-based gameplay and intense competitive matches, survival depends on speed, precision, and smart decisions.

4776080.title: Beast Bastion Demo
4776080.short_description: 这是一款Roguelike自走棋游戏的Demo。招募部队，搭配防御炮塔。欢迎试玩！

4705700.title: Fishing Survivors
4705700.short_description: 击败源源不断袭来的敌人，并生存5天。 每天都会出现新的敌人，并挑战拥有独特攻击模式的5位首领。 升级并进化武器，收集道具，让自己变得更强。

4516030.title: bōnin Demo
4516030.short_description: Battle your friends in this exciting PvP sudoku showdown! Run around nature-themed puzzle boards while avoiding dangerous pencil projectiles, making good use of power-ups, and, most importantly, fill in the missing numbers faster than your opponent.

4725020.title: Take Your Throne
4725020.short_description: A Tower Defense-style game. Take a strong stance and defend your throne against the brazen and utterly shameless claims of your enemies. With each level, your opponents will become increasingly resourceful... be prepared for anything... from formal charges to an angry mob!

4594060.title: Turn Back Now Demo
4594060.short_description: You are Ross Chole, a young detective who responds to a routine call in a quarantined city on the brink of collapse. What begins as a simple investigation quickly spirals into a fight for survival as an unknown outbreak turns ordinary people into something monstrous.

4639590.title: Tileburg Demo
4639590.short_description: Tileburg is a game where each tile played has direct effects as well as powerful combos that trigger as soon as the conditions are met. Transform the landscape and develop your city while scoring points. Each turn, the city expands on a random tile!

4748500.title: 25 Days in the DARK Demo
4748500.short_description: 在这款游戏中，你将扮演一名迷路的孩子，必须在充满敌对生物的危险像素世界中生存25天。每一天都是一场生存之战——你必须通过狩猎、捕鱼或采集浆果来获取食物。然而，即便是最简单的任务也可能充满风险。

4762510.title: Shepherd Demo
4762510.short_description: Shepherd is a survival horror game where you must identify invisible entities using audio and visual cues. Protect your passengers, keep your ears open, and if all else fails...trust your gut.

4671700.title: 城主与少女
4671700.short_description: 《城主与少女》奇幻模拟建造 + 少女养成策略游戏。自由规划城邦发展，探索秘境、挑战强敌，百人联盟协同作战。拒绝强制 PVP，搭配丰富互动与随机奇遇，打造属于你的理想家园。

4710290.title: Pour Boy and the Nitro Necromancer
4710290.short_description: A hand-animated coffee horror platformer from the world of Pour Boy Coffee. Fight zombrews, collect flies, complete quests, find secrets, and survive the crashing moon to face the Nitro Cold Brew Necromancer.

3965240.title: Protect Your Humans
3965240.short_description: Rebuild a kingdom, raise an army and defeat the Demon King and his servants in this 4 player Couch co-op action shoot-em-up adventure. Protect Your Humans, or there will be no humans left to fight with.

4699480.title: Tenebrix
4699480.short_description: Descend into a living dungeon where hesitation empowers the darkness. Build your deck, command creatures across tactical lanes, and survive a roguelike descent shaped by fear, strategy, and the echoes of your past failures.

4603740.title: Asana Demo
4603740.short_description: A sci-fi dark comedy visual novel. Build your stats, navigate branching paths, and argue with N.E.K.O., the ship’s godlike AI in cat form. Live AI conversations with multiple characters shape your path, making every run different. Every choice matters. N.E.K.O. is still not impressed.

4738920.title: 无限构筑 Demo
4738920.short_description: 《无限构筑 Deck of Potential》融合了 Roguelike 卡牌构建与弹幕天堂。你可以无限制地收集卡牌，通过融合与贴纸强化，横扫数以千计的敌群。在挑战地牢首领的过程中，解锁新的卡牌、角色。在探索海量卡牌合成配方的同时，构筑属于你的完美自动射击卡组。

4424950.title: 飞空艇探险物语 (Skyship Quest Story)
4424950.short_description: 驾驶在空中飞行的船来一场大冒险！充满浪漫色彩的模拟角色扮演游戏

4758020.title: 临界点：破阵对弈 试用版
4758020.short_description: [英雄构筑] + [推进塔防]｜指挥少数英雄守住两路敌潮｜通过站位、朝向、技能加点与阵型，打造独特防线｜推进战线、抢夺资源、强化英雄｜让敌潮撞碎在你的杰作中

4776180.title: Edge3 Demo
4776180.short_description: Try Edge3, a pixel art editor featuring powerful palette management and animation tools.

4774050.title: 数字文明：进化 Demo
4774050.short_description: 来创建自己的帝国吧 从原始文明，一路进化....成为最强的伟大帝国！ 管理资源，修建房屋，与他国外交，让自己的文明一步步成长到无人能敌

4773900.title: STRANGER WITHIN Demo
4773900.short_description: Trapped in unfamiliar places, investigate your surroundings, collect clues, and combine them to solve escape room style puzzles. With the help of different personalities, uncover the mysterious story behind Dorothy in this mystery 2D point-and-click escape adventure.
developers: Great LEE SEUNG YONG - Team E.S

4604520.title: Zozo and the Lost Dreams Demo
4604520.short_description: Help Zozo find his way home in this cartoon-inspired Metroidvania platformer. Pillow-fight sentient pastries, train under an octopus master, and brave a cybernetic jungle as you explore the vibrant landscapes of Zozo's dreams.

4521340.title: 电子ED治疗中心
4521340.short_description: 《电子ED治疗中心》是一款随机游戏启动器，专为陷入游戏荒的玩家提供游戏解决方案。我们致力于让玩家重新找回游戏的快乐，让那些埋没在游戏库深处的神作重见天日。现在点击治疗，重振你的玩家雄风吧！

4619700.title: Tonkatsu Diner Simulator
4619700.short_description: You are the owner of a small tonkatsu Diner. Manage everything from purchasing ingredients and cooking to customer service and running the business, and grow your Diner into a popular success.

4760550.title: The Wickers House Demo
4760550.short_description: 一款氛围浓厚的第一人称恐怖游戏。你在一场车祸后醒来。眼前是一栋房子，你以为可以在那里找到帮助。但这栋房子却是一个陷阱，等待着那些胆敢踏入其中的人……

4673560.title: Your party died again Demo
4673560.short_description: 在这款递增式RPG中与邪恶的怪物和恶魔战斗。收集战利品，解锁升级，招募队员，消灭魔王。战略性地使用技能，或开启自动施放，尽情享受冒险之旅。

4772580.title: Snarfles Demo
4772580.short_description: Snarfles is a Turn-Based Tactics game where you play as BOTH SIDES. Strategize to keep everything alive for a set number of turns and bring balance to your broken family.

4757080.title: DEMON SIEGE Demo
4757080.short_description: A retro-inspired boomer shooter where every powerup stacks infinitely. Become an unstoppable demon-slaying powerhouse with insane speed, massive jumps, multi-bullet weapons, and game-breaking builds.

4719740.title: INORIGAMI HACK DOWN Demo
4719740.short_description: A point-and-click horror adventure where you battle evil spirits to escape. You take a part-time job at the "House of Saschibae," a place said to grant happiness through prayer. Instead, This demo allows you to play the first 15-30 minutes of the story.

4481440.title: 命运之轮（序章）/Journey of Destiny(dependent origination)
4481440.short_description: 这是一款兼具古风叙事与异世宿命的文字视觉小说。在与现实平行的异界，暗夜古族轩辕家与天圣魔宫两大势力百年对峙，至宝现世打破平衡。游戏采用人物专属视角叙事，剧情充满悬念反转：从家族灭门、庆典刺杀，到时空穿梭、灵魂融合，高能情节接连上演。你的选择将触发数十种分支剧情，最终导向匪患、兵变、赎罪等多重结局，家族兴衰全由你掌控。本作 1:1 还原原著核心剧情，并补充大量专属支线，用 Ren'Py 经典交互带来沉浸式体验。

4509660.title: Hardcore Soldier Demo
4509660.short_description: Vengeance or Die in this no mercy, bullet hell, run and gun shooter that requires player skill, with only one life and one hit death, game over. You just can't get hit.

4536010.title: AE: Archeological Expedition Demo
4536010.short_description: Explore dig sites inspired by real locations, from Petra to Pompeii, and unearth artifacts spanning 10 historical eras. Brush away the centuries, discover the stories behind each find, and fill your journal one careful dig at a time

4298240.title: 眷族
4298240.short_description: 【捉宠战斗】+【进化变异】+【孵蛋】+【世界变化】 可以召唤非常多宠物同时进行战斗，通过进化与变异，随机的天赋与性格，符文与技能，培养出一个个独一无二的宠物。去变化莫测的冒险世界中，探索一个个随机的奇遇，挑战每片大陆的幕后BOSS，在无尽塔中进行狂暴的杀戮。累了后再回到家园建设家园休息吧。

4231020.title: Gum Squad
4231020.short_description: Gum Squad is a co-op PvE shooter set in a quiet world gone sticky. Start with a peashooter, explore together, and gear up to survive the gum epidemic with up to 8 players!

4785900.title: Alpha Star Demo
4785900.short_description: "Survive the crushing gravity and conquer the void! Alpha Star is a fast-paced 2D space shooter where you must navigate through evolving bullet hells and dynamic black holes. Upgrade your ship, survive 10 intense mission phases, and reach the heart of the Singularity."

4662820.title: The Totemist Demo
4662820.short_description: Craft totems and talismans inspired by real witchcraft practices at your own pace with no time constraints. Help the people of a quietly strange town carry their burdens. See their souls to understand their needs and desires. Uncover an ancient darkness hiding under the town that only you can stop.

4454720.title: Ethereal Storm
4454720.short_description: Survive the Ethereal Storm — a thrilling 4-player co-op bullet hell with an FF5-inspired job system, layered building mechanics, and expansive Skyrim-style quests. Play solo or team up for explosive fun!

4760050.title: The Last Flight Demo
4760050.short_description: 重建被遗忘的飞机，生存下去，收集零件，在末日天空飞翔。每次飞行都更接近自由…前提是过去不先追上你。

3609720.title: 圣殿法师
3609720.short_description: 《圣殿法师》是一款魔法奇幻题材的清版过关动作冒险游戏。你需要：制定多变的战斗策略，组合随机触发的元素祝福，驾驭魔能驱动的战斗载具，突破蜂拥而至的魔物大军，最终向掌控八大元素派系的传奇法师发起震撼寰宇的法师战争。

4694970.title: Cluster - Roguelike Tower Defense Demo
4694970.short_description: A roguelike tower defense game where you strengthen your single tower through a tactical cluster board. Rotate, connect, and optimize cluster cards between waves, survive 30 waves, and take on Hardcore Endless mode with online leaderboards. Will you be able to keep up with the best?

4592820.title: The Blinking Room Demo
4592820.short_description: 某个夜晚，小女孩莉莉从噩梦中醒来……却不知道真正的噩梦才刚刚开始。 揭开闭上双眼后隐藏的秘密。

4772370.title: Silent Shark Demo
4772370.short_description: A tactical WWII submarine sim demo focused on chart-based attacks: track ships by hydrophone and periscope, plot an intercept, estimate range, set up the Torpedo Data Computer, fire torpedoes, and evade escorts through tutorials, standalone encounters, and a limited scenario generator.

4662580.title: Duke vs The Gang
4662580.short_description: A Wild West bullet hell where you mix drinks into attacks, blast enemies from afar, and whip them up close. Dodge chaotic patterns, discover new combinations, and outplay unique bosses in fast-paced, precision-driven duels.

4642550.title: Ghost Town Seekers
4642550.short_description: 《Ghost Town Seekers》是一款 2-10 人的多人捉迷藏游戏，村民们可以变身成各种物品，并利用特殊技能努力生存，而女巫则负责将他们一一猎杀。

574760.title: Starship Theory
574760.short_description: Starship Theory is a ship building survival game. Mine and trade to gather resources. Plan and construct new upgrades. Train and manage crew. Fight to survive.

4780260.title: Dead Circuit Demo
4780260.short_description: You are brought to another dimension, to help a weak faction fight their aggressive enemy. You will need to upgrade your arsenal and abilities, to take on this task and become victorious.

4731630.title: Bug Spray
4731630.short_description: Blast through swarms of unwelcome pests with your trusty can of bug spray in Bug Spray! Spray wasps and flies but avoid spraying fireflies! That's just mean. Experience realistic graphics clash beautifully with 2D bugs in this fast-paced, arcade-like game. Try to beat your high score without letting it get below zero.

4690960.title: Seeding The Wasteland Demo
4690960.short_description: Wake up in a desolate world as a little robot gardener, replant the planet and breed procedural plants to get the best ones!

4653810.title: Pirate Survivors Demo
4653810.short_description: Cursed to the abyss, your skeleton crew battles hordes of sea monsters in this movement-focused bullet-heaven roguelite.
