Stack limitless upgrades, discover synergies, unlock unique ships and captains, and challenge deadly Sea Legends as the depths grow ever more dangerous.

4773630.title: Harmony Of Tea Demo
4773630.short_description: Small relaxing puzzle game where you need to find the right place for tea on a shelf. Travel from Yunnan Province to Shanghai as a tea courier, exploring charming provinces and discovering unique tea flavors.

4223630.title: KingForge
4223630.short_description: 建立一个真正“活着”的王国，让村民能够自主工作与生存。分配角色，保障人民的食物供给，自动化你的系统，并应对不断加剧的威胁。你的王国的命运掌握在你的手中。

4332930.title: 芝士财商 CheeseMoney
4332930.short_description: 在《芝士财商》中，炒股不再是K线图和复杂指标的专属战场，而是一场充满欢声笑语的社交大乱斗。作为开发商宋雅网络系统（广州）有限公司的第一款游戏，我们想让你和朋友以及全球玩家在同一片股市沙滩上轻松“炒”出感情——全球同服、多人同平台共竞技，你可以选择单枪匹马搅动风云，也可以拉上好友组建“炒股敢死队”互相结盟。没有晦涩的财报分析，只有趣味事件、随机新闻和玩家间的心理博弈，买涨买跌全凭直觉或“隔壁盟的小道消息”，甚至能用表情包和语音忽悠对手接盘。最终，不管是成为“芝士首富”还是“破产姐妹”，都能在派对般的交易所里击掌庆祝或互相甩锅。现在，带上你的不靠谱队友，一起来炖一锅快乐的“韭菜乱炖”吧！

4787570.title: Nullbreak Protocol Demo
4787570.short_description: A sci-fi arcade roguelite of fast, escalating runs. Launch your core, shatter every block, survive what the room fires back. Draw stacking protocols to build your run, push deeper into the system, and beat your record — the descent never ends.

4204590.title: Reincarnated as a Dark Lord Before Taking Over the World with Power 999999999
4204590.short_description: 极具挑战性的解谜小说RPG。转生为魔王，制定策略，征服世界。*非放置挂机游戏*

4768930.title: Total Survival Simulator Demo
4768930.short_description: Tell your own stories in Total Survival Simulator and watch the simulation play out in real time. Create characters, set relationships, traits and make them survive in a fight to the death with up to 16 other contestants.

3583670.title: Where the forest ends
3583670.short_description: 《森林尽头》是一款剧情驱动的俯视角恐怖射击游戏，背景设定在僵尸肆虐的末日世界。 血肉横飞、真实写实、脚踏实地。经典题材的全新诠释。

4749800.title: Too Many Balls Demo
4749800.short_description: There are too many balls. No one knows why. Your only option? Collect them. All of them. Yes, even that one in the corner.

4785860.title: Valefor 2 Demo
4785860.short_description: 黑暗奇幻肉鸽自走棋。招募雇佣兵，叠加独特的种族职业羁绊，重铸神器，攫取天赋。慢慢推演你的阵型，不限时长。异步PvP自动战斗：纯粹的策略博弈，随你的节奏从容落子。

4086340.title: Yclept
4086340.short_description: A grim adventure where the King is destroying his own city, and you must stop him. To survive, you must navigate the game board, hunt down and eliminate his accomplices, and frame others to draw the King's wrath away from yourself.

4302630.title: 9 MINUTES AND 59 SECONDS TO HEAVEN
4302630.short_description: 你只有短短10分钟,说服上帝你值得进入天堂。 仅有一次机会。 慎重选择你的言辞。

4736670.title: Grapple Gunners Demo
4736670.short_description: Swing, shoot and explode your friends in this chaotic multiplayer experience! Use the grappling hook to outmaneuver and outlast everyone. Grab a weapon and fight to be the last one standing across 70 unique maps!

3608900.title: NOMIA
3608900.short_description: Coordinate two heroes in this story-rich tactics roguelike. Set up combos with your reliable Action cards, execute masterstrokes by drawing the right Gambit cards, and blast monsters off cliffs. Chase salvation with cloth and steel. Chart the path through a shattered dream.

4349410.title: Генеральские котлы
4349410.short_description: «Генеральские котлы» — это юмористическая пародия, сделанная по мотивам популярного мема. Короткая игра, где каждая деталь была продумана до мелочей. Мена?

4765590.title: Loop Miner Demo
4765590.short_description: Loop Miner 是一款采矿增量游戏，可爱的鼹鼠矿工将不断挖掘矿井、收集资源与遗物，并向更深的地下前进。 在不断重复的采矿循环中，体验越来越强大的成长乐趣。

4765610.title: The Flesh Beneath Demo
4765610.short_description: A dark-fantasy card-roguelike about giving the cathedral below what it asks for — one piece of yourself at a time. Sever your own flesh for power. Press blood-stones into your cards. Permadeath. Every name is remembered.

4710730.title: ClockOut
4710730.short_description: 《ClockOut》是一款强调潜行玩法的恐怖动作游戏，讲述了主人公为了生存，试图逃离被怪物徘徊的公司的一段故事。

4395300.title: 跳舞的线
4395300.short_description: 随着音乐引导一条无限延伸的线条通过不同的环境。点一下屏幕以转弯，从而因应眼前不断变化的世界做出相应的反应及避开障碍物。

4772910.title: Folded: Inner Journey Demo
4772910.short_description: An emotional puzzle-exploration game set in a paper world, where solving puzzles leads to discoveries about yourself and the world around you as colors and wonder take form.

4768560.title: Monke Survivor Demo
4768560.short_description: Smash through endless waves of suited agents and become incredibly OP! Launch enemies with ragdoll physics, smash corporate machines for loot and level up. Unlock items and upgrade your monkey to create insane, game-breaking builds in this action-roguelite!

4775500.title: Midnight Queue Demo
4775500.short_description: 吸血鬼混入了夜总会的队伍中。你是门卫。检查证件，观察可疑行为，使用工具决定谁可以进入，谁必须留在外面 — 但最终决定权永远在你手中。

4176190.title: VoidStep
4176190.short_description: 一款战术回合制棋盘游戏，背景设定在神圣之泪诞生的境界中。移动、摧毁、隔离——通过故事战役、5 个人工智能难度级别和激烈的跨平台在线竞争来征服虚空。

4669170.title: Sneaky Tail Demo
4669170.short_description: Sneaky Tail is a top-down game where you play as a Mouse Sneaky with a big dream becoming a pop superstar. Sneak around, pocket valuables, load up your minivan, and earn enough to make your musical dreams come true with your friends.

4768280.title: DEAD BEFORE WORK: THE COMMUTE Demo
4768280.short_description: “距离会议还有20分钟，否则你就会『出差错，出人命』！” 阿奇正经历人生中最倒霉的一天。从坏掉的闹钟到整个城市的致命恶意，奔跑在基于物理引擎的混乱世界中，躲避宇宙级别的霉运，赚取爆笑的“花式作死点数（GAG POINTS）”。你能在这场全世界最致命 rigid 的通勤中活下来吗？

4697190.title: 断光のウルバスティア
4697190.short_description: 断光のウルバスティアはシミュレーションRPGです。隣国や無法者との戦いを描いたダークな世界観のファンタジー、総勢35人の個性豊かな仲間と共に困難を切り開いていきます。

4045680.title: 冠を持つ神の手
4045680.short_description: “The Hand of the Crown-Bearer” is a character-training adventure game where you develop the protagonist while building relationships with specific characters. With numerous branching paths and a higher difficulty level, your choices shape the story. One playthrough lasts about two hours.

4718880.title: Цикл прошлого
4718880.short_description: Первая игра по истории России. 862 год. Ты – тот, кого назвали Рюриком. Но твоя память пуста. Тебе предстоит заново узнать себя и построить государство.

4675130.title: surfass
4675130.short_description: surfass is a speedrunning parkour game that goes really fast! Let your legs burn, they are the price of speed. Master the slide jump and climb the leaderboard!

4770450.title: Inching Along Demo
4770450.short_description: A slow, expressive physics-based adventure about movement, persistence and exploration 🐛

4765400.title: ANONYMIZED Demo
4765400.short_description: Play as a digital rat and hack your way into the retro-futuristic grid-based movement puzzle world of Anonymized, where you shift hues and dive layers deep in search of the one true Source Cheese.

4772800.title: Hold The Gates Demo
4772800.short_description: Build by day, hold the line by night. A pixel-art roguelite where you build a village, recruit heroes, and watch your formation hold or break against waves of monsters in real-time auto-combat. How long can you hold the gates?

4737490.title: Pull Factor Demo
4737490.short_description: Turn a tiny magnet into a metal-devouring machine as you upgrade, retry, and conquer chaotic arcade stages.

4567050.title: Target Hunt
4567050.short_description: Hit stationary, moving, shrinking, and armored targets across 10 stages with multiple difficulties. Sharpen your aim — then take it into 1v1 PvP, defense waves, and beyond.

4714360.title: 以富之名(In The Name Of Fortune) Demo
4714360.short_description: 一款类大富翁的休闲游戏，每个房屋都有独特技能，每个角色都有独特的技能。再加上暗标竞争提升物价，股市等额外玩法。

4215900.title: 颠倒世界 Demo
4215900.short_description: 天空在我们脚下，重力将我们推向未知。头顶上延绵至视线的尽头的，是一个巨大的平面。从上往下倒悬着林丛般密集的建筑，彼此通过狭长的通道以及管道链接。它们沉默着，如同倒立的方尖碑，直指着太阳的眼睛...本作将以文字加独具风格的图像向你呈现一个上下颠倒的世界。

4768440.title: Rangedrifter Demo
4768440.short_description: Get a glimpse of the forbidden world of Rangedrifter in this demo version! Travel a remote path, outsmart deadly traps, overcome monsters and wild animals, gather food and gear, find secrets, and try to reach the end of the path!

4750840.title: Cook Cook Village ~! Demo
4750840.short_description: 《Cook Cook Village》 is a deck-building roguelike where you run shops using resource tokens to gain certain amount of fullness. Operate your shops day by day, earn rewards from villagers, and build a deck that leads to big success.

4774390.title: Herbalist Roman Demo
4774390.short_description: 扮演一名中世纪草药师。研读草药书，制作浸剂，并帮助你的顾客缓解他们的病痛。基督教正在传入斯拉夫的德雷博尔。你的决定将决定这些变化是否会和平地发生。

4784170.title: Defrag Incremental Demo
4784170.short_description: A retro incremental where you optimize messy disks, choose the right algorithm, manage heat and wear, make a living from each job, and reboot for permanent BIOS upgrades.

4776380.title: Patisserie Simulator Demo
4776380.short_description: 经营你自己的舒适甜品店，增加财富！为满意的顾客提供咖啡、新鲜糕点和橙汁，解锁新食谱，并装饰你的甜品店，使其更有魅力和盈利。

4639110.title: Demonium Illusion
4639110.short_description: 《恶魔幻象》是一款硬核射击游戏，你将与恶魔展开对决。运用你的技巧和反应能力来生存下去。

4612440.title: Cubie Demo
4612440.short_description: CUBIE 是一款极简主义的解谜平台游戏，在这里你将控制重力。立方体的每一面都根据你的进入方式提供独特的物理特性。世界保持不变——改变的只是你的视角。在一个“向上”只是相对概念的迷宫中，你能解开空间谜题吗？

4701320.title: Nova Strider
4701320.short_description: An indie top-down sci-fi score-attack game about blowing up aliens in the upper atmosphere! Compete against your friends locally and see who can get the highest score on the leaderboard.

4749960.title: Dead Night Highway Demo
4749960.short_description: 《死亡之夜公路》是一款紧凑型殖民地模拟游戏。幸存者们在一路向西的旅途中建立营地，补充资源并维持生存。但尸潮始终紧追不舍，而且规模会越来越庞大……

4312800.title: And No One Was There
4312800.short_description: This deeply personal, atmospheric journey leads you through a childhood home now filled with shadows and silence. Exploring and uncovering old diaries, notes, and open meaning evokes melancholy, nostalgia, and reflection on loss, memory, and the bonds that tie us to home.

4683540.title: Brix Demo
4683540.short_description: Think it, build it, and watch it break. Brix is a physics-based engineering sandbox where you tackle impossible challenges with your own custom creations. From battlebots to earthquake-proof towers..

4783890.title: Once Upon a Throne of Thorns Demo
4783890.short_description: The demo for the BL visual novel Once Upon a Throne of Thorns.

4764280.title: Help me Cats Demo
4764280.short_description: 一款在害怕时可以借助猫咪力量的3D恐怖游戏！ 探索充满恶灵的异界，追寻你失踪的宠物猫。 在危险时刻，幽灵猫也许会成为你的力量……？

4447550.title: Linebound
4447550.short_description: One player navigates. One player creates. Linebound is a 2D asymmetric co-op puzzle platformer where one player navigates the world while the other draws platforms in real time. Progress is only possible through communication.

4725620.title: Pixel Dungeon Platformer
4725620.short_description: Skillful Pixel Dungeon 实时生成。

4748250.title: Little Herbal Baker Demo
4748250.short_description: 你将扮演莉莉亚，一位初来乍到白林镇的新手面包师，即将接管一家曾由面包大师经营的面包店。在野外探索并收集食材、与小精灵和动物互动、磨练烘焙技艺，别忘了经营你的面包店，并与迷人的镇民成为朋友！尽情沉浸在温馨和悠闲的游戏步调中。 🥨✨

4655520.title: Dungeon Tells Demo
4655520.short_description: The heroes have escaped their cages. Dungeon Tells is a single-player social deduction game where you can read the minds of your enemies. Execute the weak, charm the strong, and defend your dungeon.

4303370.title: Absolutes Akestas Tournament
4303370.short_description: A story-driven RPG combat tournament for the throne, glory, and the fate of the world—unlike anything you’ve ever experienced. Experience a dark, dramatic world caught between honor and betrayal, where every decision has consequences and your chosen paths shape the conflict.

4668180.title: Dungeon Potato Demo
4668180.short_description: 为了土豆神的荣耀，飞升吧!《地牢土豆》将地牢闯关与独特的信念机制完美融合。你将遭遇各种随机事件，打造独一无二的专属构筑，并在如潮水般的敌群中一路血战。在这款充满高风险博弈的俯视角类Rogue游戏中，你的信念将直接决定你的生死存亡。

4784060.title: My First 3D Printer Demo
4784060.short_description: Remember buying your first 3D printer? Now imagine having twenty. Manage your workshop, fulfill orders, and build the business you always dreamed of.

3666090.title: Iron Stars Demo
3666090.short_description: Iron Stars is a realistic space 4X strategy game where you explore believable star systems, colonize planets and moons, grow your population, and turn entire solar systems into industrial empires.

4121890.title: 扑通心跳小屋
4121890.short_description: 《扑通心跳小屋》能够让你沉浸在自己的空间中并放松下来，专注于独属于个人的美好。

4757370.title: Tokamak Hand Demo
4757370.short_description: Tokamak Hand is a turn-based monster-taming RPG. Confine wild Thermons within fields, forge bonds of resonance, master diverse builds and battle across a continent teetering on the edge of imbalance. Every capture tips the scales—will you restore order, or unleash chaos?

4740610.title: 松木村 ( Pinewood Village )
4740610.short_description: 一款轻松休闲的城市建造游戏，你需要连接板块来建造一个温馨的村庄。放置板块，旋转找到最佳排列方式，并通过策略性放置获得星星奖励。

4774440.title: 咸鱼搬运工 Demo
4774440.short_description: 4人在线合作，推车捡货、翻车互坑、对抗猛兽——交够价值才能回家。【试玩遇到任何 BUG 请随时戳我们！有啥想法或想唠嗑的也尽管来，一起成为“鱼鱼朋友”吧！】🐟

4766310.title: Academy of Samsara Demo
4766310.short_description: Answer right to deal damage, answer wrong to take it. Die and reincarnate with no items but the same level. 6,000+ trivia questions across 7 categories. Master challenging lore, interact with haunting characters, and break the loop in a world brought to life through 90s retro anime art.

4762480.title: Rejected Draft Demo
4762480.short_description: 你本是被弃置的残缺涂鸦。迎战各式草图强敌，吞噬对方力量，踏上复仇之路。这款双屏放置对战游戏中数值将飞速暴涨，庞大技能树搭配随机转生机制，每一轮冒险都独一无二。

4676410.title: Komo: A Sunlit Journey - Demo
4676410.short_description: 在温柔治愈的世界中悠闲度过的元宇宙聊天应用。漫步于美丽的自然风光中，或围坐在篝火旁聊天。在喜欢的地方摆上桌椅，拿出美食和饮品放松身心。独自一人或与他人一起——在你喜欢的地方，享受属于你的时光。

3688440.title: KI Lab — Neural Pipeline Simulator
3688440.short_description: Build a neural AI pipeline from nodes, technologies and upgrades. Connect, optimize and scale your AI beyond limits

4147770.title: Aakihiko Aaruberutasu Aadisony Aazumeragi: SRPG Tactical
4147770.short_description: A parallel story in the Prince x Princess universe. Sky Soldiers invade the continent, led by a commander who has already conquered a neighboring kingdom. Prince Akihiko and the princesses must fight back and defeat him through tactical battles to restore peace.

4686700.title: FerryMan Demo
4686700.short_description: Revolt against death itself. Every outcome by the roll of your dice. Sacrifice boons given to you from your crow companion and tip the odds in your favor. Die, grow stronger, unlock more boons, and fight toward the Reaper who bound you to this endless cycle.

4468440.title: Ommetaphobia Demo
4468440.short_description: Ommetaphobia is a shoot-em-up horror atmospheric arcade game that takes you into your mind to face the fears that have been embedded within you. Use your lighter to burn the watchers, collect energy and sparks from them to further enhance your lighter, and last until the medicine kicks.

4771170.title: Slots & Sword & Magic Demo
4771170.short_description: Slots & Sword & Magic 是一款回合制类 Rogue-like 老虎机游戏，每一次旋转都有可能打破你的构筑并触发疯狂的连锁组合。

4769210.title: 天机•大唐重构 Demo
4769210.short_description: 《天机：大唐重构》是一款架空晚唐题材的 2D 横版卡牌构筑 Rogue-like 游戏。玩家将扮演穿越到唐末的现代理科生，组建物理、化学等科学流派卡组，在五代十国的混乱残影中探索、破甲、识破敌人意图，并用现代知识重塑大唐命运。

4791440.title: ABSOLUTE TOFU Demo
4791440.short_description: ABSOLUTE TOFU is a one-button jumping game.

4777250.title: Space Cat Arcade Adventure Demo
4777250.short_description: A chill arcade-style space runner where every run ends in discovery.

4584110.title: Soul Land: Awakening World
4584110.short_description: The first-ever 3D open-world MMORPG of the Soul Land saga is here! Featuring dual-authorization from the original novels and anime—this time, redefine the Soul Land universe!

4656210.title: How To Grow a Black Hole Demo
4656210.short_description: How To Grow a Black Hole is about... well... how to grow a black hole. Manage your black hole, feed it to gain mass, and prevent catastrophic collapses. Compete globally or against your friends to achieve the biggest black hole. Maybe you'll be #1.

4708760.title: The Book of Prosperity Demo
4708760.short_description: A 2D Action RPG set in a surreal pixel-art world where ancient magic seeps through Hong Kong-inspired streets. Pulled into a parallel dimension ruled by the Circle, Cyrus must master rhythmic combat, rooftop parkour, and forbidden truths to uncover the cost of a world built on false prosperity.

4791320.title: Idle Primes Demo
4791320.short_description: A horror incremental game about clicking prime numbers across expanding grids. Discover new ways to find primes faster, smarter, and weirder. ████████████████████ Belphegor's ██████!

4782680.title: ALIGNMENT Demo
4782680.short_description: 一款以道路工程设计为核心的建造与驾驶游戏。在这个 Demo 中，你可以创建道路，调整平面线形和纵断面，布设匝道，并让系统根据地形自动生成桥梁、隧道和边坡。完成设计后，进入场景驾驶车辆，从真实行驶视角检验曲线、坡度、路线选择与工程结构带来的空间体验。当前内容仍在开发中，界面、性能、车辆手感和设计规则都会持续优化，更多玩法也会在后续版本中加入。

4165000.title: Smiley Battle
4165000.short_description: Roam a confusing maze with your smiley, sneak up behind unsuspecting opponents or get right in the middle of a fight and throw color bags at each other. Earn money to unlock powerups that turn you into a ghost, a vampire or even hand you a nuke to give you an edge in the battle for supremacy.

4757870.title: 球打球 Demo
4757870.short_description: 在《球打球》中，你可以自由选择4颗参数可调的强力球战士，为他们选择最佳的升级路线，同时使用你的策略、反应以及对物理的理解，在四角笼中实时操作它们，打败同样在不断成长的对手。游戏支持0~8人，在线/局域网/本地同屏游玩。

4607110.title: SporeWars
4607110.short_description: A top-down survivor roguelite where you battle endless waves of mutant fungi. Level up, choose powerful upgrades, and outlast the Mycelord's ever-growing horde. How long can you last?

4653420.title: Throne of Cards Demo
4653420.short_description: 用寥寥几张卡牌建立一个王国。堆叠并组合卡牌，收集资源、训练士兵、解锁强大的牌组，并围绕统治者、神器与生存打造你的策略。

4676280.title: In The Roots Of The Mountain
4676280.short_description: Mine deep into procedurally generated caves, gather rare ores, upgrade your pickaxe, and explore an ever-changing underground world. Build your fortune with a shopkeeper, swing across caverns with your grappling hook, and uncover ancient treasures in this relaxing 2D pixel mining adventure.

4785970.title: Saw Rush Demo
4785970.short_description: Control a powerful neon saw in this physics-based incremental clicker! Smash rocks, collect valuable fragments, buy massive upgrades, and deploy automated drones to maximize your destruction. Can you push your numbers to the limit? Perfect for fans of idle and arcade progression.

3910690.title: 拯救小狗
3910690.short_description: 拯救小狗是一款轻松有趣的寻物解谜游戏，你将在充满与变化的房间中，打败邪恶的老巫婆，拯救可爱的小狗们

3938290.title: Soul Card Duel
3938290.short_description: A deckbuilder where position and direction make combats more tactical. Flank enemies with 8 attack directions and combine cards to win in any situation. Explore procedural maps, create decks and armor to customize your hero, and forge your legend in the region's grand tournament.

4328400.title: 秽水
4328400.short_description: 《秽水》是一款以逃离玛莲下水道为背景的第一人称Roguelike动作游戏。利用敌人的弱点进行攻击与格挡，配合猛击、盾击等招式击败暗杀组织“夜藓苔”的刺客。不断解锁形形色色的家具与道具，让每一次无止境的挑战都走向成功吧。

4750980.title: 结晶姬的迷宫 Demo
4750980.short_description: 《结晶姬的迷宫》是一款以“探知不可视者、逃离迷宫”为核心的恐怖冒险游戏。

4778080.title: SCP: Blink Demo
4778080.short_description: Uncover the origins of SCP-173 in the abandoned exclusion zone surrounding Chernobyl. Told through the lens of found footage recordings, explore a hidden facility where Soviet secrets should have remained forgotten.

4392380.title: Sunrise
4392380.short_description: Sunrise is a 2D platformer high-speed hack and slash, featuring the ability to create and share levels you make to the world!

4710060.title: Rattle Spring demo: the crow's room
4710060.short_description: Rattle Spring is a surreal, eerie puzzle adventure inspired by Rusty Lake. When your cousin vanishes from her family’s desert health resort, you must adventure into unsettling spaces, cryptic characters, and generational trauma to solve the interconnected puzzles and uncover the truth.

4726280.title: Maze 95 Ultimate Demo
4726280.short_description: 曾让一代人着迷的那座迷宫回来了。它曾是一个屏保。但现在？你终于可以亲自走过那些走廊。或者只是放松看着它，就像从前那样。

4775520.title: Capybaria Demo
4775520.short_description: 最温馨又最疯狂的水豚游戏！在温泉里泡澡放松，建造建筑杰作，成家立业……然后开车狂飙、飞向太空，或者决定是否让总统引爆核弹。你的业力将决定这个世界的命运！

4695680.title: A Game About Getting Bigger Demo
4695680.short_description: 一个关于变大的游戏是一款以不断成长的黑洞为核心的打宝增量游戏。摧毁天体，让中心的黑洞变得越来越巨大。

4765830.title: Panic Poopers Demo
4765830.short_description: You desperately need to find a toilet before having an accident! Navigate through a procedurally-generated house, avoid the house hold residents, collect items that aid you, and reach the washroom before you run out of time!

3077760.title: An Exercise in Mortality - Chapter I
3077760.short_description: Slip into the role of a detective and find out why a seemingly peaceful village suddenly has to hold a funeral every other day. To solve the mysteries, act as the perpetrator and simulate the crimes. Left completely to your own devices, it’s up to you to prove your ingenuity and wit.

4742490.title: The Son of Stone Demo
4742490.short_description: Play as Sosruko, a warrior born from stone, and fight through mythic battles using three distinct combat styles and stone bending abilities.

4772560.title: Witness the Dark - Episode 1 - Bloody Burger Demo
4772560.short_description: Experience the first night shift at Billy's Burger. You escaped a serial killer. Now you're hiding, working nights in a small-town diner. But the hallucinations won't stop—and the customers seem to know you. A free demo of the psychological horror narrative.

4174490.title: GAME.exe 2 - Phantom Strike
4174490.short_description: 你找到了一台旧电脑，上面安装着一个被遗忘的程序：Phantom Strike。只有一台服务器仍然在线，被时间冻结，等待有人完成这场对局。加入后，你发现记分板早已在运行，沉默的队友从未出现，而服务器已运行了多年。最初的怀旧好奇逐渐变成对某种更加诡异事物的坠落。

4776230.title: PROBABILITY KING Demo
4776230.short_description: A solo or multiplayer roguelike about coin flipping, probability manipulation, and paying debts. Miss the deadline? Play Russian Roulette. One bullet quickly becomes six.

4767530.title: Destroy The Moon Demo
4767530.short_description: A cosmic survivors-like where every upgrade brings you closer to becoming a living superweapon. Burn through alien hordes, rupture pocket dimensions, escape black holes, and survive the cosmic war for the Moon.

4773230.title: Cards Of Calling Demo
4773230.short_description: This demo includes the first act of Cards of Calling, featuring 1 playable summoner, 3 summonable creatures, elite and boss encounters, and a preview of the card, relic, and event systems. The full game is planned to include additional acts, summons, events, and content.

4668610.title: Mini Sushi Factory Demo
4668610.short_description: Become the Sushi Factory Master! Build machines, discover recipes, and perfect your automation lines.

3528440.title: Shrimp Escape
3528440.short_description: A fast-paced arcade survival game where you dodge predators, navigate dangerous waters, and master precise movement to help a shrimp escape capture. Play through a story-driven journey or test your skills in endless survival mode.

4771490.title: The Sleepless Nights Origins Demo
4771490.short_description: A first-person psychological horror walking simulator. The same rain-soaked corporate street, looping. Notice what's wrong before it notices you back.

4144510.title: Freefall '95
4144510.short_description: 在这款快节奏的街机冒险游戏中，连锁巨型特技连击，躲避致命残骸，追逐超高分数。在这趟1995年的厄运航班上，赚取硬币、升级能力、收集稀有物品，并揭开一段狂野的、扭曲时间的剧情。

4716110.title: Heroes of the Triangle: Mask Rush Demo
4716110.short_description: In this chaotic party game, you must hold onto the sacred Lunara Mask as long as you can. Oh! But your rivals will try to beat it out of your hands. Move with agility to chase down or escape from your opponents, and sabotage their attacks with precise parries. Who can complete this hilarious ritual?

4780690.title: Forty Foes Demo
4780690.short_description: 握紧铁拳，战斗一触即发……！《Forty Foes》是一款横版清版动作冒险游戏，致敬《双截龙》（Double Dragon）、《忍者蛙》（Battletoads）和《时空忍者》（Turtles in Time）等街机黄金时代的传世经典。

4775440.title: Dark Eyes - Super Soldier 2 Demo
4775440.short_description: Continue the fight in the Dark Eyes universe as the Super Soldier battles the Delma and the elite Alpha commander. Experience fast-paced combat, massive battles, stealth, upgrades, and powerful abilities in this chaotic sci-fi action shooter.

4766270.title: Channel 453 Demo
4766270.short_description: A gothic psychological thriller romance visual novel. A man inside the screen calls your name — as if he has been waiting for you.

4183530.title: A Factory Roguelike
4183530.short_description: 设计高效的生产流水线，以满足不断增长的箱子需求。策略性地选择奖励礼包和研究模块，扩建你的工厂并优化效率。

4751040.title: RobotzZz Demo
4751040.short_description: A robot, after humanity. The beat builds the world. Chase it or fall behind. Chain pickups, build combos, survive three stages of escalating rhythm.

4702840.title: Politisim Demo
4702840.short_description: Run for President of the United States. Fight through a state-by-state primary, pick a running mate at the convention, trade blows across every televised debate, and hold your coalition together on election night — one decision a week, in a country paying attention to every one.

4716570.title: DarkStone Restoration Demo
4716570.short_description: Darkstone Restoration brings the classic action RPG back to modern PCs with improved stability, compatibility, controls, readability, and quality-of-life improvements — while preserving the spirit of the original game.

4646230.title: Necroforge: Outbreak
4646230.short_description: Fight through a dark fantasy outbreak in this action roguelite. Survive escalating waves, shape your build with relics and upgrades, and climb the online leaderboard in score-driven runs.

4769940.title: The Blood Mage 2 Demo
4769940.short_description: The Blood Mage 2 is a turn-based Puzzle/Dungeon Crawler RPG hybrid. You play as a blood mage, so your health doubles as mana pool. Fight against different creatures and explore the environments to reach your goal!

4616780.title: Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales
4616780.short_description: 《超越土壤：农场与故事》将耕作与生存完美融合。建造属于你自己的农场，在荒野中求生。完成任务，拯救你忠诚的狗狗，并与好友在线合作，体验史诗般的乡村冒险。

4032090.title: Final Strategy
4032090.short_description: 《最终战略》是一款严肃、现代的即时战略游戏，专注于大规模战争与直接单位操控。指挥精英部队，与时间赛跑，阻止一场由冷战遗留武器库所构建的失控核行动。

4771200.title: Monkey Wave Demo
4771200.short_description: Monkey Wave is a fast-paced action clicker where you defend your banana stash against waves of hostile apes. Click rapidly to defeat primates and epic bosses in solo, co-op, and PvP modes. Deploy strategic abilities and survive the chaos of the jungle.

4619100.title: Shock and Gnaw
4619100.short_description: Shock and Gnaw is an FPS where you fight an ever growing horde of monsters with a "gun-game" like model for earning new weapons. Kills will earn you stronger weapons. As time progresses, the monsters will become stronger, so take them out as fast as you can before they outpace you!

2942780.title: Bloobs Adventure Idle
2942780.short_description: A massive RuneScape-inspired idle RPG built for long-term progression. Train 24 skills, defeat bosses, collect over 500 souls, and bank offline time to accelerate your progress whenever you choose.

4792320.title: 凉面爱情故事 demo
4792320.short_description: 这是一部轻松愉快的短篇视觉小说，您将通过不同选项指引男主走向不同结局。原本是历史学研究生的许埠，在放弃学业后，成为了一名老师，但本该平凡的人生却因一次学校的“内定”，而朝向着另一条航道前进。

4747780.title: Chrome Survivor Demo
4747780.short_description: Chrome Survivors! the DEMO! Augment your characters, level up, destroy hordes of vile enemies looking to crash the concerts! This is a Demo for Chrome Survivor, a horizontal slice that has no time limit, only a limit on some features as explained in the description.

4532510.title: Blood Welkin Demo
4532510.short_description: Slaughter hordes of abominations and buy upgrades to build your kit to become the ultimate killing machine. YOU ARE NOT CRAZY.

3865640.title: Glass Hand
3865640.short_description: Build card queues, clear escalating Nodes, unlock new decks and Modules, and chase satisfying combo turns in a chill glass-and-water deckbuilding roguelike.

4780830.title: Lil Laundry Lane Demo
4780830.short_description: Run a hand-painted little laundromat that's all yours. Take in orders from the neighborhood's regulars, tend each load with care, and sink into the soothing rhythm of cleaning clothes.

4779750.title: BomBom Saga Demo
4779750.short_description: Puzzles, limited ammo and cute and outgoing humanoid Kokeshi doll robot with an AI that becomes self-aware.

4066910.title: Ragdoll Chimps Demo
4066910.short_description: 《Ragdoll Chimps》是一款基于物理的沙盒游戏，拥有超大的开放世界和丰富多样的活动。种植、采矿、钓鱼、收藏品、任务、自定义、战斗、竞速、小游戏，应有尽有！支持单人游戏、分屏合作模式以及PVP对战模式。

4763630.title: PinRogue Demo
4763630.short_description: PinRogue is a pinball roguelike. Build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!

4767080.title: 维度核心：紫水晶 Demo
4767080.short_description: 一款Roguelite策略塔防游戏。每局不同的塔、事件与强化。统筹资源，协同作战，守护维度核心。

4617250.title: Set In Stone Demo
4617250.short_description: Explore a unique level and fight a boss! Get a taste of Set In Stone's platforming and fighting mechanics without getting the main game spoiled. This small sample contains secrets to find and bits of lore, can you find them all?

1731510.title: Olmari ja T-paita
1731510.short_description: A narrative game about a hypothetical Finnish e-sport commentator legend whose daily life unravels through the act of putting on t-shirts. Dive into Olmari’s world – where did that t-shirt wander off to this time? Challenges arise!

4705950.title: Dark Lessons Demo
4705950.short_description: 你被困在了自己老师的家中，手上唯一能够对抗黑暗的，只有一根摇曳不定的蜡烛。在这个洛夫克拉夫特式的噩梦中，你需要破解重重谜题，揭开这个家族扭曲的过往，并找到逃出生天的方法。不过当心：阴影中还潜伏着别的什么东西……此外，似乎有个声音在哀求你的帮助。

3285960.title: The Victor Initiative
3285960.short_description: The Initiative was a Welsh government facility that was mysteriously abandoned in the 60s, with rumours of terrifying supernatural threats lurking inside. Will you take the plunge?

4687140.title: Immortal Dao Idle Demo
4687140.short_description: Immortal Dao Idle Reborn as a heaven-defying genius in a brutal mortal world, harness ancient Qi, shatter realm barriers, and crush rivals in this addictive idle cultivator inspired by xianxia or wuxia novels.

4772160.title: Perspective Protocol Demo
4772160.short_description: Perspective Protocol is a first-person puzzle game where you manipulate perspective to solve puzzles. Switch between 2D and 3D to overcome obstacles and escape the facility of the evil Dr. Gamblebert.

4765710.title: SHED Demo
4765710.short_description: Flush your friends. Burn the deck. SHED everything. SHED is a competitive card-shedding game where your goal is simple: get rid of everything before your opponents do.

4735290.title: Space Savory Demo
4735290.short_description: 在一个不太遥远的星系中... 一家卫生状况堪忧的餐馆，充满了黑暗的秘密和黑色幽默，位于宇宙虚无的中心。 欢迎来到 Space Savory。别被外表欺骗——宇宙中最美味的味道就在这里烹饪。 (仅限于可观测部分。)

3388590.title: Wrecking Wave
3388590.short_description: Wrecking Wave is an explosive action game with physics-based destruction focused on Challenge and Speedrun. Unleash a wave of chaos and smash cities, chase high scores and stop a mad scientist from polluting your ocean with toxic waste.

4585480.title: Entropy Demo
4585480.short_description: Entropy is a tactical turn-based RPG inspired by classic JRPGs. Assemble your party of mercenaries and forge your own path towards an expedition into hell to stop the demonic incursion. Choices you make along the way will determine the fate of your world.

4618000.title: Inseco Demo
4618000.short_description: To survive a dying world, you must witness the end of humanity. Experience a high-tension point-and-click horror adventure where every brutal choice shapes your fate. As the world molts into something monstrous, how much of your humanity will you shed to survive the swarm?

4686510.title: Ctrl+Alt+Defeat Zero Humanity Demo
4686510.short_description: 一款2D Roguelike生存遊戲，講述機器人在世界末日對抗荒誕的人類領袖的故事。遊戲包含一波又一波的敵人、建築系統、史詩級Boss戰，以及為征服南極洲的玩家準備的無限模式。混亂從未如此令人興奮。

4304930.title: Chef Knight
4304930.short_description: 在这款温馨的奇幻风格增量成长游戏中，你需要通过猎杀获取烹饪原料。斩杀怪物，将它们变成美味佳肴，打造你自己的地下城美食帝国！

4738850.title: Stick Scholars Demo
4738850.short_description: A social deduction party game where players parkour to school, answer trivia, and hunt down a hidden Class Clown who is sabotaging to try and make the entire group fail!

4589280.title: BRUMLEY Demo
4589280.short_description: A co-op zombie horde shooter set in a West Yorkshire town gone very, very wrong. Fight off waves of the undead, collect coins, buy bigger weapons, and uncover the dark secret rotting at the heart of Brumley. Up to 8 players. No survivors expected.

4389010.title: Caribbean Frontier
4389010.short_description: Start with your ship and a couple of coins to conquer the caribbean frontier. Use trade, diplomancy or piracy to gather wealth. Control cities, build new ships for you fleet and expand your influence! Or become a well known pirate that every vessel fears.

3200290.title: Sister Ray
3200290.short_description: 2D RPG about the brutal daily life of Ray - an artist struggling with addiction, who takes care of her little sister. Look after your condition - no one should know about the addiction. Improve your skills, sell paintings, do everything to ease the withdrawal. Survive and look for a way out.

4744920.title: Death Kitchen Demo
4744920.short_description: Death Kitchen is a fast-paced online co-op horror cooking game. Coordinate with your friends to serve alien customers who can kill you if you make a mistake. Embrace the chaos and deliver quality with your new intergalactic restaurant chain.

4752180.title: Mym's Sword Demo
4752180.short_description: Defeat powerful foes and discover a colorful world full of mystery and wonder in this exploratory action platformer! A wandering beast discovers a magic sword, but can she uncover the truth of its origins, and resist the powers that created it?

3143910.title: 纹身清除模拟器
3143910.short_description: 扮演一位经验丰富的纹身清除专家，在轻松舒缓的节奏中，专注于令人平静的纹身去除过程。游戏设定在繁华都市中的一间小型工作室，你的每一位客户都有着同一个目标：抹去过去的印记——那些曾经的图案、文字、秘密与故事。

4776750.title: Funny Rummy Demo
4776750.short_description: This table feels familiar... the rest of it? A little funny. Funny Rummy is a rummy-based roguelike deckbuilder where the rules make sense, the combos don't, and the dream ends if you don't hit your score.

4627630.title: Barnacle
4627630.short_description: Investigate an abandoned server frozen in time. Explore liminal, blocky spaces, uncover strange anomalies, and piece together what went wrong. The deeper you go, the more the world shifts, watching and reacting to your presence.

4352290.title: Testimony - Night Underground
4352290.short_description: Mandy, a shy 23-year-old girl, accompanies her friends Alice and Karen into the depths of a network of secret tunnels. What begins as a simple photo-taking adventure turns into a nightmare when, deep underground, an unexpected event unfolds.

4656830.title: Runebound Legends
4656830.short_description: A tactical match-3 RPG where every move powers your party. Build teams of unique heroes, master elemental strengths and weaknesses, and unleash powerful ultimates in turn-based battles across a fantasy campaign full of monsters, bosses, and progression.

4779130.title: Seal The Breach Demo
4779130.short_description: The Demo for Seal The Breach. A 3D survival experience set within a cramped one-man submarine exploring a hostile ocean trench.

4700530.title: THE WELL IS NOT EMPTY Demo
4700530.short_description: The well has gone dry. It's up to you to find out why. Traverse through abandoned tunnels. Discover remnants of a ritual never meant to be seen. Power dying machinery to bring light into darkness. Dig into broken earth and crawl your way out. Down here you’re not exploring... you're trespassing.

4689860.title: Cold War Battles Demo
4689860.short_description: Lead Cold War formations in quick, turn based, hex‑and‑counter battles spanning 5 decades of real and hypothetical conflicts. With over 250 units, more than a dozen factions and varied theatres - from Africa to the Golan Heights, Europe and more, Cold War Battles await.

4681550.title: Cargo Runner: Faction Fracture Demo
4681550.short_description: One wrong delivery can start a war. Smuggle cargo through fractured space in a top-down roguelite where Tetris-style packing meets twin-stick combat and three factions are always watching.

4559080.title: 精气神灵
4559080.short_description: 来体验一次五分钟的人生如何？对中国传统文化中的“精气神”概念进行全新演绎的三消益智游戏等你来体验

4760180.title: Faithless Water Demo
4760180.short_description: Freshly awakened, you discover that the underwater station sheltering you is deserted. There is nothing but death here, and no one will come to help you. Dive yourself into this classic survival horror game and explore a vast environment filled by nightmarish creatures.

3464520.title: Island of Giant Trees
3464520.short_description: This is a casual game.where you will take on the role of the protagonist and explore this dream world. The gameplay is very simple, just looking for butterflies.

4727810.title: Blooming Winter
4727810.short_description: A old-school top-down dungeon crawler where you explore and fight through the gardens of an old, abandoned castle. The game starts off simple, with new mechanics and more complicated room layouts being added as you go.

4439190.title: KILLFLOW Demo
4439190.short_description: KILLFLOW 是一款设定在时尚程序生成世界中的超高速复古 FPS。使用毁灭性武器消灭红色疯子，防止自己被腐化，并冲击最高分。

4207520.title: Chivalware Demo
4207520.short_description: 《骑士盘骑士》是一款节奏紧张的三消型动作Roguelite游戏。在网格状的战场上实时考验你的反应速度与协调能力：闪避攻击、组合地块为武器充能，并寻找最佳时机发起进攻。

4213520.title: GEODE
4213520.short_description: In this top-down, multiplayer, co-op game, you must protect your Core Crystal by any means necessary. Build up your defenses, explore, refine, and upgrade to reach your goal. Play alone or with up to 8 people.

3019270.title: Let's Café
3019270.short_description: Food makes everything better in this cozy café business simulator. Discover recipes and set your menu to rake in those tips and five-star reviews. Solve your fuzzy clientele’s problems with the power of good cookin’ and earn the favor of satisfied customers.

4730750.title: Frog Island Demo
4730750.short_description: Start your new life as a caretaker for an island of frogs in this cozy creature-collector! Build your dream island, discover magical wildlife, and uncover the island's many hidden secrets, to try and piece together the past life you've somehow forgotten.

4717650.title: Mystic Diary: Wizard's Legacy Collector's Edition
4717650.short_description: Journey through time to uncover hidden clues and family secrets in a magical hidden-object adventure!

2962260.title: Recursive Riftfall
2962260.short_description: Explore liminal dungeons with all your friends to collect loot while avoiding hazards. Proximity chat, exotic monsters, powerful equipment, and no set player cap.

4030830.title: Focus Grove：专注森林
4030830.short_description: 《Focus Grove：专注森林》 是一款与你共同成长的专注伙伴。通过完成现实生活中的任务来建设你的农场、使用生产力工具并解锁全新内容。提升你的专注力、幸福感以及工作与生活的平衡。

4244440.title: Exark Demo
4244440.short_description: Exark is a run-based engine builder where you command a gigantic ark-ship. Construct buildings, hire crew with unique skills, and exploit powerful synergies to survive your voyage to the rim of the world.

4601290.title: Cosmic Heist Demo
4601290.short_description: 冷战已经过去，现在是黄金战争。你和你的团队正在执行政府“黄金计划”的第11次宇宙劫掠任务，目标是夺取太空中曾经存在过的所有黄金！务必做到完美、迅速、干净利落，赶在其他政府之前完成！让我们再次让太空空无一物！

4353410.title: Prowl Demo
4353410.short_description: Prowl is a fast, turn-based roguelite where combat plays out through patterns. Pick an animal. Modify its attacks and movement, manipulate the board, and outplay overwhelming odds one tile at a time.

4349340.title: Prowl
4349340.short_description: Prowl is a fast, turn-based roguelite where combat plays out through patterns. Pick an animal. Modify its attacks and movement, manipulate the board, and outplay overwhelming odds one tile at a time.

4666150.title: Tank Arena Demo
4666150.short_description: Tank Arena is a chaotic top-down multiplayer tank shooter built for fast, explosive battles with friends. Jump into the arena, blast each other with shells, and see who survives the longest.

2900050.title: Lost in Art: a Miniature Realm
2900050.short_description: 在这款解谜冒险游戏中，探索充满东方神话、被遗忘的民间故事和令人惊讶的历史事件的微型宇宙。走进真实的艺术作品，通过解决独特的谜题揭开神秘面纱，成为微型族群的英雄。

4724620.title: Paraquito
4724620.short_description: On the wings of courage, a small parakeet faces dangers and predators in a vibrant 2D world to rescue their missing brother. Overcome platforming challenges in this heartfelt journey of resilience and family.

4621960.title: Juggling Cup Demo
4621960.short_description: 快速休息一下，玩得开心！ 在屏幕底部，一个足球正在等你！

4482650.title: CS Manager Demo
4482650.short_description: CS Manager is a deep and tactical eSports manager game. Make key decisions on rosters, strategies, and practice, and take on your opponents in real time matches. Rise to the top of the circuit in a simulation where every tactical choice matters.

4765220.title: Buerokratie Idler: Germany Demo
4765220.short_description: Try the opening slice of Buerokratie Idler: Germany. Process applications, collect stamps, unlock early upgrades, and see how the administrative machine begins to move.

4710230.title: Armory Crafter Demo
4710230.short_description: Armory Crafter is a modular weapon system that allows you to create weapon models for your games, change their textures, color or size and export them directly to a 3D file format, ready to use in your game or any other 3D project. Free version allows to create swords only.

4782340.title: 掘地潜者 试玩版
4782340.short_description: 着陆，采矿，装满背包，返回飞船。 成为掘地潜者，在这款增量游戏中，你将前往各种星球，采矿卖钱，升级装备，并和各类当地生物热情交流。

4791080.title: Mandate of Heaven : Dynasty Breakout Idle Demo
4791080.short_description: 放置增量打砖块游戏，带你穿越4000年中国历史。弹射农民、弩兵与火药。击败王朝Boss。解锁新单位。看着数字无止境地攀升。

4733070.title: LUREFOLD Demo
4733070.short_description: 在《LUREFOLD》中，你将与各种对手展开单人 PVE 对决，通过收集和组合上百种独特道具，不断强化自己的牌组。看似普通的一手牌，在巧妙搭配下也能触发惊人的连锁效果，逆转整场战局。 这是一款融合扑克与策略构筑的 Roguelike 冒险游戏。每一次冒险都是全新的策略实验，每一种组合都可能带来意想不到的惊喜。单局游戏仅需 5-15 分钟，但每次挑战的对手配置和掉落道具都不同，策略永远有优化空间。 一同踏上这段充满变数的奇妙旅程吧～

4763170.title: Humankind in a nutshell Demo
4763170.short_description: A civilization-themed slot-machine roguelike where you build a deck of symbols, spin the board each turn to harvest food, gold, and knowledge, and guide your people from the ancient campfire to the modern age before the ever-growing tribute consumes you.

4770890.title: Uraz the Journalist (Demo)
4770890.short_description: Every headline has a cost. Play the demo of a story-rich psychological drama where you decide what the city sees — and watch what it turns you into.

4655500.title: Dark Watching Chapter 2 Demo
4655500.short_description: After leaving the bunker, you've arrived at the shopping mall, but your sister is still missing. Solve simple puzzles and survive the dangers lurking in the dark...

4034190.title: 瓶の中のサカナのために
4034190.short_description: 在一片广袤的沙漠中央，你发现了一个小瓶子里装着一条鱼。 它似乎想要什么东西。 解开散落在沙地上的谜题，收集这条鱼想要的物品。

4679700.title: Heroic Musical Chairs Demo
4679700.short_description: Face off against your friends and family in this epic take on musical chairs! Play locally or online as tiny wizard athletes ready to do anything to win. Special powers, dirty tricks, and dozens of crazy arenas: when the music stops, chaos begins!

3635320.title: Cosy Housing
3635320.short_description: Cozy Housing 是一款轻松惬意的游戏，你可以在 宁静舒缓的氛围中建造并装饰自己的房屋。 探索丰富多样的独特家具与装饰品， 尽情释放你的创造力。

3685360.title: Voidcutter Fuzor
3685360.short_description: Battle through waves of enemies, taking their power for your own in this retro-styled arcade shoot'em up.

4780070.title: Showrunners Demo
4780070.short_description: A single player, fast paced, speed running platformer focused on building up and maintaining high speeds, performing tricks and mastering the use of movement to achieve the fastest time and greatest score. Find and unlock new movement options to help you escape the gameshow you are trapped in.

4462730.title: Rocket1994
4462730.short_description: Rocket1994 is a casual rocket action game set within a program called the "C-40 Campaign." Pilot a physics-based rocket and reach the goal. As you progress, the tone of the guidance begins to shift. What is the true purpose of the C-40 Campaign? 9 stages. About 30 minutes. Multiple endings.

4716950.title: Bait Ball Party Demo
4716950.short_description: 一款最多支持6人的实时台球乱斗游戏。扮演地精称霸排行榜，使用道具暗算你的朋友，并用拳头揍他们来赢得胜利。

4728980.title: Fluff'n'Roll Demo
4728980.short_description: Roll, tilt, and break the rules. Build speed, hit impossible angles, and discover skips that shouldn't exist. Learn the levels, master the momentum, and turn messy attempts into clean runs.

4636380.title: TheLastHelicopter
4636380.short_description: Six jerrycans. An abandoned city. Spiders hunting you. Find the fuel and reach the last helicopter before you're surrounded.

4319310.title: Corner Arcade Demo
4319310.short_description: 在这款放置经营模拟游戏中，实现你的梦想，亲手打造并运营专属于你的游戏厅。 购置街机设备，随心规划并打造你的专属空间。 经营游戏厅、提升等级、升级设备，吸引各路高手玩家，看着他们为游戏一掷千金，让你赚得盆满钵满！之后便可悠闲坐观，享受游戏厅的热闹喧嚣。

4646380.title: Ball Buster Breakout Demo
4646380.short_description: AIM! FIRE! OBLITERATE! Build chaotic idle combos with your balls in this hyper-kinetic breakout idle game.

4184670.title: Fishing Party VR
4184670.short_description: Stop clicking, start casting! Experience the most immersive physics-based VR angling where every flick of the wrist and every fight matters. Master 3 fishing methods across 5 stunning locations, hunt 20 unique species in dynamic weather, and dominate tournaments. Just... watch the ceiling fan.

4236080.title: A little Jumpingspider's Garden Adventure (Day 1+2)
4236080.short_description: Experience the world through the eyes of a cute little jumping spider! All levels have completely different mechanics and each one challenges you in its own unique way. Let's go for an amazing ride!

4725770.title: Foosball Manager Demo
4725770.short_description: 《Foosball Manager》是一款桌上足球管理模拟游戏。搜罗、签下并训练你的阵容，制定战术，然后在球员于物理球桌上自主行动时从场边发号施令。逐级晋升，成为桌上足球的传奇。

4657510.title: The Butler's Mansion
4657510.short_description: You have to escape your butler... Before he tries to "Cure" you...

4764120.title: Rotted - A Brain Rot Simulator Demo
4764120.short_description: Rotted is a satirical dark-comedy survival roguelite where attention is your only currency. Scroll to peak Brain Rot, dodge real life, and climb a live global leaderboard. Plot twist: every run secretly builds the machine that replaces you. Doomscrolling has never been this dangerous.

4751760.title: Typing Drag Racer Demo
4751760.short_description: A competitive online multiplayer typing racing game where speed comes from skill, build flow, hit boosts, and out type your opponents.

4699010.title: Anatolian Horror Stories : Curse In Bayramdere
4699010.short_description: Anatolian Horror Stories:Curse in Bayramdere is a third-person survival horror game that puts you in the shoes of an ordinary young woman facing an unknown evil.No special skills.Just the desperate need to find out what happened to the people she loves and the will to survive long enough to do it.

3346670.title: HELI 100
3346670.short_description: Isometric bullet hell sci-fi shooter in a futuristic atmosphere

4765980.title: Soul Ampz Demo
4765980.short_description: Summoned to another world, your choices will shape its fate. Build bonds with companions, unlock multiple endings, and turn monsters into power in this story-driven turn-based JRPG set in a handcrafted pixel fantasy world.

4713710.title: Ballgame Demo
4713710.short_description: Aim, bounce, smash and grind your way through Ballgame, a ballsy physics platformer where you ARE the ball. Compete in challenging tournaments, speed-driven heists, and physics-bending courses where the precision of golf meets the speed of pinball!

4313300.title: BLOCKUELITE
4313300.short_description: A roguelite game where you play as a block shooting blocks at other shapes.

4764820.title: Tidy Up Demo
4764820.short_description: A peaceful cleaning and organizing game where you explore different locations, collect trash, clean stains, and arrange items to turn mess into perfection.

4540100.title: Silver Pines Demo
4540100.short_description: 《银松镇》是一款生存、恐怖、类银河战士恶魔城游戏，背景设定在美国小镇。在噩梦般的恐怖中奋战，破解重重谜题，同时管理稀缺资源，逐步揭开那些可能掌握救赎之钥的谜团。

4737480.title: Sensory Overload Demo
4737480.short_description: A dropper game designed to overwhelm your senses. Twisting tunnels, psychedelic patterns, and breathing walls assault your sense of balance as the chaos escalates with every level.

4127690.title: Cozy Cooking
4127690.short_description: Cozy Cooking is a strategic roguelike Deckbuilder/Survival Game wrapped in a vibrant anime art style, where every decision shapes your run and no two cards play quite the same. Build a powerful deck, face challenging enemies, and see how far you can push.

3191530.title: Irradiate 235
3191530.short_description: Discover and automate unique materials. Engineer the machines and tools for your factory. Handle hazardous materials to make near-limitless energy. Use your own tools to navigate a labyrinth of alien passages and uncover dangerous tunnels in this innovative Automation and Engineering game.

4772630.title: Bibidi Bibidi! Demo
4772630.short_description: Bibidi Bibidi! is a wizardcore roguelike deckbuilder where you combine cards in your spellbook to cast unique and powerful spells. Crawl through twisting tunnels and fight maddening monsters to find the perfect build for your wizard. Every turn is a puzzle!

4573940.title: Fugaz Demo
4573940.short_description: With only a flute at your disposal, play songs to solve puzzles. Explore a dark place looking for an exit before the darkness grows too dense. In this immersive psychological horror game, knowledge is the key to put the pieces together.

4764220.title: Space Pew Pew Demo
4764220.short_description: Aboard your ship, destroy the hordes of aliens attacking you by choosing your weapons and upgrades as you play, and defeat the final boss! In this roguelite, each ship has a different weapon layout, giving each one its own unique playstyle. Then create your ship and develop your own strategy!

4564990.title: GraveBoy CrowFeet - A Quest for Skulls
4564990.short_description: A spooky fun 2D adventure with focus on exploration and light puzzling. Help GraveBoy to collect 10 rare skulls to save his father from a demon!

3039930.title: Seedborne Soldiers
3039930.short_description: An auto battler roguelike made by obsessive fans of both genres. Draft fighters with matching Traits to power up your team. A massive content pool enables a large variety of builds. Weigh risk vs. reward every round as you carve a path toward each boss.

4423120.title: Alley Dodge
4423120.short_description: BEWARE! Giant red cube-shaped obstacles are steadily approaching. You must lean, duck, or climb to avoid colliding with them… or be exploded into smithereens! So get ready to get good (or even more good) at getting out of the way in Alley Dodge. It might even be fun!

4315670.title: Pets Survivors
4315670.short_description: 《宠物幸存者》是一款生存类roguelike游戏，你将与成群的怪物战斗，努力生存到时间耗尽。选择你的宠物，挑选你最喜欢的武器，升级你的技能，看看你能生存多久！

4693900.title: 13 MASCA Demo
4693900.short_description: 你能... 找出那个不太对劲的人吗?

4054480.title: HeroTail: Survivors
4054480.short_description: HeroTail Survivors 是一款以回合为基础的 roguelike 游戏，你的英雄们会组成一条活生生的链条。升级、招募追随者，并叠加强大的套装加成，在与一波又一波的敌人战斗中解锁永久升级。

4605960.title: Drako: Blood Heist Demo
4605960.short_description: 《喋血喵星人：猫腻满满》—— 今晚，血库清零！欢迎来到吸血鬼猫的暗黑肉鸽世界！ 黑进后台、魔改武器、捣鼓副业……总之，不把这城里血库“连猫带盆”端个干净，决不罢休！

4678520.title: Hearty Haven
4678520.short_description: Your a specialist entering the children's wellness centre, its your job to find the truth and deactivate the robots, the mascots will hunt you... Only equipped with a company issued magnet watch, its up to you to hide from these monsters and survive with your body still in one piece.

4677080.title: PigPonyPocalypse Demo
4677080.short_description: 一款融合了顶级MMO团本机制精髓的硬核Boss Rush游戏。破解机制，开创属于你自己的战术，击败难度极高的Boss。但你的打法真的是最高效的吗？与其他玩家一较高下，在全球伤害排行榜上夺取第一的宝座吧。

4752050.title: PULSARI Demo
4752050.short_description: 一款讲究精准操作的街机节奏游戏，音乐不会自动响起，除非你亲手赢得它。从四个方向击打节拍，逐层构建每首曲目；守住节奏，因为一次失误就可能让音乐崩塌。

4763690.title: Beyond Yardwork Simulator Demo
4763690.short_description: 接下你的第一个任务，让荒废的花园焕然一新。发动割草机，拿起吹叶机清理小径上的落叶，并用高压清洗机冲洗肮脏的砖面。拔除杂草，分类残余垃圾，享受完美秩序带来的纯粹成就感！

3584870.title: Lucha Chess
3584870.short_description: 在这款 Roguelike 自动战斗游戏中组建墨西哥摔跤手的终极团队。将独特的单位与强大的物品和文物相结合，在战斗中发现数百种协同作用。

4613920.title: The Ayna Demo
4613920.short_description: The Ayna 是一款背景设定在土耳其的心理探索游戏，灵感源自一位女歌手的 MV 美学和歌词主题。玩家的任务是发现演唱会现场的异常并揭开真相。

4463700.title: Castle in the Sands
4463700.short_description: 《沙中古堡》是一部像素风视觉小说，故事发生在一个以《一千零一夜》与北非为灵感构建的世界之中。这场冒险从沙漠腹地开始，将带你一步步踏入充满魔法与危机的奇幻秘境。

4677050.title: Reign Down Demo
4677050.short_description: A physics based, point-and-click tower defense game where you equip castles with traps to defend your king. Be creative and embrace the chaos that ensues!

4646410.title: Fill The Void Demo
4646410.short_description: Experience the power of BEING a black hole. Consume everything. Grow. Morph between a void that swallows the world and a rolling sphere that bounces, dashes, and wall-jumps across themed diorama levels. Inspired by Katamari Damacy.

4750430.title: Dino Dynasty: Evolved Demo
4750430.short_description: A stylized 3D action–adventure where you fight, explore, and evolve to lead your dinosaur herd to dominance through survival and adaptation.

4746770.title: Far Away Kingdom Demo
4746770.short_description: A fast-paced arcade gallery shooter inspired by Wild Guns and Cabal. Switch between fire and ice, dodge intense bullet patterns, and defeat powerful bosses. Unlock hidden routes, discover secret encounters, and chase high scores across handcrafted stages.

4745220.title: ころコロ 2 Demo
4745220.short_description: corocoro 2! A gyro-exclusive casual game where you tilt the ground to guide 5 uniquely shaped balls to the goal. Overcome obstacles across 50 stages in the full version!

4665520.title: When Work's A Bore Demo
4665520.short_description: A platformer where drill-bots jump, drill, and race their way across tunnels and courses. Build up high speeds by boring through the ground and launch past obstacles, over obstructions, and outpace your rivals. Adventure alone or race against 3 friends in local splitscreen and online.

3740010.title: Underchoice
3740010.short_description: 《Underchoice》是一款以密闭避难所为背景的生存模拟游戏。成为避难所的管理者，决定那些前来敲门之人的命运。你的每一个决定，无论是收留陌生人、消耗资源，还是赌上避难所的安全，都会带来独特的后果，并导向多种不同的结局。记得谨慎选择！

4725080.title: Jumping Wroc Cat - Big Silesian Tour
4725080.short_description: Meet Mruczek, a magical cat from Wroclaw, whose peaceful life is interrupted by a mysterious dream. Set off with Mruczek on a journey, starting from the hidden corners of Wroclaw, to find magical artifacts and save the world from grey chaos.

3353390.title: Starforged Legacy
3353390.short_description: 在激烈的科幻幸存者类游戏中，您的决策与火力同样重要。指挥可定制的星际战舰，用 100 多种决定战略的升级来强化您的武库，消灭无穷无尽的宇宙战机编队！在群星间刻下你的传奇—或是死得其所！

4462300.title: The Doorframe Demo
4462300.short_description: Locked away in a facility far underground lies a mysterious and foreboding doorframe. There is no door, yet remains open a gateway into a familiar place. You are an employee whose job is to enter it, record what lies within, and get out. At least that was the case originally in this Survival Horror.

3760310.title: Heart of Gaia
3760310.short_description: 带领反抗军对抗一个试图唤醒远古邪恶、将盖亚拖入混乱的黑暗组织。探索广阔的蒸汽幻想世界，在这款动作RPG中挑战强敌，体验实时角色切换与动态战斗。

4461920.title: Superstring Transition: The Warp Ancestor
4461920.short_description: An AI returns from a relativistic test flight to find humanity gone. Explore a real data‑based solar‑system ephemeris, pilot spacecraft across accurate topological data, and push the limits of physics as you attempt escalating Superstring Transitions.

4773120.title: Arthur’s Tale Demo
4773120.short_description: Guide Arthur through a world that’s out to get him! Sprint, leap, and faceplant your way through a vibrant adventure overflowing with devious traps, oversized bosses, and enough "Try Again" screens to last a lifetime. It’s colorful, it’s chaotic, and yes—you’re probably going to fail. A lot.

4787240.title: COLORFALL Demo
4787240.short_description: 一款充满混乱的1-4人合作消除游戏，每位玩家仅控制1种颜色。通过抓取和投掷球体来触发连锁反应，在时间耗尽前完成任务，从下落的方块中生存。如果屏幕上堆满了你的颜色，清除障碍开路的重任就在你身上。

4732480.title: Echoes of Aethelgard Demo
4732480.short_description: Evolve your arsenal and become the bullet hell. Echoes of Aethelgard is a horde-survival roguelite featuring deep meta-progression, an explosive combo system, and devastating ultimate abilities. Survive the endless hordes and lift the curse of the Void Corruptor.

4754450.title: Peace Under His Roof Demo
4754450.short_description: Peace Under His Roof is a short psychological horror focused on atmosphere, sound, and the uneasy calm of a place that was never meant to feel safe.

4567480.title: ELLUSION
4567480.short_description: ELLUSION is an action puzzle bullet hell fully contained within a tiny 6x6 grid. A "controlled chaos" take on the genre all about mastering the flow of dodging within its spatially and rhythmically quantized simulation.

4716100.title: Let's Cook It! Demo
4716100.short_description: Scavenge for ingredients and cook them into tasty dishes with up to four players. Work together as a team to manage your restaurant and get out of debt. Build your own restaurant, unlock upgrades, and recruit NPCs!

4450460.title: Empluna – Preview Demo
4450460.short_description: Sandbox city building meets automation: Design unique buildings, create vibrant cities, and perfect production chains. Create a civilization that suits your style. Perfect for anyone who loves creativity and strategy!

4086760.title: Arcane Merchant
4086760.short_description: 在中世纪奇幻世界的中心地带开设你自己的店铺！从药水和宝剑到神秘水晶和传奇神器，应有尽有，让你的货架琳琅满目。设定价格，赢得顾客的信任，成为镇上最富有的商人！

4619290.title: Fatimopolis
4619290.short_description: 2005年新年刚刚到来，卢卡斯接到老板的电话，要求他前往Fatimopolis完成一些送货任务。这个神秘的小镇在一夜之间失去了所有的居民。

4714040.title: CoinDecker ~Deck Building Pusher~ Demo
4714040.short_description: 背负的债务高达1000兆金币。从140张以上的卡牌中组建15张牌组，组合多种效果的协同，向推币机撒出奖章 ― 常驻桌面一角的卡牌构筑×推币游戏。工作中、直播中、看视频时。不经意抬头，发现奖章已堆成山，素材也积攒了不少。解锁技能、偿还债务，每一步都由你来决定。这就是这款游戏的手感。以狂热模式奖章如雨倾泻的瞬间为动力，在"随手玩"中完成债务清偿。

4500270.title: Global Protocol: New World Order
4500270.short_description: 在 2026 年背景下的现代大战略模拟游戏中指挥任何国家。在塑造全球权力平衡的同时管理外交、经济、间谍活动和战争。在动态的地缘政治沙盒中领导超级大国，或将一个小国建设成为全球力量。

4782890.title: The bird of the North Demo
4782890.short_description: In 1921: a kidnapping, a revolution... Investigate and uncover the truth behind a dark, mysterious story.

4756080.title: Mini Murder Mysteries Demo
4756080.short_description: Solve cozy, crafty whodunits. Puzzle your way through nine unique investigations – and use your noggin to make intelligent deductions. Explore the evidence, scrutinize statements, and connect the dots.

4152450.title: Abyssal Anarchy
4152450.short_description: A fast-paced co-op spell-hell where each map pulls you deeper into the Abyss. Choose from 5 heroes and 14 spells, unlock upgrades, and survive alone or with friends as the magic grows wilder with every descent.

2178990.title: 汽水侠
2178990.short_description: 汽水即是抛瓦! 在《汽水侠》中化身超级汽水侠，捏爆汽水罐，用汽水的力量对抗邪恶外星人！在充满未知的宇宙中，探索神秘星球，搜集稀有汽水，打造专属的汽水武器，体验畅快淋漓的泼水射击快感！【现已全面支持中文】

3522470.title: BugSquash
3522470.short_description: You are a professional Bug Squasher. Clients reach out to you with their pest problems, and you'll respond to increasingly challenging infestations. With each successful job, you'll earn money to upgrade and expand your equipment and take on bigger, badder bugs.

4116340.title: Escape from Castle Porcrest
4116340.short_description: A brutal, atmospheric horror experience inside Castle Porcrest. Explore, survive, and escape.

4651820.title: Pizza Dash Demo
4651820.short_description: A high-speed first-person delivery game where movement is everything. Bunny hop, surf, and race the clock to climb the leaderboards and become the ultimate pizza courier!

3812320.title: The Odyssey of Commander Cookie
3812320.short_description: Take command of the PSS, Paw Space Squadron, and catfight your way through relentless swarms of cybermice. Scavenge their tech. Upgrade your ship and weapons and unlock a fleet of fellow cat heroes, as you claw your way to victory in this intense roguelite twin-stick shooter.

4684510.title: ARB: Alien Races Battle
4684510.short_description: ARB: Alien Races Battle is a lane-based alien auto-battler where strategy, economy, positioning, and army comp determine victory. Choose from 5 unique factions, command alien races, unlock upgrades + faction doctrines, and overwhelm your opponents through superior planning, control, and adaptation.

4737400.title: QuickShot Demo
4737400.short_description: QuickShot is a thrilling Western rogue-lite styled around an arcade shooting gallery. Defend Tumble Town as you face vile criminals and unique bosses! Discover powerful abilities, make run impacting decisions and keep your head level as you venture forth and brave the desert.

4714470.title: _archive Demo
4714470.short_description: _archive is an experimental software granting access to a fragment of reality beyond time and space. Our system renders this universe from a human perspective. We cannot guarantee what your exploration may uncover. Enjoy the open demo, and feel free to share feedback.

4656370.title: The Last Shot: Underworld Demo
4656370.short_description: 《最后一击：地下世界》将玩家带入一位年迈科学家的角色，他因一场邪恶的巧合，身处大都会地下城的深处——这里栖息着恐怖实验的受害者、失控的机器人，以及其他被抛弃至最底层的不幸者。为了偿还对生命的债务并重返家园，你必须运用自己的智慧和一切随手可得的物品，在这座地狱中存活下来。

4385190.title: MECHS
4385190.short_description: Mechs is a fast-paced mechanical reaction training game built to sharpen your reflexes, precision, and in-game mechanics. Push your speed, track performance, and master split-second decision-making to level up your gameplay.

4626330.title: Unknown Horizons Demo
4626330.short_description: Retro styled top-down space exploration adventure where you will meet new alien races, learn their secrets and build their trust to get their help to find a way home.

4604120.title: FARLUME: Into the Silent Dark
4604120.short_description: 一款沐浴在霓虹几何中的roguelite弹幕天堂。抓取进化为满屏混沌的武器，在多阶段BOSS中生存，穿越寂静黑暗追踪人类最后的信号。

4515400.title: Suck It Up!
4515400.short_description: Suck It Up! Is an action-adventure where you take the role of an exterminator, tasked with clearing a city of its critter infestation. Dust off your vacuum cleaner and suck up the pests to save Cloud Town!

4666850.title: Garden Of Being Demo
4666850.short_description: Garden of Being is a hand-drawn oil pastel art game and a quiet journal of moods. Plant flowers, dedicate gardens to loved ones, and create downloadable prints. A fusion of art and code where gardens come alive while you are in them, and wait silently when you leave.

3760520.title: Rogue 'n' Roll: Dice of Fate
3760520.short_description: 一款黑暗风格的骰子 Roguelike，每一次掷骰都在塑造你的命运。 构建强大协同，收集遗物，在残酷的回合制战斗中生存下来。

4518080.title: Dragon Climb
4518080.short_description: Dragon Climb 是一款基于物理的垂直攀登游戏，你将操控幼龙控制玻璃球。掌握冲力、平衡与精准操作，抵达顶峰，刷新排行榜成绩，并发现神秘蛋中隐藏的秘密。

4628900.title: Dear My Bot - Programming Game
4628900.short_description: Write, test, and break through. A programming puzzle game about the joy of trial and error.

4757810.title: 未知守则 限时免费
4757810.short_description: 《未知守则》是一款独立制作规则类多人联机恐怖游戏,支持1-4名玩家。

4641300.title: Rampallians Demo
4641300.short_description: Rampallians blends the resource gathering of strategy games with core card game mechanics from Trading Card Game classics. With an auto battler for combat, in a fantasy setting. Nearly 400 cards available, and future expansions to be free updates. So no pay to win, ever.

4661160.title: Farming Pixels Demo
4661160.short_description: A unique resource gathering game with quests, gambling, tools and a lot of loot. Play the first chapter of the main story and try to reach the highest possible rank - to eventually become the king of the pixels!

4547440.title: A Knight of Lothen
4547440.short_description: A dark fantasy metroidvania fueled by heavy metal. Fight, explore, and carve your path through the ruined kingdom of Lothen.

4530360.title: Imminence
4530360.short_description: A brutal 16-bit sci-fi shoot-’em-up inspired by the golden age of the Sega Genesis. Fight across multiple worlds, upgrade your ship, and confront the forces behind the Augmentation Program.

4677240.title: Astromental Incremental Demo
4677240.short_description: Mesmerizing incremental idle clicker game about space. When objects collide, you receive matter. Use this matter to unlock and upgrade objects in your star system. Use powerful Abilities. Dive into the Prestige system (Warp) with a wide Skill Tree, and discover new star systems with new bonuses.

4774260.title: S.E.X. Project: Simulated Emotional Xenotech Demo
4774260.short_description: Build emotional connections with synthetic beings in a sci-fi facility where every choice shapes their behavior and your fate.

4742600.title: The Towering Dungeon Demo
4742600.short_description: Fight your way through the levels of the Towering Dungeon. A unique Tower Defense blending exploration, strategy, and RPG elements. Explore, summon your defenses, customize your heroes, and overcome deadly dangers on your ascent toward the greatest secret in the universe!

4296980.title: Enter The Moshpit
4296980.short_description: A point-and-click adventure set in the Italian underground scene. Navigate the streets of Livorno as a local punk, solve inventory-based puzzles, and use branching dialogues to sneak into a hardcore concert. A short, satirical story featuring item combination and a cynical narrative.

4730210.title: Organic Evolution
4730210.short_description: Organic Evolution is a neon platformer set in a microcosm. Jump across organic structures, break blocks, avoid hostile creatures, and find keys to navigate through 8 biological environments.

4245820.title: ORBITAL
4245820.short_description: 这是一场太空冒险，你将解开身世之谜，并在遥远的太阳系中建立一个繁荣的文明。作为指挥官驾驶你的火箭，发展殖民地，建造星球升级设施，征服这片未知的太空。

4753180.title: Jarnasmal Demo
4753180.short_description: Survive a bullet hell where your Wi-Fi signal is your lifeline. Delve into underground facilities, fight off massive swarms of enemies, and strategically build a mesh network of signal repeaters. If your connection is strong, you're a powerhouse. If the signal drops, all you have is a shovel.

4728080.title: Design My Drink! Demo
4728080.short_description: Create the most beautiful, delicious looking drinks! Restore and manage your little cafe and meet locals.

4264680.title: Rogue Assault
4264680.short_description: 款实时战略军事游戏，让你直接指挥部队，无需等待建造时间，并拥有震撼的3D画面。游戏背景设定在后末日时代的欧洲——与其他指挥官结盟，为资源和领土而战，并在战争中不断提升自己的荣耀，成为真正的战争指挥官。

4660100.title: Streamchat: Horror Live Demo
4660100.short_description: A first-person livestream horror game where you explore abandoned locations, survive terrifying encounters, and experience dynamic audience interactions through realtime chat and donation systems.

3925190.title: Eclipse of Fate Demo
3925190.short_description: In a world haunted by echoes of ancient magic, young Lioren discovers a connection to reality-warping anomalies: Himself. Join him on a dangerous journey to discover the secrets of his connection to a rapidly destabilizing realm in a classic, story-driven JRPG - and decide the fate of the world!

4717200.title: Memo R.I.P. Demo
4717200.short_description: 拥有900多个手工制作的恐怖事件、实时语音多人模式、最终Boss，以及在被诅咒的飞船上推进的第一人称心理恐怖卡牌游戏。

4770330.title: Wheelchair For Two Demo
4770330.short_description: 在一辆轮椅上开启一场混乱的合作冒险。两名玩家各控制轮椅的一侧，必须齐心协力在残酷的障碍、危险的跳跃和基于物理的挑战中幸存下来。支持单人、本地合作或与好友在线联机——一个小小的失误就会让你们同时坠落。

3676840.title: Dino-Ducks Mayhem
3676840.short_description: Dino-Ducks Mayhem is a twin-stick shooter with bullet heaven vibes, wrapped around duck-builder system, set in a duck-tastic world and all about surviving as long as you can while everything explodes around you.

4050650.title: Shadow Monarchs Rise
4050650.short_description: Shadow Monarch’s Rise is a soulslike action RPG with fast, skill-based combat, many many quests, hidden treasures, epic bosses, and character progression. A Skilltree with epic Powers to unlock! Future updates will include more Skills, areas & Bosses who r gonna make u suffer!

4763420.title: Warrior's Memory The Hollow Strata Demo
4763420.short_description: In a world where countless warrior vessels lie dormant, a wandering soul fights for freedom. Build your 20-card deck from over 1,000 cards, then collect, fuse, and upgrade cards as you conquer the Hollow Strata.

4715050.title: 魔法少女症候群 Demo
4715050.short_description: 如果魔法少女成为一种职业，需要投简历，面试，签约事务所。每个魔法少女都要穿上战斗服，走进公众的视野，每一场战斗，都会被现场直播。那，怀揣着梦想的少女们，会如何踏上这条充满挑战的路？

4730310.title: Lost Lures Demo
4730310.short_description: Demo of the fishing adventure set in the northern wilderness. Learn fish behavior, read the waters and master your lures. Progress through a skill-based journey of quiet patience. Play solo or join friends online to complete shared missions and fish at your own pace.

3367430.title: Battleship Command
3367430.short_description: 在这款沉浸式二战海战模拟游戏中指挥强大的沙恩霍斯特号战列舰。以第一人称视角漫步甲板，操控炮术、雷达和导航系统，带领舰队航行在大西洋、北冰洋和地中海。与护航队交战，智斗敌军，在战争的惊涛骇浪中生存下来。

4728660.title: Midnight Nasi Goreng
4728660.short_description: Experience the grit of the Indonesian night shift. Manage a street food stall through accurate architectural spaces and eerie corridors. In this world of meticulous dread, the grind never ends—and something in the shadows is watching.

4639660.title: VELATO Demo
4639660.short_description: VELATO is a Poker-Bluff Roguelike Deckbuilder where players build a Joker-driven economy engine, manipulate AI opponents through bluffing, and survive escalating table pressure across each run.

1578390.title: My Garage
1578390.short_description: MY GARAGE is a car simulation game with main focus being simulating real car repair, maintenance and physics.

4566280.title: Container Hunter Simulator Demo
4566280.short_description: 从深海中打捞失落的集装箱，发掘其中的隐藏价值，并通过拍卖出售，打造你的海上贸易帝国。

4697060.title: Gobballing
4697060.short_description: Become the hero no one saw coming! Play as a ambitious goblin who dreams of glory and smashes his way through monsters using nothing but his trusty rock!

4791960.title: Bookstore Incremental Demo
4791960.short_description: 一款充满互动性的放置增量游戏，在这里经营你自己的书店！印刷并升级书籍，解锁新顾客、新员工、各种物品等等。

2678070.title: Phoenix 2
2678070.short_description: 一款具有经典街机玩法的现代射击游戏！开启史诗级战役，每天参与全新任务。收集、升级并掌握 100 多种独特战机，与其他玩家竞争，证明你是最强的王牌飞行员！

4725360.title: Fire Fire Royale
4725360.short_description: Tired of cheaters in 3D shooter games? This fast-paced cheats free 2D PvP battle royale shooter game will be your ultimate choice. Players can try different weapons and experience different battle styles, but most importantly, no cheaters are allowed! Players can also try different customizations.

4652280.title: Rituals of Demons Demo
4652280.short_description: A demon-hunting game where you investigate haunted locations, gather evidence to identify the entity, and perform the correct ritual to banish it—before it hunts you.

4775270.title: Paddle Together Demo
4775270.short_description: 踩！踩！踩！独自或与好友合作，依靠纯粹的踩踏力量攀登天空中的水道。充满挑战的赛道、混乱与惊喜正在你的上升之路上等待着你。

4634890.title: 心舞 Demo
4634890.short_description: 次世代3D换装音舞游戏。海量时装随心搭配，热门舞步神还原，抖音神曲等你解锁。偶遇交友，开启甜蜜心动之旅！
developers: 上海游牛信息科技有限公司
publishers: 辰炎翎网络科技（上海）有限公司

4536230.title: Economic Biathlon Demo
4536230.short_description: Test your wits in an arcade quiz. React quickly and overcome tricky challenges. You can set new records and compete in Economic Biathlon.

4769370.title: 中等生 Demo
4769370.short_description: 这是一部中式校园（高三）为背景的百合向视觉小说。 只要考上大学，一切都会好起来吗？手牵着手，心跳扑通扑通，我们只是朋友吗？大家说只是开个玩笑，感到不舒服是正常的吗？想要挣脱母亲的期待，这是不孝吗？您将跟随主角周语桐，探索青春期的疑惑，帮她作出选择。

4778030.title: Nile Express Demo
4778030.short_description: Build the first railway network in Africa. Create profitable routes in Egypt, from Alexandria to Aswan. Deliver passengers and goods to the right destinations. Take care of your railway network and deal with accidents.

4689720.title: Shmandala Demo
4689720.short_description: Shmandala is a delirious arcade-style shoot'em up choreographed to a banging soundtrack!

4734400.title: BAFF A
4734400.short_description: Minimalist, hardcore and challenging game in the genre of avoid-em up that will test your reflexes, timing and planning! This game is hard as hell!

4247130.title: Flamecraft Demo
4247130.short_description: 《龍焰魔法鎮》是一款支持 1-5 名玩家的策略游戏，充满魔法，轻松惬意。作为守焰人（Flamekeeper），你将帮助可爱的工匠龙找到理想家园。为城镇商店附魔，把龙卡牌放入其中，见证奇幻商业街的活力绽放。

4734220.title: Neon Sunset
4734220.short_description: A brave little sun has found himself in endless neon dungeons! Help him jump across platforms, collect coins, dodge devious enemies, and destroy blocks in search of hidden treasures.

4778740.title: OFFBEAT Demo
4778740.short_description: OFFBEAT is a music-tycoon game where you build the recording studio of your dreams. Collect and upgrade increasingly strange musical objects, complete jobs for cash, and record real, actual music.

4019180.title: ULTRA0
4019180.short_description: Enjoy a simple, easy-to-play pseudo-3D shooter! Upgrade your character with power-ups and take down the approaching monsters before they reach you.

4726250.title: The Tracy Arm Tsunami Experience
4726250.short_description: Explore Tracy Arm, Alaska and trigger a massive landslide tsunami in a first-person simulation with land, air, and water viewpoints.

4711990.title: Atlas Zone
4711990.short_description: 我们将卡牌与Roguelike类型相结合，并在此基础上加入了基于网格的地图机制。打造独特的牌组，邂逅不同的制作人，组建一支出色的队伍。与你的团队共同发展技能树，掌控整片区域。

3907110.title: Up Cards
3907110.short_description: UP CARDS 是一款轻度肉鸽的卡牌类游戏。在这个令人兴奋的游戏旅程中，你需要掌控卡牌局势，打出最佳组合，叠加扭转局势的额外效果，选择自己的永久奖励，通过不同的策略构建，达到更高的巅峰。

4587780.title: Girlsnite - Anime Building Battle TPS
4587780.short_description: Girlsnite is a fast-paced anime-style TPS where you build walls, floors, and other structures in real time. Fight intense 1v1 or survival battles, outplay CPU opponents, and customize your experience with VRM characters in this lightweight single-player building combat game.

4729900.title: FussyCraft Survival: Sandbox
4729900.short_description: Dig, build, cook, cast spells and survive royal levies in a darkly funny 2D pixel sandbox. Explore dangerous locations, manage resources, fight strange creatures and grow strong enough to challenge the king.

4780430.title: 抽号小队 Demo
4780430.short_description: 一款融合了牌组构筑、自走棋、肉鸽元素的策略游戏。玩家需要通过购买、升级棋子来完善壮大你的队伍。通过随机抽取一个数字号码，来触发棋盘中对应棋子的技能效果，并由此获取分数来击败boss。游戏考验你的策略与布局，当然也需要些许运气。

4704030.title: Invokyr Demo
4704030.short_description: A forgotten board game. A haunted house. Play with up to 4 friends. Roll the dice, survive the horrors that are summoned, and beat the Gamemaster to win your freedom.

4726380.title: Ruin Adventurer
4726380.short_description: ‘Ruin Adventurer’ is an automation game with survival and programming elements. Use your robots to ensure your survival, automate resource gathering, and ultimately escape the ruins.

2962280.title: Space Bross
2962280.short_description: 你的鸡被绑架了，这一切足以让一位退休宇航员陷入银河大混乱。《Space Bross》是一款手绘风格的2.5D塔防与动作肉鸽游戏，在这里你将建造基地，抵御外星敌群，并穿越各个星球，奋力夺回你毛茸茸的朋友。

4661220.title: Match Cards: Football
4661220.short_description: Change the course of football history in a tactical sports card game. Lead national teams through authentic tournaments since 1916, play cards on the virtual pitch, and decide the fate of legendary matches in fast, few-minute clashes.

4707480.title: Collie Companion
4707480.short_description: A cozy desktop idle game where your personal collie companion lives on your screen—play, feed, and bond!

4793060.title: Space Fleet Logistics Demo
4793060.short_description: Wars are won by logistics. Command the Federation's fleets across a star system, manage supply chains, secure planets, and outmaneuver a relentless AI enemy. Every battle is decided before it begins.

4607840.title: Run Run Iguana!
4607840.short_description: Make the iguana chase the delicious leaf for as long as possible! As the iguana runs after the leaf, you will encounter obstacles that the iguana must avoid. If the iguana catches the leaf, runs into an obstacle, or if you drop the leaf, the run will end!

4040510.title: Soft(A)ware Demo
4040510.short_description: A surreal puzzle-platformer where you bend gravity, rewind time, and disrupt a virtual prison built to contain you.

4728990.title: 白色归途
4728990.short_description: 操控一个白色小方块，解开谜题，收集■●●●，到达终点。

4729300.title: DeMon Researcher 2
4729300.short_description: A third-person sci-fi survival horror shooter. Enter the Green Dungeon, battle AI-transformed enemies, and uncover the devastating truth behind a monster born not from evil, but from a mother's grief. Explore, survive, and face what hides in the dark.

4767510.title: Japanese with Mayu Demo
4767510.short_description: A short Japanese-learning visual novel where you play as an exchange student in Japan, learn vocabulary through everyday conversations, and check words instantly with a hover dictionary.

4737330.title: GANA FORCE Demo
4737330.short_description: 《加纳力量》 是一款横版飞行射击游戏，猛烈地射击敌人，巧妙的回避子弹，利用地形迂回周旋。宇宙场景包含细胞关卡、火海太阳、冰洞穴，宇宙战舰等等，强力的BOSS和弹幕等你来挑战！！

4657200.title: Be kinder and, like, be a Rewinder, dude! Demo
4657200.short_description: 1995, Summer. "Get a job or you're joining the military" shouts your dad. Get your ticket to an incremental game where you'll rewind, loan, buy tapes, buy rewinders, buy food, move to better locations, hire your mates and make a mint at Planet Rewind! Video tape rentals will be around forever!

4271650.title: Mothkeep Demo
4271650.short_description: Mothkeep 是一款单人飞蛾记录游戏，你将踏入一片宁静的自然保护区，逐页记录并发现这里的本地飞蛾。✒️🦋

4697240.title: Bravebones Demo
4697240.short_description: Bravebones is a stressful anti-stress game. Shoot arrows. Miss everything. Die. Repeat. Auto-shoot included (your mouse will thank you). Short runs, bad decisions, and just one more try.

4789300.title: Just Shoot Demo
4789300.short_description: 在这款动作 Roguelite 游戏中对抗成群的敌人，寻找随机武器并发现隐藏的卡牌组合，打造毁灭性的构筑，在混乱中生存下来。

4743550.title: Cakey & Tanaka : CandyLand Adventure
4743550.short_description: Protect the world’s sweetest cupcake! Cakey & Tanaka is a 3D roguelite shooter where you lead a fated duo. If either falls, it’s Game Over! Combine unique spells and unleash Rapid Fire to blast through candy monsters and survive the perils of CandyLand in this high-stakes, sweet adventure.

4755620.title: Mostly Delivered Demo
4755620.short_description: Deliver packages and passengers through a chaotic open world city on two wheels, and try not to crash too much. A free taste of the full arcade courier mayhem: ragdoll passengers, wild physics, and an endless score chasing rush that ends in spectacular wipeouts.

4772720.title: Iris and the Moonlight Bakery Demo
4772720.short_description: Play the Chapter 1 demo of Iris and the Moonlight Bakery. As Iris, a burnt-out goddess hiding in a sleepless city, take midnight DM orders, read emotions as colors, and decorate cakes for six customers over three nights, while someone searches for you.

4800780.title: Genterra Demo
4800780.short_description: Humanity needs out. Genterra Corporation requires an Architect. From a remote terminal on Earth, deploy automated factories across four planets, each with its own resources, to build the rescue rocket. ARIA will guide you. Productivity is mandatory.

4587360.title: Salasasa 开源麻将平台 Demo
4587360.short_description: Salasasa 是一款支持在 PC 上进行跨平台联机的麻将对战平台，提供国标麻将、青雀、古典麻将等多种规则玩法，并支持牌谱回放、实时观战、段位匹配功能。

4667680.title: The Undercut: Racing Manager Demo
4667680.short_description: Experience one full race weekend in The Undercut: Racing Manager. Make pre-season decisions, then hit the track — practice, qualifying, and race day with a physics-driven 2D engine. Every circuit is procedurally generated. This is a taste of the full management sim.

4580970.title: Getting Home Demo
4580970.short_description: A space landing adventure about love and perseverance. Master precision controls, conserve fuel, and navigate deadly cosmic hazards on a journey to find your way home.
