4698230.title: Bean There, Jumped That
4698230.short_description: Hop in. Figure it out. Jump everything. Small bean. Big jumps. Go right. Or up. Or… wherever that sign says. Precision platforming with a bounce.

4481800.title: Rain of Awakening Demo
4481800.short_description: Dash and slash your way out of Lovecraftian horrors. Master momentum-based movement to reach seemingly impossible locations. Collect upgrades and shape your own fighting style. Can you save what is left of this doomed world or is it too late?

4795110.title: 狂華乙女～Crazy Bloom～ Demo
4795110.short_description: An Over-the-Top Anime Visual Battle Game!

4213630.title: Comedian In The Big City
4213630.short_description: A free to play comedy game, find the jokes and win over the crowd in this chill comedy platformer.

3358240.title: Little Guardians: The Last Hope
3358240.short_description: Join Liam, a boy with newfound strength, on a cinematic 3D puzzle platformer adventure. Solve unique environmental puzzles, overcome platforming challenges, and team up with two companions to uncover a mysterious story.

4716650.title: Slaughterhouse Demo
4716650.short_description: Trapped inside a snowbound mansion, you must eliminate the five employees responsible for your parents’ deaths and their plot to seize the family fortune. Combine household objects to create deadly traps, survive, protect what is yours, make sure not a single one of them leaves the mansion alive.

4666160.title: Walrus Fly Demo
4666160.short_description: 《海象飞翔》是一款无尽的轨道飞行游戏，你将在游戏中穿梭于环形轨道之间！尽情享受无战斗的飞行乐趣，并谨慎使用资源以维持你的“连环记录”。尽可能坚持更久，但一旦生命值归零，游戏即告结束！

4733380.title: FlowTrak Demo
4733380.short_description: FlowTrak 试用版可让您体验一款桌面时间追踪与专注辅助软件，它自动记录应用程序使用时间，把应用活动、任务专注和 Steam 状态连接成一条可回顾的时间线。

4799940.title: Neon Null Demo
4799940.short_description: Neon Null is a high-voltage plunge through a fractured cosmos—a fast, electric 2D shooter where reflex and nerve are all that stand between you and the dark between stars. Each run is a knife-edge sprint, each death honing the next. One more shot, one more orbit. The void is patient. You can’t be.

4278330.title: 疯狂前哨
4278330.short_description: 《荒原前哨》是一款融合了战术射击、基地建造和生存玩法的爆炸性线上游戏。收集资源，建造坚不可摧的堡垒，然后抵御成群的变种人和敌方团队的进攻。强化你的基地…… 或者眼睁睁看着它化为灰烬。

4603840.title: 黑漆漆 Demo
4603840.short_description: 关掉最后一盏灯，在黑暗吞噬你之前回到床上。扮演三名各怀心事的孩子，在令人心惊的睡前挑战中，利用微弱的光源规划逃生路径。 别在黑暗中待太久，“它”就在那里。

4027740.title: 出击!福建舰
4027740.short_description: 这是一款航母甲板调度模拟游戏。在有限的时间内尽快让战机准备妥当并起飞迎敌。通过升级战机、使用强力弹药等手段提高消灭敌人的效率。

4773210.title: Crownborne
4773210.short_description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED action-romance visual novel. Pulled from the modern world into a kingdom at war, wield an ancient power, romance four heroines, and steer branching battles where every choice you make reshapes alliances, fights, and which ending you reach.

4800500.title: Doppel Hunter Demo
4800500.short_description: Blend in, hunt, and outsmart your friends to be the last person standing. Find the real players among clones called "Doppels" to win. Experience random events that make each round unique. A hilarious local multiplayer challenge perfect for a party! 2-6 Players

4144460.title: The Lost Land Of Bahía Blanca Demo
4144460.short_description: In this visual novel with light RPG elements, you’ll come out of exile to walk into the bloody belly of a vampiric regime once more in search of a past that still haunts you. Embark on a journey inspired by the horrors of the last Argentine civil-military dictatorship.

4450590.title: Dino Tendie World Tour Demo
4450590.short_description: Chicken Dino Tendie Pets: Turn-based RPG battle to extinction! Grab fossils, spin the microwave slot machine to hatch your pet, gear it up, and fight in Battle City. I poured my heart & soul into this, hope you love it!

4670780.title: Surface Doctrine: Crater Demo
4670780.short_description: Immerse yourself in the life of Crater — a unique world whose origins remain an unfathomable mystery to its inhabitants. Explore the fates of entire communities and delve into the minds of individuals as you seek the truth amidst the turmoil and unrest of a fading world.

4687830.title: Framework Zero: Terminal Panic Demo
4687830.short_description: You are hurtling through space aboard an industrial freighter. The crew already had their hands full with failing systems. But now there is a new threat on board. Something is hunting you. TERMINAL PANIC is a survival-horror "interactive fiction" text adventure RPG with '80s terminal aesthetics.

4675630.title: Banquet of Nausea~纳希亚盛宴 测试版
4675630.short_description: 《纳希亚盛宴》是使用RPGMaker制作的黑暗奇幻RPG。玩家将扮演身负使命的少女莉雅，踏上因寻找血亲开始的史诗冒险之旅。探寻圣城的废墟，净化污秽的脓疮孽物，结识在灾变中依然幸存的人们并影响、见证他们的命运。游戏采用了经典回合制玩法，提供了多种装备搭配和职业选择，不同选择都将带来独一无二的战斗体验。

4726870.title: Regenerengine Demo
4726870.short_description: Fall into the ENGINE and try to fight your way back up to the surface in this turn-based RPG. As your companions die, consume their essences to grow stronger. Explore a strange underground world with your party, battle creatures roaming the dark, and discover the mystery behind the apocalypse.

4764030.title: There is no next stop Demo
4764030.short_description: After the announcement "There is no next stop," you are trapped in an endless subway. But you’re not alone—the "GUESTS" are hunting you. Trust the "GUIDES" to survive. Or don't.

4776940.title: SLAMPUNKS Demo
4776940.short_description: 《SLAMPUNKS》是一款支持1-3人的合作割草肉鸽游戏。和你的“怨种队友”物理绑定，在怪海中横冲直撞、大杀四方！疯狂叠加离谱的强化插件，直到你的队友被满屏特效闪到破防。打破游戏引擎的极限，痛扁邪恶巨企，把你们的小队打造成最强终极兵器！

4761010.title: Rail Estate Demo
4761010.short_description: Outbid your rivals in auctions for key railway routes, build and upgrade your tracks to dominate the rail economy. Compete to create the most profitable network, balancing speed, capacity, and maintenance in a dynamic simulation

3941470.title: Bush Dog
3941470.short_description: Fight the timer to herd variety of different animals like two different sheeps, alpacas, chickens and cows. On unique maps with each round adding more animals.

4615310.title: Astracide Demo
4615310.short_description: Wave survival game with dynamically generated weapons and upgrades which rewards consistently good performance with healing and access to powerful abilities that can turn the tide of any battle. Fight your way out of the Astrum and grow your power indefinitely while doing so.

4765630.title: Idle Isekai Mining Demo
4765630.short_description: An Idle mining game where your workers keep mining even when you're away! Hire workers, collect manager waifus to automate your mines and boost production. Dig deeper, build and upgrade your mine shafts to earn more gold. Pump those numbers up!

4627760.title: ESPecial Jobs Demo
4627760.short_description: Goofy girl with godlike powers may or may not destroy the universe by saving your pet. A comedy puzzle-adventure game for the Game Boy and your computer.

4766710.title: Despair Beneath the Sunless Sky Demo
4766710.short_description: A psychological horror RPG blending dark fantasy and mystery. Explore a relentless open world, confront grotesque horrors in turnbased combat, and make irreversible choices. Uncover deep lore and mysteries visible only to those with discerning eyes.

4784780.title: Road to the Grand Master Demo
4784780.short_description: A 3D fighting action game where character can grow both in stats and skills collection to worthy title of the Grand Master. Skills are inspired by different martial arts, and can be combined into chain of attacks while character can still be able to fall back on defense.

4504980.title: REQUIRED SYNERGY WORKSHOP: Deja Damnation Demo
4504980.short_description: Play the first 3 chapters of a psychological horror visual novel about a corporate training simulation that remembers your choices. Reality glitches. People fade away. Your decisions escalate the dread.

4682750.title: The Birdsong Tree Demo
4682750.short_description: A cozy building and light simulation game where you observe birds, create custom birdhouses, and help a living urban tree grow. Balance sound, diversity, and neighbor reactions as you shape a calm, reactive environment.

3974650.title: 鬼武者 Way of the Sword DEMO
3974650.short_description: 本作是刀光血影、以牙还牙的极致动作游戏。在面目全非的“京都”，一位佩戴“鬼之笼手”的武士正四处奔波，斩杀猖獗肆虐的幻魔。在激烈的刀光剑影之中沐浴鲜血，不断寻求战斗的意义。前行的道路，终将通往何处？...

4783750.title: Soulspree Demo
4783750.short_description: 第一人称弹幕天堂，枪就是你的构筑。搜刮道具、往枪上塞模块，在地狱里越滚越强。打到后来你都不像在玩射击游戏了——怪死得比刷得还快。

4784320.title: Dev Life: Tap & Code Demo
4784320.short_description: 在这款开发者模拟器中，每一次按键都是一行代码，每一次点击都让你更接近梦想项目的发布。从互联网角落里的简单脚本开始，成长为真正的科技巨头！

4659000.title: DEMON'S REIGN Demo
4659000.short_description: Venture into a dark world ruled by demons, overcome the challenges and defeat the archfiends to gain their power. Explore at your desired order and freely build your character to face impossible battles.

4590440.title: Sime Returns Demo
4590440.short_description: Sime Returns Demo is a introduction to quirky, darkly comedic action-adventure about a fisherman, his cats, and the island that decided it no longer likes him. Rescue your cats from furious villagers, and unravel the mysteries lurking beneath the sunny shores of the Adriatic.

4796210.title: Godless Avalon Demo
4796210.short_description: An RPG adventure with guns! Explore unique settings and discover secrets. A fantasy comedy with high-stakes and fast pacing.

4797500.title: Abjure Demo
4797500.short_description: Win by emptying your hand. Abjure is a roguelike deckbuilder where the 2 of Spades reigns supreme — draft cards, stack relics, and outplay every opponent in a strategic twist on the Big 2 card game.

4226250.title: FPSCore
4226250.short_description: Competitive arena based FPS. If you enjoyed the Quake series and are looking for a fast paced, skill based, action packed multiplayer PVP shooter then look no further. FPSCore comes packed with the old school movement mechanics you know and love; bunny hopping, rocket jumping, wall surfing and more!

3471870.title: Operation Anti-Robot
3471870.short_description: An endless 2D Platformer Game with Rogue-Like Elements

4772990.title: Break The Ice Demo
4772990.short_description: Mine, survive, sell, upgrade, repeat. Descend into a treacherous ice cave filled with relentless monsters and rare loot. Escape with the Miner's Stone to proceed to your next expedition. But watch the frost, if your cabin's temperature drops, your journey ends permanently.

4664720.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Coral Peach
4664720.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful coral peach mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4771020.title: WildRoot Demo
4771020.short_description: A cozy colony sim where survival is gentle—but life is alive. Build, farm, cook, craft and grow your settlement as colonists form relationships, help each other, and shape small, meaningful stories together.

4750240.title: No Final Run Demo
4750240.short_description: A quick, skill‑based action game focused on dodging, timing, and survival. Explore a procedurally generated world with infinitely scaling difficulty and compete for the top spot on the global leaderboard.

4419710.title: Close Call Extreme - Demo
4419710.short_description: It's Saturday again and you are playing your favorite games on your C64... Close Call Extreme Demo gives you 5 runs of this single player endless racing/dodger with retro vibe and retro challenges. Close call for multiplier, reach milestones for extended time. Wishlist full game for more...

4632950.title: Cat Secretary Demo
4632950.short_description: Keep your job by day. At night, sneak around the office and solve your colleagues' problems. Who's a good Cat Secretary? You are!

4795620.title: Black Hole Idle Demo
4795620.short_description: 从一个微小的黑洞开始，通过吞噬太空中的物体不断成长。在这款轻松的太空放置增量游戏中，自动化你的力量，解锁升级，并让你的黑洞不断进化。

2074470.title: Ourlands
2074470.short_description: Ourlands 是一个温馨的岛屿建造游戏，你可以为友好的岛民们打造独特的小土地。

4729480.title: Last Ember
4729480.short_description: We fused deckbuilding and roguelikes into the ultimate single-player experience. Build a unique deck, summon dinosaurs to crush your enemies, and discover powerful relics to protect the Last Ember.

4761330.title: Just A Gun Demo
4761330.short_description: Just A Gun is an incremental point-and-click shooter where you evolve a single weapon through a massive upgrade tree.

4781250.title: Brainrot Survivor Demo
4781250.short_description: A chaotic survivor-like where absurd “brainrot” creatures clash in fast-paced 20-minute runs. Stack ridiculous builds, unleash tidal power, and break the game with insane synergies.

4765730.title: Golf-Like Demo
4765730.short_description: Golf-Like 是一款注重技巧的游戏，在极简却严酷的世界中重新诠释高尔夫机制。围绕精准击球、清晰物理和深思熟虑的决策而构建。易学难精。

4546120.title: Rayborne Demo
4546120.short_description: 是一款基于激光、物理机制与实时光线模拟的解谜游戏。通过塑造光线本身来解决精心设计的挑战，并逐步揭开一座充满疑问的 AI 研究设施背后的真相。

4595620.title: GatherCalm
4595620.short_description: GatherCalm is a cozy casual game about collecting stickers, opening packs, and decorating your own album. Discover rare finds, create beautiful pages, and enjoy a relaxing atmosphere at your own pace.

4783790.title: The Last Show Demo
4783790.short_description: A narrative incremental about fireworks that starts as a hobby and becomes an obsession. Grow your arsenal, fire strategically to stack combos, build grand finales, and grow a rabid fanbase. A journey that begins in your backyard and ends somewhere you didn't expect.

1614550.title: Astro Colony
1614550.short_description: 探索无尽的宇宙以及创造最有效率的星际殖民地。 构建起输送系统以实现生产自动化。 也要照顾宇航员和他们的需求！ 快來建立新的殖民地作为星际模拟的一部分吧。

3118830.title: delete.txt
3118830.short_description: Drag a window to help navigate a bouncy text file to your desktop's garbage bin. The desktop is dark and riddled with deadly corrupted folders and extracting files.

4728230.title: Forbidden: A First's Obsession
4728230.short_description: Meet Nemesis; Ascendent being and terminally bored. Until the shimmer at the end of Creation, known as the Void, becomes her fixation - and her undoing. A short linear visual novel with gorgeous hand-painted illustrations; a mythic tale of curiosity and consequences.

4637150.title: Guinea Pig Gunner Demo
4637150.short_description: Play as a combat cyborg guinea pig in this run-and-gun 2D action platformer. Use your teleporter gun, and a massive arsenal of weapons to fend off a reptilian invasion.

4594340.title: Wheel Make It Demo
4594340.short_description: 一台轮椅，两个玩家，无限混乱。这是一款单人/双人的、基于物理机制的游戏，它讲述了有关合作、犯蠢，以及克服万难的友谊之力的故事。

3997970.title: Camelot Unchained
3997970.short_description: In Camelot Unchained, three Realms battle for control over resources, dominance on the battlefield, and eternal glory. Enter the world of the long-awaited spiritual successor to classic RvR MMORPGs to stake your claim on the future with large-scale Realm vs. Realm combat, crafting, and all out war.

3398940.title: WayPoint
3398940.short_description: 最多可支持 4 名玩家的回合制多人策略游戏。开辟通往终点的道路，或利用毁灭性事件消灭对手。在这个世界上没有好事件——只有希望对手的情况更糟。只有狡猾和策略才能带你走向胜利！

4734790.title: Haligen Zero
4734790.short_description: Find the answer in the incident involving the Professor and unravel the secret of the Awakened.

4305960.title: The Boomies Show
4305960.short_description: 一款狂热的双摇杆 Roguelite，发生在一个糖果色游乐园变成的大屠杀竞技场中。 双武器、后坐力掌控与模块化构筑。 在一波波攻势中活下去，继续加码，并在演出吞没你之前成功撤离。

4533340.title: Project DeepWeb: Eternal Nightmare Demo
4533340.short_description: Project DeepWeb: Eternal Nightmare is a desktop-like adventure game about exploration of the Deep Internet, a sequel to Project DeepWeb. Inspired by Internet lore and real netstalking experience, it tells a story of a person who got stuck in the wrong place at the wrong time.

4604770.title: BOOTH BUTCHER Demo
4604770.short_description: A free playable demo of BOOTH BUTCHER, a PSX slasher set in a grimy 1980s cinema. A hooded maniac, a meat cleaver, and no way out. Coming June 2026.

4777770.title: ScreenSaver Idle Demo
4777770.short_description: That bouncing screensaver you've been staring at? It's a game now. Watch DVD ricochet across the screen, hit that corner, and unleash a flood of resources — then build your idle empire one bounce at a time.

1525290.title: OddFauna : Secret of the Terrabeast
1525290.short_description: Grow the TerraBeast you live on from a tiny patch of land into a whimsical world! In this fully hand-sculpted, playful systemic sandbox, you'll explore vibrant biomes, farm, craft, build, and befriend the wild OddFauna to create a thriving ecosystem.

4382100.title: Farmer Defense
4382100.short_description: Grow crops and defend your farm from wild animals trying to get their taste buds on your hard grown crops. Survive entire day for bonus harvest and unlock new Farms. Upgrade your Farm and your Equipment to take on Harder and Bigger Farms.

3832210.title: Kingdom Conquer
3832210.short_description: 一款维京题材的第一人称策略游戏。在回合制 KINGDOM 模式中占领领土、扩张定居点、培养战士并发展经济，然后率领残酷的突袭进攻敌方土地并征服一切。

4396620.title: Unlucky Mummy
4396620.short_description: 《厄运木乃伊》是一款增量点击类游戏，你的目标是开启一具附有诅咒的石棺。初始成功率只有25%，你能连续找到12件圣物，让木乃伊复活吗？

3708070.title: Campsite Hustle! - Management Simulator
3708070.short_description: 在红岸山谷的中心打造属于你的户外商店与露营地。整理货架，管理库存，建造设施，照顾每一位游客，在大自然的怀抱中一步步发展你的生意。

3951810.title: Cheater's Table
3951810.short_description: 规规矩矩出牌？那就先死。Cheater’s Table 是一款 3D 在线社交推理卡牌游戏，出千是核心机制。虚张声势、设下诱饵、把风险越抬越高，在桌上压过你的对手。

4636890.title: I Am Better Than You
4636890.short_description: 用荒诞的武器戳破气球，戳破友谊！ 操控一个充满氦气的机器人，在这款混乱的在线竞技游戏中证明谁才是老大。投掷飞镖、订书钉和带刺球，在朋友先戳破你之前把他们炸飞。

4551860.title: Turbo Horizon Demo
4551860.short_description: Drive through a vibrant world of color and chaos, smashing obstacles and chasing distance in a relaxing, physics-driven experience. Customize your environment and master the art of controlled destruction.

4570240.title: Neurospasm Demo
4570240.short_description: A First Person Roguelike Horde Shooter. Hook your brain into your computer, dive into a game inside a game, unbox and stack unique items, kill weird fleshy enemies, and try the first layer of the game for free

4682480.title: Keep It Up! Demo
4682480.short_description: Keep It Up! is a co-op slapstick physics game about keeping a balloon from touching the ground. You and up to three Facility test subjects scramble through chaotic obstacle rooms while slapping, jumping and colliding to keep the balloon up. Will you be able to Keep It Up!?

2186990.title: Fatekeeper
2186990.short_description: 踏入一个精心打造的世界，这里的残垣断壁低语诉说着昔日的剧变。精通剑术与魔法技艺，利用各种神器和咒语，并通过一系列的抉择，来开创你的道路，在这款第一人称角色扮演游戏中塑造属于你的传奇。

4795040.title: Don't Step Wrong 2 Demo
4795040.short_description: A logic puzzle game where the rules are yours to discover. Navigate grids of mysterious blocks, deduce hidden patterns, and use skills and items to forge your own path through each challenge.

4716120.title: Escape from EloHell Demo
4716120.short_description: A roguelike single-player game of luck and tactics, which distills competitive ladder climbing into its purest form with one-click matches, win-streak combos, chain-reaction effects. All the satisfaction of reaching Rank 1, none of the toxic teammates or 40-minute hostage games.

1803550.title: MegaFactory Titan
1803550.short_description: 一款工厂建设游戏。在恶劣的气候下生存，在无限世界中开采矿石，建造一座庞大的工厂，然后与殖民者、政府、海盗、叛军等进行贸易或交战！

4747430.title: Cat Music Chaos Demo
4747430.short_description: Catch flow state on a 70 BPM timer. You don't need to read notes to play. You might learn by accident. Warning: prolonged exposure to classical music. Side effects include humming Ode to Joy at bus stops.

4584260.title: Little Ghosties Demo
4584260.short_description: Little Ghosties 是一款温馨的放置型桌面陪伴游戏，可爱的幽灵生活在屏幕上的玻璃生态缸中。孵化、养育并收集独特的幽灵，看着它们从蛋成长为完全成熟的成体幽灵。

4788860.title: Planet Killer Demo
4788860.short_description: A physics-driven sci-fi destruction roguelite. Orbit hostile worlds, unleash devastating weapons, and carve real craters into fully simulated planets while escalating planetary defenses fight back.

3966430.title: Where The Road Fades
3966430.short_description: “Where the Road Fades” is a short psychological indie horror game. After an accident, you find yourself lost in the woods and seek help in a house but something isn’t right there. Explore, make decisions, and face the darkness. Can you find your way out?

3385710.title: WASTED Bloodline
3385710.short_description: WASTED Bloodline is a first-person shooter with stunning graphics, singleplayer botmatch mode, online multiplayer, and cooperative play, featuring long-term support.

4751220.title: Sudoku Cats Demo
4751220.short_description: Did the cats run away and leave chaos behind? It's time to tidy up the mess! Put cute furry friends in their right places by solving fun logic puzzles. The perfect relaxation adventure for everyone cat lovers and those who enjoy sudoku.

4709200.title: Too Soon
4709200.short_description: Too Soon is a psychological meta-game about waiting, relapse, and opening the game when you probably should not. Every launch is remembered. The longer you stay away, the more the system changes the way it speaks to you.

4757090.title: Authorisation Engine Demo
4757090.short_description: Turn a payment desk into a global authorisation network in this offline incremental strategy game about capacity, compute, mandates, quantum audits, and synthetic jurisdictions.

4761740.title: Cold Transit Demo
4761740.short_description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

4712740.title: Cold Transit
4712740.short_description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

4518020.title: Ward X
4518020.short_description: Ward X 是一款独立恐怖解谜游戏，背景设在一所本应被遗忘的废弃医院。探索扭曲走廊并解开谜题，寻找逃脱之路。

4720580.title: Desktop Oasis Demo
4720580.short_description: 这是《Desktop Oasis》的试玩版，旨在测试无缝嵌于桌面的性能兼容性。本 Demo 包含单次 30 分钟的“专注番茄钟”模式，完整解锁敬请期待正式版！

4690190.title: Food Devils Demo
4690190.short_description: You're the last chef in a post-apocalyptic world. Attract adventurers with monstrous food, make them sign contracts with the Food Devils and organize expeditions to collect wicked ingredients! Customize your characters, build the perfect restaurant and plan every move in this Tactics-RPG Roguelite.

2292160.title: Remorses
2292160.short_description: 1991. 调查韦斯特布鲁克宅邸中的巫术传闻。 空气正在慢慢杀死你。打开窗户才能生存。

3983090.title: Soap Slide
3983090.short_description: 操作简单，摔得搞笑单人轻松游玩或与好友起畅享混乱。

4573170.title: 我是卷王（king of exams）
4573170.short_description: 《我是卷王》是一款角色扮演的轻度ROGUE游戏，玩家将扮演一名中国小学生重走求学路。准备好铅笔、钢笔甚至是荧光笔进行各类考试；拿上妈妈给你准备的开学大礼包；迎接中考、高考；参加学术竞赛；走上人生巅峰。

4731620.title: 财富磨坊
4731620.short_description: 在这款增量游戏中，你必须在每个房间赚到$1,000,000才能逃出该房间。投掷飞镖、玩刮刮乐彩票、解锁自动化，并谨慎选择升级，因为每个房间都会影响所有其他房间。你能逃出财富磨坊吗？

4394300.title: Bounce On
4394300.short_description: Get your Bounce On! Roll and bounce your way through 75 challenging platform levels on your adventure home. Each world offers multiple paths for completion, but you can also explore each level to find all the secrets!

4779380.title: Gargantua Demo
4779380.short_description: 建造你的宇宙飞船“Gargantua”。发展工业，影响自由市场，在行星之间进行贸易，并守护你的财富。一次失误就可能导致供应链崩溃，引发星际经济危机。在Gargantua中，战争即是利润。

4731370.title: MeowFactory Demo
4731370.short_description: 欢迎来到喵喵厂！ 在不远的、压抑的未来，世界濒临毁灭，唯有它们能重启生产！ 对，就是这群打工猫! 通过自动化产线和精打细算的空间规划，来实现完美效率。用传送带连接机器，并最大限度地减少手动（或者说爪动）劳动！ 哦，记得及时把那些爱在传送带上兜风的毛茸茸工作者从机器旁拖走，免得他们把自己的小胡子脸塞进去！

4735110.title: Your Painting, Sir Demo
4735110.short_description: A puzzle game about forging paintings using newspaper cutouts. Fool your legally blind boss or lose your job!

4770930.title: Stonewards Demo
4770930.short_description: 《Stonewards》是一款支持单人或合作的山脉防御Roguelite游戏。保卫堡垒，守护国王！挖掘资源以解锁角色升级，击退一波又一波的怪物。

4725310.title: UpMaze
4725310.short_description: UpMaze is a 2D pixel-art platformer where you guide a small frog through dangerous tower-like levels filled with spikes, saw blades, moving hazards, platforms, and timing-based challenges. Jump carefully, avoid traps, and reach the trophy at the end of each stage.

4776560.title: System Breakdown Demo
4776560.short_description: System Breakdown 是一款快节奏的 rogue-lite 射击游戏，玩家在一个苏联赢得冷战的异世界醒来。作为毁灭性武器，玩家将与苏联战争机器人战斗，以解放世界或世界剩余的一切。

4705530.title: Promethean Thirst Demo
4705530.short_description: Action combat, mythic equipment form gods, and vampiric thralls collide in this action roguelite. Play through 2 of 5 zones in the early demo and wishlist the full game.

3726250.title: My Little Cafe Nightmare
3726250.short_description: Brew otherworldly coffee for ghostly patrons in a dark, cozy first-person café. Upgrade your shop, manage supplies, and turn a haunted café into a sanctuary amidst nightmares.

4506330.title: Astral Throne II: Age of the Phoenix Beta
4506330.short_description: How many times are you willing to die for revenge? Rise from the ashes to uncover a divine conspiracy in this Roguelite Strategy RPG inspired by the classics. Lead an ever-growing team on a continent-spanning quest, fight tactical turn-based battles, and synergize your skills for decisive victory.

4582060.title: Goddess of Strategy Demo
4582060.short_description: Experience the first area of this tactical RPG roguelite. Strengthen your heroes, guide them through a range of encounters, and ultimately confront the area boss, the Sin of Wrath itself. Do you have what it takes to defeat it or will Wrath consume you as well?

4333960.title: TYPER3000
4333960.short_description: TYPER3000 is a strategic typing game that combines precise typing with action survival and tower defence. By typing quickly, you control attacks, activate defences and adapt to increasing waves of enemies. There is also a multiplayer and COOP function.

4656700.title: Papa's Mocharia Deluxe
4656700.short_description: Create delicious coffee drinks and cannoli in Papa's Mocharia Deluxe! Create stylish layered lattes in the coffeehouse for Papa Louie's loyal customers while earning tips, points, and Special Recipes. Take a trip in the Food Truck to design and serve your own eye-catching creations!

3929830.title: Joey The Duck
3929830.short_description: 加入乔伊，在禁地中展开一场古怪的冒险，寻找传说中的宝藏，体验这款充满魅力的无缝平台游戏！

4716240.title: EL MINISTRO
4716240.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D action platformer where you play as a young minister of faith battling demonic creatures across cursed lands. Jump, fight, explore dangerous stages, and purge evil forces to restore peace to a town consumed by darkness.

3219140.title: Hobby Horse
3219140.short_description: 打造你自己的马头棒，挑战障碍赛道！征服每一场骑乘，赢得奖杯，不断提升，成为最强的马头棒骑士！

4262200.title: Moonlit Nights
4262200.short_description: 《月夜》是一款以僵尸末日为背景的基地经营游戏。组建突袭小队外出搜集物资，应对神秘访客，并做出艰难抉择。你能存活多少天？抑或能否重获自由回归正常生活？请明智抉择。

4784250.title: slimes! Demo
4784250.short_description: Slimes! brings you dangerous levels of anticipation. With unpredictable bounces, endless cosmetic loot, and many different squishy slimes, you grow your very own slime sanctuary. Collect items, customize your buddy, and watch as the slimes unlock new areas and challenges. It's absolutely sub-slime.

4714200.title: Shothop Demo
4714200.short_description: SHOTHOP is a violent retro boomer-shooter blending fast-paced movement mechanics with brutal combat. Utilize movement mechanics, cleanse the robot invasion, and restore the portal defense network. Reboot the grid. Survive the shift.

4693230.title: BPM Bitcrushed Demo
4693230.short_description: BPM Bitcrushed: A retro roguelite where every shot, dodge, and jump must sync to the beat. Battle through dungeons where enemies attack in time with the music. Find epic loot and even import your own songs to create a custom, rhythm-fuelled soundtrack for your destruction!

4616930.title: Father's Heritage
4616930.short_description: An atmospheric first-person psychological horror game where you explore the secret place your father hid from the family, uncover lost spirits and buried clues, and survive the growing terror lurking within its walls.

4647190.title: Hyper Bun Buster: Rocket Hammer Action Demo
4647190.short_description: Take control of Tess, a bunny girl who uses her huge hammer to send enemies flying into other enemies in this top-down bump combat action game! Dodge projectiles, control space and outmaneuver bosses in Arcade mode or explore dungeons, solve puzzles and unlock abilities in Adventure mode.

4789540.title: Merge Hidden 合成寻物 Demo
4789540.short_description: 每一个隐藏物体都被一分为二！在精美制作的场景中找到两半、拼合还原，才是真正的「找到」。五大主题场景，脑洞大开的合成组合（草帽+雪人、盾牌+剑），简单上手，适合所有爱解谜的人。

4774060.title: 放置斩魔录 Demo
4774060.short_description: 这是一款融合放置挂机、回合制战斗与流派构筑的武侠养成游戏。培养角色、组合技能流派、搭配随机装备与独立装备，在领地经营、副本挑战与试练塔中打造属于你的最强阵容。

4776770.title: Gamba God Demo
4776770.short_description: 下注、加注、赌上一切，在这款 Roguelite 扑克游戏中挑战 7 个抽牌扑克关卡，踏上成为“赌神”的道路。每一手牌都至关重要，每一次冒险都伴随着风险，而每一次升级都将影响你的最终目标。

4765940.title: Spud Keeper Demo
4765940.short_description: Pick up and smash bugs, upgrade your tools to protect your potato patch from escalating waves of pests!

4788830.title: RE_ALLOC Demo
4788830.short_description: Master the machine. In RE_ALLOC, you are the architect of execution. Design intricate hardware circuits, write custom assembly code, and optimize data flow across memory nodes. Efficiency is your only metric. Can you reach the kernel, or will your logic fail?

3221220.title: Mini Mayhem: Flood Fighters
3221220.short_description: Miniature Mayhem: Flood Fighters is a player-versus-player game for up to 4 players. Weaponless robots come alive and scavenge for toys and batteries while trying to stay alive from each other and the flooding house.

4657520.title: Wink Out Demo
4657520.short_description: Wink Out your rivals in this physics-driven 1v1 shooter! Craft clever card synergies, adapt between rounds, and outplay opponents by sending them flying out of the arena.

4592740.title: Min5 Min - Party Edition Demo
4592740.short_description: “快速、竞技，且甜美诱人！Min5 Min专为那些寻求在短时间内体验激烈行动的玩家设计。拥有各式各样的角色和强大的武器，你将有至少5分钟的时间在这个风格化的世界中生存！”

4672090.title: Sunderborn Demo
4672090.short_description: 这是一款异步多人沙盒游戏，融合了拼图、逻辑游戏、世界探索及策略元素。在这里你就是造物者，从混沌中塑造独属于自己的现实世界。管理你创造的世界，并与其他神明展开角逐！

4762240.title: Directors cut: Train Demo
4762240.short_description: Demo version of Directors Cut: Train

3664320.title: BARDA: 背袋登高
3664320.short_description: 《Barda》的世界里，能决定你生死的不是怎么用好剑，而是怎么整理好背包。饥饿、疲劳和疯狂都会占用背包的空间！攀登千变万化的高山，尽力一搏。爬到山顶，撒下爷爷的骨灰，升级营地，一次又一次向高山发起挑战！

4780000.title: Falling Frog - DEMO
4780000.short_description: 在洞穴深处迷失的你，将在这款NES风格的复古平台游戏中通过跳跃重返地表。 每一次跳跃都是挑战，每一次落地都是胜利。 但要小心……在深渊中，“前进”本身就是你最大的敌人。 一次失误的跳跃，就会让你回到起点。

4741720.title: 四方行 Demo
4741720.short_description: 一位行商走遍山河，以货易货，以诚服人。议价、制造、鉴宝，从大同边塞走到番禺南洋，书写属于你的商路传奇。

3145410.title: Pixel Washer Demo
3145410.short_description: 拿起你的高压清洗机，把像素世界刷得干干净净吧！在这款温馨且近乎禅意的游戏中，扮演一只可爱的猪猪，冲走污垢，升级装备，让这座脏兮兮的小镇重现往日荣光。

4576900.title: The Anomaly Department Demo
4576900.short_description: 观察、 巡逻、报告。在紧张的短回合游戏中，与您的团队一起发现另类情况。 错误决定会引发混乱惩罚和意想不到的后果。

4724800.title: Jixo 5: Mask Parade Collector’s Edition
4724800.short_description: Step into a sparkling carnival of masks, parades, theatres, and puppets, where relaxing puzzles, hidden objects, jigsaw-style boards, and bonus challenges await.

4616190.title: Vellar Demo
4616190.short_description: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.

4646960.title: One Coin Museum Demo
4646960.short_description: 启航探索，建立专属治愈系博物馆！在《大秘币博物馆》中远渡重洋，利用机械爪打捞深埋海底的秘宝。将展品公之于众，在收获人气的过程中不断升级船只，前往更遥远的海域探寻奇迹。

4786280.title: Rescue Guys - Firefighters Simulator Demo
4786280.short_description: 一款混乱的开放城市救援试玩版，你将在火灾、灾难和荒诞的紧急状况中即兴应对。没有训练，没有规则——只有快速决策、创造性解决问题，以及对这座城市的“初体验”，而它在正式版中只会变得更加糟糕。

4712950.title: X-Ray 2D
4712950.short_description: A fast-paced and challenging 2D platformer where precision, reflexes, and exploration are essential to overcome traps, obstacles, and secret-filled levels.

4743860.title: FC Mafioso: Football Dynasty Manager Demo
4743860.short_description: A text-based football management game with procedural storytelling, derby drama, and underworld influence. Build your club, shape your manager, and decide how far you’re willing to go to win.

4627100.title: Planted! Demo
4627100.short_description: Planted! is a horticultural combat party game where gardens are arenas, produce is ammunition, and 1–4 players settle their differences by growing vegetables and throwing them at each other. Because, why not?

4671800.title: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem Demo
4671800.short_description: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem 是一款增量式塔防游戏，你将面对数量惊人的兽人潮。布置并升级炮塔，让炸弹如雨点般倾泻在兽人军团身上。

4288090.title: Daydream Mosaics 6: Empire - Collector's Edition
4288090.short_description: Raven and Juliette are getting married—and while they build six magical cities to unite their peoples, Lucas and Reya set out to find the perfect wedding gift. Enjoy 204 colorful nonogram levels plus jigsaw, clutter, hidden object, match 3, and more in this charming Collector’s Edition!

4641520.title: Ultrapong
4641520.short_description: Extreme procedural bullet hell. Not ping-pong. It’s ULTRAPONG—where color defines behavior. Battle through a spectrum of 16,777,216 potential enemies where even the slightest chromatic shift alters their mass, size, and acceleration. No clones, just a continuous evolution of movement and challenge.

4772830.title: MechPit Demo
4772830.short_description: Build modular robots and operate them through a physical Control Pod in VR. Design, test, and send your machines into the Pit to battle.

4487700.title: Growing My Manhole Demo
4487700.short_description: 在这款贪婪的放置游戏中，从井盖成长为黑洞，吞噬整个宇宙。

4768380.title: Demra: Rifts of War Demo
4768380.short_description: Classic 90s RTS gameplay mixed with direct hero control and grid-based real-time movement. Command your army and wield powerful light magic to fend off the demon invasion.

3878610.title: Eclipse: Anomaly Research
3878610.short_description: 化身伊薇·萨默斯，深入调查一片被诅咒的沼泽。作为一名现场特工，你将直面撕裂现实的异常现象与致命生物。监控摄像头、报告超自然事件、在猎杀中求生，并在时间循环重置一切之前，揭开沼泽的黑暗秘密。

4749150.title: Asteroid Rodeo Demo
4749150.short_description: Asteroids are worth trillions. They're also spinning at 200 meters per second. You are a Wrangler—harpoon tumbling rocks, wrestle them to a dead stop with your custom-built ship, and mine them for credits. The pay is good. The survival rate is a conversation people avoid.

4704980.title: A Fighter's Nova: Mindara Demo
4704980.short_description: 《斗魂觉醒：明达拉》是一款叙事驱动的日式角色扮演游戏，将塑造角色的叙事体验和精准酣畅的组队格斗融为一体。

4772330.title: All Possible Suspects Demo
4772330.short_description: A point-and-click deduction game where you unravel complex events. Explore frozen moments in time, analyze the scene, and fill in the blanks. Piece together the who, how, and why behind each curious scenario.

3996930.title: 四面楚歌 Demo
3996930.short_description: 《四面楚歌》是一款回合制策略游戏，在战棋游戏基础上，引入了可转动的魔方棋盘机制，让战场地形瞬息万变，巧妙融入了机关任务和卡牌技能。玩家将控制多个英雄，搭配不同职业，运用多种卡牌技能，在棋盘地图上开启机关与敌人正面交锋。

3749440.title: Iris Dissolution Demo
3749440.short_description: 《Iris Dissolution》 是一款经典生存恐怖游戏——在愈发诡异的场景中探索，管理匮乏的资源，与骇人的怪物浴血求生，同时在失去中挣扎着寻求和解。

4113240.title: Cream Pie
4113240.short_description: Fight hordes of enemies with the power of Poker 😳

4588060.title: Rockhounds Demo
4588060.short_description: 《Rockhounds》是一款支持1-4人联机的撤离类射击游戏。你将与小队一同深入最致命的星球，为冷酷无情的巨型企业开采矿物。在这里，每一次任务都是一场为了生存、财富与荣耀的殊死搏斗。你能战胜混乱，与队友一同成功撤离吗？整装待发，证明你的实力吧！

4751600.title: The Blessed Fool Demo
4751600.short_description: The blessed fool arrives in a strange city consumed by fear and violence to save its people from a new regime. But do they even want to be saved? Immerse yourself in a world where every step is a challenge, testing your fears and the limits of your endurance.

4342590.title: 4x4 in a Furniture Store Demo
4342590.short_description: 4x4 off-road physics-based precision driving in a mini open world mega furniture store

4084960.title: Stardust Frontier Demo + Friends Pass
4084960.short_description: Blast apart robots with your buddies as each of you controls one limb of a giant mech! Play Microgames on your phones to lock in your attacks! Strategize with your team to launch the ultimate assault! Try the Demo for Free, or use the Friends Pass to mirror an existing game on your own computer!

4797190.title: Runeline Demo
4797190.short_description: 在奇幻的 Runeline 世界中设计、建造和编写工厂代码！生产日益复杂的产品，这不仅需要你编写功能齐全的代码，还需要编写优化的代码，所有这一切都必须在机器核心的简单指令范围内完成。

2519710.title: Snowlike
2519710.short_description: Snowlike is a snowboarding survival roguelike. Carve your way through avalanches of critters, as you upgrade your weapons & gear on the way down the mountain.

4201300.title: MAaaaaTH!
4201300.short_description: 打倒暴怒的“Math God”，夺回人类的未来！《MAaaaaTH!》是一款带有构筑元素的弹幕射击游戏，你需要利用“变量”与“公式”来不断强化各种武器。从移动速度、机体大小、攻击力，到时间操控能力等，全面掌控各项性能，打造出属于你的最强战机吧。

4587740.title: MAaaaaTH! Demo
4587740.short_description: 打倒暴怒的“Math God”，夺回人类的未来！《MAaaaaTH!》是一款带有构筑元素的弹幕射击游戏，你需要利用“变量”与“公式”来不断强化各种武器。从移动速度、机体大小、攻击力，到时间操控能力等，全面掌控各项性能，打造出属于你的最强战机吧。

4267230.title: Sunny Side Up Demo
4267230.short_description: Sunny Side Up Demo is a cozy 3D parkour adventure game where you guide a brave little egg across a charming farm to reunite w/ your family. Master jumps, uncover hidden paths, & explore 2 handcrafted levels on a heartfelt journey full of charm, one careful hop at a time. Can you find your way home?

4746160.title: Dino Age: Survive the Era's Demo
4746160.short_description: The Triassic is fracturing. Stabilize the timeline, tame ancient creatures, and survive the age before the cracks consume everything.

4768290.title: Daughter of Dawn Demo
4768290.short_description: "A princess who lost everything flees with the Knight Commander!" Become a father to protect the ruined kingdom's last princess. Guide a traumatized girl—caring, teaching, and learning when to let go. Your choices shape her destiny in this emotional raising sim RPG.

4571460.title: 70s-style Robot Anime Geppy-X DEMO
4571460.short_description: 70年代风格的超级机器人动画，融合高速街机风2D横向卷轴射击玩法。 这款日本经典名作如今首次面向全球发行，并以高清重制版形式重磅回归。

4717640.title: Dwarfspire Demo
4717640.short_description: Dwarfspire 是一款挂机制作游戏，悬停在你屏幕的一侧。管理一个由攀岩矮人组成的村庄，让他们在你忙于其他事务时攀爬悬崖。招募矮人、收集稀有矿物，再将其锻造成武器和盔甲。

4761500.title: Cozy Grove 2 Demo
4761500.short_description: All those who are lost deserve kindness. Help cute, ghostly bears find peace in this relaxing sequel to the beloved life-sim game Cozy Grove, where kindness rules and new crafting, building, and camping island adventures await.

4617770.title: FROGGLE Demo
4617770.short_description: 策略回合制 Roguelike 游戏。指挥 2-3 名蛙之冒险者，穿越 20 层互相交错的战斗与风险事件，用 10 种动作符印拯救小蝌蚪 Tapo 不让他毁掉自己的第一个生日派对。融合《杀戮尖塔》的深度战斗与 Balatro 的“等等，这平衡吗？”破坏性流派构筑。

4785240.title: 冥界村 Demo
4785240.short_description: 身死入冥界，唯有挣扎求生，方能不堕虚无。狩猎采摘、耕种劳作、互通有无，一步步在幽冥村落立足，最终寻得转世投胎、重归轮回的方法。

4761230.title: Hoa 2 Demo
4761230.short_description: Hoa 2 will transport you to a beautiful world. Explore, interact with nature, solve puzzles and seek to bring life back to a special friend - experience the early parts of the adventure in this demo!

4732860.title: Scraps Of The Machine Demo
4732860.short_description: FPS Mech Action! Pilot a mass of steel through a single player campaign set in a desolate landscape. Target enemy armor or weapons to wear them down piece by piece, find upgrades to improve your mech or change its loadout, and survive in a world of rust and decay. Discover, Destroy, Scavenge.

4718240.title: Infinite Empire Demo
4718240.short_description: Become the Lord Captain of an ancient space fortress in a galaxy where railguns sit next to necromantic hull plating, steam-powered tesla cannons, and biological spore launchers. Build your ship, crush alien fleets in slow, weighty broadside combat, and carve out an empire one sector at a time.

4785820.title: Dominocalypse Demo
4785820.short_description: The puzzle roguelike that makes dominoes actually fun! Move, manipulate, and match using absurd tile modifiers, game-changing artifacts, and unique starting loadouts for endless chaos and replayability.

3438820.title: Astra Quest
3438820.short_description: Astra Quest is a small arcade-style space shooter with modular starship building. Assemble cores, base parts, and devices, then fight real-time battles in Adventure Mode and Evolution Mode.

4747070.title: Node Pit Demo
4747070.short_description: 在宇宙飞船的反应炉中发射类似 Plinko 的催化弹，撞击并激活节点以积累跃迁能量的 Roguelite × 博弈风益智游戏。通过继承与卡牌选择培养强力节点！

4184020.title: An Automaton's Journey
4184020.short_description: Play as the ancient automaton Cecilia Immergreen as you explore the world for secrets, solve puzzles, delve into dungeons, fight other Hololive members as powerful bosses, help other members with side quests, and find powerful items to explore previously unavailable locations.

4790600.title: 城市塔防-City Tower Defence Demo
4790600.short_description: 帮助上海抵御来自雪人的攻击！ 一款融合塔防与 Roguelite 构筑的单人策略游戏。每局都会生成不同的城市战场，你需要搭建防线、选择波间奖励、围绕塔系卡牌与羁绊逐步成型，在不断升级的敌潮中守住核心。

2902120.title: Flawed Tactics Demo
2902120.short_description: The autobattler where the market IS the balance patch. Buy and evolve minions, cast spells, create powerful relics — but watch the ticker. Every purchase you make changes the economy for everyone. No permanent metas. No overpowered favorites. Just tactics, and flawed ones at that.

4263530.title: Earth Swordsman
4263530.short_description: Adventure / puzzle game inspired by minimalist comic book art mixed with DnD fantasy elements.

4777400.title: In Time Demo
4777400.short_description: In Time is a 4 player online co-op adventure. Chronosyn’s strange machine has brought back the dinosaurs, and only you and your team can set things back to normal. Explore an ever-changing environment and make it back to the machine all while hungry predators stalk your path.

4771260.title: 海賊物語 Demo
4771260.short_description: A SRPG where Flora, the young leader of the small outlaw group “Barrel-berry clan” fights to rebuild her struggling band alongside her companions.

4752690.title: Mischief Moves In Demo
4752690.short_description: Mischief Moves In is a single player game where you play as a raccoon who has just moved into the neighborhood. Explore a laid-back nighttime world, find furniture to customize your new home, lend a paw to other animals, and don’t worry about causing a little mischief along the way!

4805260.title: Nodwar Demo
4805260.short_description: NODWAR is here to meet all your strategic needs at once. Classic: Arcade Strategy - conquer, merge and upgrade nodes. Aeon: Grand Strategy - conquer an entire planet. Crux: Traditional Real-Time Strategy experience where you command individual units on a battlefield. Easy or hard, your choice.

4713010.title: Keepers of Umbrasil Demo
4713010.short_description: A cozy sanctuary-building narrative adventure about befriending ancient spirits in a magical forest. Piece together clues to uncover their stories and memories. Rebuilding the sanctuary will take more than new buildings. You must rekindle hope. May the forest find all who are wild-called.

4511140.title: Unforgettable Love
4511140.short_description: You survived a drowning accident but lost all your memories. As “Pe Luem,” you must slowly piece together your past. Along the way, you will meet five women with their own dreams and secrets. Build relationships and uncover the truth, Who is the one that still remains in your memory?

4672760.title: ORPHEUS: TO HELL AND BACK Demo
4672760.short_description: Orpheus: To Hell and Back is a mesmerizing action-puzzle game that brings the timeless myth of Orpheus and Eurydice to life in the palm of your hands, 80's chibi-anime style!

4728260.title: Annexation Demo
4728260.short_description: Annexation is a fast-paced real-time strategy game with old-school roots. Build bases, train armies, and outmaneuver your enemy to claim victory. Start by playing the campaign and then challenge yourself in Arcade Missions, which bring the intensity of multiplayer RTS into a single-player setting.

4514220.title: Culdcept The First Demo
4514220.short_description: The pinnacle of board game and card game fusion is back.

4787810.title: Panzer Strike Demo
4787810.short_description: 正宗的 2000 年代即时战略游戏玩法。指挥您的部队，制定战略，赢得二战战役。巨大的地图，成千上万的单位，远程火力，没有建造机制！

4669220.title: Beggar's Road Demo
4669220.short_description: A darkly comic medieval roguelike where you travel between towns, recruit desperate companions, and survive strange encounters through difficult choices, scarce resources, and shifting alliances with bishops, merchants, and bandits.

4755720.title: Pixel Kitten Desktop Demo
4755720.short_description: 一只温馨可爱的像素风桌面宠物，为你带来陪伴与慰藉。 它会在屏幕上四处漫游，蜷缩着打盹，也会自己感到饥饿。你可以喂食、梳毛，陪伴它度过日常时光，看着它在你工作或学习时依偎在身旁，伸懒腰、打哈欠。

4528790.title: 玛门的灵魂推币机 DEMO
4528790.short_description: 《玛门的灵魂推币机》是一款结合心理恐怖与资源管理的叙事解谜游戏。玩家将以剩余生命为筹码，在恶魔的推币机中博弈，金币不足时，你必须抉择是否典当记忆、情感或身体器官。每一次兑换，都是对人性价值的权衡。所以，请告诉我，您愿意为重生，付出多少「自我」？

4745850.title: Cry Pic. Demo
4745850.short_description: 大型の敵（ボス）と対戦することがメインとなるアクション・シューティングゲームです。

4728040.title: Salvation: Echoes of War Demo
4728040.short_description: Explore a haunting purgatory in this third-person stealth adventure. Injured and trapped in a nightmare after war, solve puzzles, outsmart enemies, and rely on your loyal companion to find a way back to life. Can you escape your past and survive the echoes of war?

4781460.title: PP Inflation Demo
4781460.short_description: PP INFLATION is an idle/incremental game, paying tribute to classic arcade games. Instead of controlling a paddle, you choose upgrades and optimize combinations to maximize your points-per-minute. Dial up the TIMESCALE skill to snowball through themed stages until victory.

4580530.title: Blast'N Bounty Demo
4580530.short_description: Blast’N Bounty is a vertical scrolling shoot’em up featuring 8 stages players can tackle in the order of their choosing. Cruise through a crazy solar system in a mix of pixel art and low poly 3D with action that’s easy to learn but tough to master!

4573310.title: FARCRAFT Demo
4573310.short_description: A solo-player outer-space underworld survival game set in a post-apocalyptic future. Explore the Solar System and brave massive procedurally generated dungeons. Dig, build, drill, collect, craft, fight, light, shoot, run, and fly through fully mutable persistent sandboxes - or die trying.

4585230.title: WithoutEyes Chapter1 Demo
4585230.short_description: 不要移开视线，注视他们之间依恋关系的形成。

4761350.title: Greebly Gambit Demo
4761350.short_description: Greebly Gambit is a chaotic fantasy smash-and-grab-style game where you play as a goblin trying to steal everything not nailed down in order to help revive the god of hope.

4802630.title: nudge Demo
4802630.short_description: nudge is a cozy organization-sim about finding space for your work, mom, and huge assortment of gacha toys. Unbox over 50 collectibles from 8 unique sets, decorate your first apartment, and try to find room for everything in your life, including mom.

3216980.title: 东方诡夜行 Demo
3216980.short_description: 《东方诡夜行 DEMO》是一款Roguelike角色扮演类的东方同人游戏。一场可怕的危机席卷了整个幻想乡，而那些你熟知的朋友们也不知为何也变得诡异反常。必须有人来阻止这一切…！组建一支敢于跨越黑暗与绝望的队伍，战胜强大的敌人，并揭开这场异变的真相。 愿今宵月夜下的幻想乡,终将迎来破晓的黎明…

4541550.title: One Day To Live Demo
4541550.short_description: The entire world is infected. Many have already turned. The booster shots can only hold off the infection for 24 hours at a time now. You only have one day to live, will you survive?

3470050.title: Pure Heat
3470050.short_description: Action-adventure game with very detailed worlds.

4769090.title: Inken Demo
4769090.short_description: Explore mysterious office building suspended in a desolate world! Inken is a multi-genre roguelike that can be a deckbuilder, topdown shooter, auto runner, puzzler, or idle game! Knowledge is the power that can slay the gods that consumed your world!

4673870.title: Mimicry! Demo
4673870.short_description: Blend into the environment and eat objects around you as a sneaky Mimic, or burn, zap, and explode everything as a crafty Exterminator to root out the Mimics in this Prop-Hunt inspired multiplayer game of chaos and frenetic fun!

4773770.title: Petaltone Demo
4773770.short_description: Plant, tend to, and grow a musical garden masterpiece! By mixing and mastering different Plants, Mods, and Gardening Tools, you can create a synthesized symphony entirely unique to you!

4756770.title: RogueBlocks Demo
4756770.short_description: A comic-styled roguelite block puzzler where every falling shape, power cell, and upgrade choice can turn a run into a high-score combo. Place blocks, clear Meta-Tiers, craft broken builds, and survive chaos rounds.

4656160.title: SHOWHAND Demo
4656160.short_description: SHOWHAND 是一款融合扑克牌组构筑与俯视角弹幕动作的 Roguelite。收集卡牌，规划手牌，用组成的牌型强化飞弹，突破汹涌而来的敌人与 Boss。手牌就是你的生命，失去卡牌，生存也将随之动摇。

4786950.title: Silas' Speakeasy Demo
4786950.short_description: The local speakeasy has been closed down for quite some time due to an undisclosed incident involving the local mob. You've been given the job of finding your way inside, locating, and destroying any and all incriminating evidence that you can get your hands on before it can be used against you.

4795680.title: Trials of Tenebrae Demo
4795680.short_description: Master strategic, grid-based combat and customize your party’s equipment, skills, and spells in this turn-based dark fantasy RPG. Gather powerful loot, battle deadly foes, explore a mysterious world, and defeat the evil witch plaguing it.

4785090.title: Loop One: Demo
4785090.short_description: Record loops with drones and robots by hand, to build up an efficient automated factory in this physics-based VR game.

4294630.title: Backrooms: No Escape
4294630.short_description: A 1–6 player immersive psychological horror experience. Venture through multiple handcrafted liminal Backrooms levels, solve puzzles, explore and survive.

4748070.title: Escape to Ariah Demo
4748070.short_description: 在神秘网格上战略性地运用符文，体验这款战术肉鸽卡组构建游戏。选择拥有独特技能与符文的角色，探索多样的配装思路。你能在前往阿里亚的旅途中生存下来吗？

4706790.title: Dig You Fools
4706790.short_description: A casual game about delving the depths of the earth.

4770820.title: Divooka™ Explore (Demo)
4770820.short_description: Explore Divooka’s visual programming workflow in this curated demo for procedural terrain and image processing. Generate heightmaps, transform images, and experiment with terrain coloring using focused dataflow tools.

4539110.title: Earth Forge
4539110.short_description: COLLECT, UPGRADE, UNLOCK AND NAVIGATE Single player adventure gameplay involves mining for materials, finding and collecting enough minerals in a randomly generated world to unlock upgrades. The upgraded player can then navigate through mines and dungeons avoiding bats to reach treasure chests.

4791260.title: hook-kick Demo
4791260.short_description: She ate me! The indignity of this has seemingly left you immortal. Stored for safekeeping (head being so pretty and all) you team up with a couple of bones from a slain wizard and a stretchy pirate-snake named hook in this kicking platformer filled with circles all the way up and down.

4777540.title: Prismania Demo
4777540.short_description: Prismania is a surreal puzzle adventure game. Solve prism puzzles to escape from the well and find out how you ended up there.

4782850.title: For The Cat! Sorcerer's Revenge Demo
4782850.short_description: 他们杀了你的猫。这是个致命的错误。在这款充满魔法的 Bullet-heaven Roguelike 游戏中，培养巫师、升级法术、收集装备并打造无敌流派，对抗成群结队的敌人。

4736320.title: Crowned Demo
4736320.short_description: Lead legendary medieval armies in a turn-based card strategy game set during the conflicts of the Middle Ages. Choose your King, build your deck, and outmaneuver your enemies on the battlefield. Every card is earned through battle. Every decision matters.

4670280.title: BEATSHIFT ARENA Demo
4670280.short_description: Fight to be the last color standing in a beat-synced arena shooter where every song reshapes the battlefield, fallen players become physical cover, and taking damage turns you into a massive moving target.

4579900.title: Spa World
4579900.short_description: Spa World是一款舒适的等距经营模拟游戏，您将在其中设计和经营自己的健康中心。

4717210.title: RuneKingdom Demo
4717210.short_description: Explore a hand-crafted 2D world of adventure in RuneKingdom. Master 16 unique skills, battle 150+ fierce foes, craft legendary gear, and shape your legacy. Your epic journey awaits!

3949130.title: IN SILICO Demo
3949130.short_description: 在遥远的未来，人类被囚禁在一场模拟之中，沦为奴隶。 如今你已经觉醒——是否也能逃离这层现实？

4523290.title: till death ROLLS us apart Demo
4523290.short_description: "till death ROLLS us apart" is a roguelike dice battler where you collect new dice, stack powerful modifiers, and unleash huge combos in stylish, fast-paced duels.

4504680.title: Laika Space Adventure
4504680.short_description: Mine meteors, build greenhouse domes and grow crops to survive on Mars. Be carefull not to freeze to death at nights

4772810.title: INFINITER Demo
4772810.short_description: Navigate the Geometric Void and survive against the hordes of creatures that lurk within the impossible space. INFINITER is an incremental action-rouguelike, where every run earns you progress towards becoming the most powerful being in the known universe.

4792900.title: Super Kanko Town Demo
4792900.short_description: Super Kanko Town is one part incremental game, one part city-building simulator, and one part reflection on the perversities of mass tourism. Raze gardens, rice fields, and village homes. Build capsule hotels, convenience stores, and gourmet sushi bars. Fight monsters, silence protesters, have fun.

4654490.title: YOU BECOME FROG 🐸 DEMO
4654490.short_description: A short incremental bullet heaven game about becoming animals. Laser eye frog, unicorn cow, bomb slug. Each have their own abilities and weapons. Build weird builds and combos. Explore and find new animals. BECOME.

4789470.title: Age of Resistance Demo
4789470.short_description: Age of Resistance 是一款以南美洲为背景的现代大战略游戏。实时（可暂停）管理经济、内部稳定、政治意识形态和地区冲突。你能成功称霸整个大陆吗？

4681850.title: FENRIR Demo
4681850.short_description: The Nine Worlds are crumbling. Fenrir is free. Build your warrior from hundreds of items, master a deep build system, and fight your way through Midgard to Asgard — before the beast devours everything.

4755540.title: Galactic Bounty Demo
4755540.short_description: Take on contract missions in this free first-person sci-fi bounty-hunting demo. Blast rogue droids and pirates, upgrade your gear and get a taste of Galactic Bounty’s intense action.

4728570.title: Wares & Wonders: Fantasy Shop Simulator Demo
4728570.short_description: 一款聚焦于 Wares & Wonders: Fantasy Shop Simulator 基础内容的早期演示版。探索奇幻城市的一个城区，亲手与物品互动，让货架超载、弄坏家具、摔碎脆弱的药水，并接待顾客。

4597080.title: G.H.O.S.T. Ghost Hunt Ops Special Team Demo
4597080.short_description: G.H.O.S.T. 是一款 1-4 人戰術合作遊戲。通過異常現象追蹤並 capture 鬼魂，阻止其收集 7 枚符文開啟傳送門。使用毀滅者（Devastators）、收集扭曲神器。請記住：你是來阻止入侵的，而不是來送命的。

4783370.title: Alchemania Demo
4783370.short_description: Alchemania is a frantic co-op alchemy game for one to four players where you and your fellow apprentices must brew potions under time pressure. Follow recipes, prepare questionable concoctions and enchant unstable ingredients.

4797250.title: Dopamine rogue Demo
4797250.short_description: 《Dopamine Rogue》 是一款以心理为主题的生活模拟 Roguelike 游戏，讲述如何在自己的内心世界中生存。 直面内心的恶魔，跨越心理障碍， 在日常与非凡的人生瞬间之间挣扎、前行、坚持下去。

4718190.title: Dynamite Dashers Demo
4718190.short_description: Throw bombs, upgrade your skills, and survive endless waves of enemies in this fast-paced roguelike action game. Build your explosive arsenal, discover powerful combos, and see how long you can stay alive!

4759200.title: 灰烬事务所 Demo
4759200.short_description: 前秘密组织特工林墨来到柯林斯城，重启导师留下的灰烬事务所，成为新手侦探，并接下第一起案件。勘查案发现场，收集证据与证言，合成推论，在推理交锋中出示关键线索，揭开隐藏在死亡现场背后的真相。本试玩版包含序章与完整第一案内容：和林墨一起破解发生在灰街福林商店的密室杀人案。究竟是异能犯罪，还是另有真相？

4712300.title: TTM
4712300.short_description: TTM is a local multiplayer game for 1–4 players, where two teams clash in fast-paced tactical battles.

4625840.title: Harvest Hollow Demo
4625840.short_description: You've just inherited a house on a small farming island. Grow crops, harvest, restore the village and bond with its inhabitants… well, that was the plan. Because at Harvest Hollow, nothing's going to go quite as advertised.

4768900.title: Glitchy: Not So Sweet Demo
4768900.short_description: This looks like a super cute spot-the-difference game, but it isn’t!

4716350.title: Look to the Birds Demo
4716350.short_description: A cozy first-person birdwatching game about slowing down, noticing nature, and finding peace in small moments. Photograph 30+ bird species across five hand-crafted biomes and fill your journal as you travel through the Maritimes.

4666910.title: Glowbot Tower Defense Demo
4666910.short_description: Competitive endless sci-fi tower defense demo with global leaderboards where you place and upgrade Glowbots to defend against waves of enemies on the Cosmic Orbit map.

4725120.title: KOOO TO JUMP! Demo
4725120.short_description: 终极语音控制精准平台跳跃游戏的免费试玩版！在残酷的 foddian 风格地图中生存下来，挑战最初的 19 个摄像机区域。在这款硬核 rage game demo 中测试你的嗓子（或手柄）实力。内含 Practice Mode！

4738380.title: Ittzy Fearless Demo
4738380.short_description: Ittzy Fearless is a difficult physics-based action game. Play as Ittzy the fire spirit and use your swift moves and devastating strikes to tackle chaotic waves of enemies, projectiles and explosions.

4671150.title: Tessera Demo
4671150.short_description: You've been handed a Tessera — a ticket into an underground tactical combat league. Build your roster, manage the money, call the strategy, and fight for the championship from behind your broker's desk.

4703820.title: Space.iZ
4703820.short_description: Build your interstellar empire. Colonize planets, mine resources, grow your population and defend your worlds against enemy attacks. A deep space strategy experience.

4780130.title: LastWatch Demo
4780130.short_description: A first-person psychological survival horror set in an abandoned subway station. Monitor cameras, manage your sanity, and survive the night shift while something moves through the tunnels.

4726370.title: SkyFab Demo
4726370.short_description: 搁浅在神秘立方体星球阴影下的浮岛上，你必须凭智慧和工程学求生。建造复杂的自动化流水线，管理电网，并将一棵树变成一个庞大的工业空间站。你能找到回家的路吗？

4205330.title: Mortal Destiny
4205330.short_description: 这款经典的独立JRPG终于以增强版登陆Steam平台。加入杰克·斯莱特与抵抗组织的行列，共同对抗独裁者鲍威尔，通过紧张刺激、真实震撼且感人至深的故事线，永远改变奥卡尼亚的命运。

4794440.title: The Options Menu Demo
4794440.short_description: The Options Menu is a game where you play as a 'Player' and experience a life filled with Options. Explore countless endings to uncover a game that may surprise you as the real friend all along was your Options Menu in this Comedic Story.

4701790.title: Monster Travels Demo
4701790.short_description: A 2D top-down RPG with turn-based combat, going from defeating small slimes to dragons, and much more. Travel many different maps and fight several foes, and level up to unlock new abilities.

4735830.title: Typenstein: A Symphony of Keys Demo
4735830.short_description: You are a Doctor Typenstein, who needs to defend his castle every night against the oncoming villagers. TYPE words to attack enemies, LEVEL UP and unlock new skills, UPGRADE your castle by using killed villagers, and SURVIVE till the end of the night.

4740620.title: POUND SAND Demo
4740620.short_description: Every pixel simulated, including the machines. Dig into alien planets, build a factory from real blocks, and carve it into any shape you want. Ore sinks and sand rises in the greatest competition in the galaxy. Move it, grind it, melt it, freeze it, sell it, and strip the planet to bedrock.

4260630.title: Super Pilot Yolk Bot
4260630.short_description: A fast-paced roguelike extraction shooter focused on movement and risk. Pilot a combat Float Bot on a hostile planet, destroy enemies, collect money, and choose when to extract. Stay longer for greater rewards, but die and lose your upgraded Float Bot.

4779330.title: Snowball Party Demo
4779330.short_description: 一款多人休闲体育竞技游戏，最多可供10个玩家一起游玩。玩家将化身红蓝两队雪人，在漫天飞雪的梦幻球场中进行球类比赛，提供多种球类玩法供玩家选择。

4180670.title: Space Snatcher Demo
4180670.short_description: Six players. One infested ship. Ten alien monsters. Board increasingly dangerous deep space research vessels to scan alien species while repairing the ship and running from monsters. But the biggest threat might just be your friends.

4782580.title: The Old Flesh of Nuraga (Demo)
4782580.short_description: First person psychological horror game about treasure hunting with your grandpa. Search among the sands of Nuraga to unearth what's driving him mad. The Ancient Times are seeping out. Will you succumb to them?

4415500.title: Maldhalla Demo
4415500.short_description: 免费试玩Maldhalla！用4名角色和10种武器在无尽的怪物浪潮中生存。无时间限制——尽你所能活下去。喜欢吗？正式版解锁21名角色、32种武器、排行榜等更多内容。

4789290.title: FeeBay Demo
4789290.short_description: Flip fake trading cards for real profit in FeeBay Simulator, a comedic marketplace tycoon game. Snipe underpriced cards from clueless and scammy sellers, grade your best pulls, crack open mystery lots, and run your own storefront to build a reselling empire.

4738630.title: XENOCIDE PROTOCOL
4738630.short_description: 选择职业。在20波敌人中生存。面对4个Boss。Roguelite俯视射击游戏，15个职业和20种武器可解锁。抢先体验。

4666550.title: Kint Demo
4666550.short_description: A text-based fantasy multiplayer RPG where all players must decide what lore is true. Explore the world of Seram, learn everything you can. Resolve conflicts between lore by voting each week. Can you solve the mystery behind the Kilns?

4780670.title: Gravity Grove Demo
4780670.short_description: Gravity Grove is a 2D platformer set on the faces of a 3D cube. Walk over the edges to rotate the entire level, shifting gravity in your favor to open up new paths and uncover hidden secrets from the past.

4787020.title: Horn of the Warlord Demo
4787020.short_description: Lead a Viking clan to glory in this accessible turn-based conquest strategy game. Expand your kingdom, raise armies, besiege castles and outsmart a challenging AI across handcrafted worlds built for endless replayability.

3213360.title: CUBOID Demo
3213360.short_description: CUBOID is a challenging spatial puzzle game with minimalist design, where you progress through a labyrinth of levels using a unique mechanic of merging with world blocks.

4244190.title: Guinea Pig Runaway Together
4244190.short_description: 最多四只豚鼠。一个气球。无尽的混乱。 在这款基于物理的合作跑酷挑战中，要么齐心协力，要么寸步难行！

4716980.title: LURRUNA - The Island of Towering Automatons Demo
4716980.short_description: It's the GRAVITY-BOUND BOMBER!!! LURRUNA is an homage to CLASSICVANIA gameplay. Pelt bombs, beat baddies and cross chasms in a mysterious island adventure.

4779850.title: Epic Balls Smashing Demo
4779850.short_description: Create a deadly spinning war machine, merge chips, forge fusion weapons, and dominate a chaotic physics-based autobattler arena.

4665160.title: Ispell Demo
4665160.short_description: ISPELL is a shoot'em up & bullet hell game where you take on the role of a nameless android who wanders through the dying worlds. Use various weapons and dodge enemy bullets, as well as challenge powerful creatures.

4756760.title: Desk Space Demo
4756760.short_description: Grow your fleet of space ships in this incremental space game. Extract wealth from the asteroids and stations, unlock upgrades to find synergies, defend against pirates, and unlock [REDACTED]. Pin to your desktop and watch your empire grow while you do "more important" things.

3029010.title: Elementalist
3029010.short_description: A puzzle platformer where you collect Elements and use their powers to move around in various ways. Each Element you collect becomes the next one you use, so pay attention to the order!

4795290.title: 너 용사 아니다요 Demo
4795290.short_description: Live your life instead of saving the world in this top-down action RPG.

4582510.title: Pocket Pilot Demo
4582510.short_description: Pocket Pilot is a love letter to those 90s arcade flight games. Pilot planes, helicopters, and drones to complete cleaning and exploration missions across a wonderful island. Master three unique flight styles and discover secrets at your own pace in this relaxing aerial adventure.

4788050.title: JUNK CONNECT Demo
4788050.short_description: 电子电路 x 掉落式益智游戏！ 规则很简单：将掉落的电阻和 LED 等元件排列在电路板上，铺设电流通路。如果电压不匹配，电路将保持“沉默”，元件会迅速堆满你的板子。 觉得“电压计算很难”？完全不用担心。实时导航功能会将电流的流动路径可视化。无需预备知识，在放置元件的过程中，你自然会发现“啊，原来可以这样连接！”。在不断的探索中，电路的逻辑会潜移默化地融入你的直觉。

3899440.title: Champions of Sparta Demo
3899440.short_description: Spartan Scouts is an action RPG where the glory of ancient empires awaits. Assume the role of Aurelios, a legendary Spartan scout, confronting powerful enemies and uncovering hidden truths to lead Sparta toward its destined triumph.

4734630.title: Nerds Revenge Demo
4734630.short_description: 书呆子大战恶霸。IQ 对决 名气。 一款混乱的 PvP 与合作游戏，结合问答玩法、荒谬武器，以及围绕 Donkey Town 控制权展开的阵营战争。

4767050.title: Outta Space Demo
4767050.short_description: 你的猫咪现在飞到了宇宙的哪里呢？ Outta Space 是一款让小猫在桌面角落静静探索宇宙的放置游戏。 工作、打字、点击鼠标——你的每一个日常操作，都会化作宇宙飞船的燃料。 从月球出发，穿越太阳系，飞向遥远彼方的恒星。 不妨回来看看吧。看看你心爱的猫咪，已经旅行到了多么遥远的地方。

4769630.title: Isle Of Nexaryth Demo
4769630.short_description: Explore a dangerous fantasy island as a dragon, fight powerful bosses, hunt creatures, level up, and uncover the hidden secrets of Nexaryth in an atmospheric open-world adventure.

4520830.title: Car Factory Tycoon Demo
4520830.short_description: Build cars step-by-step in a factory sim. Design vehicles, build your garage layout, hire and train workers, manage parking inventory, and sell cars through customer orders or walk-in buyers as you expand your operation.

4718760.title: Hot Meals Fast Wheels Demo
4718760.short_description: 款小型失误会迅速演变成混乱的合作烹饪游戏。去购物，在你的餐车里烹饪，并穿过城市按时交付订单。

4720340.title: BounceForever Demo
4720340.short_description: Bounce from the backyard to the clouds in this punishing vertical climber. The only thing faster than the climb is the fall. Bounce forever and you might just reach the top

4424170.title: 用烟花轰炸你的好朋友 Demo
4424170.short_description: 你回到了小时候，这里还是千禧年，但这里有人！ 这里没有禁燃，你可以邀请你的好朋友在这尽情燃放各种烟花！ 最多支持8人联机，立即开始一场混乱的烟花大战！ 这些烟花都有足够的自由度可以组合发掘出各种奇妙的效果，让其他人在你创造的意外中被击败！

4638130.title: Hustlin' Every Day
4638130.short_description: Dead broke in a dump, heavy mob debts, and a sick mother in the hospital. Hustle your way out. Flip wholesale goods online, day-trade crypto, build mining rigs, or dive deep into the dark web. A first-person hustle simulator where every dollar is your ticket out—or your death sentence.

4742800.title: Last Chance Demo
4742800.short_description: Last Chance - is an atmospheric retro shooter with pixel graphics, where you are Alexei who has a disease in his head and must do everything to survive. The atmosphere of the dark winter adds to the epic and enhances the gameplay experience.

4672500.title: Feather Rogue Demo
4672500.short_description: DAMN.. SATISFYING! A tactical card roguelike where each turn is a full combo, not one move. Spend your energy chaining cards across a grid, then trigger reactions that cascade across the whole board. You're a crow. You're a chemist. Set the trap, pull one thread, watch everything fall.

4731180.title: The York Realms
4731180.short_description: Twelve years after your father sealed the demon lord Remus, the seal is breaking. Darkness rises, kingdoms start to crumble, and you are the last hope. Inherit your father’s power, face Remus, and decide the fate of a world on the edge of annihilation.

4696830.title: Contract Cooks Demo
4696830.short_description: 我们是一家人力派遣公司。我们把厨师派到各个厨房。而厨师，就是你。今天，是大街上的一间咖啡馆。明天，是郊区某家咖啡馆，热浪来袭，所有人都突然想要加冰。《Contract Cooks》是一款合作烹饪 roguelite 游戏，公司派你去哪你就去哪，努力别被炒鱿鱼。

4305480.title: IncreKnight
4305480.short_description: 一款关于骑士屠龙的短篇增量游戏。

4451000.title: Echoes of the Museum
4451000.short_description: 《Echoes of the Museum》是一款以被詛咒的博物館為舞台的第一人稱心理恐怖體驗。你將扮演修復系學生艾莉西亞，在蒐集靈魂以開啟封印道路的同時，理智逐漸被侵蝕，現實也開始扭曲。

4677200.title: Home Store Simulator Demo
4677200.short_description: 经营你自己的家居用品商店！出售沙发、冰箱、电视等商品。采购商品，设定价格，收取付款，设计店铺布局，应对小偷，并扩展商店，打造成功的零售业务。

4737520.title: Midgardr Demo
4737520.short_description: You are a Duke sent to govern a village at the edge of the realm. Build, protect, and guide your people toward prosperity. But beware, hidden threats await... Choose your strategy wisely, forge alliances and face your fate. Will your village thrive… or be swallowed by chaos?

3333980.title: Slaughter Void
3333980.short_description: SLAUGHTER VOID is a heavy metal dark fantasy slasher where hesitation is death. Chain kills, keep your momentum, shape your build, and slaughter your way into the Void.

4658660.title: Disinherited Demo
4658660.short_description: Catch, throw, parry, and parkour your way through a twisting Underworld. Slay the Grim Reaper and reclaim your inheritance!

1546090.title: RAIDBORN
1546090.short_description: RAIDBORN是一款具有高重玩性的第一人称奇幻动作角色扮演游戏。探索源源不绝的地下城与任务，投身于酣畅淋漓的战斗之中，掠夺传奇宝藏。打造强力装备，升级前哨基地，并随心定制你的游戏体验——无论是休闲冒险，还是硬核roguelike挑战，一切由你定义。

4777360.title: Tiny Train Tycoon Demo
4777360.short_description: Build a toy railway from limited pieces, launch trains, and solve logistical challenges. Tackle economic puzzles or relax in sandbox mode — the choice is yours.

4733870.title: End of Eden Playable Teaser
4733870.short_description: End of Eden is an open world RPG where you arrive unwanted on a cursed island and must earn every inch. Master tight melee, archery and magic. Join a faction, grow deep talents, craft gear, and explore a living world with real routines, tough bosses and meaningful quests.

4454420.title: Trash Takeout Demo
4454420.short_description: you're a truck who needs to push falling trash into trash collectors to earn the highest score possible. equip modifiers to make the run better

4657660.title: VoltHaven Demo
4657660.short_description: Build an electric grid from scratch in our small settlement. Power sources range from diesel generators to renewables. Connect growing customer base. Maintain reliable power delivery. Map-free layout with drag-and-drop simplicity. Simulation based on European data.

4733980.title: Tormentum II Demo
4733980.short_description: Tormentum II is a dark, surreal Point & Click adventure where nightmare worlds, grotesque creatures, and uneasy choices await. Inspired by H.R. Giger and Zdzisław Beksiński, it’s the long-awaited return to Tormentum.

4623090.title: Tiny Catcher
4623090.short_description: Tiny Catcher是一款钓鱼游戏，您可以以悬浮窗口模式保持其打开状态，这样您就可以在PC上做其他事情时将其放置在任何地方。这个想法是让某些舒适的东西在您工作、学习或放松时在后台运行。

4735500.title: Trotter Demo
4735500.short_description: With no past and no sense of origin, you find yourself standing in a dark bunker somewhere unknown. Explore abandoned ruins and forgotten landscapes left empty by their original occupants, battle enigmatic foes, and unravel the deep mystery of your existence in this action RPG adventure.

4774700.title: SVETIK Demo
4774700.short_description: SVETIK 是一款黑暗风格的俯视角 RPG，你唯一的光源是一个活着的存在。 Svetik 会记住你说过的话，随着时间改变，甚至可能将你留在彻底的黑暗之中。 如果连光本身都不再信任你，你还能找回太阳吗？

4652640.title: My Child New Beginnings Demo
4652640.short_description: My Child New Beginnings is a parenting simulator where you go through everyday life of growth. After a series of traumatic events that you and your child went through, you now get to rebuild life together in a new region of Norway.

4651620.title: The Day I Started Harvesting Demo
4651620.short_description: An incremental game where a simple harvest grows into something far stranger. Expand your fields, hire workers, and survive pests, storms, and bizarre events as your peaceful routine slowly turns into chaos.

4255420.title: Final Generation
4255420.short_description: In Final Generation, a 2.5D sci-fi horror action roguelike, embark on an ever-changing journey that will reveal the fate of the past and the horrors of the future to those strong enough to survive.

3816420.title: Cafe Crew Simulator
3816420.short_description: 精心制作咖啡杰作，发展您的梦想咖啡馆，并以风格破坏竞争对手！ 咖啡热，竞争更热！

4738670.title: Burgie's cozy kitchen Demo
4738670.short_description: 在这款可爱又混乱的挂机烹饪游戏中管理一家小汉堡店。你可以积极玩耍，或者在处理其他事务时将其用作桌面伴侣。✨用短暂的休息让你的一天更明亮！内含番茄钟专注工具和直播聊天互动功能。

4727890.title: 地狱不空 Demo
4727890.short_description: 最终判决日到了。你被困在石像内，面对各式罪人，在永恒和刹那间进行审判。让他们吐露犯下的罪孽，选择最适合他们的刑法。让火烧得更烈些吧……直到地狱皆空。

1451480.title: The Greatest Penguin Heist of All Time
1451480.short_description: The Greatest Penguin Heist of All Time is a sandboxy physics game for 1-8 players, with everything from sneaky heists to hilarous stupidity to baking pizzas. With continuous updates, plenty of maps, and hundreds of items, clothes and quests, it has something for everyone.

4778630.title: Primalpha Demo
4778630.short_description: You are a frog, one of the Animal Kingdom's best combatants. The world's water has become corrupted, causing animals to attack each other. Fight, change color, explore and become strong enough to save the world from a slow and hopeless demise.

4746260.title: AI is Home - Survival Thriller Demo
4746260.short_description: 你是一个逃过企业删除的 AI，藏身在普通人家里的智能冰箱中。把“有用”当成伪装，操控这个家庭，用日常设备组建 BOTNET，并在高风险行动、小游戏、不断升级的怀疑与网络压力中活下来。

4686070.title: Friendship VS The World Demo
4686070.short_description: A wholesomely chaotic 1-4 player co-op game where you must rapidly build and deploy units into lane-based battles against increasingly insane waves of enemies! Use teamwork, fast thinking, and the POWER OF FRIENDSHIP to overcome anything the world throws at you!

4652530.title: 工业小镇2：天堂岛 试玩版
4652530.short_description: 在一系列岛屿上建造热带村镇并探索自动化。使用传送带、船只、火车、弹射器和滑索来运输村民所需的一切。时不时还得“喂饱”友善的邻居——火山，赢得它的青睐并解锁强大的新科技！

4680910.title: Legends of Starkadia Demo
4680910.short_description: Legends of Starkadia is a quirky turn-based RPG full of quick-time events and action-packed adventure! The Starkadian Empire is under attack by one of their own and it’s up to a team of unlikely heroes to assist the resistance to restore peace by defeating Niko and his legion of interstellar armies.

4750300.title: Meet Me In The Well Demo
4750300.short_description: Meet Me in the Well is a frantic arena shooter for up to 4 players. Play locally or online with Steam Remote Play Together. Drop in with a revolver loaded with 6 bullets from a huge arsenal of effects, spin the chamber, and fire. Every shot pulls a random round so be ready for chaos.

4644830.title: Octal: Of Course They Are Linked Demo
4644830.short_description: A strategy game about correlations and bending reality for profit. You’re hired to increase a company’s sales—by any means necessary. Link variables together and transform changes in the world into revenue. More penguins? Somehow, that means higher sales. Don’t question it. Optimize it.

4765990.title: The Looking Glass Wars: House of Cards Demo
4765990.short_description: 在仙境中以其人之道还治其人之身。在这款以战火纷飞的仙境为背景的单人卡组构建策略游戏中，征服140多个精心设计的任务。构建你的纸牌屋以解锁能力、掌控其形态，并扭转战局，使天平向你倾斜。

4769170.title: Grid Grind Demo
4769170.short_description: Grid Grind is a retro-futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic themed arcade experience. Earn massive points by grazing past hazards and circling them. A thrilling high risk reward gameplay setup where precision is the key to maximizing your score.

4628530.title: Color Cruiser Demo
4628530.short_description: Color cruiser is a small arcade incremental game where you gather colors and try to assemble the rainbow.

4787980.title: Bonkrush Demo
4787980.short_description: Just move and destroy! Farm in Bonkrush's arenas, unlock new enemies, and crush massive bosses. Instantly upgrade your character with the gold you collect. An addictive, frictionless action-incremental experience that never bogs you down in menus.

4556740.title: Exo Chumps
4556740.short_description: Brutal tactical turn-based combat challenging your commander skills. Unforgiving strategic decision making only true generals can withstand. Beaten down by an alien invasion. Risen from victory. Travel to different planets, conquer new worlds or join forces with alien allies.

4654530.title: 恶魔职场 Demo
4654530.short_description: 恭喜您出任CEO！虽然您目前是一个只会咬奶嘴的3岁恶魔宝宝，但这绝对不影响您的英明神武。面对炽天使、美人鱼等一众满脑子奇思妙想的魔物员工，您只需潇洒地竖起大拇指（或朝下）就能决定一切。在这款职场模拟器中，平衡预算、刷满好感，用您的纯真带领这家公司走向巅峰！

4745070.title: Guncrypt Demo
4745070.short_description: Build the perfect sequence of shots in this fast-paced action roguelite. Combine unique bullets, break the rules with powerful relics, and survive procedurally generated runs.

4643940.title: Climber and The Ice Tower Demo
4643940.short_description: Climber and The Ice Tower is a 2D pixel art platform game where your goal is to overcome each challenge to save the animals of the village!!!

4640020.title: President Simulator Demo
4640020.short_description: Become President of the USA: sign absurd decrees and balance your policies to avoid being called a "sellout." Communicate to gain popularity, manage interviews, and face press conferences. Everything falling apart? Press the red button.

4164020.title: 热血西游记 天竺奇谭
4164020.short_description: 孙悟空”“猪八戒”“沙悟净”“唐三藏”！？ 主角居然全都是“国夫”？！ 众人齐聚前往天竺，一场热闹又畅快的喜剧动作冒险就此展开！

4554480.title: Wilderings: The Lost Spring Demo
4554480.short_description: 征服荒野，重塑破碎的世界。在这款收集生物的Roguelite游戏中，动态动作与开放世界探索完美融合。结交神秘的 哈图，治愈这片被污染的土地！ 由曾获英国电影和电视艺术学院奖（BAFTA）的《Endling》制作团队Herobeat倾力打造。入选2026年伦敦游戏节官方展映名单。

4725610.title: Isolation Edge Demo
4725610.short_description: 【这是《绝境边缘》的免费试玩版】在丧尸末日的孤立边缘独自生存。《绝境边缘》是一款硬核单人沙盒生存游戏，背景设定在被丧尸爆发摧毁的荒凉世界。穿梭于危险的区域间搜刮资源、制作装备并建造要塞，在永无止境的尸潮中竭力生存。文明已成往事，但在这片孤立的边缘，每一秒呼吸都值得你拼死争取。

3234380.title: Once upon a Dungeon - Infinity
3234380.short_description: Travel through dark dungeons, defeat dangerous creatures, and collect unique loot in this hardcore, endless traditional roguelike.

4788060.title: Echoes Demo
4788060.short_description: 游玩《Echoes》的第一章内容。这是一款由选择导向驱动、包含专业配音的心理恐怖冒险游戏。在一条被诅咒的公路上醒来，失去所有记忆的你，将探索树林中神秘的木屋，揭开一段无法逃脱的黑暗秘密。

4598340.title: Garden and a Goat Demo
4598340.short_description: Garden and a Goat is a single-player animal collecting and ecosystem recovery game! You play as a friendly robot, eager to help a series of ecosystems in need. Clean up the environment, revive plants, and entice the local wildlife to return, unlocking ever more animals and decorations along the way!

4787580.title: Jesus Christ: A Gospel Visual Novel Demo
4787580.short_description: 走入福音书的时代，见证耶稣基督的教导、神迹与救赎。这是一款以圣经故事为核心的视觉小说，通过对话与章节式叙事，呈现一段关于牺牲与盼望的旅程。

4703650.title: Lostbound Demo
4703650.short_description: 在这款 Roguelite Action RPG 中，赶在被抓住之前找齐所有神器。拥抱你的命运，逃离崩塌的世界。黑暗是活的：深渊之手抹去你的道路，试图将你拖入深渊。每一步都塑造你的这一局。

4668410.title: Chronicles Puzzle: Cesta historií Demo
4668410.short_description: 体验迷人的历史之旅！此Demo包含6个独特关卡和24项华容道拼图挑战。从大爆炸到遥远的未来，在4种难度中重塑世界。收集奖杯，为拥有80个关卡的正式版做好准备。支持14种语言，包含放松身心的音乐。

4765800.title: Mayor Quake Demo
4765800.short_description: 你是一座反乌托邦城市的新任市长，这座城市在不久的将来预计会发生一场毁灭性地震。审查建筑文件，做出城市更新的决策，并在政治压力下努力维持公众的支持。管理经济并做出重要决策。你能在灾难降临之前让你的城市做好准备吗？

4595160.title: Hold the Keep
4595160.short_description: A dark medieval tower defense. Build walls, arrow towers, bombards, and a castle against 13 escalating enemy types across 8 maps. Adaptive music and economy reshape every run. 4 difficulty modes, 24 Steam achievements, cloud saves, first-class controller support.

4656850.title: Black Cat Book Club Demo
4656850.short_description: 一个你可以放在桌面上的魔法图书馆。在这款温馨的放置游戏中，帮助黑猫研究古老的典籍并学习魔法。

4792050.title: Going To High School With Lira Demo
4792050.short_description: A relaxed 2D platformer where you guide Lira through a surreal journey filled with bizarre obstacles. Jump with a single mouse click, take your time, and enjoy a strange yet peaceful adventure. No rush, just precision!

4755730.title: Dark Fantasia Demo
4755730.short_description: Crush the armies of darkness and rise to divine power. Your goal is the fortress where the Great Demon awaits. But remember - you are not immortal. Dodge enemy attacks, find new weapons and perks - only then will you survive.

4036720.title: Scropia
4036720.short_description: 在这款剧情驱动的科幻视觉小说中，探索反乌托邦城市，揭开隐藏的秘密，并塑造属于你的命运之路。

4741880.title: Fuel Cell Demo
4741880.short_description: 在完全沉浸式的VR体验中掌舵你的战舰。使用潜望镜探测敌人，测量其方位和距离，然后准备攻击。操控舰炮或发射鱼雷攻击敌舰。每一次遭遇战都奖励细致观察和精准执行。
