4779320.title: The Order Of Serenity : Cult Simulator Demo
4779320.short_description: The Order Of Serenity is a psychological horror simulation where you carry out cult duties, make unsettling choices, and prove your devotion to ascend within a secret and oppressive order.

3807830.title: The Well's Blessing Demo
3807830.short_description: Explore the mystical Sanctuary of the Old Well and reconnect with your childhood friends while solving environmental puzzles. Meet quirky animals, unravel forgotten tales and immerse yourself in an interactive soundscape as you piece together your place in the world.

3503790.title: PROHIBEAST
3503790.short_description: 在这款战术潜行游戏中，你将穿越到30年代的芝加哥，一个充满腐败和非法走私肉类的城市。你可扮演埃利奥特·内斯或他的小队成员，深入敌境。你需要巧妙运用声东击西、潜行躲藏等战术，暗中打击黑手党，最终摧毁阿尔·卡彭的犯罪帝国。准备行动, 让我们一起体验这场充满刺激和挑战的冒险吧！

4779670.title: Shapemonger Demo
4779670.short_description: Shapemonger is a colorful arcadey incremental game about destroying shapes - in outer space! - getting money and buying upgrades

2651350.title: Slip & Skid
2651350.short_description: Race against your friends and alter the track by placing obstacles after each lap. Change the rules mid-game with roguelike modifiers. Shove your opponents off the track, drift, boost and jump. Up to 4 players online and local split-screen.

4799660.title: Ancient Shadows Awakening Demo
4799660.short_description: Ancient Shadows Awakening 是一款黑暗风格的 3D 地牢 RPG，在其中你将探索古老遗迹，对抗可怕的生物，并揭开深渊中的秘密。

4711810.title: Shipping Store Simulator 2037 Demo
4711810.short_description: 经营未来物流中心！雇佣机器人、派送包裹、自动化日常流程，打造阳光克兰洛克最大的包裹自提点。

4622520.title: Func Key Demo
4622520.short_description: Deck out your keyboard with powerful upgrades in this roguelike word-builder. Snap on keycaps to buff entire rows or columns, install "broken" function keys, and pick your projects as you rise from a nobody to a keyboard legend!

4739840.title: Rongu Demo
4739840.short_description: Rongú combines turn-based RPG and rhythm combat in an adventure inspired by Afro-Esmerealdan mythology. Chain combos, dodge, and counterattack to the beat of a unique soundtrack, as you experience an action-packed journey full of rhythm and a powerful narrative.

4215520.title: 神手牌
4215520.short_description: 这不是一个肉鸽游戏。试试你的手气，以生命向众神下注，展开一场致命的卡牌游戏。使用强大的遗物去战胜那些不朽的对手，直到最后一位神明殒落。

4777200.title: The Fortuneteller Demo
4777200.short_description: Take up the mantle, read the fates, control them, use them. You are The Fortuneteller. You are to be the best of the best. Use the tools given to take what is rightfully yours, vengeance.

4725540.title: Tribe Quest Demo
4725540.short_description: Your village was destroyed. Hunt the evil warlord, rebuild your home. Embark on perilous quests to craft, fight, and survive in a harsh roguelite world.

4497870.title: Magic Ball Breaker Demo
4497870.short_description: 《Magic Ball Breaker》是一款将物理休闲打砖块与“背包俄罗斯方块”和“Roguelite”元素相结合的策略游戏。与自称魔王的魔法书签订契约，在有限的背包中战略性地布置魔法，击败你的敌人吧！

4521590.title: Make'Em Mayhem Demo
4521590.short_description: Make'Em Mayhem defines a fresh mix of AI generation, battle, strategy, and hero growth. Summon legendary heroes from across the multiverse to build your dream team, crush powerful enemies and prove you are the kingdom's ultimate champion!

4430800.title: 救援被拒 - Salvation Denied Demo
4430800.short_description: 救援：被拒 是一款面向1-4人的混乱 co-op 建造模拟游戏。与队友合作，使用重型机械和离谱工具打造疯狂结构。物理主宰一切：每块方块都有重量，每个失误都会破坏平衡，而灾难会把你的建筑推向极限。

4702850.title: LastCrownGambit Demo
4702850.short_description: 一款让棋子通过卡牌与协同效果不断进化的国际象棋 Roguelike 战术游戏。

1880100.title: Backpack Raiders
1880100.short_description: 《Backpack Raiders》是一款融合生存 Roguelite 与背包构筑策略的动作游戏。装备摆放与搭配决定你的战斗强度。 打造你的装备。碾压虫潮。在废墟之城中生存。

4779740.title: Deliverage Demo
4779740.short_description: Deliverage is a hardcore open-world PvP delivery game where every shipment is a gamble. Fight other players for valuable cargo, repair and modify fragile vehicles, outplay rivals in a shifting economy, and climb from nothing to the top of a ruthless world.

4768200.title: Gempop Demo
4768200.short_description: Channel your beam into drifting gems, charge them until they pop, and trigger cascading chain reactions across a dark void.

4409870.title: Slots & Diapers
4409870.short_description: 一个关于经营赌场、榨干爷爷奶奶剩余价值、把人生过成电子功德机的增量挂机游戏。雇佣退休老赌徒，24 小时自动疯狂梭哈，替你永不停机地创造流水。当别人还在悠闲种田的时候，你已经开始打造全自动养老院赌场帝国了。让你边笑边开始怀疑自己道德底线。

4750120.title: Crystal Harvest: Apex Operator Demo
4750120.short_description: Crack, mine, and sell mystical crystals while fighting alien hordes on various planets in this fast-paced incremental mining extraction roguelite hybrid experience. Earn currency to spend across upgrade categories with permanent progression and powerful builds in runs.

4746670.title: Super Galaxy Gladiator Demo
4746670.short_description: Super Galaxy Gladiator 是一款主打构筑搭配与背包管理的幸存者类肉鸽游戏。迎战一波波汹涌来袭的敌人，在战斗中购买、升级物品，通过巧妙排布装备位置，解锁强力联动，打造极具想象力的流派构筑。

4688740.title: Drink Water!
4688740.short_description: A simple and clean desktop bottle-companion that reminds you to drink water and stay hydrated throughout the day. Track your daily water intake, monitor your streak, and keep a little (or big) pixel-art bottle always on your desktop.

4741690.title: Paper Carnival Demo
4741690.short_description: 《纸片嘉年华》(Paper Carnival) 是一款带有魔幻现实主义色彩的2D解谜平台游戏。你将扮演一只手持大锤的小丑兔探索充满谜题的箱庭地图。利用大锤打飞道具，利用反作用力让自己跳的更高！Demo版本包含一个精心制作的关卡。

4691720.title: FLIPSWEEPER
4691720.short_description: Put your deductive reasoning to the test in this sleek, modern logic puzzle. Reveal safe tiles and mark hidden dangers to successfully clear the grid. Optimize your speed, minimize your hint usage, and master your logic skills to earn perfect 3-star ratings across dozens of challenging levels.

4769840.title: Flakeparty Demo
4769840.short_description: Scoop, position and score cereals to gain enough points in this relaxing, rogue-like deck-builder. Collect quirky cereals with unique effects, use them to play the rule-twisting minigames to gain special toys,buy upgrades to increase your chances and reach the final extra difficult boss round!

4712760.title: Snuggle nightmare Demo
4712760.short_description: Survive this first-person mascot horror adventure set in an abandoned theme park. Solve puzzles, craft tools, avoid a deadly animatronic, and uncover the secrets hidden within Brain World Rots.

4599090.title: Mutie Headz - Demo
4599090.short_description: A roguelite pinball action-adventure! Explore the CAVI-NET as you flip the Mutie Headz, android heads torn from their bodies, across unique physics-driven levels. Unleash quirky powers, bust through waves of alien minions, and dive into retro-futuristic kawaii chaos. Preparing for launch...

4433170.title: Absorber: Absorb Adapt Survive Demo
4433170.short_description: 吞噬敌人。窃取他们的力量。在网格中生存下去。 一款硬核战术类Roguelike游戏，舞台设定在7×7的被污染主机系统中，拥有160多个具有协同效应的程序。永久死亡。每次通关都至关重要。

4576380.title: Still Warm Demo
4576380.short_description: Deep-fry lángos in a Budapest alleyway and serve the regulars from the apartment building across the courtyard while they slowly realize someone is picking them off, one by one.

4519730.title: Dave's Word Game Demo
4519730.short_description: A daily word game. Find words, clear rows and columns, aim for the highest score you can. A new board every day!

4752000.title: DARK DANCE Demo
4752000.short_description: DARK DANCE：华丽的弹幕盛宴！ 沉浸在强烈的节拍中，体验自动攻击 nit 带来的便利与手动操控带来的爽快感。策略性的 Build 构建与华丽的动作表现，将带你进入一个梦幻般的幻想世界。

4794790.title: Claire Detective 1 : The Monster of Lake Flavoria Demo
4794790.short_description: A monster has been spotted at Flavoria lake ! Hoax or truth ? Start your detective career with panache by solving this mystery... not so complicated... but hey ! First time for everything, right ?

4776370.title: Krieg Demo
4776370.short_description: 爆发火力，直闯闪击战场！！在这款竞技场风格的多人对战游戏中体验高速战斗。Krieg 是一款融合未来科技风与老派手感的第一人称射击游戏。通过多种坦克与升级选项自定义您的战斗风格。游戏还提供高度可自定义的专用服务器系统。设置、启动，然后冲冲冲！

4732810.title: Gunk
4732810.short_description: Gunk is an endless rouge-lite wave survival game. Fight off hordes of enemies and level up your skills to increase your chance of survival, and save the world from the Gunk invasion. Their only weakness is rocks, and you are the last hope for humanity. Can you save us all?

4583130.title: Park It!
4583130.short_description: 在线4人合作停车游戏——每人只控制一个WASD按键！

4105740.title: 痴情妹妹纱雪的兄控日记 Demo
4105740.short_description: TamaMako首部原创游戏，以闷骚妹妹VS妹控哥哥为主题。夏日的心动同居物语从此开始！本游戏内含五篇ASMR音声，让你的体验不再单调！夏日的每一天，我们的妹妹要如何表达自己的爱意呢？

4617850.title: 呪霊が見せる夢 / Dreamscapes Demo
4617850.short_description: Visit the room you toured by day, once more in your dreams at night. Waiting there are ghosts pleading, "Let me out." Dreamscapes is a horror adventure set in six haunted properties. Gather clues to perform rituals and release trapped spirits. This demo features the story's prologue.
developers: アイエダゲームズ（Aieda Games）
publishers: アイエダゲームズ（Aieda Games）

4734120.title: Only Humans On Board Demo
4734120.short_description: Buy supplies and manage your resources. Serve customers quickly from your trolley, but stay sharp: be aware of the unknown. Some passengers are only pretending to be human...

4733700.title: Terminal Cursor
4733700.short_description: Terminal Cursor is a fast‑paced reflex arcade game where you dodge evolving bullet patterns and survive as long as possible. Every movement matters. Features intense runs, rising difficulty, high‑score focus, and an original soundtrack by David‑Ștefan Horecica.

4743490.title: Aspectless One Demo
4743490.short_description: Aspectless One Demo is an early playable preview that doesn't directly represent the final content of the game. This demo is designed to let you experience the dark fantasy world, basic combat systems, ability usage, and the overall atmosphere of the game.

3697790.title: 帕斯的餐厅 Demo
3697790.short_description: In a fantasy world, become magical cat Pas. Run your restaurant, serve creatures, make friends. Explore mazes, map them, find hidden food to enrich your menu. Meet friends, hear their stories. Pas's Restaurant eagerly awaits you to co-write this warm fantasy chapter.

4711050.title: ImpossibleBosses
4711050.short_description: Team up in online co-op and take on powerful boss raids. Learn attack patterns, survive chaotic battles, and work together to defeat seemingly impossible bosses.

4642830.title: The Void Calls Demo
4642830.short_description: The Void Calls, and you will answer. Explore the mysteries and secrets of Reprieve, a town stitched together from the dark past of its bizarre inhabitants in this horror-filled point-and-click adventure.

4781180.title: (You're Not) Welcome to Rennville Demo
4781180.short_description: (You're Not) Welcome to Rennville is a cozy, pixel art platformer with an emotional dialogue-driven story. Explore the town of Rennville and it's surroundings, complete mini games, and talk to quirky characters, on a sentimental journey filled with humor and heart.

4719050.title: 楚汉争霸之神兵天降
4719050.short_description: 来自未来星球的6位（目前仅2位）少年战士，意外通过时空裂缝坠入公元前3世纪的楚汉战场。他们携带未来科技武器，在古老战场上演一场跨越时空的"神兵天降"。
developers: Qingdao Qilin Ark Network Technology Co.,Ltd.
publishers: Qingdao Qilin Ark Network Technology Co.,Ltd.

4529970.title: 咔擦果切
4529970.short_description: 欢迎来到赛博夜市！《咔嚓果切》是一款快节奏的休闲果切游戏。经营你的未来街头小摊，精准切割新鲜水果，完成顾客订单，触发霓虹狂热模式，成为午夜最强的果切大师！

4759430.title: Vortha Demo
4759430.short_description: A high-speed arcade racer inspired by Trackmania. Race against the clock across 32 unique tracks, compete for the top spot on global leaderboards, and earn your medals. Race agains you best time, or other players best times.

4779590.title: 90 Minutes Till The World Ends Demo
4779590.short_description: 90 minutes remain until the world ends. Will you face the end with regret or go out with a bang?”

4677290.title: Midnight Moments Demo
4677290.short_description: A small, cyberpunk diorama-building game where you create cozy rain-soaked backstreets, glowing apartment blocks, or quiet neighbourhood corners. Decorate your designs with props and place citizens, crafting stories that bring your city to life. At your own pace. No goals. Just vibes.

4716140.title: 美偶人 Puppet Demo
4716140.short_description: 一款第一人称 3D 生存恐怖游戏，你误入了这个诡异的空间，疯狂的人偶与高挑的魅影对你紧追不放，任何一步都需要小心翼翼，避开它们的视线。探索周围环境，利用道具和笔记上的线索，寻找离开这里的路。不安与恐惧时刻笼罩着你，努力逃离这场噩梦。

4774230.title: Yummy Yummy Honey Demo
4774230.short_description: 采摘花朵，培育你的蜂巢！轻松又刺激：治愈系的花朵与蜂鸣盛宴。

4275930.title: KGT: Kevin Got Teleported
4275930.short_description: 这是一款竞技场式的第一人称射击动作游戏，融合了枪战元素。 在艾森斯塔特博士的量子实验室发生一场灾难性事故后，你被传送到了一个陌生的维度。 神秘的地下城主强迫你在危机四伏的关卡中为了生存而战。

4072320.title: Pawful Dice
4072320.short_description: The cutest roguelike deckbuilder: roll adorable animal dice to win! Add new dice, level them up, and greedily collect rewards. Every strategy works… if you can defeat the Mushroom King!

4665200.title: Prophecy of Vul Demo
4665200.short_description: A playable demo of Prophecy of Vul featuring the game's first act. Meet the denizens of the forest and explore a beautiful pixel art world!

4514400.title: Smash Dash: Demolition Run Demo
4514400.short_description: 俯视角PvE刷宝射击游戏。战斗、搜刮、生存——撤离以保留你的物品并通关。

4752430.title: 灵宅：回音缭绕 Demo
4752430.short_description: 现实在令人惊愕的熟悉感中崩塌。《灵宅：回音缭绕》是一款第一人称心理恐怖体验。在一座不断变化扭曲的别墅中，揭开深藏在建筑表面下的悲剧。当建筑本身开始传递过去的回声，你的摄像机中映照出与现实不同的神秘空间的画面，你需要看穿两个世界之间的联系，离开别墅。

3234100.title: 丧尸要塞：末日搜打撤
3234100.short_description: 在末日废土中爆杀万千丧尸！在《丧尸要塞：末日搜打撤》的崩塌废墟中飞速变强，捡垃圾也能爆出满身神装！是选择八方弹射的火力风暴，还是连环爆炸的清屏盛宴，亦或是用棒球棍猛击丧尸魔丸？成为末日背包管理大师，在血与火的围攻中杀出生天吧，出击，屠杀，逆天改命！

4711140.title: Astaryn : Chained Realms Idler
4711140.short_description: Astaryn: Chained Realms 是一款长期放置奇幻 RPG：选择英雄职业，离线训练专业，制作装备和食物，提升战力，准备挑战地下城，并解锁宏大的任务战役。

4687370.title: G Squad Demo
4687370.short_description: Run the gauntlet with G Squad in this hand-crafted autobattler with roguelite and RPG elements, designed to scratch the strategy itch without the spreadsheets. 9 unique heroes, in-run rewards, permanent progression, and boss challenge modifiers to test yourself against.

4585290.title: Squadika Demo
4585290.short_description: 俯视角竞技场射击类 Roguelite 游戏，在这里，倒下的队友将化为你的力量。指挥你的英雄小队，抵御无尽尸潮并击败强大的 Boss。Twitch 聊天观众还能作为英雄加入战斗！挑战排行榜！融合《Brotato》风格的弹幕生存玩法，拥有疯狂 Build、随机事件与极高的重复可玩性。

4733760.title: NEUROSLOP
4733760.short_description: On a rainy night, the protagonist steps into a café that has never been on this street before. Inside are strange visitors, conversations about how stories work, and an evening that lasts longer than it should. A short linear visual novel.

4737920.title: Crisis Commander: Strait Of Hormuz
4737920.short_description: A satirical 2D strategy game set in the Strait of Hormuz. Control fleets, play cards, and manipulate oil prices. Meanwhile, your incompetent general keeps issuing increasingly unhinged orders. Keep the price of oil where he wants it, or the world will pay the price.

4672340.title: Ink & Void
4672340.short_description: 一款以繪本世界為舞台的塔防遊戲，文具騎士們挺身對抗侵蝕故事的「虛無」。 配置鉛筆劍士、鋼筆魔導士、橡皮僧侶等個性鮮明的單位，守護全4章的繪本篇章。 透過轉職進化單位、通關後獲得卡牌構築專屬卡組，享受高策略性的戰鬥體驗。 支援語言：日語 / English / 中文

4621180.title: Ascenders: Beyond the Peak Demo
4621180.short_description: ASCENDERS: BEYOND THE PEAK is a turn-based exploration roguelite where survival is vertical. Lead a team of alpinists to recover ancient artifacts from cursed peaks, prepare your expedition, evolve your climbers, master rope mechanics, and face H.P. Lovecraft-inspired horrors within the mountain.

4340130.title: WorldDrive: Real Open-World Driving Simulator
4340130.short_description: Drive the roads you know. WorldDrive recreates real cities and roads at 1:1 scale—starting with a 30 km² region of Poland in Early Access. Free drive, explore, and share the road with realistic AI traffic.

4579820.title: 超词元同居 Demo
4579820.short_description: 《超词元同居》是一款关于和Vtuber主播同居扮演日常生活的模拟游戏。 你将和一名Vtuber主播住在一起。你可以坐在电脑前看她在直播间里整活、发光；也可以在摄像头关闭后，陪她喝杯咖啡、聊聊心里话。隔着屏幕，她是万众瞩目的虚拟偶像；推开房门，她是只属于你的同居少女。

4403300.title: Crime Union Demo
4403300.short_description: Build your criminal empire from the shadows. Manage global networks, launder black money, hire specialists, and crush rival gangs in tactical card battles. In Crime Union, staying alive while the law watches your every move is just as hard as reaching the top. Don't get busted.

4783690.title: Abracademia Demo
4783690.short_description: Become a wizard, and a thumping good one! Abracademia is a cozy mage idle life-sim that lives on your screen and keeps you company while you work or play. Pick a coven, manage your daily routine, learn spells, make friends, embark on adventures, and pass exams on your way to graduation.

4380420.title: Chonky Cat Demo
4380420.short_description: 在《胖墩墩猫》中化身最毛茸茸的破坏者，扮演一只永无止境暴食的巨型肥猫。追逐、碾压、吞噬成群生物，变得更胖更无敌！吃光一切，解锁升级道具、倍增器和个性化装扮，看看你能胖到什么程度！

4753100.title: NETRUN Demo
4753100.short_description: 双手各持抓钩，摆荡、推进、冲刺，一路杀出胜利之路。这是一款快节奏、以动量为核心的精准平台游戏，遍布陷阱、敌人与各种物理挑战。

4795980.title: Pengzle:Arctic Arcane Demo
4795980.short_description: Pengzle is a real-time puzzle action adventure where you weave mana into spell formulas in the middle of battle. Read the flow of combat, build the right combination, and cast at the perfect moment as a small penguin mage in a distinctive polar fantasy world.

4773960.title: Gold Up Demo
4773960.short_description: Gold Up 是一款基于物理机制的在线合作攀爬游戏。两名玩家必须通过角色切换与精准配合，将宝藏一路带回地面。成功完全取决于信任、时机与团队合作。

4650380.title: Pull Out! Spotted Garden Eels
4650380.short_description: 拔花园鳗——这大概是每个人都曾至少做过一次的梦吧。在这款游戏里，梦想成真了。 这是一款可以体验拔出可可爱爱花园鳗的单人鼠标操作游戏。

4727160.title: 图说八道
4727160.short_description: 《图说八道》是一款看图猜谐音梗的休闲益智游戏。每一关都是一张脑洞图片，玩家需要观察画面中的物品、动作、文字暗示和奇怪组合，联想到对应的谐音词、成语、俗语或网络热梗。没有倒计时，没有惩罚，轻松猜梗，快乐解谜。

4709930.title: Harmonic Drive
4709930.short_description: An arcade-style rhythm game featuring full AI generated EDM. Build combos, chase perfect runs, climb the leaderboards, and experience a soundtrack built for late-night sessions and score chasing.

4655740.title: Warena Demo
4655740.short_description: Warena 是一款实时卡牌对战游戏。两名玩家同时行动。部署部队、施放法术、推向敌方基地,对手也在对你做同样的事。管理法力,读懂对手,卡准反制时机。包含 1v1 PvP 与单人战役。

4711870.title: Hidden Legends
4711870.short_description: Discover a magical world full of secrets and hidden treasures!

4612780.title: Into The Deep
4612780.short_description: Into The Deep - a rhythm roguelike game where you must dive into the ocean and clear it from music-corrupted ocean creatures!

2649860.title: Gombo
2649860.short_description: 探索、制作、战斗、建造并在这片被神秘感染侵袭的卡通世界中求生！操控魔法生物贡博，投身充满奇幻色彩的冒险之旅。支持单人游玩或与好友在线合作。你能揭开这多彩王国的黑暗秘密吗？

4783080.title: Life's Too Short Demo
4783080.short_description: A little adventure game featuring a problem solving ghost. In Life's Too Short, this little ghostly adventure game, you have been called in to settle a feud between two vampires who have dramatically fallen out.

4757890.title: South of the March Demo
4757890.short_description: South of the March is an RPG that combines visual novel exploration with turn-based combat in a hand-drawn dark fantasy world. Meet the locals and unravel a mystery, equip your party for the dangers ahead, and set out into the unforgiving wilderness.

4786990.title: HellFactory Inc. Demo
4786990.short_description: Run a factory in Hell. Automate production lines, hit monthly revenue targets, bribe the board of Seven Deadly Sins, and skim slush funds to seize control — before they terminate you. A roguelike fusion of factory automation and boardroom politics.

4707680.title: Mechanical Granny Demo
4707680.short_description: An atmospheric point & click quest where the player explores a mysterious house, solves puzzles, and uncovers the disturbing truth behind the grandmother's strange behavior.

4145900.title: Chaos Claw
4145900.short_description: You are the claw. Chaos is the goal. Fulfill increasingly ridiculous cat orders in a physics-fueled claw machine meltdown. Grab, toss, and scramble your way through waves of impatient cats, random items, global leaderboards, and pure, contained chaos. Nuclear Kitty Minis Tiny games. Pure chaos

3837200.title: 外卖李水
3837200.short_description: 这是一款现代2D像素风，休闲解密类游戏，游戏操作非常简单，玩家可以收集道具，在合理的情况下使用道具，解锁剧情，这样剧情才能延续下去 每一次解锁了剧情，游戏中的场景可能会出现一些变化，玩家可以再次探索剧情中的物品

4757650.title: Bootloop Demo
4757650.short_description: Brain busting puzzles to drive you loopy. Set up to 8 instructions that loop infinitely to reach the exit. Jump over obstacles and pitfalls, and use walls to your advantage. All Easy, Medium and Hard puzzles unlocked, so attempt them in any order.

4662290.title: Split Fate Demo
4662290.short_description: Split Fate is a 2D co-op game for two players where you control fire and ice characters. Work together to solve puzzles, fight enemies, and progress through levels. Success depends on teamwork, timing, and coordination between both players.

4799770.title: Garden Eternal Demo
4799770.short_description: The cozy garden that keeps on growing. Garden Eternal is an idle clicker where you tap a glowing Heart, raise bees & buildings, and draft cards through every season. A calm place, mostly. But the garden keeps its own hours, and not everything that blooms after dark is a flower.

4711440.title: 白之追猎 Hunter White Demo
4711440.short_description: 《白之追猎》是一款2.5D开放箱庭共斗狩猎游戏，每把武器均拥有不同方向的独立派生，搭配海量饰珠组合出只属于你的战斗风格吧！

4799840.title: ZapStick Demo
4799840.short_description: 一记电击,看他们飞天而去。《ZapStick》是一款色彩缤纷、混乱十足的魔法乱斗游戏,爆炸的水晶与飞舞的身体让每一场对局都难以忘怀。单人或多人,纯粹的疯狂任你尽兴。

4732700.title: 灰烬王国 - 陨落纪元
4732700.short_description: 以陨落王国为背景的单人 roguelike 卡组构建游戏。抽取卡牌、连锁元素共鸣，穿越由战斗、神龛和 Boss 编织而成的程序化地图。在熔炉中消耗灰烬以获得永久强化。八位英雄，残酷的飞升层级。

4718440.title: Lords Of Heck
4718440.short_description: Lords of Heck is a high-octane 2.5D arcade brawler that captures the raw energy of 90s cabinet classics. Forget modern hand-holding—this is a brutal, handcrafted journey through a hellscape inspired by the dark, gothic grit of Diablo.

4726950.title: 天门问剑
4726950.short_description: 《天门问剑》是一款放置武侠 RPG。创建剑客，选择命格，在自动游历中收集名剑、功法与后天命格，推进人物关系、奇遇支线和长线传说。

4703400.title: Mara Unbound
4703400.short_description: 在这款第一/第三人称动作冒险游戏中，你将探索古老遗迹、解决环境谜题、破解保险箱、黑入被遗忘的科技，并在危险的遭遇战中生存下来。搜刮资源、制作物资，并揭开隐藏在神秘世界各处的传奇遗物。

4798510.title: Boxing Life Simulator Demo
4798510.short_description: 《拳击人生模拟器》是一款结合了拳击机制的模拟游戏。你可以在锦标赛中与对手对战，拥有社交生活，赚取金钱并用它来提升你的实力和社交地位。

4728810.title: The Telwynium: Book One
4728810.short_description: Book One - Winter's Dawn. The first chapter in a 90s fantasy adventure epic from the creator of The Drifter. It's your first night away from Willows Dene, and you have first watch.

4729960.title: Orbit Breaker
4729960.short_description: 选择几何核心，用自动武器和被动能力组成构筑，在不断升级的敌潮中生存。探索扇区，寻找解锁内容，让装备进化，并击败最终 Boss。

4705730.title: Ship It
4705730.short_description: Welcome to Ship It Co.! As a Sorting Specialist, grab incoming packages off the conveyor and stack them in the elevator. Build stable loads, hit Send, and meet your shift quota before time runs out. Just don’t let your friendly AI manager, Shippy, catch you falling behind!

3239960.title: Goalkeeper Journey
3239960.short_description: Step into the gloves of a rising goalkeeper, starting your journey at local clubs and working your way to the world’s biggest football stages.

4403200.title: 雪夜枪声 Demo
4403200.short_description: 这是一款类魂俄罗斯轮盘赌肉鸽游戏。行走在黑雾笼罩的雪原，穷凶极恶的邪教徒强迫人们进行残酷的轮盘赌游戏。为了活下去，你们不得不使用各种卑鄙的技能与手段......

4800770.title: Richer than the King Demo
4800770.short_description: Create immense wealth, build a rebel army, and overthrow the crown in this medieval economic strategy game. Trade daily, invest wisely, bribe royal scouts to stay hidden, and rally fellow nobles to survive clashes against the King's forces

4798500.title: 墨卷奇路 Demo
4798500.short_description: Mojuan is a single-player roguelike deckbuilder blending deck construction with Qishu board space management. Enter painted scrolls, plan around cards, relics, consumables, and the Nine Gates, and face forest spirits, strange formations, and eerie encounters.
developers: 杭州执棋者网络科技有限公司
publishers: 杭州执棋者网络科技有限公司

3917590.title: Blendkins
3917590.short_description: In Blendkins, explore the 3D Atlantic Forest in first-person, find camouflaged Blendkins, care for them, and post trend photos! Buy online and collect creatures, but beware: your actions will have consequences.

4761510.title: Realmlords
4761510.short_description: REALMLORDS is a fast‑paced Bullet‑hell / Spell-hell roguelite with 12 distinct classes, each offering unique weapons, abilities, and build paths. Explore 9 dangerous Randomly Generated Elemental Realms filled with unique monsters, hazards, and loot as you fight to survive each run.

4674290.title: Revenger3 Demo
4674290.short_description: ガラケー時代のレトロRPG、リベンジャーシリーズ第三作！

4558980.title: Frutiger Home Demo
4558980.short_description: Decorate your dream frutiger home in this cozy co-op frutiger house decorating game. Pick a home layout, add from a wide range of frutiger-themed decor and hang out with your friends!

4755980.title: Zombie Survivors - last soldier - Demo
4755980.short_description: 用你喜欢的枪击倒逼近的僵尸，活下去。 《Zombie Survivors - last soldier -》是一款肉鸽休闲射击游戏。

4493720.title: Skycore Reboot Demo
4493720.short_description: 《天核重启》是一款以技能构筑为核心玩法的动作类Roguelike闯关游戏。你将在随机生成的浮空城中冒险，自由组合随机获取的技能与装备，最终战胜终极魔导兵器，重启天核，改写群岛坠落的命运

4714100.title: 真理谭：黑暗城堡的女巫 Demo
4714100.short_description: 打开这本书的那一刻，你就不再只是"读者"——这是一款在书页中冒险的"阅读式"奇幻RPG。曾在香草社（Vanillaware）任职、深耕游戏业界30余年的工匠，倾注6年时光亲手打造，100%纯手工的一册。

4789930.title: Cards of Sparkle Demo
4789930.short_description: 一款以“卡牌推演”重现人类文明发展史的解谜冒险游戏。从第一颗火花开始，沿着科技树点亮节点，通过拖拽、合成与启迪，亲手书写一份属于人类的浪漫宣言。

4783410.title: PopVibe Demo
4783410.short_description: PopVibe is a casual rhythm game centered around pop music. Using only your keyboard, you can play along with various tracks in a straightforward, easy-to-learn manner. It is designed for players looking for a simple way to interact with music.

4706830.title: Idle Asteroids Demo
4706830.short_description: 一款結合經典復古太空戰鬥與深度永久成長系統的增量式街機生存遊戲。 在激烈的戰鬥回合中生存、收集資源、購買武器升級，並將你的基礎戰機逐步打造為全自動放置型小行星採礦無畏戰艦。

4752030.title: Drive To Meet Demo
4752030.short_description: 是时候了，你决定开始这趟旅程。路上会遇到些麻烦事，但它们不会动摇你的决心。

3709430.title: 魔女：终末旅途
3709430.short_description: 深渊已经腐坏，象征着终焉的魔女们将在奥尔德林苏醒。你将执掌每位魔女的命运轨迹，以卡组构筑无限可能。创造属于你独一无二的卡牌，自定义魔女们的日程，在策略交锋的战场中，每一次精心构筑，都是在重塑世界的轨迹——是携手寻找希望，还是为世界献上终焉？结局，由你来改写...

4781810.title: SEC-NULTOR Demo
4781810.short_description: As an amnesiac employee, complete your re-evaluation in an entity containment facility to obtain access to your original living quarters. Manage and work with containment cells up close to ensure you complete your work day without much casualty.

4749110.title: 再见犹丽迪茜
4749110.short_description: 《再见犹丽迪茜》是一款关于音乐与校园青春题材的GalGame。高三艺考生李莫正处于低谷期。某天放学，他在本应空无一人的出租屋客厅里，遇见了一位陌生少女。她自称“犹丽迪茜”，很是古怪，却从此自然而然地闯入了他的生活。玩家将在游玩过程中体验一份别样的校园青春恋爱，并在结局处做出抉择。

2752350.title: 深海工厂
2752350.short_description: 你将被投送到一颗完全被海洋覆盖的异星上，从零开始建立深海工业文明。探索随机生成的未知海域，解锁生产路径，构建自动化物流网络，并通过可循环的生物培育系统，将星球生命转化为稳定的工业产出。在自动化的轰鸣声中，逐步征服幽静深海，打造能够自我运转的工业帝国。

4770590.title: 幸运奶茶店 Demo
4770590.short_description: 幸运奶茶店是一款融合了肉鸽元素的餐厅模拟游戏。玩家选择适合的菜单、适合的顾客，加上一些幸运，就能打败不断涨房租的包租婆

4510300.title: 次元之旅 Demo
4510300.short_description: 在一个风和日丽的午后，奶牛牛牛正悠闲地嚼着青草，忽然，一道神秘的传送门在他面前展开——下一秒，他坠入了陌生的​​艾斯特拉大陆​​。这里的一切都颠覆了他的认知：魔物横行，星辰之力涌动，而更令人震惊的是，​​这个世界遍布着无数传送门​​，它们通往未知的领域，也隐藏着足以毁灭世界的阴谋……

4807100.title: NightFang Demo
4807100.short_description: NightFang wears it's inspirations on it's sleeve. It's an 80s/90s Anime/VHS inspired Shmup, rendered in delicious 3D that hypnotizes you into thinking it's 2D. Youth is a falling star. Rise up against the Crimson Scourge.

4427240.title: The Reserve
4427240.short_description: Fast paced modern military FPS. Diverse game modes for fun PvP action or PvE game play with co-op mode with friends plowing through bots while hitting the mission objectives. Experience Rank up system along with daily challenges to expedite your ranking up progress. Can be played in FP or TP.

4770550.title: The Heart of Gold Demo
4770550.short_description: The Heart of Gold: Demo is an Hybrid Bullet Heaven-JRPG game, where each character is unique thanks to their own abilities, progression, and combat style. Upgrade your equipment, evolve your weapons, collect cards, and survive hordes of enemies in a colorful world full of secrets and challenges.

4522150.title: 疯狂原始人
4522150.short_description: 成为一个原始人，生存建造钓鱼打猎

4720210.title: 连击与乱斗
4720210.short_description: 快节奏，轻Roguelike游戏。几十种随机事件快速变化生成，在众多敌人的围剿下，通过上下左右的简单移动，勇往直前不假思索地顶撞击飞敌人，通过随机事件相互配合，得到意想不到的效果；或是思考局势随机应变。不管哪种方法，不断击飞敌人，突破包围，来获取更高分数。迎接Boss的挑战。

4220150.title: Deep Board Go
4220150.short_description: 在宁静而沉浸的 3D 空间中体验围棋。逼真的棋子、手工打造的棋盘、流畅的镜头控制，以及强大的 Computer Go 对手，共同营造出独特的围棋体验。DeepBoardGO (静境围棋) 将传统围棋富有触感的美感带入数字世界，带来更加贴近真实且沉浸的体验。

4805450.title: The Comyths Demo
4805450.short_description: 《The Comyths》是一款无游戏结束机制的弹幕动作游戏。操控角色暂停、减速、回溯时间，你的实力由评级决定，而非死亡。你可执掌空间、时间、物质、生命、心智、虚空六大本源力量，精通一切机制，追寻完美S级评价。

4758810.title: Infogrind Demo
4758810.short_description: 在赛博朋克的未来，管理一座存放超自然文物与机密信息的银行。解开新现实的谜团，探索这个世界，并在那些企图掌控新现实的权势企业之间寻求平衡。

4340820.title: Isekai Villain
4340820.short_description: 化身真正反派，在暗黑RPG中改写命运！

4802920.title: Colossus - Eternal Blight Demo
4802920.short_description: Your brother is corrupted. The Blight is spreading. Only you can stop it. Colossus is an atmospheric pixel action-adventure where you master precise combat, explore a vast dark fantasy world, and make choices that permanently scar the kingdom of Eireos.

4708900.title: 画室模拟器 Demo
4708900.short_description: 在你的画室里展示天马行空的想象。画画，出售，打造你的画廊并邀请朋友欣赏！

4682280.title: Burger Bois Demo
4682280.short_description: 你将扮演帕蒂，阴差阳错间接管了濒临倒闭的餐饮店生意。制作美味（或怪味）汉堡，探索新食材，（稍作）努力挽回你的声誉，打造有史以来人气最火爆的餐车。在这款温馨的餐车模拟游戏里玩转美食吧！

4634400.title: Portabellows Demo
4634400.short_description: Explore a whimsical island to find… pie recipes?! Bake them by gathering or growing ingredients, which may be the key to helping out your new found quirky friends leave the island! In this wholesome 3D platformer collectathon, you can enjoy discovering the world freely at your own pace.

4665870.title: Fields of Aaru Demo
4665870.short_description: 治愈的生活模拟游戏，带你走进古埃及神秘的死后世界。在尼罗河畔耕作，与当地人交朋友，装点永恒的家园。闯入沙漠深处，探索绿洲、金字塔与陵墓。修复古老的方尖碑，向诸神献祭，解锁神奇的魔法力量。

4751990.title: Meowstery Wisp Demo
4751990.short_description: 多​人​社交​推理​与​调查​游戏。​搜集线索、​进行​辩论​并​操纵​信任​以​解​开​谜团；​直​到​“最终​阶段”​前绝无​淘汰。​

4114260.title: lily's world XD Demo
4114260.short_description: 莉莉曾是生活在 2004 年的一名普通少女，而你刚刚找到了她的笔记本电脑。翻翻她的日记，给她的朋友发发消息，赶在一切无法挽回之前，弄清楚她身上到底发生了什么。不过，能够接触她电脑的人，并非只有你……在试玩版中，抢先体验莉莉故事的第一章。

4784990.title: American Revolutionary War Demo
4784990.short_description: Fight through the American War of Independence in a tactical wargame of field battles, frontier warfare, fortified positions, and campaigns for control of the colonies. Command American, British, Loyalist, German, Native allied, and French forces across 148 scenarios and four campaigns.

4794960.title: Prehistoric Pit Demo
4794960.short_description: 化身为恐龙，在这款快节奏的动作 Roguelike 游戏中对抗无尽的敌人。积累经验，选择强力升级，成为终极掠食者。面对混乱，你能坚持多久？

4762030.title: Firva: Strings of Fate (Part 1) Demo
4762030.short_description: 《Firva: Strings of Fate》是一款剧情驱动的动作冒险游戏，拥有充满氛围感的电影化场景与震撼演出，故事发生在一个丰富而残酷的黑暗奇幻世界中。体验独特的复古动作战斗，在闪避与格挡的技艺中寻找生机。化身被复仇驱使、注定踏上血色之路的 Firva，步入最黑暗的命运。

4695410.title: T.W.I.R.L. Demo
4695410.short_description: 凌晨 3 点，你回到了童年的家。所有人都睡着了，除了你。偷偷溜出房间，去做你一直都会做的事 - "T.W.I.R.L." - 不管那是什么意思。

4709620.title: GRIMLOOP
4709620.short_description: Command a ghost army built from your own past. Every 30 seconds a spectral echo replays your combat — by minute 20, 40 ghosts unleash hundreds of projectiles. A horror roguelite bullet heaven with 90+ weapons and 7 nightmare bosses.

4755180.title: Final Flavor Demo
4755180.short_description: Hone your skills with knives and fire to taste sweet victory... LET THEM COOK! Final Flavor is an old-school dungeon crawler where a diverse party of outcasts slays, bakes, and sautés their way to survive. Find the perfect ingredients, following the footsteps of the legendary chef.

4797010.title: GrassChopper Demo
4797010.short_description: Swing your scythe, earn coins, and spend them on a variety of upgrades to cut deeper into the overgrowth. An incremental action game about pushing further than anyone has gone before

4626480.title: Toada Brava Demo
4626480.short_description: Toada Brava is a fully hand-drawn 2D top-down RPG. Battle your way through the Santacrúz Dungeons and help Kako find his mom, while helping the revolution!

3799880.title: Plush Rangers Demo
3799880.short_description: Survive waves of wacky mutated constructs to defeat powerful bosses with your team of Plushie friends in this quirky chaotic Survivors-like. Earn merit badges to unlock new Plushies, relics, items, and upgrades.

2144600.title: Eterspire
2144600.short_description: Eterspire 是一款经典、友好且充满魅力的 MMORPG，你的技巧与投入将决定你的成长。刷取装备，探索生机勃勃的 Aetera 世界，每两周发现全新内容，并在这款支持 PC 与移动端跨平台联机的免费 MMO 中加入一个温暖友好的社区。

4780750.title: Teeko Demo
4780750.short_description: Teeko 是一款结合 2D平台跳跃 与 塔防 的叙事游戏，灵感来自哥斯达黎加的 面具节（Día de Las Mascaradas）。某天，Tita奶奶的孩子们被面具之灵附身，引发混乱。现在只能靠她的树懒 Teeko 来拯救小镇。

4753200.title: Sanctus Wars Demo
4753200.short_description: Sanctus Wars is a small indie dark fantasy action game. Summon hellish units, cast spells, grow your heroine, and defend the portal against waves of enemies.

4622830.title: Darkstone Bay
4622830.short_description: A shipwreck has been hidden on this island for 300 years. Nobody has found it. You arrive at Darkstone Bay determined to change that. Cross the island by solving ancient puzzles, navigate rocky beaches, caves and dense jungles in an escape room inspired adventure. Will you be the one to find it?

4774680.title: The Kingsward Demo
4774680.short_description: 探索开放世界RPG，体验等距视角ARPG战斗、灵活的职业系统与充满讽刺幽默的史诗故事。打造你的专属构筑，寻找传说中的王之剑。

3833760.title: 你懂的钻头 You Know The Drill
3833760.short_description: 一款轻松的渐进式采矿游戏，玩家需在地下挖掘以开采矿石。收集资源并用它们升级你的钻头，向更深处进发吧！

4780640.title: Meow Box City Demo
4780640.short_description: Cute cats, chaotic moves, big plans. Meow Box City is a multiplayer, strategy board game about building influence before local elections. Collect cards, place buildings, balance satisfaction, population, income, and sabotage rivals to win at the ballot box.

4733830.title: Tiny Capsule Collector Demo
4733830.short_description: 在屏幕底部经营一家温馨惬意的扭蛋店。在这款放置类模拟游戏中，招揽萌趣可爱的动物顾客，收集别致迷人的扭蛋玩具，打造一方惬意悠然的小天地，让你在忙碌之余也能收获点滴小确幸。让你的桌面，成为你愿意停留的小天地。

4518230.title: TD Master
4518230.short_description: Build, upgrade, and defend in this tactical tower defense experience. Place traps, manage resources, and survive increasingly intense waves of enemies in a system-driven, replayable strategy game.

4690250.title: Billion Egg Farm Demo
4690250.short_description: Billion Egg Farm 是一款第一人称自动化游戏，玩家需要让鸡下蛋，并构建鸡蛋、肉类及加工制品的生产线。

4749830.title: Clank-Robotics Demo
4749830.short_description: Build your own robot. Program your robots AI in the Visual Scripting logic editor. Compete against other people's robots in the ranked arena. Build the strongest and smartest robot and win.

4712770.title: 2x2=BOOM Demo
4712770.short_description: 驾驶你的飞船穿越数字敌人的群体。配对数字以求生存——或者运用数学，用一次毁灭性的攻击将他们全部消灭！

4780110.title: Chess Pawn Demo
4780110.short_description: Chess Pawn is a fun puzzle-platformer in which the hero dreams of becoming a king. Your goal is to claim the royal crown, but along the way you’ll have to eliminate the competition… by knocking your opponents off the board.

4795570.title: Conqueror's Stage Demo
4795570.short_description: No fixed maps. No scripted history. No tutorial treadmill. Conqueror's Stage is a real-time grand strategy across five ages — where every decision trades against another. Grand strategy, finally designed to be finished.

4043280.title: Below
4043280.short_description: 这是一款**《逃生》风格的第一人称恐怖游戏**，融入了心理恐怖元素，为你带来毛骨悚然的体验。你将手持摄像机，探索金字塔下黑暗的陵墓和狭窄的通道，努力揭开它可怕的秘密。合理管理你的电池，而最重要的是——活下去。

4666190.title: Quantum Quartz Demo
4666190.short_description: 一款蒸汽朋克像素风精准平台跳跃游戏。你可以用不同颜色的水晶开启或关闭平台。一次只能激活一种水晶，而每种水晶都会带来不同的移动能力，让你用新的方式移动、解开房间中的空间谜题，并完成高难度的平台跳跃挑战。

4799950.title: Labyrinth Demo
4799950.short_description: Climb a 100-floor Labyrinth in a third-person anime action RPG featuring skill-based combat, persistent progression, powerful build customization, and Epic Boss encounters every 10 floors.

4788130.title: 80s Horror Survivors Demo
4788130.short_description: Battle endless hordes in an 80s horror nightmare. Stack insane upgrades, break the game, and survive as long as you can.

4802060.title: I Know A Spot Demo
4802060.short_description: 自定义你的车辆，布置温馨的营地，探索宁静的地点，与狗狗一起放松身心。

4693840.title: Birdy's Island Demo
4693840.short_description: 加入友好的小鸟 Birdy，开启热带冒险！飞翔、潜水、探索岛屿，发现新地方并结识可爱的动物朋友。点击引导 Birdy 飞行，松开即可下潜，寻找隐藏的宝藏。快来体验这场充满乐趣的冒险吧！🌴🦩

4749730.title: Incremental Stand Demo
4749730.short_description: Incremental Stand 是一款增量式策略塔防游戏，玩家使用光标收集资源，在地图上部署幸存者，与僵尸战斗，并通过技能树和强力升级不断变强。

4701020.title: Medic Please! Demo
4701020.short_description: 最多4人的基于物理的在线合作救援模拟。搬运、拖拽、投掷——为了拯救病人不择手段！通过治疗赚取金钱并升级你的诊所。

4789980.title: Plant Game Demo
4789980.short_description: A short run-based survival game where you grow a plant with limited perception, unlock sensors to read the environment, and reach a bloom/death reveal that shows what your run created.

4779250.title: In The Mist of War Demo
4779250.short_description: In the Mist of War is a turn-based online PvP strategy game. Select your units, position them strategically, and outsmart your opponent in a tactical top-down fog-of-war battle.

4705560.title: Future? No Thanks! Demo
4705560.short_description: Future? No Thanks! is a narrative-driven, open-world adventure set in an ecosocialist utopia. You're old, bitter, and scheduled for euthanasia. Enjoy your last day in a future that works for everyone but you.

4791380.title: Game About Breaking A Cube Demo
4791380.short_description: Take a role of a factory worker opressed by an evil corporation. Break stranger and stranger cubes in pursuit of ore and truth. Upgrade your tools, explore the underground facilty and learn the secret of NullCorp. Later, relax at home with the cold can of drinkable meat.

4303110.title: Just One More Link
4303110.short_description: 连接。恐慌。暴利。 一款高速增量式Roguelite：贪婪就是燃料。连接水晶触发巨型反应，解锁清屏激光，为每一秒而战。链条越长，回报越大。但计时归零，你将失去一切。

4150470.title: Penguin Colony Demo
4150470.short_description: 透过企鹅视角体验宇宙恐怖，两支互为死敌的人类队伍闯入南极家园，妄图寻觅某种古老且无法名状的存在，本作忠实重构了H.P.洛夫克拉夫特的《疯狂山脉》及其他经典怪谭，准备好见证人类如何一步步陷入疯狂吧。

4756790.title: Hands On Builder Demo
4756790.short_description: Hands On Builder is a cozy first-person building simulation where you gather materials, prepare them yourself, and construct your home piece by piece. Cut logs into panels and studs, plan your worksite, and build at your own pace in a relaxed sandbox world.

4695280.title: Blobby Coins - The Board Game
4695280.short_description: Blobbies love coins and winning! In this classic turn based board game that almost needs no dice, you proceed by collecting move points and try to collect the most coins. Find treasures, avoid bear traps and outsmart the other players. Play against the computer or local with your friends or family.

4792750.title: SAMPO Demo
4792750.short_description: Sampo is a Kalevala-inspired roguelite deckbuilder rooted in Finnish mythology, where you forge powerful rune combos, battle mythical creatures, and quest through a world of ancient magic to claim the legendary Sampo.

2700790.title: Shepherd Knight
2700790.short_description: 《Shepherd Knight》 是一款冒险游戏，你需要带领羊群和忠犬，穿越充满巨龙、野狼和其他危险的世界。

4236640.title: Goat Nuclear Clicker
4236640.short_description: An absurd incremental clicker — click goats, trigger nuclear chaos, automate production, and ascend through galaxies in a multiverse of upgrades and detonation-driven mayhem.

3596470.title: Clockfall
3596470.short_description: Master the clock, break the loop. Time is limited and is the ultimate resource in this hybrid Dungeon Crawler packed with phases of village defense. Each run is a fight to earn more time, or unlock new weapons and skills to build your escape.

4807340.title: Jewelers Of Gaia Demo
4807340.short_description: Explore procedurally generated caves, solve encounters and collect loot with friends!

3876960.title: Штольня
3876960.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game in which a trip for easy money turns into a fight for survival deep underground.

3774620.title: Gachamon
3774620.short_description: 一款轻松可爱的放置游戏，从神奇的扭蛋机中收集生物，边玩边 multitask，随时随地轻松养成！

4803910.title: Horde Reapers Demo
4803910.short_description: 无论单人作战还是最多4人联机，都要奋力击退无休止的敌潮。搜刮强大的遗物，在每次通关中变得更强，并重建村庄以解锁英雄和升级项目

4766610.title: 50 Years Classic Demo
4766610.short_description: 50 Years Classic is a minimalist turn-based strategy game where you can choose from a variety of nations, each with its own unique feature. The game offers fast, engaging gameplay with high replayability. This is a demo version.

4627910.title: DOMISNAKE
4627910.short_description: 回合制 roguelike 中，贪吃蛇遇上多米诺骨牌。你放置的每一块骨牌都必须与蛇头的点数链相匹配，吃苹果，智胜在快速填满的棋盘上猎杀或逃窜的对手蛇。

4791420.title: The Remains Demo
4791420.short_description: The Remains is a 1-4 player co-op survival horror where an intelligent AI enemy hunts your team whilst adapting to your tactics. Stay quiet and out of sight, or get picked off one by one.

4793310.title: SOMIA Demo
4793310.short_description: 索米亚 是一款心理恐怖游戏，讲述了一位年轻女子一夜醒来后失去所有记忆，随后发生一系列超自然事件的故事。

4542200.title: Data Center Simulator Demo
4542200.short_description: Step into a realistic first-person data center simulator. Badge in, diagnose faults, replace hardware, configure networks, and manage critical infrastructure. 45 training scenarios across 9 categories teach real-world skills that prepare you for data center technician careers.

4731190.title: 狐狸饺子
4731190.short_description: 在《狐狸饺子》中，你将经营自己的美食车，并在旅途中结交朋友。在这款温馨的烹饪模拟游戏里，制作世界各地的饺子，悉心照料顾客，探索一顿美食如何能治愈饥饿之外的伤痛。用每一道暖心料理，逐步攀升至狐狸美食网的巅峰。

3793830.title: Bittersweet Blossoms Demo
3793830.short_description: A lesbian romance set in England shortly after WWI. The story centres around Dot, a young maid who begins to work in the crumbling stately home of Bly, and her young mistress: the devious, devilish Patience.

4732420.title: Lovecraft Survivors
4732420.short_description: A Lovecraftian survivor-like. Wield forbidden tomes and cursed sigils against endless hordes of cosmic horrors. Survive 30 minutes against a rotating pantheon — Cthulhu, the Black Goat, the Eldritch Entity — and unlock 5 weapon evolutions before the Final Awakening.

1298370.title: Zap Blastum Demo
1298370.short_description: Robots have invaded your planet, and they don't even see you as a threat. Beat the odds and SAVE THE GALAXY in the FREE DEMO of this twin-stick cover shooter with lock-on targeting!

3797240.title: Chaos Coin Demo
3797240.short_description: Your coins are your actions in this roguelike coinbuilder. Plan your turns to shove, evade, and attack your foes in tactical lane-based combat. Upgrade coins with new faces unique to every character to build complex combos. The forces of Chaos are coming…so use your heads (and tails)!

4770520.title: Road Defense Racing Demo
4770520.short_description: 在 Road Defense: Outsiders 的世界中体验高速载具战斗竞速。驾驶、射击、摧毁并升级你的赛车，在 30 条充满挑战的赛道上驰骋。面对武装对手，在敌意观众的攻击下努力生存，并赚取资金来强化你的车辆。

2975040.title: Gate Guardian
2975040.short_description: Gate Guardian is a fantasy roguelite with a deep spell-crafting. Take advantage of unimaginable freedom in creating your magic spells. Build perfect combinations of skills, change and modify them. Defend Life and Survive Death!

4619380.title: Undying Flame Demo
4619380.short_description: Survive a minimalist wave-survival rogue-lite. Keep the fire alive. Read its flame. Defend your fire against creatures that crawl from the dark across endless waves. Every wave survived, the fire grows. Over time, it consumes everything.

3722550.title: GENERAL IDLER Demo
3722550.short_description: Experience the thrill of global conquest with a limited demo of GENERAL IDLER. Train your army, conquer neighboring nations, and unlock a taste of strategic gameplay. Will you make the right moves to expand your empire? Your path to global control begins now!

4785650.title: Slimestoppers Demo
4785650.short_description: Slimestoppers is a top down horde shooter that pits the technology of man against a relentless army of sentient slimes from space. Choose from an ever-expanding arsenal of weapons, abilities, perks, and equipment to forge the perfect Slimestopper. Supports multiplayer up to 4 players!

4441050.title: AKIBA LOST (秋叶原迷踪) 试玩版
4441050.short_description: 13年前，秋叶原发生了6名少女失踪的未解之谜——“秋叶原的神隐”。新城大辉宣布以此为题材制作一款真人游戏。被召集出演的6位女性，正是象征日本次文化圣地“秋叶原”的多彩人物。然而，她们原本要演出的故事，渐渐开始侵蚀现实。《AKIBA LOST》究竟能否完成？

4685070.title: Far Mining
4685070.short_description: Far Mining is a short and relaxing incremental game about mining asteroids. Mine resources, upgrade your ship, unlock new tools, and find your way out of deep space.

3301370.title: 昏迷
3301370.short_description: 在这款以故事为核心的复古生存恐怖第一人称射击游戏中探索你腐朽的内心世界。管理稀缺资源，解开谜题，奋力挣脱死亡的枷锁。

4471030.title: An Odd Walk: Shinjuku Alley
4471030.short_description: Exit the looping alley by observing the environment and correctly answering "anomaly" or "no anomaly" 9 times in a row. Anomaly-spotter/walking simulator set in an odd imitation of an alley in Japan.

4798490.title: UnfAIr War: Survivors Demo
4798490.short_description: This is NOT a "forever" roguelike for thousands of hours. It's a game for a few cozy evenings. Download — launch — play immediately. No skill trees, no boring meta-grind. Just pure co-op action: you're chained together, dodging waves of robots, throwing grenades, and triggering ultimates.

4774460.title: Chess 2 Demo
4774460.short_description: Chess 2 combines chess-like tactics with territory control, economy, diplomacy, and special units. Expand across the map, build your position, and outplay opponents in singleplayer or multiplayer.

4470910.title: a monkey Demo
4470910.short_description: 《AMonkey》是一款以《西游记》为背景的快节奏2D牌组构筑Roguelike。您将化身猕猴，在随机生成的取经路上展开冒险。游戏核心循环清晰明快：战斗 → 三选一获取卡牌/法宝 → 构筑/升级牌组 → 挑战更强Boss。 游戏的核心乐趣在于深度策略构筑。您可自由组合超过60张效果各异的卡牌，形成独特战斗流派，例如追求一击制胜的爆发流、侧重高频攻击的连击流，或依靠格挡反击的防御流。 游戏内容丰富，包含10多种能改变战局的强力法宝，以及10位以上拥有独特机制的首领Boss。每一次失败都意味着下一次能带着更丰富的策略开局，保证了极高的重玩价值。 准备好迎接这场充满策略与随机性的快节奏卡牌冒险了吗？

4405620.title: Inferno Protocol Demo
4405620.short_description: A survival horror set in a massive maze. Play solo or 6-player co-op. Scavenge resources to craft gear and survive against terrifying enemies. Unlock unique abilities and find the exit.

4750080.title: NoodlePunk Demo
4750080.short_description: Forced into a corporate-mandated work program, you run a cyberpunk noodle shop to pay off a crushing debt. Prepare orders fast, manage your ingredients, and upgrade your operation while keeping up with relentless customer drones.

4462530.title: Guess The Sound Demo
4462530.short_description: Guess The Sound is a relaxing sound-based puzzle game where you type an answer to a question based on what you heard. Handcrafted levels, logic-driven challenges, and clever hints triggered by wrong answers in a unique game of listening and reasoning for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. 🧠🎵

870910.title: RAD Demo
870910.short_description: RAD is a neon-drenched movement game built around speed, flow, and experimentation. Jump, swing and glide through relentless obstacle courses, race leaderboard ghosts and shave milliseconds off every run. Instant restarts keeps the momentum going.

4732160.title: Blighthold Demo
4732160.short_description: Blighthold is a 2D city builder set in a Lovecraftian-Dieselpunk world. Reclaim the lost city and its Eldritch Tree. Suffer through moral dilemmas that will shape your society. Defend against abominations and uncover the terrible secret that lies below.

1526550.title: Project Microchip
1526550.short_description: 加入这个支持多达10人的危险世界！在PvP中通过社交推断揭穿叛徒，或在单人/联机PvE中对抗AI敌群。完成任务以逃离并从这场噩梦中生还！

4705230.title: 駒山キリは全部やりにいく
4705230.short_description: Popular streamer Komayama Kiri stars in a chaotic streaming survival action game! Fall through deadly obstacles, survive endless enemies, go viral across the galaxy, and overcome mysterious cosmic trials with the fox-eared V-streamer Kiri in this wild minigame collection!

4778070.title: Cascade Demo
4778070.short_description: A real-time roguelike where every move starts a chain reaction. Push, collide, and watch the dungeon finish what you started.

4770370.title: Gardens Of Lutonia Demo
4770370.short_description: Gardens of Lutonia is a contemplative druidic sandbox. Terra-farm a world with your harp-staff and your cat, freeze plants mid-growth to compose living patterns, or build your own dungeon-gardens in the Map Editor. No combat. Just vibes. 🌿

4624170.title: レザリシアストーリーズ 体験版
4624170.short_description: "Lezarishia Stories" is a classic command-based JRPG set in a 2.5D world that blends pixel art and 3D visuals. Pursue the stolen Holy Sword and set out on a grand retro-fantasy adventure with a cast of memorable companions!

1281640.title: 医疗兵：太平洋战争
1281640.short_description: 化身医疗兵，成为真正的战地英雄。在枪林弹雨、令人胆战心惊的太平洋战争前线活下去。受伤的同伴将你视为最后的希望。你的决定将改变战争的进程，但有时你必须面临艰难的抉择！

4701750.title: AstroDig Demo
4701750.short_description: 在多个星球上开采、防御并获利。在这款极简科幻策略射击游戏中扩展你的行动，抵御敌人波次，并发现危险的隐藏世界。

4587840.title: Neat Demo
4587840.short_description: 感到不知所措吗？你好，我是Molly。我帮助人们整理空间、收纳物品，让生活重新回归平静。让我们一件一件来，把一切重新变得整洁。告诉我你的故事。我会在这里倾听。

4743010.title: Minibus Simulator Demo
4743010.short_description: Manage your own minibus route through the narrow streets of the city. Transport passengers, load luggage, monitor your fuel, and complete your route while staying alert for police inspections.

4300660.title: Fire Pit: Throw Things Into The Fire
4300660.short_description: 这个世界不配存在。反正一切都无所谓。独自摧毁并焚烧事物。或者叫上你那些虚无主义的朋友，一起把东西丢进火里。

4389350.title: 1997 RELOADED
4389350.short_description: Three teenagers find a mysterious audio tape recording which turns out to be evidence of a murder. It’s the end of the world as they know it. Immerse yourself in a kinetic novel that encapsulates the essence of the 1990s by completely reinventing its music scene.

4606700.title: CatCha Demo
4606700.short_description: Discover CatCha a Cozy and Roguelike solo game for PC. Take care of your cats, decorate multiple rooms in the Cat-Castle and play the strategic Dice Builder Rogulike!

4745280.title: Valkyrie Raid Demo
4745280.short_description: Deliver devastating close air support while commanding a dynamic battlefield in this 2D action shooter with real-time strategy and roguelite progression.

4714640.title: Void Runner
4714640.short_description: Dive into the Void. Dodge, fire, restart. Sharpen your build run after run and claim a spot on the global Top 10. A pure, demanding arcade roguelite: 28 evolving skills, 5 hand-crafted worlds or endless survival. Your skill, your ladder.

4751650.title: Celestial Routes Demo
4751650.short_description: Celestial Routes is a space exploration game in which players take on the role of galactic citizens, tasked with paying taxes and collaborate with the colonial and the galactic government authorities. And survive as an individual.

4780720.title: SeaColony Demo
4780720.short_description: SeaColony 是一款设定在无尽海洋上的基地建造生存游戏。建造并扩展漂浮前哨，管理幸存者，建立生产链来维持殖民地。耕作海洋，并与商船交易，在严酷深海中生存发展。

4796490.title: Food Truck Rush Demo
4796490.short_description: 在源源不断的急躁顾客面前，顶住压力经营你的餐车。通过快速上菜、升级设备以及搬迁至更富裕的地段，一步步还清10k债务。在这款快节奏的烹饪与管理游戏中，速度、升级和混乱将决定你的成功。

3976150.title: Sonki's Lagoon
3976150.short_description: Dive into Sonki's Lagoon, a colorful low-poly high speed 3D platformer, inspired by the classics. Explore a fun world, pull off stylish moves and find all the Johnnies in this indie adventure!

4656920.title: PetDoctor
4656920.short_description: A cozy veterinary clinic simulator where you treat animals, expand your hospital, and build a trusted care center.

4278370.title: Charming Hill Demo
4278370.short_description: Charming Hill 是一款小型实验性游戏，让创作美丽的画作变得轻松而自然。无需任何特殊技能，也能感受成为艺术家的乐趣：在这里放松、绘画，发现一段温暖的故事，或绘制属于你自己的故事。

4793290.title: Daybreak Slam Demo
4793290.short_description: Colorful characters clash in this beginner friendly 2D Fighter. Family friendly themes and aesthetics with simple combat mechanics make Daybreak Slam a welcoming experience for new players to the genre, and allow each character to stand out in their own unique ways that veterans will appreciate.

4734280.title: Rumble Rush
4734280.short_description: Pick a fruit. Jump, dodge, grab power-ups, launch rockets at your friends, and try not to fall off. First one to the finish line wins. Good luck.

4575730.title: 龙之剑:觉醒 试玩版
4575730.short_description: 探索由虚幻引擎5打造的动画风格开放世界——奥尔维斯大陆！招募个性十足的伙伴，施展华丽的异常状态联携战斗，踏上拯救世界、对抗沉睡60年后再度苏醒的龙的伟大旅程。

4609710.title: Space Tail: Definitive Edition Demo
4609710.short_description: 《Space Tail》是一款 2.5D 平台冒险游戏，您将踏上令人心潮澎湃的宇宙冒险之旅，并领略跌宕起伏的剧情。您将扮演一只勇敢卓绝的太空旅行犬，探索神秘的星球，解开种种谜题，并在此过程中与外星文明建立独特的羁绊。

4591900.title: Cosmic Crusher Demo
4591900.short_description: 简短的增量太空游戏，摧毁小行星。使用大量武器采矿小行星，通过庞大的技能树提升技能，并保卫太阳系免受敌对外星舰队的侵袭。你能走多远？

4764380.title: SLOWBURN Demo
4764380.short_description: Your kill count matters. Your life doesn't. Absorb, aim, kill. Hunt the "Gemstones" to find the truth about yourself in a post-apocalyptic city in this isometric action game.

4518150.title: S.A.N.D.Y. - Beach Cleaner Demo
4518150.short_description: 这是一款温馨、叙事且黑暗的游戏。在游戏中，你需清理海滩上的油污、分类垃圾，并拯救动物。结合了恐怖氛围的放松清理体验。

4699890.title: 7 DEADLY DEMONS
4699890.short_description: An incremental roguelite where you slay hordes of demons to level up. Click to collect powerful loot, develop your skills, master spells and attacks to test your true power! Are you capable of defeating the demon lords?

4566050.title: We Believe in No Gods (Demo)
4566050.short_description: 在一个仅剩坚定的唯物主义者占据的末世废土中，你是一位刚刚从永恒死寂中苏醒的虚弱神明。倾听废墟中幸存者的祈祷，赐下神迹或冷眼旁观。榨取信仰以维持生存，引导凡人的思想，并在善恶的交织中，决定这片“没有神的大陆”的最终命运。

4502630.title: In Silent Walls : Origines Demo
4502630.short_description: A first-person psychological horror demo. Explore a supposedly haunted place, use your flashlight and Ghost Box, collect clues, and uncover what is hiding behind the walls.

4591950.title: Marbs: Deluxe Demo
4591950.short_description: Marbs: Deluxe is a casual puzzle game where you link colourful Marbs to rack up huge combos, equip game-changing modifiers and score big! Give the demo a go with "Classic" mode and a limited "Deluxe" mode with 22 Marbifiers to play around with!

4776780.title: What The Dog Remembers Demo
4776780.short_description: 《What The Dog Remembers》Demo版，一款复古风格的心理恐怖游戏。在密闭的拖车中度过固定种子的七夜生存挑战。发现打破现实的异常现象并报告你的发现。同一晚两次错误判断即游戏结束。

4716620.title: Totoball 2
4716620.short_description: Fast-paced arcade foosball with skill shots, powerful kicks and competitive matches. Master the rods, score incredible goals and become the champion in Totoball 2.

4799640.title: DVD Dealer Simulator Prologue
4799640.short_description: Build and manage your own DVD game store in DVD Dealer Simulator. Buy, sell, and trade game discs, expand your inventory, upgrade your shop, and move to bigger locations as your business grows. Turn a small store into a thriving gaming retail empire.

4615080.title: Hypnagogia 壊れた夢 Broken Dreams: Demo
4615080.short_description: Hypnagogia: Broken Dreams is a surreal, first-person exploration game where you traverse various dream vignettes, interact with colorful characters, solve puzzles, and do some light platforming. In the demo, you'll experience the Dream Factory and Junk City worlds.

4677730.title: Maelor The Robot: Going Rogue Demo
4677730.short_description: Flip gravity on the fly, master a multi-stage jetpack, slingshot across massive gaps, and use weapon recoil to launch yourself through chaotic levels. Evolve your arsenal through use, fight aggressive enemies, and turn the environment itself into a weapon in this high-mobility sci-fi adventure.

4757260.title: Leapin Lads Demo
4757260.short_description: 《跳跳小童》是一款内容丰富、采用随机生成技术的双键街机游戏。只需使用单格跳或双格跳两种操作，就能在无穷无尽的挑战洪流中寻找自己的节奏与手感，探索究竟能抵达多远的前方。

4697320.title: Veilbreak
4697320.short_description: A story-driven dark fantasy JRPG with strategic turn-based combat and character progression. Explore a fractured world, seal deadly rifts, battle otherworldly creatures, and uncover why something beyond the Veil is hunting you.

4734440.title: City of Atlantis Demo
4734440.short_description: City of Atlantis 是一款生存城市建造游戏。你将重建神话中的亚特兰蒂斯，管理脆弱的经济，为人民的生存而战。建造、扩张，保护市民免受灾难侵袭，并面对古老诸神的怒火。

4791470.title: Cozy Archivist Simulator Demo
4791470.short_description: A first-person archive work simulator. Sort through boxes of documents, arrange files on the shelves, and bring order to the archive by following its filing rules. Handle stacks of records, keep each section organized, and enjoy the satisfying process of restoring order step by step.

4587030.title: Founders Save The World
4587030.short_description: Save The World! Bullet-heaven roguelite where absurd founder archetypes defeat world problems through hunger, healthcare, and energy crises. Draft ridiculous weapons, evolve chaotic synergies, and save the world!

4581690.title: MEGAKO☆PUNCH! Demo
4581690.short_description: “MEGAKO☆PUNCHI!” is a fast-paced deck-building roguelite! Smash through hordes of overflowing monsters with your ultimate techniques and make your way back home!

4657380.title: Tear Them All Demo
4657380.short_description: Tear through waves of doodle enemies with your pencil. Sharpen your weapon, balance melee and ranged combat, and survive the chaos in this fast-paced arena shooter.

4569870.title: Hakoniwa Electric Demo
4569870.short_description: "Hakoniwa Electric" is a cute relaxing puzzle game. Explore adorable isometric stages, solve puzzles, and light them up. Why not spend a leisurely year as Akari, who's taken over grandpa's electronics shop, helping with the monthly troubles from the townsfolk?

4690870.title: Dice Carnival Demo
4690870.short_description: 《骰子嘉年华》是一款roguelike得分追逐游戏，你将掷骰、存入并连击骰子打出爆炸性组合。收集强大的代币，选择你的旅程，击败章节首领，将你的分数推向极限。

1902940.title: Snacktorio《异食工厂》
1902940.short_description: 《异食工厂》 是一款工厂烹饪自动化游戏，需要你建造食品生产线，不断扩大生产规模，喂饱即将吞噬世界的巨兽。经营庞大的烹饪工厂，管控稀奇古怪的食材，一边满足怪物的食欲，一边逐渐了解它们胃口大增的原因......

4429870.title: There's Nothing Down There
4429870.short_description: There's Nothing Down There is a short undersea horror exploration game. Descend into a sinkhole at the bottom of the ocean and discover the remains of a lost, yet not dead, civilization.

438570.title: Age After Age Demo
438570.short_description: Age After Age. Build a thriving settlement, shape society across multiple eras, and dominate a living world economy. Choose your path - classic history, Steampunk, Gothic, and more in a deep city-building strategy with evolving logistics, citizen classes, diplomacy, and research.

3724430.title: Misha's Story
3724430.short_description: A pixel art story platformer game that blends classic gameplay with heartfelt storytelling. Jump, explore, and uncover secrets in a charming retro world where every challenge brings you closer to the characters and the mysteries they hold.

3989640.title: A Kobold Story : Trenchcoat Adventurer
3989640.short_description: Join three hungry Kobolds (and several Trenchcoats) in a hand-drawn, classical dungeon-crawling adventure to be Great Heroes - but mostly to find Shiny Things and Eat Good Food!

4143100.title: Fish & Hike
4143100.short_description: 扮演柴犬医生希伯森。钓鱼、探索荒野小径，并与友好的怪物战斗。帮助当地人，收集宝藏，揭开八湖谷的秘密。你能钓到4条传说中的金鱼吗？

4432590.title: SGS Battle for: Gettysburg
4432590.short_description: 《SGS 葛底斯堡战役》重现了美国内战中最具标志性且伤亡最惨重的这场为期三天的战役。1863年7月1日至3日，在宾夕法尼亚州，由罗伯特•E•李指挥的南方联盟北弗吉尼亚军试图迂回包抄并歼灭由米德将军率领的波托马克军。

3710840.title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
3710840.short_description: 猜猜谁回来了——而且比以往更加闪亮！House Flipper Remastered Collection让你成为一支人的装修团队。清理、建造、装饰并转售赚取利润！现在拥有更出色的画面效果、语音配音，所有扩展内容整合于一个工具箱中，并在本版本中加入了充满真挚情感的全新内容。是时候开始翻新大业了！

4447880.title: What Happened At Sugar Hill?
4447880.short_description: A First Person Horror Walking Simulator with other Simulator elements set in a fictional town called Sugar Hill. Play as various characters trying to unravel the mystery of What Happened At Sugar Hill.

4516280.title: Kamikaze Survivors Demo
4516280.short_description: Survive waves of kamikaze attackers as battleships from the World Wars of last century to the present in this turret-based Roguelite. Gain equipment from underway replenishment and pick up admirals from history to increase the power of your ship.

4632260.title: Goblins for Good Demo
4632260.short_description: A short incremental game about growing a goblin army, merging them into massive units, and unleashing comedic, wholesome chaos — all while supporting real-world good. 90% of profits are donated to charity, and players vote in-game for which charity they want their money to support.

4787790.title: Glowy Demo
4787790.short_description: Glowy is a minimal yet atmospheric puzzle experience where light is both your only guide, and your greatest fear. In this journey through a mind trapped between light and darkness, you’ll help a fragile being rediscover who they truly are.

4702340.title: False Hero Demo
4702340.short_description: 《伪英雄》是一款快节奏的类魂冒险游戏，你可以盗取敌人的攻击并将其串联成致命连招。探索腐败蔓延的诸神之地，在充满挑战的头目战中真正考验你的战斗技能。你会选择为诸神而战，抑或成为死魔的使徒？

4329250.title: Die Severed Demo
4329250.short_description: Die Severed is a gambling roguelike where each lost round costs you one finger. Stack your dice bag with weighted dice, collect run defining abilities, and push your luck to pay your debt and walk out in one piece. More or less.

4544110.title: Project Vanguard
4544110.short_description: A neon-drenched arcade shooter. Pilot your ship, obliterate endless waves, collect upgrades, and survive bosses that will test everything you've got.

3618850.title: Pronoun Palace
3618850.short_description: Pronoun Palace is a word-spelling roguelike set in a dystopian future where the government has taken your pronouns. Use spells to manipulate letter tiles, catch fish, and abuse amphetamines to defeat the Party and get your pronouns back!

4708970.title: Friendly Steps Demo
4708970.short_description: A physics-based 1-4 player co-op disaster about getting home after a wild night out. It was a fun night! Now grab your buddies and walk home. IF YOU REMEMBER HOW.

3265290.title: Swan Song
3265290.short_description: 《Swan Song》是一款温馨的解谜游戏，邀请你放慢脚步，聆听音乐，并沉浸于思考之中。游戏设定在一个充满魔力的音乐盒内部，其中每个谜题都需要玩家将音符放置在音阶上。当你转动发条时，乐曲随之响起，激活平台并开启前进的路径，引导小天鹅安全抵达终点。

2753000.title: GOALS
2753000.short_description: GOALS是一款快节奏、反应灵敏的足球游戏，为纯粹技术、真实竞技和全球玩家社区而生。玩法至上，免费畅玩，跨平台联机，每位球员都独一无二。没有借口——只有足球！

4475610.title: Galdromeda Demo
4475610.short_description: Turn-based RPG with space combat. Assemble a crew, each having their own unique abilities, level up, upgrade your ship and your crew's abilities, collect new outfits for your crew.

4768450.title: Zombies & Battery Demo
4768450.short_description: A sound-driven co-op survival game for up to 4 players. Sneak past zombies that hunt by sound, manage hunger and injuries, scavenge supplies, and repair a vehicle to escape. Every action makes noise, and every run takes place in a procedurally generated map.

4787660.title: Waste No Space Demo
4787660.short_description: Explore space, find hidden objects and beat your high score - while trying not to drown in the nuclear waste you produce! Research technology, manage your resources and achieve extra goodies with galactic events!

3682920.title: Chicken Coop Invaders
3682920.short_description: Save the chickens! Help Lucas defend the chickens against a ruthless alien attack in this frantic FPS game with Tower Defense elements! Battle through dozens of levels, make allies, buy and upgrade items!

4681220.title: Kitty Witchy Demo
4681220.short_description: A little lost witch, a magical cat, and a world full of secrets. Kitty Witchy is a 3D narrative puzzle adventure game. Join the witch and solve puzzles with the help of her cat, uncover the secrets of this universe, and find the way back home.

4778620.title: ARCWATT: Power Empire Demo
4778620.short_description: Plan, power, and protect a city that runs on the grid you build. Place producers, balance demand, survive storms and surges.

4797070.title: CLEARANCE: S-7 Demo
4797070.short_description: November 1989, Czechoslovakia. As a secret-police officer you descend into the hidden facility Š-7, ordered to burn the archives and silence the witnesses. But no one down there is still alive — only corpses, tapes, and things that used to be people. A retro survival horror about guilt and memory.

4641420.title: Keeper's Vigil
4641420.short_description: As the Harbinger, you are the only Keeper who can cast spells. Stop a necromantic plague, uncover an Elven conspiracy, and decide the fate of a dying world! A text-based fantasy novel, 193,000 words and hundreds of choices, without graphics or sound effects."

4739160.title: Keeper's Vigil Demo
4739160.short_description: As the Harbinger, you are the only Keeper who can cast spells. Stop a necromantic plague, uncover an Elven conspiracy, and decide the fate of a dying world! A text-based fantasy novel, 193,000 words and hundreds of choices, without graphics or sound effects."

4567970.title: Wellspring
4567970.short_description: Master your timing and precision in this relentless wave survival game. Hone your skills and discover your style as you beat back the assault. Unlock powerful upgrades that compliment and enhance your abilities. Can you make it to round 40?

4793570.title: Ecosystem Architect Demo
4793570.short_description: In Ecosystem Architect, build the ecosystem of your dreams and let your imagination run wild. With a vast selection of foliage, animals, and prehistoric creatures, mix-and-match to your heart's content and watch your environment come to life as they interact in an in-depth simulation.

4719910.title: Snap the Cat Demo
4719910.short_description: 一款关于拍摄猫咪照片的简增量游戏。升级你的账号，解锁新猫咪，并为它们拍照，让全世界的粉丝都关注你！

4757550.title: GAP OR DIE Demo
4757550.short_description: 只有一个规则：完成跳跃。全力加速，冲向断崖，在这款高风险无尽竞速游戏中尽可能存活更久。升级你的车辆，看看在一切彻底失控之前你能走多远。

4154720.title: The Color Kitnapper
4154720.short_description: In a town filled with cats, all the colors have been kitnapped! Luckily, you Mr. Detective, are on the case! Uncover the stories of the towncats and catch the Color Kitnapper! The Color Kitnapper is a short and sweet story game with an ASCII look, set in a town of adorable cats!

4772120.title: How to Grow Your Sausage Demo
4772120.short_description: Every [key]stroke makes your sausage bigger. Let it sit in the corner of your screen and watch it grow while you use your computer. Feed it different meats, upgrade your butcher, and see the magic happen. Have you ever dreamed of growing your sausage? Now it’s finally possible!

4418420.title: OUTBLAST
4418420.short_description: OUTBLAST is a fast and frantic arcade shooter for flatscreen and VR. You are piloting interceptor C11-28. Your objective: destroy infected constructs, collect data particles, and purge the system before total collapse.

4615270.title: Interstitial Demo
4615270.short_description: Interstitial is a first-person psychological horror game that dives into the unease of liminal spaces, blending environmental storytelling, exploration-driven gameplay, and slow-burning dread to create an experience where the world itself becomes the threat.

3390280.title: Pay 2 Win: The World is Mine
3390280.short_description: 在这款增量策略卡组构筑游戏中经营属于你的游戏工作室。打造强力连招，产生惊人的数值。发现稀有设施、传说物品与升级。选择你的道路，塑造剧情，最终掌控世界。

4487480.title: 蜘蛛间谍：特工8号演示
4487480.short_description: 化身机器蜘蛛超级间谍8号特工，全力拯救世界！走进由英国电影学院奖获奖工作室Sumo Digital打造的全新合家欢冒险世界，爬遍墙壁、天花板和地板，巧用内置小工具解开趣味场景谜题。

4694500.title: Endless Rails Demo
4694500.short_description: 《Endless Rails》是一款俯视角的"弹幕生存肉鸽"。你将操控无人机，粉碎成群的怪物，守护那列穿行荒野的列车。

3916860.title: The Brewline
3916860.short_description: 在这款剧情驱动的单人模拟游戏中，进入私酒的世界！ 种植作物，酿造酒水，与顾客建立联系，并用你自己的品牌装瓶。 揭开你哥哥被捕的真相，完成独特任务，建立你的地下帝国。

4772170.title: Litany Demo
4772170.short_description: Litany 是一款 Roguelike 卡牌构筑游戏。你将操控多个单位，打造高度协同的队伍，触发意料之外的效果。选择角色，开启卡包，升级卡牌，构筑能打破数值规则的强大组合！

4745430.title: Spikes&Traps
4745430.short_description: A brutal 2D action platformer filled with deadly spikes, traps and enemies. Master movement, combat and skills to survive. Every level is a new challenge. Do you have what it takes?

3440260.title: Alruna: End of History
3440260.short_description: Alruna; now in wide-screen! A different kind of Metroidvania, a tour-de-force of game design, with world-class temples and dungeons. Dead men yearn for Heaven, but Elysium remains out of their grasp.

4754320.title: Lucky Punk Demo
4754320.short_description: 我们把Roguelike牌组构筑浓缩成了一个简单选择：抽牌，还是停手。在这个生机勃勃的末日世界里赌一把，逆转概率。收集物资，建设你的社区。在鲜活又荒诞的生态反乌托邦中活下去，活得更好……干脆不活。1%的机会，100%的选择。你觉得自己够走运吗，朋克？

4439740.title: Mechs V Kaijus 2 Demo
4439740.short_description: Mechs V Kaijus 2 is an Hybrid Tower/Base defense, with army vs army (tug of war style) tactics. From the cockpit of a mech, to build a huge base with Reactors, Mines and all type of tower army factories and super weapons.

4664660.title: RPG:护火者
4664660.short_description: 护火者，守护火种，收获火焰。 阅读书籍，寻求故事和真相。与人交流，给予帮助和治疗。做出抉择，迎接残喘或罪孽。

4803770.title: Hellsino Pokerlike Demo
4803770.short_description: Stop playing blind luck. This is tactical grid combat. Deploy cards onto a ruthless 5x3 board to trigger overlapping horizontal and vertical sets. Master the Nexus Multiplier to unleash massive triple damage combos, outsmart a rigged house, and save your soul from absolute bankruptcy.

4792180.title: Desktop Claw Master Demo
4792180.short_description: 当你工作或享受游戏的时候，Graboo会在屏幕的一角，静静地抓起娃娃朋友们。 请为孤单的Graboo送上温暖的朋友吧！

4764660.title: Merge Mutants Demo
4764660.short_description: Merge Mutants 是一款快节奏俯视角生存射击游戏，敌对研究员想把你永远关在实验室里。将他们的残骸转化为治疗、能力和忠诚的突变体，再把相同单位融合成更庞大、更强大的存在。逃出实验室，或者死在路上。

3581860.title: Moonbrella Demo
3581860.short_description: 一款以深度移动技能和无跳跃按键为特色的2D类银河恶魔城平台跳跃游戏。升级你的雨伞，探索一颗被遗弃的星球，并一路登上月球。

4397060.title: Sitting Ducks
4397060.short_description: A chaotic co-op armageddon game where you build ridiculous structures to survive world-ending disasters with sticky hands, physics chaos & friends who probably won’t save you. Don´t be a Sitting Duck!

3431630.title: AHAPIKA – Heroic Agency
3431630.short_description: What is it, bullet heaven or bullet hell? Better! It's a "bullet novella"! Hordes of enemies, invincible heroes, capricious gods, and heroic labors. Ancient Greek myths in the game authors' irreverent retelling. All of this awaits you in Ahapika.

4157170.title: Sports Card Shop Simulator (球星卡牌店模拟器)
4157170.short_description: 开启卡包，搜寻稀有卡牌，打造最棒的球星卡牌店。寻找全息卡、签名卡以及限量编号卡，满足您的收藏欲望。设计自定义卡牌，享受从全新卡包中亲手抽中自己杰作的快感！

4752660.title: Throttle Trace Demo
4752660.short_description: 当轨道赛车遇上模拟竞速。你仅需油门和刹车，即可控制抓地力、时机和竞速策略。挑战极限，智胜对手，在激烈的竞赛中争夺每一个弯道。

4752560.title: TFC2: Collapse of the Bronze Age Demo
4752560.short_description: 带领你的小队人马踏上穿越古代世界的伟大旅程，在这款故事驱动的即时战略游戏中，保护家人和朋友比征服更重要。

4780590.title: Zombie Ship Demo
4780590.short_description: A cinematic horror adventure where you battle undead horrors aboard a cursed warship. Explore, fight, and survive as the ocean itself turns against you in this atmospheric, story-driven experience.

4693180.title: 钟馗传试玩版
4693180.short_description: 化身中国传奇驱邪天师钟馗！ 驰骋沙场横扫群妖，收服妖怪之魂化身其形，并借其力反制强敌。踏入充斥古老秘法的玄幻天地，揭开幽冥地府尘封秘事，开启全新动作角色扮演之旅。

4711820.title: Tyrants Must Fall Demo
4711820.short_description: Build your rebel army and lead them to victory over the Tyrant King in this turn-based strategic roguelike. Improve your leader's skills, unlock new units, and hone your battlefield strategy as you march towards your fate as the Hero of Destiny.

4711540.title: GameZone Demo
4711540.short_description: 最多支持 4 名玩家，从一家小而无名的游戏店成长为全城最大的游戏殿堂！在店内销售游戏商品、提升声誉，并不断壮大你的事业！

4564630.title: Minkle's Masks of Mayhem
4564630.short_description: A cosy 2.5D micro management game, situated in a magical fantasy universe. Play as Minkle, and help him arrive safely at his destination by keeping his troublesome masks at bay.

4713760.title: STROIDZ!
4713760.short_description: Clear the asteroid field before the Corpos hunt you down with their AI weaponry!

4109330.title: BunkerZ Demo
4109330.short_description: Defend your bunker from waves of claymation-inspired zombies in this stylized survival shooter. Buy weapons, use explosives, place defenses, and survive the horde.

4604900.title: HEAVYDELIC Demo
4604900.short_description: HEAVYDELIC is a 2D Slavic Synthpunk Platformer broadcasting on dead frequencies. Synthetic psychedelia, comic art, VHS tapes, analog ruins & robots resurrected from Slavic mythology. Every asset is manually drawn by Eniac. Signal lost. Game found.

3144230.title: Modern Warships
3144230.short_description: 《Modern Warships》是一款关于现代军事载具的在线动作游戏。立即加入，用侦察机探查敌情，用巡洋舰发射制导导弹，用潜艇偷袭水面船只，用喷气式战斗机和直升机掩护盟军舰队。

4656170.title: Just Dying Demo
4656170.short_description: 一款 2D 幸存者 Roguelite 游戏。扮演搞怪主播，拯救粉丝以防失业。解锁独特角色、堆叠强力符文、化身为人间凶器，释放极致混沌。学习。死亡。再来一次。

4751350.title: Dyno Burst: Bubble Shooter
4751350.short_description: 发射、配对、消除彩色恐龙蛋，在经典泡泡龙益智中连锁爆破。

4674690.title: GlyphBound Demo
4674690.short_description: "Think Fast. Shoot Faster." A high-speed puzzle-action roguelike set in ruins where magic and machinery coexist. Hack the rusty security with logic (Nonograms), charge your energy, and blast through the depths with your trusty Glyph Buddy.

4784910.title: Hell Cleaners Demo
4784910.short_description: A first-person automation game set in hell. Suck up limbs, feed bodies into the Grinder, fuel your Purifier, and deploy Doombas to build a self-sustaining cleaning operation that slowly reclaims corrupted territory from hells rot.

4729020.title: Les jeux du cycle
4729020.short_description: Les Jeux du Cycle 将你的 Bluetooth FTMS 训练台变成骑行派对游戏：通过 25+ 个迷你游戏冲刺、躲避、组队、添加机器人并挑战好友。

4670830.title: Apex Complex Demo
4670830.short_description: You work the night shift. Tonight, Patricia isn't well, she's had a meltdown and taken everything on the company's net along with her. Make your way through the evolving complex facility, reach the core and shut her down, before she shuts you down!

4577800.title: Zero Sum Demo
4577800.short_description: 手绘双摇杆类Rogue游戏。每颗子弹都是方程，每个敌人都是数字。全 7 种运算符。10 种射击模式。3 个 Boss。3 种难度。把它们全部归零。没有血条，只有赤裸的算术暴力。数学课你挂了。数学可没忘。

4804060.title: MDT: Make it or Die Trying Demo
4804060.short_description: MDT is a fast-paced side-scroller shooter filled with violence and dread. You don't really know why, but you keep going through hordes of humanoid, and not so much, enemies that inhabit this world. A world that seems both dead and alive at the same time. What for? - It's up to you to decide.

4639060.title: 掷剑者 示範版本
4639060.short_description: Throw swords to fight in this roguelite chain-action game. Weapons bounce off walls and enemies, chaining hits from one foe to another. Build damage bonuses with every chain and dive deeper into ever-changing dungeons while collecting swords, spears, axes, staves, shields, and more.

4672040.title: Pandora's Sack Demo
4672040.short_description: Pandora's Sack is a deck builder roguelike auto battler where the players use a slot machine system to create a ridiculously silly, destructive army to fight Pandora's minions.

4729750.title: 魔律物语-韦德霍尔克学院 Demo
4729750.short_description: 《魔律物语-韦德霍尔克学院》是一款以魔法学院为主舞台，力图带来经典JRPG体验的的动作RPG。你将扮演一名入学“韦德霍尔克学院”的新生，体验丰富多彩的校园生活、探索魔法之力的奥秘，最终成为一名强大的魔法师。可与在校期间结识的伙伴们一同修习课程、挑战课题、完成任务，培养感情，以及探索神秘莫测的“伽罗迪亚”——四季并存之岛，揭开世界尘封千年的真相，面对即将到来的危机……
developers: 杭州达图雷网络科技有限公司
publishers: 杭州达图雷网络科技有限公司

4487160.title: Marshmallow Marvin: Grimvault
4487160.short_description: Marshmallow Marvin: Grimvault is a challenging 2D pixel art platformer where you guide Marvin through cursed vaults and haunted tombs, avoiding deadly traps, dodging automated turrets, collecting coins, and mastering precision platforming to uncover ancient secrets and survive the Grimvault.

4487140.title: Marshmallow Marvin: Templestone
4487140.short_description: Marshmallow Marvin: Templestone is a challenging 2D pixel art platformer where you guide Marvin through trap filled ancient ruins, avoiding deadly spikes, dodging automated turrets, and mastering precision platforming to reach the exit.

4798800.title: Mouseburg: Pursuit of Power Demo
4798800.short_description: Mouseburg is a turn-based resource management game where you compete to become the most influential tycoon. Buy real estate, acquire company stock, invest in city projects, and gain influence to become the most powerful mouse in the city!

4379180.title: Drift
4379180.short_description: 一个宁静、如梦般的探索体验，设定在一个程序生成的世界中，变化的景观与静谧的结构在迷雾中浮现。

4695890.title: Heroes' Heaven
4695890.short_description: Assemble a party of heroes and survive endless monster hordes. Equip them, level their skills, and unleash devastating weapon evolutions — all without lifting a finger to aim. A retro-RPG bullet heaven for 1–∞ runs.

4311130.title: 怪奇餐厅 试玩版
4311130.short_description: 在怪奇的宇宙中经营一家属于你的餐厅！亲自切菜备料，为神明烹饪菜品；部署高效的机器人员工，搭建自动化产线；灵活运用各种Build，抓住神的胃。最终，你只需运筹帷幄，让机器人接管餐厅的工作，轻松赚取巨额财富，打造宇宙第一的餐厅！温馨提示：暴躁的客人会攻击餐厅设施，而你的厨刀不只能用来切菜…

4787750.title: Ratatouille Builder Demo
4787750.short_description: In this cooking roguelike, inspired by many deckbuilder games, set up your garden to grow fresh vegetables and serve delicious dishes every day in your restaurant! Discover new recipes, exploit synergies, and learn your customers' favorite dishes!

4770760.title: 反射魔女 Demo
4770760.short_description: 「反射魔女」是一款以独特的玩法重新诠释打砖块的Roguelike游戏。透过画线创造反射板，玩家能掌控并强化魔法球，同时阻挡魔物的攻击。与魔女一同踏上探索法术的冒险之旅吧！

4710400.title: Deep Sea Fish: Hidden World
4710400.short_description: 一款简短的渐进式钓鱼小游戏。在这里，你将通过捕鱼、赚取金币并解锁强大的升级，来一步步探索神秘的深海。

4148130.title: Stickcross Classic
4148130.short_description: To play, move the sticks. Where three sticks cross, stones will fall. To win, clear the bowl.

4792400.title: Goblin museum Demo
4792400.short_description: A chaotic co-op extraction heist game where you play as goblins running a museum. Go on dangerous illegal expeditions to find artifacts for your collection. Scan, dig, loot, and RUN! Outsmart the police, fend off thieves, and get everyone onto the pickup helicopter magnet before time runs out.

4748990.title: Riftaway Demo
4748990.short_description: Riftaway is an NDS/N64-inspired 3D platformer in which you help a young witch recover her lost memories in an outter-space-like world known as... the Riftaway! Collect memory-refreshing crystals and meet unique personalities in a world where even gravity is broken.

4678550.title: 豹豹鲨鱼日记 Demo
4678550.short_description: 豹豹鲨鱼日记是一款拥有可爱手绘画风的模拟经营类游戏。你将扮演浅粉色糯米团海豹——豹豹，来制作各式各样的食物，经营小岛食堂，种植素材，从而完成游戏内的简单挑战，推进剧情发展，感受一个个在小岛上发生的温暖故事。无论是食物还是食堂，都拥有等级和特性系统。通过制作和经营提升等级，解锁食谱、称号、关键道具和特性。特性通过不同组合方式，还能够获得强力增益，而如何组合，完全取决于你的游玩思路。
developers: 鲨乘豹工作室 Atelier Seal&Shark
publishers: 鲨乘豹工作室 Atelier Seal&Shark

4762970.title: Spin Tactics Demo
4762970.short_description: SpinTactics is a tactical slot-machine roguelike built on real decisions. Spend limited Actions, craft powerful combos, stack rune synergies, and push your luck against escalating bosses.

4588250.title: FiresOut! Demo
4588250.short_description: FiresOut! 是一款合作向灭火游戏。你将扮演工资不高、责任很大的动物消防实习生，用马桶里的金鱼灭火、救人，顺便把现场搞得一团乱。问题不大...应该吧...吧...

4692850.title: Y: Solo Mod Simulator Demo
4692850.short_description: You are the only moderator of a social media platform. Deal with troublemakers and increase the platform’s value so you can one day sell it to a wealthy mogul.

4696160.title: Aircraft Dispatcher: Ground Operations Demo
4696160.short_description: Take control of airline operations from the ground up. Flights depend on your judgment — from managing aircraft, equipment, and maintenance schedules to overseeing ground crews, tugs, and marshals. Coordinate taxiway movements and ensure every aircraft reaches its gate or runway safely and on time.

4696730.title: The Trials - Chapter Two Demo
4696730.short_description: The Demo for The Trials - Chapter Two is its own self-contained story which is a prequel to Chapter Two, containing the same features found in the main game.

4587340.title: Guild of Three : Demo
4587340.short_description: Guild of Three 是一款同时操控3名角色与3套牌组的队伍制回合制卡组构筑 RPG。组合不同职业，在伙伴之间传递卡牌，并布置前后排站位，打造属于你的队伍战术。

4801460.title: Erimos: Blood and Dust Demo
4801460.short_description: A dark fantasy soulslike set in a cursed underworld where no soul rests. Recover your shattered soul, master brutal combat, and face the truth of who you were.

4778230.title: Pop! Pachinko Demo
