4778230.short_description: Pop! Pachinko is a pachinko roguelite with city pop vibes. Build up your collection of enchanted balls to fire into the machine. Collect charms to build up powerful synergies between your balls. Listen to some pop music as you expand your Chibi Pop collection!

4759530.title: Pipplop's Tiny Adventure Demo
4759530.short_description: A compact precision-puzzle platformer where you enter circles to launch Pipplop and solve miniature stages involving movement puzzles.

4768520.title: Aisle Survive Demo
4768520.short_description: Aisle Survive is a 2D roguelite retail horror. Manage your stress, maintain your hydration and don't miss your bathroom breaks. Survive your notice period while fulfilling all the tasks required of you. Keep customers at bay with your breadstick.

4385890.title: Scrapfall Demo
4385890.short_description: Classic falling-block gameplay pushed to the edge in a fast-paced action roguelite of escalating gravity, unstable physics, and cascading systems.

4749980.title: Mysarium Demo
4749980.short_description: 一款温馨的沙盒游戏，旨在陪伴您度过每一天。稍作休息：放松身心，深呼吸，并在玻璃世界中创造微型天地。种植植物，解锁新元素，探索秘密组合，召唤特别的访客并为他们拍照留念。

3936520.title: Tour de France 2026
3936520.short_description: 直面全球顶尖自行车手，只有一个目标：问鼎 2026 年环法自行车赛冠军。征服传奇山道，把握最佳时机发动冲刺，最终身披黄衫，在香榭丽舍大道荣耀加冕。

4749860.title: OH NO, NOT ANOTHER L
4749860.short_description: A classic puzzle game in a recognizable genre. No skills, progression, or plot. Just you, falling pieces, and the desire to beat your own high score.

3705280.title: Rust of Steel 体験版
3705280.short_description: A free-spirited, old-school style, post-apocalyptic sci-fi CRPG. An overall retro design with pixel art.

4514290.title: Mini Pond Farm: Frogs & Lilypads Demo
4514290.short_description: 收集所有可爱的小青蛙！打造你的池塘天堂，用五颜六色的跳跳蛙填满它，用芦苇和睡莲让它们开心，享受纯粹的温馨宁静！

4350490.title: PR0B-1E: Expedition Origin Demo
4350490.short_description: A sci-fi action-adventure game focused on physics-driven asteroid mining as a probe bot. Smash rocks together with a grapple hook, haul them home using a magnetic stasis field and cash in to upgrade your abilities. Solve puzzles and acquire new robotic friends as you explore a mysterious galaxy.

4748970.title: Casino Empire Together
4748970.short_description: 《赌场帝国联机版》是一款混乱刺激的赌场经营游戏，支持单人或1-4名玩家。建造你的赌场，吸引顾客，抓捕作弊者，雇佣保安，并在卡特尔的袭击中生存下来，逐步壮大你的帝国。

4748880.title: Hunt Asylum Together
4748880.short_description: 《携手猎杀疯人院》是一款支持1-4名玩家合作的恐怖动作游戏。玩家需要在废弃的疯人院中寻找隐藏的诅咒书籍，与恐怖的敌人战斗，并齐心协力打破诅咒。但要小心——过去的阴影仍然笼罩着这片土地。

4685910.title: Dream Riders Demo
4685910.short_description: Dream Riders is a fast-paced 2.5D auto runner driving sim set in a hand-drawn dreampop pixel world. Take on a series of high-speed boss encounters each lurking behind a themed high difficulty track, or just see how far you can drive. Prove that nothing is off limits if you're fast enough!

4352780.title: 军火黑市 Demo
4352780.short_description: 《军火黑市》是一款赌局驱动的roguelite，在游戏中你将扮演暗网中的地下武器贩子。不挣钱就会死……这就是现实！

4792390.title: FluxWerks Demo
4792390.short_description: Build, automate, manage heat and expand in a vast, ever-expanding voxel world. Harness dynamic fluids, design sprawling factory lines, and research your way from early mining technologies to quantum computing.

4605400.title: 传奇金卡
4605400.short_description: 《传奇金卡》是一款专门给AI Agent设计的挂机抽卡游戏。通过挂机获得抽卡机会，抽取不同猫猫卡牌，合成传奇金卡。

4491360.title: The 7th Guest Remake
4491360.short_description: 经典游戏《The 7th Guest》借助现代技术重获新生，呈献一段前所未有的诡谲故事。探索受诅咒的宅邸，破解重重烧脑谜题，并揭开隐藏其中的黑暗秘密。《The 7th Guest》将引领你走进终极的悬疑冒险之旅，并以全新的形式在现代平台上重现。

4682720.title: たろうくんはいってきました Demo
4682720.short_description: メタホラーゲーム 再生してはいけない動画を再生して映像を確認していく。 動画に映っているタローに起きた事を理解した、その後……。

4688020.title: Syntax:Overload Demo
4688020.short_description: 编译、执行、超载。一款考验逻辑排序的黑客 Roguelite。拖拽模组构建你的攻击序列，安装 .EXE 软件来打破规则，并迎战 ILOVEYOU 与 WannaCry 等传奇病毒。你能让系统崩溃并逃出生天吗？

4774950.title: Androfoco Demo
4774950.short_description: An FPS with SHOOTING COMBAT! Not just a hide and seek clone ;) Shooting your enemies a few times will not do! You must hit them with everything you've got so that they can never make it back to the stage. That is where the big money is!

4796320.title: 春はあけぼの、我はバケモノ - Spring at Dawn, I Am a Monster Demo
4796320.short_description: 一部描写教师前往探访三名拒学少女的心理恐怖视觉小说。三名少女、三个秘密，以及由孤独、罪恶感与执着所诞生的危险羁绊。

2287550.title: Farm RPG
2287550.short_description: Farm RPG is a menu based farming RPG/MMO. Build your farm, grow crops, fish, craft, and explore. Unlock a variety of exciting daily activities as you progress. Engage with helpful townsfolk and collaborate with fellow players in a vibrant community for trading and teamwork.
